Fox5 Atlanta: Georgia set to purge nearly half-million inactive voters this summer| | | These purges could disenfranchise people with unreliable mail delivery, those who have lost their homes, and other legitimate registered voters. Voters of color, those in underserved communities, and residents of rural areas are most at risk. And you can bet that every other suppressive state wants to follow Georgia's lead. | | Team: **Another 500,000 Georgians are at risk of having their voter registration “purged” this summer.** **What happens?** Partisan election officials conduct mass registered voter removals, as required by recent Georgia voter suppression laws -- laws that include limits on mail-in ballots, the criminalization of giving out water or food to voters waiting in line, and so much more. **T****hese purges disenfranchise legitimate eligible voters who haven’t moved or had other changes to their voter registration status**. Multiple stories written by the _Atlanta Journal-Constitution_ in recent years have highlighted wrongfully purged voters and show the evidence clearly. This comes after _groups based outside of Georgia_ brought mass challenges against almost 400,000 Georgia voters in recent election cycles. And that doesn't include the 92,000 additional challenges brought in Georgia by amateur "_voter fraud hunters_ " who believe the lies peddled by partisan activists trying to shake our faith in our elections and guarantee their party wins elections. [**Voter suppression is real, Team, both in Georgia and across the country. Help us push back on these cynical purges and voter challenges with $25 or whatever you can today to protect the right to vote nationwide >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109286460/550606002/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=sIO0IyvBISdpECBCL6xwKOnLApA+IWHMgq8YmjxBCZYAQkbEqkRxwSInfPmYkllIegvKQb5wgxRZCVL9IqBwLCDjji7+CfGWJ1KGcENNXxs=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4ZWY3MWRhLThkNDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IJz9f6A_-yCty1ExOImaBTofQjdizs949rFfPcW9TUk=&emci=a13eed21-3945-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e8ef71da-8d45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: Ryan Crosswell
subject: Honor, Courage, and Commitment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
My name is Ryan Crosswell, and today, I’m officially launching my campaign to represent Pennsylvania’s 7th District in Congress.
Donald Trump asked me to ignore the law. I said no.
Every citizen who cares about American democracy must have a line in the sand that cannot be crossed.
My name is Ryan Crosswell, and today, I’m officially launching my campaign to represent Pennsylvania’s 7th District in Congress — because Donald Trump crossed my line.
**[If Donald Trump has crossed your line, please consider splitting a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign to help me reach my Launch Day Digital Goal. Every dollar we raise sends a message to Donald Trump that this is our country, and we’re going to fight for it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89547?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89547?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h)**
I grew up in Pottsville, Pennsylvania. Motivated to serve because of 9/11, I joined the Marine Corps, where I learned the code of Honor, Courage, and Commitment.
I kept that code during my time as a federal prosecutor under Presidents Obama, Biden, and Trump.
I locked up child predators, took on drug traffickers, and took down corrupt politicians — until the day Donald Trump decided to weaponize the Department of Justice to go after his political opponents and let his friends off the hook.
He wanted the prosecutors in my section to drop a case against his political ally. He wanted me to break the code and ignore the law, and that’s something I would never do.
**So I said no and resigned from the Department of Justice — then, I fought back.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89547?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h)
I testified publicly in a congressional hearing about the threat Donald Trump’s agenda poses to our justice system, the integrity of the federal government, and our democracy itself.
I don’t have the deep pockets of the big corporations that are ripping us off while hardworking Pennsylvanians fight like hell just to get by, or the influence of the corrupt politicians who keep the game rigged against everyday Americans, or the power Trump has forcibly seized for himself.
But that won’t stop me from fighting back against him again — with Honor, Courage, and a Commitment to the real people and families of Pennsylvania’s 7th.
**[I’d be honored to have you by my side in this fight for the long haul. If you’re all in to flip the House blue and put a real check on Donald Trump’s power in 2026, I’m personally asking you to split a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89547?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89548?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89548?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89548?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89548?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89548?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89548?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89547?refcode=em20250609-8995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8995%2E614464%2En4yK1h)
---
Thank you.
Ryan Crosswell

**To stop Republican gerrymandering and make maps fair, we need to be relentless and strategic.**
That means planning ahead, directing our resources where they’re needed most, and being prepared to spring into action whenever a new threat to fair maps appears.
**What helps us be as strategic and effective as possible? Predictable funding** — the kind that comes from our hundreds of monthly donors who collectively pool critical resources that don’t just keep this work going, but allow us to accelerate our efforts when the situation demands it.
Knowing what our bottom line will look like next month, next quarter, or next year is critically important so we can make the best possible investments into the most important state-level fights for fair representation.
[**Start a monthly contribution today — even just a few dollars each month — that will provide a steady stream of resources to power our democracy-saving work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109286595/550606767/123784549?recurring=1&refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MonthlyAppeal1_email_20250609-NDRC-Tier1-MonthlyAppeal1_ctrl&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250609-NDRC-Tier1-MonthlyAppeal1_ctrl&utm_campaign=MonthlyAppeal1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjZWY3MWRhLThkNDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mlKyyrn4wAIDGJrwvuzvlWajbmWt4VhDzhm4whmdQk8=)
We know that giving monthly is a big ask, and it’s one we don’t make lightly — so please know that any contribution you can make today will make a big difference.
As always, thanks for all you do,
Team NDRC

clean_body: Start a monthly gift for fair maps | Hey Peter — If you are going to do one thing to stay in the fight for our democracy, here is by far the most effective way to do it: | = = = = = To stop Republican gerrymandering and make maps fair, we need to be relentless and strategic. That means planning ahead, directing our resources where they’re needed most, and being prepared to spring into action whenever a new threat to fair maps appears. What helps us be as strategic and effective as possible? Predictable funding — the kind that comes from our hundreds of monthly donors who collectively pool critical resources that don’t just keep this work going, but allow us to accelerate our efforts when the situation demands it. Knowing what our bottom line will look like next month, next quarter, or next year is critically important so we can make the best possible investments into the most important state-level fights for fair representation. = We know that giving monthly is a big ask, and it’s one we don’t make lightly — so please know that any contribution you can make today will make a big difference. As always, thanks for all you do, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Bryan
subject: June 9 Campaign Update
body:
Here Is An Update From Our Campaign

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=6efaae31de&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **June 9, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | | June is Dairy Month!
We have Dairy Breakfast stops scheduled across the First District this weekend.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=3d11f1a956&e=e907534017)
| Be sure to [**join us**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=fecd99ab07&e=e907534017) at a family farm to learn more about how farmers fuel our economy, and to enjoy a great breakfast with your family.
---
| [Find a Dairy Breakfast Here](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=88db5fa76d&e=e907534017)
---
|
# Putting American Workers First
---
| Last week, the House voted to pass several important pieces of legislation that put American workers and businesses first and eliminate fraud. These included:
[**H.R. 2966**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8e3778ee03&e=e907534017) , the _American Entrepreneurs First Act_ \- This bill requires the Small Business Administration (SBA) to require proof of citizenship and age verification when providing taxpayer loans to businesses.
[**H.R. 1804**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7242471fbd&e=e907534017) , the _Loan Agent Oversight Act_ \- This bill requires the SBA to provide greater transparency and accountability of its loan programs to Congress. This reform is critical to reducing fraud, as the SBA recently revealed that its loan programs had more than [**$335 million**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=b75b68d4cb&e=e907534017) in reported fraudulent spending.
This coming week, my colleagues and I will build on these important reforms that put Americans first with legislation addressing sanctuary cities and non-citizens voting in U.S. elections.
[**Stay tuned**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=1539496a63&e=e907534017) for more information on these important reforms later this week.
---
| [Follow for Updates Here](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8148f2bfcc&e=e907534017)
---
|
# Celebrating Our Volunteers

This week, the Kenosha County Republican Party will honor one of our outstanding volunteers - Pamela Mundling.
Pamela recently was awarded the **Wisconsin Republican Party’s Terry Kohler Award**. This award is given out to a volunteer whose effort promoting conservatives and conservative causes goes above and beyond.
Pamela has been a strong volunteer for the past 20 years spending time door knocking, marching in parades, working the polls, and more!
---
|
---
| Volunteers like Pamela help us keep **Wisconsin’s First District Red**.
For example, in 2018, we received 47.2% of the vote in Kenosha County and **LOST** the county by 2%, but still winning the race for WI-01. But thanks to the hard work of volunteers like Pamela, in 2024, we received 53.3% of the vote in Kenosha County and **WON** the county by 8.7%. We’ve seen a _**10.7% swing**_ in our direction in the last 6 years.
At the top of the ticket, in 2020, President Trump received 50.7% of the vote in Kenosha County and **WON** the county by 3.1%. But in 2024, President Trump received 52.3% of the vote in Kenosha County and **WON** the county by 6.2%. President Trump saw a _**3.09% swing**_**** in his direction over the last 4 years.
_**That increase is the biggest among Wisconsin’s most populous counties**_. This shift is only possible through the hard work of volunteers like Pamela.
Please join me in congratulating Pamela on this award and thanking her and all of our hardworking volunteers for their time and service.
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7739b328a4&e=e907534017)
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/steilforwisconsin/march-14050854?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA

subject: They would say to us, Is that what we died for??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/SajcQ0idAvuFFaERsEcILtrVqRcLEcTMdWE-YpYRp-2VKDD943xsTerOFcC1oVH21VZCmBMlEpeV1hjddBjmP3J5fWwKj_ZViT4TschH-57nfBdPgUEAaa_G6H6SImZyvH0oB0DRyPH5ejkEY42lf8nK6ikY7eWkeFvxmYm0oqFCioN1DYqybvBihNOMVVUiHpGHMsNPHpAVPYxz3BiDX24v2XDyxB6YHFkPRlz1HgEjOc7XD3ocSR1Tig8wYMbzw_PQE5V8UwPrVJ_igUKSb35j1nr970QcMoGg-wrjScoiLCRsUmqSofvCXSwTF6YUZidbG-HgqJRHTMrbZVbWj2TeL73CBchqSDSD_2nmcRMr1b8mnwg-xR9UCLze0h4iV10MkvDmnJVQw830BeIbc0ovovrOmd-dE2q57qkPjXDI6KLr7f2mK6KO45UXOcRb_XwTN1y_2Q9CP2zHrmS84e15rJZwMOms4cO4P24s3ZT10e5PCIB0HNhxucE3qyZ0Oa0Ay8Mc23qEIXpM9JuRnrdaMfRtQlBfe8AJoKKsWp2bQlrWEcufd4ggvMKc7lenf8FGUTCtemi1rZ7yMa-zWRX-v_Ib69VSQHzQ2C6NF6qqbPMdV6Qx04b58S94uA4wcYsJ-F1iSERnMy5CRVvPmc2QYtPTAgomgkdSjK4Nd-QMHaLtZKQVCWTw8UiJKZTZQR-2iinPf6rRwRH5Q9KG4ECdc1De-aBLTwKTq7xN4a2cuL87VKofJfXmwGLEezDqDTQuY-p4ljUBGerr91b2pnKtb64akE-DmpxOKpAhoKg0TqJH6BU31o9rxOPLUvdxeU_G6Xutbl1Mir4QopAVY5V4QyQQiPX3uhDuU52c69dTEYCPFQ/Mt1SAzsjJ3yzNpcjdmUBOuV4rsPJ-mTl/9)
---
**Slaves did not die in the fields so that we could call ourselves victims now in 2025. **

If they saw the DEI nonsense today they would say to us, **_'Is that what we died for??_ _NO_! We died for you to have an _opportunity_ - _take it!'_**

__My father came to this country with nothing more than $1.75 in his pocket. He had next to nothing, but with education, grit, & determination, my father built a life for me and my family here.

_**He never asked for a hand out & he never needed one!**_

Peter - Democrats think minorities can't succeed without DEI. They think that we need their help, their labels, and their permission.

_But I 'm the Lt. Governor of Virginia--_**the former capital of the Confederacy.**__ I didn't get where I am today through victimhood but through **faith, education, and grit.**

Right now, I'm running to become the Governor of Virginia. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, spews DEI **nonsense** at every chance she gets. But I believe in the American Dream; _anyone who takes responsibility & works hard can succeed in this country!_ Seriously, my father is a perfect example of this; he didn't take a single handout to find success in America!

**DEI is a cancer._I will not let Democrats insult the sacrifice & hard work of my father and every other minority American with their DEI handouts & victimhood._ **

**Here is my call to action, Peter:[donate $18 or more to help me end DEI nonsense and lead with the promise of personal responsibility and hard work!](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/OT3l5QeSsK6l7PYK_hkowL43ZHdB5THoAZOkWGKI3erQTyJByPFijDdxZ_sk6MjkEm0wZ1zx9Y8ACJxSivcAOUyeJgnFKQrDFsnurjp4BWgdftI9-Dvk02Pfn9MYkjxZsCnN14-izefLMbL0TNkG-BxWqGq7Ck8WZz25pvD35Zp0PnB4ICqhLyBsEaH8aQIJRmf-zMcgITpxFfX8X0jEZgJaP1Fgg5K846-_p0M35UyO_nPxoeqQuXfoVaTTUYmi2a-qPJsZVDElstJmrvKHwncwNCAujo3n0O0Tn82gm_TSaU-DWYBbCw4rj2Oz2462ISuic7iuWNdgW9nwZciG2MTEu6vABfRsCXc5TJc76MNYQ6QXIevl7trTe2Q6nL_QCua1cyCNgHaDW8XmLjKlXejJ8s23inQ0wKylFWlAWvt6lWO6Ni5INz2D69_d13UP0HyP2lOqhVVl2rEF0xZEn5nOlVOhlMq4f47AmDui7o9nIw2aJ9yDmqc49hKcMl8DzUV_f5zICRDpNG69bAIoLx-fQjb9EDhIuYZya4d5KzrYGKCvoF_Ufk4PA2dxYg6Keg9paWWjWhba2fUl4BP_bI80-YNTdgGhXcbxzdbqcva3Wt-pfRGcBUxl2-GtPRchJi8AGsZzS8dhCFIa9tzn8HEJ3miX25Ie1CX2l8uzGUo1P7PkYsD5Y166H2ZaFknAkHcSbIDZaYM6T3sg_egZufxDb8lx4GizxsDzksgS07Dn2kHGiKLIFEOYnqLjSY1osbs7A6ZZQfmndio0fuYogfDtMhrdAGt-9AxuD-LfkxN4-Fxyiu36TwCn4RM_dzNCt3ajSMfHrxFD8ZrTbz-Z694o8KICFldsHe5NNu_Edop8fK53rQ/dMSX7u8VwNr2cDf9dcGadgi1fxxXVGS1/9)**
---

---
I am really just so grateful to have you on my team in this fight. Together, we'll win in November and end crazy Leftist policies like DEI once and for all!

Thanks again and God bless,

Winsome Earle-Sears
_Lieutenant Governor of Virginia_

Here is my call to action, Peter: I am really just so grateful to have you on my team in this fight. Together, we'll win in November and end crazy Leftist policies like DEI once and for all! Thanks again and God bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Lieutenant Governor of Virginia | | | | | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | | |

name: Stand with Gov. Newsom! (via VPP)
subject: Newsom: “Arrest me, let’s go.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Trump is taking political theater to new heights.
| **THE GOOD NEWS:** Gavin Newsom is FIGHTING BACK against Trump’s _ridiculous_ act of _political theater_ in California! ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90882?t=6&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr) **THE BAD NEWS:** _Trump is threatening to ARREST GAVIN NEWSOM!_

[**25,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED ⚠️ We need EVERY Democrat reading this to take _immediate_ action and sign our letter to STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM. We can’t afford inaction, friend — not when the stakes are this high: Add your name by midnight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90882?t=7&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr) | [**SIGN MY NAME: STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90882?t=8&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Governor Newsom,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy and the will of the people against Donald Trump’s _extremist political theater_ in California.**

You are bravely risking everything — even arrest — to stand up for the American people, and we’re extremely grateful.

**As Trump resorts to POLITICAL THEATER to threaten and intimidate Americans,_your resilience is needed now more than ever._**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting Trump do whatever he pleases — so I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90882?t=9&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90882?t=10&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90882?t=11&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr)
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20140%2E878179%2EXw50fr)

Bernie Sanders just EXPOSED Trump.** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109287921/550639027/1717332614?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250609_EMDF_E3_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiMzVmYjNiLTk2NDUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0Ae5op6r_UacII-hDdwYCsU13EAPLKTAMm_bxvy1SO4=)** We’re SHAKING because he’s 100% right.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter - I've been in some really rough situations in the past, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb... My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session! I'm not kidding - a Soros-backed group even dropped $500K on my head all in one shot, Peter! This is a BAD situation that will spiral out of control if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I am coming to you with a heartfelt plea; I'm doing everything I can to win this race and keep logging conservative wins. But I know I can't do this all on my own; it's going to take all of us, and I really meanall of us , to win. If you can't afford to send in even just $17, I'll understand. That's right - all I 'm asking is that you send in $17 or more to help me catch up with my Democrat opponent's LUDICROUS fundraising numbers! Look, this race is TIED. There's ONLY one thing holding me and my team back from winning right now; my liberal opponent's crazy cash advantage. Thank you for being a crucial part of my team, Peter. I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support! -Winsome Earle-Sears Mother Marine Lt. Governor of Virginia | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. subject: Ben Stein: What Retirees Don't Know About Tariffs
body:
You probably remember Ben Stein’s famous classroom scene from Ferris Bueller’s Day Off.

subject: CIA Operatives Caught on Tape
body:
When we dropped the CIA tapes, it wasn’t just news—it was a reckoning. Supporters say we’re “the only ones with the guts to take on the spies.” Critics? They squawk about “ethics” while ignoring the rot we uncover. I don’t care about their noise.

| [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr6o1c1ppcialplkbgskk86oioglh4v9e2s3kqk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs)
[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z11cllp0dk52dor5g4l85fau2l9je8poq0plcb20_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and at OMG, we've gone where others won't--deep into the shadows. We caught CIA operatives on hidden cameras, bragging about sabotaging President Trump, spilling secrets from DHS and DoD too. _The Federalist_ called it "**a bombshell that rocks the deep state** ," and X users said "OMG's doing God's work." It's dangerous, it's real, and it's why I've got no life outside this mission.

The left's tried to break me from the start. Jailed on trumped-up charges, my home raided by the FBI over Biden's diary, lawsuits raining down--**they want me gone**.

But I'm still here, fighting for the truth, because you deserve to know what's happening in those locked rooms.

[**OMG needs**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znvr6n104v7lcu0hmurgs3306pjpfr9q9ginca6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs)**[**$64,600 by July**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0b9qsa0tgql5n2h78bt3bs1dre5vmko9d3gj5cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs)**[**to keep going, and I 'm asking you to step up. Can I count on you?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z329gefdomumiibip7tbqbttgrooiq77ignalo5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs)

People call OMG "relentless." When we dropped the CIA tapes, it wasn't just news--it was a reckoning. Supporters say we're "the only ones with the guts to take on the spies." Critics? They squawk about "ethics" while ignoring the rot we uncover. I don't care about their noise. I care about the operatives I've heard, their casual treason on tape, and the fire it lights in me. But this fight's expensive--legal battles, gear, risks--and we're on the edge.

[**Your support keeps us digging.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zck1vqi6ntfrhp19jmrlsoab4lannb0dfdir6j4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs)

I've paid a price most can't imagine. That raid? Humiliating. The jail time? Grueling. The lawsuits? Endless. **But it 's worth it to expose a system that thinks it owns you.**

We've got more coming--bigger, darker--[**but**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znnmukv8s2m1kr172i3fqfr764stfcpico4o24do_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs)**[**$64,600 by July**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za3utvvlvftkk0g1v5qr3l3dfdm7nbob9oj5s190_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs)**[**is our make-or-break**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfdrad1e82vuado8fc62qvlfv2e9p407pd5itsa8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs). Without it, the deep state wins, and I can't live with that. [**Please, support OMG and help us keep going.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2f2r0e6ud24soc5ubn2m2c9iud2nlequ4tkmuno_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs)

If you want accountability--not platitudes, not spin--[**then this is your fight**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvrfefif96sghcileugleqfjbmegkvajdci433s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs).

[**Your donation today, $10 or $500, keeps us in the shadows, exposing what they hide.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjlfgm45jgb16u2g6ieuuvqsgmvo1tb68ol6dgmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgm9or0c5h2bs)

I'm not here to play safe; **I 'm here to win.**

Thank you for considering this. **With you, we 're a force they can't stop.**

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

body:

---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Do you remember what today is?
body:
Peter, Happy Primary Election Day! TODAY is your last chance to decide what kind of candidates end up on the November ballot. Primary election checklist...
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, Happy Primary Election Day! **TODAY** is your last chance to decide what kind of candidates end up on the November ballot. Primary election checklist...
* Do you want candidates on the ballot who answer to YOU or the elite establishment?
* Do you want candidates who will tax you less or more?
* Do you want candidates who will support a secure border or double down on sanctuary city madness?
* Do you want candidates who believe educating children should be about academics or about woke indoctrination?

It’s our duty and great privilege to engage in that choice. If you sit this one out, elites who care about themselves, and not WE THE PEOPLE will have their way.
---
**VOTE TODAY!** **🕙 Election Day voting locations are open from 6 AM to 8 PM.** **Find your Election Day polling place[here](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/ce86c76390759be4f39874ec359ab240/eJyNkEGLwjAQhf_LnGuzbdWF3kREStXDomcJ7aDRmIRkbHWl_93prnhS8Prmm_fmzQ0IjTRU1JDDhX7TNIMIPFbKKTQ0tYZk9TdNR8MkSyLQyhzn3p4d5LeXy0-gl79H468I6OqQkfXPZFoWq_l2UaxKJp30nPGRzzhL0qfPbDkpFtB1b43xpGjWsHeAnPwZ-0a14la08Zr5PZELuRBt28bmEO9sIwJJQoGaGWVNEI0lHDir-YrdQNtK9nIc9nTSHCCdQ1M_vlPi9T-muwNIy28s) 👉**

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen. Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: 'Blue Texas,' Mall Razed, and a Rocket Competition
body:
Democrats are launching a multimillion-dollar initiative to transform Texas into a political battleground, aiming to boost their electoral prospects in the Republican stronghold ahead of the next round of redistricting. The party has not won a statewide election since 1994.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLsOnDAQRb_GdCC_sKFwEWm13aZNaQ32sFiyAdlmH_n6iN0oP5B2ztXcq_PrZm8QYljvPyGhqa95sys-S8RaMdspHljxBSVBjBl-o4fVQ96c5ZT3LVUto9ZDiG8rG28m6kfWoGFajn0vuBqbxcyoPXJ0vfdzzzkXcsJBctZ7mDXTUxPM-YwqRhmjjKoOnOfKMcEUGwQ6JJKiD3XLXV2-c-b43h6YO7elJpql1r0Q8YPwK-HXsD6w1K6GhHuEUs_QScT1qMmW7cgOibhgghAJV-cxoQ9HIuKyQ_DtDrmumMsS9r_cQdoh3NdP4h9kA20l1fZrgVM2aq3lOA5NNn5_hhhDUZpIej-rPlvr_xl-GP4nAAD__5HUkIA) | |
# Tuesday, June 10, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1832, a group of Texans attacked a contingent of Mexican troops at Anahuac, marking the [first armed conflict](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb_GbKBnYzth8NCFLV07ogd-BEsPOzJuCP36ivQTOp3pHl2dr9tww8Ah3j9xJVdecxoi7RtTKZSHkb-p0Au3FZkz_pDH6DGnaVCgTA22ljB4DHwMuvJuBN_Jipy86M6YVtmuWpy13Uhwnc1Vj6bVnshbuhiNHc6EZKrgThlYCVKCBNvg5JWdZCutvLY0kdBAPpSUm7L83Zn5SE_KzZTWit1SymMT7YdQvVD9vu9N2RZMkUOkJuW7UP17VXs86vE4IVRPseSTEsBW2fnHHpjDZi9Cw33FwG97-V-Tp1O_AQAA__-rSnZx) between colonists and the Mexican military in the years preceding the Texas Revolution. _Southern Living_ compiled a list of [25 unforgettable road trip stops](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMFugzAQRL8GbkZeA044-NBLbum1R-R4l2B1wcjehKRfX6VVv6DX0Wjm6X2cx7OPHNfru1_IyWNK40p7YRKhPF74RkIPXxbPnP0XoV_R5xRGo02vtFWgR_SRn2NXo7toHKAmB4du6PvW2KGenTEBB8Ch69FawqM_Gmta0FM3BT3Zto7uNaYtaAAN2jY-oLEBWrBwbClQ1WnCKCk3Mv_iTPxMd8pNSEvNbhbZStW-VeZUmdO-701JN5kprxzvcb2-apU5_YXqcgufJIpjEZWTRyU5bqpI2ooCOHS6N32dHW57ZI7FHqpOXxcf-edP_mfp7sx3AAAA__8UEX0j), including the Alamo, Cadillac Ranch, and Hamilton Pool Preserve. Today, we're sponsored by a game changer in plastic technologies. Check out the investment opportunities with [Timeplast](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLsOnDAQRb_GdCC_sKFwEWm13aZNaQ32sFiyAdlmH_n6iN0oP5B2ztXcq_PrZm8QYljvPyGhqa95sys-S8RaMdspHljxBSVBjBl-o4fVQ96c5ZT3LVUto9ZDiG8rG28m6kfWoGFajn0vuBqbxcyoPXJ0vfdzzzkXcsJBctZ7mDXTUxPM-YwqRhmjjKoOnOfKMcEUGwQ6JJKiD3XLXV2-c-b43h6YO7elJpql1r0Q8YPwK-HXsD6w1K6GhHuEUs_QScT1qMmW7cgOibhgghAJV-cxoQ9HIuKyQ_DtDrmumMsS9r_cQdoh3NdP4h9kA20l1fZrgVM2aq3lOA5NNn5_hhhDUZpIej-rPlvr_xl-GP4nAAD__5HUkIA).

## Storm Knocks TV Station Off Air
[Severe thunderstorms](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8Gsh7ZbWOYwMElZHvphajtbgZLBkbGs-zc15_Y-4TNSnpS1VP9-Zg-KOW0PX7TKr5-zfu0yXlkqVXKFPJLqnzRsVLOhf4K08ZU9jihwg6UA60mppTfk23ZB8V33YrXvb13nUF3bxcv89Bhb9laMcHMZG0g62aRLjqS3rTJX2XKaaW10srdKDK6qI12ejASpbFKONW93OryX2fO7_1Tyi3ua5v9UuvzaMyvBscGx_M8b-dMdMEGRyo1xSwXEKqLlAZHppUeApFehzCENyzpscCZNj6gyHMvVRjSBtte6gLfi5CpylHh9eQrNDji0ENA4n7oB7ABO7BGI4ROGCQwqjsSmSht8fw8U87pcH1j1WOllL_N68_-_vT4LwAA__9glpUS) produced flash floods and knocked out power to thousands of people across North Texas Sunday night. Some areas saw over 3 inches of rain and [winds up to 76 mph](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O2zAQRk8jdWOQlExZBQsjgVJt2pTCmBxaBPhjkGNrN6cP5Bxh2_cBDx_en4_1A0MM-f4bExn-9GXNtLdIzFTXW3wS0ye2hDFW_EsOs8Na7KqEOoPQIMXqMMSvdeyduQk3y56MnMb5fB6UnvvNTGd5m8Ts9XSxbvZeT-IyD9ZLHKabQtsHc8iElkJKIYU-oXVKWzlILS8DWepGQS5wqSfe_t_x8au8qJ5sSX00G_OjdcO1U0unln3fT6nlY-vUQhme7aCEvFHt1MLl0bjUQAfOpfIGbyccNDWIhC-CVCoBb5hhnIQQsAfeypPhUXaqgA18LMWFfAdPWBscCd96rHC9yl9p-fmjr8Y99hBjaHrqRnFPGOL7M3-v9MuofwEAAP__V26VBw), flooding low-lying roads and causing power outages that affected more than 47,000 in the Metroplex and [16,000 in East Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGPozAQhX8NdEZjAwYKF9eky7VXosGeBCsGR_YkTu7Xr9gttthyy_ee9OnT-3eez-iD369_cSPDr0ucdyo5EDOleQkPYnph3jCEhP_J4e4wRTsrUL0ALSTMDn14z13tzAJukjUZOXRT37dKT_VqVDcNMKJuaVhsZ0Ety4hu6fvBTWPfQu3NAQMtQUqQoBu0TmkrW6nl2JKlqgNynmNqeP3SuYR3fFJqbNzqYFbme67aP5U6VepUSmluxLdjPCIhr5Qqdcr0pETiu9hiIsEr7kJOACAIM4uDv2dRPK8iPljcY6Ek3CP5_Sp-IOpk3L34EHzWQ9XBdUMfPrX4d2c-jfoIAAD__8q5iuQ). Homes in McKinney and Pantego caught fire from suspected lightning strikes, and the roof of a Braum’s in Bonham was badly damaged. In Abilene, the TV studio for ABC affiliate KTXS was badly damaged, knocking the station [off the air](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ_GZKC2YcwQOLiEbC69EDV2A5b8g0zfMLNPv2L2ETau0qev6t9jeqAPPq1_MZLh15KnROcRiJnKNIf_xPTCI2IIBb_IYXJYsp0UqFsNupYwOfThPXWVMzO4QVZkZN8Nt1ur9FBtRoJe7CxRt4B3XMCCmju9dGBRtVK7ypsLBlqClCBBN2id0la2Ust7S5ZEB-Q859Lw9qOzhHd-UmlsjlUwG_N-iPaPUKNQ43meTXwfmDBxTj5fJaHGa9WVEvJGRagRC3sbSKjxg6wPziXWDiOuVHMuCV2uTyzJp7VW0Op-kH2zb3tVjNtPH4I_dC86WCP68FHh3x34NOo7AAD__8Crhoo). "_Damage is extensive, but we are lucky enough to have walked away untouched_ ," said the station’s morning meteorologist, Caiden Dinkins.
## Soros-Backed Group Aims to Turn Texas Blue
Democrats are launching a multimillion-dollar initiative to transform Texas into a political battleground, aiming to [boost their electoral prospects](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLsOmzAUQL_GbBfZxjgweMhCp3TtiPy4EKvGRrYJSb--Iv2Ebke6Dx2dX4_5oX3wcf2pN1T1vaQ54lkC1op5NuHAim9dNh1C1n_Q6eh0TnbmlPdAJTA6O-3DZxaNU4a6kTWo2E2Mfd9xOTZPNfDR2sUww7gYLb_hIBZpuHHUiV5Q2Xh1PaOSUcYoo7LV1nFpWcckGzq0SARF52vKbX3-01nCJ70wtzZtTVDPWvdCujvhE-HTeZ7tVuI1I3zCCEchfNpT8NXbCzGgrT7Fi9ecjh2Mtr_RgfnAiimvCCXlVKAm2EM6YfMhXPvgY01Qjxx9XOErAlchwied4X5nP7ZhZE1Wbj-vkyJvRNB10z58Tev_9X0p_jcAAP__tpuRzg) in the Republican stronghold ahead of the next round of redistricting. The party has not won a statewide election since 1994. Texas Majority PAC, which is backed by [liberal billionaire George Soros](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO5CAURL8GZ7R42LgdEGzirDfd0MJwaaMFXwtuv-brR93zCZOWSlVH599lubiU03796wpYekZcdni0DERQlzXfgODpWnE5V_cFwe3BVfSLEmrgwnApluBSfi19F-wqwiQ7sHLsp2HQykzdZsN51OuqJ-FGNcTRRKHPGgYfTVhjBN0l-x4TRgophRTm5HxQxkstjTxr8MB6ASER1hNtPzgxv_AO9eSxdNluREdj-g9TM1Nzc_s7Z2r2nqk5QEFfHTX-SLTxhhUbX53_D4FfK94OTsgPvFVeUs4J98bTTsg_P3yFiBV4SYGglsbU3FUbjse72szIenEtLuUPCP1O392q7wAAAP__cPaHZQ), launched its “Blue Texas” initiative on Monday in collaboration with the Texas Democratic Party and about a dozen county parties. Organizers will hold a series of rallies this month and [visit two dozen cities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu9CAQhZ8GOlbcWRcUf-Nu_zalNYbZNRIYC5O95Okjb5QnSD1zPp3vfFymC6Sc1tt_KOj781qnFR97xt6xTXP-xI5P2Avk3OALI6wRWg2T5NIwbpngU4SUX5Om0c88DoKiF04PxihpB7p4J911NkoOQiFYC4PTMNs4n5WblXGWJn_AuBVcCC64PUGI0gahhBVnhQGJ5hhTr-3Ul5861_yqd2ynUAvNful924n6R-RI5NgXXFLOx43IcakFDyEixwBlg3RbiRyN0lwbzSKWGhr0nb2x7PBlv39sr60eQdp83B4p57RbRzS_FUhvPu1_W-zu5XcAAAD__w16gCc) next month in an effort to recruit candidates and volunteers for the 2026 midterm elections, particularly the U.S. Senate race. "_There is no choice for Texas or for anyone else in the country who wants to see a Democrat in the White House after 2032 but to find a pathway through Texas_ ," [said Katherine Fischer](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1ygzAUhE8DnRj9WUChIg2d06ZkHtLDaCIkjyQsO6fP4Bwh_c7ut9_Xdb6C8y7cPmFHXZ5rnAPW7LEUTPPiDyz4hLyD9wl-0EKwkKKZOeUXQhVhdLbg_GuWrdULtSNrUbNejpeL4GpsNz3QUa7SDrZfe0FFTwcJjCP0bLSLUqJ1-iyjilHGKKOqA2O5MkwwxQaBBhtJ0boSU1e2P5zVv-IDU2fi3nq9lXLPjfho-NTwqdbavZGqS3gmGj6dlxo-WdwzWcB8oyXLi-SYYiYejmA2sh03JAErccEVB8U9kJRIypECeW-SU0abtL1X573Lqm8kve3g_Buj_E_eQ_PfAAAA__-UdoYW), Texas Majority PAC’s deputy executive director.
## Invasive Sheep, 'Texas Time,' and Mini Trucks
During this year’s legislative session, lawmakers passed some intriguing bills addressing issues like invasive sheep, “Texas Time,” and Japanese mini trucks. Invasive Barbary sheep, also known as aoudads, can now be [hunted by helicopter for sport](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL8Gd7bgGmO7oHgNXV67pUXgJiBhsPB1nOzXr5L9hK2PZnRmvi7LxcYU8_2_XVHT81aWjOeekAjrck0HEj7tvtqUqv1Gb7O3tbgFOAwtV63gi7cxvRbZeH3lfhYNajHKeRh6UHMT9CwkFw7Gm5zmEUfpBxBXP7nBgxu5VE3U7zKuBBeCC6466zwoJ3qhxNSjQyY5-kildhR-dW7pVR5YO1fWJulAtO2s_8fAMDDneXYu1JLflIF5z2FgQjl2Krn95BkY9IezFEtmYGyl6BIyMB_ahiNTzPd2D4hbGzBFVzbC2gLv1SQUdFvYmqr9dsaU4q5GJvl9tTF9jOhvPz40_AQAAP__ouGISA). They join feral hogs and coyotes on the short list of animals that can be harvested in this way. The large sheep are vectors for disease and compete with native Texas grazers. If authorized by Congress, House Bill 1393 would [implement daylight saving time statewide](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1y6jAQx09jd_Jo10LGhYrX0PHalJ61tIAma8RICoKcPgM5Qvr_5-_juBwpSrye_9PGrj5OablyK8K1cl5W-eLKDyobiWT65kDXQDn5BTXulLYK9BIoynMxfXCrDjP07GAy8243op37i_PkYTVmNTgB0ITrxLgn0sSWVuC5j-4Vpi1oAA3aDuQDWg8jWNiP7LkzmkOsKQ_18jvnJM905zz4tPXiLrXeSjf-6_DQ4aG1NrwuNObPl6DDw9ujatxYbenORZXKN-UlFc4K9WRhNn124daiSCx26ow-bxTlXVD_huXu8CcAAP__G5x3xA), joining 20 other states that have passed laws to abolish biannual clock changes. The new standard would be known as “Texas Time.” And Texans can now [register and drive](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL_uozAQhJ_GdCB7sU1cuLiGLtdeiRZ7E6wsf2RMSO7pT8k9wq8baaRvRt-f63DFxGm5_8aZfHnd1mGhc2cqhfIw8kGFXrjPyJzxL0VcIuY1DCDB1NLWSg4RE78HXUU_yuhURV512hnTgnXV5J1D0sbSaLXTLjoLEsJFdV1Ho6HWVcl_YNIqqZRU0jYYItigWmXVpaVAQkuKqay5KdP_Ozd-r0_KTVjniv1UyraL9peAXkB_nmcTprwun1ZAHw4uRyYBPeaSAn_Sg1Jd8hEee_3l1Ux35BpkqxUY02zTVmUftzMxp912Qsv7jIm_g-Vnmp4e_gUAAP__jsR75A) imported Japanese mini trucks that are at least 25 years old. Also known as “kei trucks,” the vehicles have gained a cult following and become popular as inexpensive farm trucks.

Homes in McKinney and Pantego caught fire from suspected lightning strikes, and the roof of a Braum’s in Bonham was badly damaged. In Abilene, the TV studio for ABC affiliate KTXS was badly damaged, knocking the station . "Damage is extensive, but we are lucky enough to have walked away untouched ," said the station’s morning meteorologist, Caiden Dinkins. Soros-Backed Group Aims to Turn Texas Blue Democrats are launching a multimillion-dollar initiative to transform Texas into a political battleground, aiming to in the Republican stronghold ahead of the next round of redistricting. The party has not won a statewide election since 1994. Texas Majority PAC, which is backed by , launched its “Blue Texas” initiative on Monday in collaboration with the Texas Democratic Party and about a dozen county parties. Organizers will hold a series of rallies this month and next month in an effort to recruit candidates and volunteers for the 2026 midterm elections, particularly the U.S. Senate race. "There is no choice for Texas or for anyone else in the country who wants to see a Democrat in the White House after 2032 but to find a pathway through Texas ," , Texas Majority PAC’s deputy executive director. Invasive Sheep, 'Texas Time,' and Mini Trucks During this year’s legislative session, lawmakers passed some intriguing bills addressing issues like invasive sheep, “Texas Time,” and Japanese mini trucks. Invasive Barbary sheep, also known as aoudads, can now be . They join feral hogs and coyotes on the short list of animals that can be harvested in this way. The large sheep are vectors for disease and compete with native Texas grazers. If authorized by Congress, House Bill 1393 would , joining 20 other states that have passed laws to abolish biannual clock changes. The new standard would be known as “Texas Time.” And Texans can now imported Japanese mini trucks that are at least 25 years old. Also known as “kei trucks,” the vehicles have gained a cult following and become popular as inexpensive farm trucks. | Flying together with our sponsor Meet the Genius Who Invented Plastic That Dissolves in Water The world produces 450 million metric tons of plastic waste each year. The project, which costs $300,000 a year, consists of applying a clay compound that binds to phosphorus. The teens said police officers waved at them as they were painting. ------------------------------------------------------------
By Maine Wire Staff on Jun 10, 2025 06:57 am
Former director of the Governor’s Office of Policy Innovation and the Future (GOPIF) and daughter of First District Congresswoman Chellie Pingree, Hannah Pingree, launched her campaign for governor on Tuesday. She is the fifth person, and fourth well-known name to join the primary field one year before Democrats will choose their nominee. Kicking off her [...]

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Lock up Gavin Newsom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
The Left wants to turn Alabama into the MESS that Gavin Newsom has created in California. Not over my dead body |
---

Peter,

Gavin Newsom has failed to do his job.

_LA looks like a third-world country — anarchists are in charge, law enforcement is being attacked, and the rule of law is nonexistent._

[ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9701077411854a11a9c4e56c869c4102&_e=5HVuCkIILhtMLRenN-mIsHQ1ZjFDF8bonDbMQWYEt38nDnrsPExR8_TuGRYNiPQhTYtaOmVVUx_WR_lx74chJhuajtRafDqCNlYX0-4DNmGxOq6bbGBfYROf8VJhpOup1bGfF0oEpB1qNY8yDfDBvqtGKnyhjNz8bTqE8jwg32Bz85PP3Pcb0EyvuJffMeO6tYUFUeyomPysxiwtryqmivLLptAG9_CLVTB0ONAR_D3LDsZd89x1XQ5_9fDigeOLZOpr5lxdfty21GELLIM8NOM4Fl7aF4N6Fkv0q1tvNorbGttn7EYviHGS10LPVQTXUndmkXJ3x04Skh8ZMN73QqmwfZPzJpXsr-UJ1RH_-YY%3D)
**Lock him up.**

If he wants to play stupid games, he should earn stupid prizes.

I know from years of experience – it’s not too hard to enforce the rules and make sure you’re leading constituents safely.

From my career as a College Football Coach, the easiest part of my job was establishing the team rules and making sure each player was in line. If they broke the rules, I held them accountable and benched them.

_**If I ran my team like Gavin Newsom runs California, I’d have never won a game in my coaching career.**_

I’m running for Governor of Alabama to make sure my sweet home, Alabama, never turns into California. But the Dems are dumping MILLIONS into this race to stop me.

| [ **HELP COACH TUBERVILLE** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9701077411854a11a9c4e56c869c4102&_e=5HVuCkIILhtMLRenN-mIsHQ1ZjFDF8bonDbMQWYEt38nDnrsPExR8_TuGRYNiPQhTYtaOmVVUx_WR_lx74chJhuajtRafDqCNlYX0-4DNmGxOq6bbGBfYROf8VJhpOup1bGfF0oEpB1qNY8yDfDBvqtGKnyhjNz8bTqE8jwg32Bz85PP3Pcb0EyvuJffMeO6ucwA3Y-QiCFXb8_Kg9gfhHV2Tj38MClXaam67TDtqaQwee6oabRK47ddymPNDyKcjkkqVwkYLxCkOUJZEqOWtRuz1b3qoxsONHeIBvWBkIJV_6toWold_Ekuno-QRdPThaxdi0VL3S3Y5yIR9DCUhwuUpdEC1eos2laBWXFfq5Q%3D)
---

If I lose, we’ll start seeing stories like the violent riots happening in my home state.

Frankly, I’d rather wear a Georgia Bulldogs shirt than see that happen.

[**I’m humbly asking you to chip in $10 or more before midnight to help me protect Alabama from the Radical Leftists.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9701077411854a11a9c4e56c869c4102&_e=5HVuCkIILhtMLRenN-mIsHQ1ZjFDF8bonDbMQWYEt38nDnrsPExR8_TuGRYNiPQhTYtaOmVVUx_WR_lx74chJhuajtRafDqCNlYX0-4DNmGxOq6bbGBfYROf8VJhpOup1bGfF0oEpB1qNY8yDfDBvqtGKnyhjNz8bTqE8jwg32Bz85PP3Pcb0EyvuJffMeO6qznyTYr27HSMtdQfn3OgFV6MlGaLZsmwy6pfekCJz1D3rAg7U4VxwI3tJ_6ze0fOCI_vjv5Sp9N9-0Ym9Qg7Tq6pMg3NGhBcCJeFt3xJq6zopStsz431wKb-0NkwOiSDqgct2gWAn91nJ8f60uPDzB3ej7dg29Ro2csz2LUqv6o%3D)

Thank you,
Coach Tuberville

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9701077411854a11a9c4e56c869c4102&_e=5HVuCkIILhtMLRenN-mIsHQ1ZjFDF8bonDbMQWYEt38nDnrsPExR8_TuGRYNiPQhTYtaOmVVUx_WR_lx74chJhuajtRafDqCNlYX0-4DNmGxOq6bbGBfYROf8VJhpOup1bGfF0oEpB1qNY8yDfDBvqtGKnyhjNz8bTqE8jwg32Bz85PP3Pcb0EyvuJffMeO6o4TdN_iiYPdVerZeYuLwdF-rIoE-ebX91C6hJKBFE_Q1u49x6HYm6PLrbfP1eCRMl1eH7cwZALPbJuRkojEAZtRqJeg_246UppUsg76oGDpRp_BMlzQsQFrgu4Tc54XBBvZi7tUtItVow4s1pGujEa8ugGGm9ggyVqEtEec30D8%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: The Left wants to turn Alabama into the MESS that Gavin Newsom has created in California. Not over my dead body | Peter, Gavin Newsom has failed to do his job. LA looks like a third-world country — anarchists are in charge, law enforcement is being attacked, and the rule of law is nonexistent. Lock him up. If he wants to play stupid games, he should earn stupid prizes. I know from years of experience – it’s not too hard to enforce the rules and make sure you’re leading constituents safely. From my career as a College Football Coach, the easiest part of my job was establishing the team rules and making sure each player was in line. If they broke the rules, I held them accountable and benched them. If I ran my team like Gavin Newsom runs California, I’d have never won a game in my coaching career. I’m running for Governor of Alabama to make sure my sweet home, Alabama, never turns into California. But the Dems are dumping MILLIONS into this race to stop me. | If I lose, we’ll start seeing stories like the violent riots happening in my home state. Frankly, I’d rather wear a Georgia Bulldogs shirt than see that happen. Thank you, Coach Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 6/10/2025
body:
False claims, real consequences: Judge rejects activist’s First Amendment defense
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
🛑 Colorado’s gun control fight is just heating up... Join us **[tonight in Lakewood](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** or **[tomorrow in Fort Morgan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** for our RMV/NRA Legislative Round Ups. We’ll break down Colorado’s new anti-gun laws, share what legal battles are coming next, and help you understand your rights as a law-abiding gun owner in Colorado. Don’t sit this one out. [RSVP details here!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Lakewood residents are pushing back against a [rise in homelessness](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) they say stems from Denver’s policies and overflow, while ranchers question CPW’s reporting after [wolf damage payouts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) exceeded $650K despite conflicting records. Meanwhile, Sen. Paul [Lundeen has resigned](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to lead a national civics-focused nonprofit, and a Colorado judge ruled a mother’s false claims about a school board member [aren’t protected speech](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), raising questions about digital activism limits.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** As [riots erupt in LA](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after ICE arrested violent migrants, President Trump deployed the National Guard—prompting backlash from Gov. Newsom, who told border officials, [“So, arrest me.”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Meanwhile, DHS [revamped its ICE tip line](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after the Boulder firebombing to better track crimes by illegal immigrants and prevent future attacks.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Today's commentaries dives into Colorado’s clash between parental rights and state control, with Laureen Boll warning that “protection” policies are [alienating families](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Dr. Brian Joondeph also questions whether some “long COVID” cases may actually be [vaccine injuries](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—hidden in plain sight. Drake Hunter warns that [post-pandemic pet returns are surging](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), urging Coloradans to see animal adoption as a lifelong commitment—not a fleeting comfort.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, June 10, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[False claims, real consequences: Judge rejects activist’s First Amendment defense](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
For more than a year, Derrick Wilburn – father, community leader and now an elected school board member – was publicly branded a “child predator” by a vocal district parent. The accusations, repeated at school board meetings, online and even in state legislative testimony, painted him as a man who preyed on children.
Wilburn filed a defamation lawsuit in December 2024, seeking accountability. And on April 29, a Colorado judge drew a legal line.
El Paso County District Court Judge Gregory Werner denied defendant Bernadette Guthrie’s motion to dismiss Wilburn’s defamation lawsuit. Judge Werner ruled that Guthrie’s accusations went far beyond protected speech under the First Amendment.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

**[Hunter: More than a price tag—what that doggie in the window really cost](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* During COVID-19, nearly 1 in 5 American households adopted a pet—but now shelters are overwhelmed with returns, especially dogs, due to economic hardship and lack of long-term planning.
* Shelter leaders warn the crisis has worsened with overcrowding, reduced resources, and emotional toll on abandoned animals who once were cherished family members.
* The article urges readers to remember the responsibility that comes with adoption—every wagging tail is a life, not a lockdown impulse buy.

* Two Colorado families say public school officials concealed inappropriate teacher-student relationships, labeling teens “homeless” to bypass parental consent.
* State laws now allow gender transitions at school without notifying parents, sparking backlash over what many see as ideological overreach.
* Parents are pushing back—opting out of surveys, running for school boards, and seeking alternatives to public education to protect their rights.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[A crisis of cradle and classroom: How Colorado’s baby bust is closing schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | JUNE 6** _Colorado’s classrooms are getting quieter – not because kids are learning, but because there are fewer of them. Across the state, dropping birth rates and shrinking enrollment are forcing schools to close, merge – or sit half-empty. And the trend isn’t slowing down._
**[Hunter: Dear Common Sense on using your voice without becoming part of the chaos](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JUNE 6** _“Dear Common Sense” is a no-nonsense advice column for those who still believe truth matters, leadership is earned, and common sense isn’t so common anymore._
**[Devotional: The breastplate of righteousness isn’t a costume—it’s combat gear](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JUNE 8** _Reflecting on the lives of remarkable figures—Abraham Lincoln, Nelson Mandela, Mother Teresa, Billy Graham, etc.—we discover a golden thread that weaves through each of their stories: character._

body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMFu4yAQhp8GbrFgAGMOHJKNvFIirbaqWqW9UcAJkQkOOLby9lXSNNeZb-b_9Js49KG7aiRXCOAQXEEAiC0RwPljjvlyjNu_ixS3-8W5_hfFbQt_HugET_hkzfrz5TUvj3YqaTe_DTXbTfSJj9fBP-FHaOWjCf1tKtfYadY5wrHXVHIlRM0FxwfNGFPQUKGUI1Y1lFjBvACpLHjPoMFBAwFBakooFUBkpWjXME69BcmdtB3i5J5TmehzsIaWcTY5pxQrmyLu9WEch3IXaxG0c07V6WJ7fyk_ZzZFBO1DGUE7IWiXX_uds3kjM2LtvTS29pv3ufw3K4ezdsMc-j6UWiJO9r9v8KThOwAA__9g6G7m)
Dear Friend, Artery plaque could have been a death sentence for John — and a catastrophe for his grieving family.

Cholesterol in his artery walls was clogging his circulatory system, restricting blood flow to vital organs, and setting the stage for a disaster.

Left alone, it had the power to turn John — a living, breathing human being — into a fading memory — another heart statistic.

Who knows? John might have been one of the fortunate ones. His plaque might just have triggered a mild heart or brain problem, leaving him diminished, but still alive.

Or, if he was really lucky, he might have escaped with a lifetime sentence of doctor visits and drugs that may cause skin rashes, insomnia, depression, kidney damage, and even rob him of his sexuality.

But now, this once-savage killer is as harmless as a teaspoon of sugar.

Because a few hours ago, John swallowed three, tiny capsules containing an amino acid so safe that the United States Food and Drug Administration has approved it as an additive to baby food.

It entered his bloodstream, seeking out the rogue calcium deposits that had glued plaque to his artery walls.

Then, in an act of supreme irony, the very blood that this plaque had once blocked swept it to his kidneys where it was unceremoniously evicted from John's body as a component of urine.

**There will be side effects.**
**Truly _amazing_ ones!**

This remarkable amino acid did not just help remove plaque from John's cardiac arteries, it also helped scrub every one of the 75,000 miles of arteries, veins, capillaries, and microscopic arterioles in his body.

Now, nutrient-rich, life-giving blood is coursing to places it hadn't reached in years.

And suddenly, cells throughout his body are being nourished including...

**> >** The brain cells that control learning, reasoning, coordination, and memory

**> >** Nerve endings and painful joints

**> >** Entire organs — from his eyes and ears... to his heart, lungs and liver... to his stomach, pancreas and intestines — and even his sexual organs

**> >** Extremities — arms and hands, legs and feet are now being warmed by supplies of life-giving blood...

**> >** Skin that was thinning and weakening with each passing year is regaining the smoothness, elasticity, and youthful glow it had 10, 20, even 30 years ago...

**> >** As his body rallies, even the fatigue that began plaguing him after age 50 is giving way; replaced by vibrant new energy.

**Four little letters are changing John's life.**
**They should be changing YOURS!**

So what is this miracle of nature? This 23-cent capsule that works such heart wonders?

Scientists call it "ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid." But please don't be put off by the hard to pronounce name. The rest of us refer to it with four little letters: "E–D–T–A."

EDTA, first synthesized in Germany in 1935, is a simple amino acid, very similar in composition to common household vinegar.

In medical studies, EDTA has been shown to be extremely safe. In fact, EDTA is so safe for humans, the American Heart Association recommends large direct intravenous injections as treatment for people who have been exposed to toxic levels of lead, mercury, aluminum, and cadmium.

More than 200,000 children in the U.S. have undergone chelation therapy as treatment for lead poisoning.

Both the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) and U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) approve it for use in foods that are enjoyed by everyone from our youngest babies to our oldest seniors.

EDTA is used every day to help stabilize fats, oils, and vitamins... to keep potato products from turning brown... to keep fish and shellfish looking fresh in the supermarket... to preserve the flavor and consistency of milk products... to preserve canned vegetables... to keep beer from exploding in your face when you open the can... to preserve the flavor of soft drinks... and much, much more.

When a doctor administers intravenous EDTA, the procedure is called "chelation therapy." The word "chelation" is taken from the Greek word for "claw" — the EDTA grabs and dispatches toxins in your body like an eagle's claw grabs its prey.

In 1955, research conducted at the Providence Hospital in Detroit, Michigan, found that EDTA can help claw away rogue calcium in your joints, kidneys, and the bones of your inner ear. And that which glues cholesterol deposits to the inner walls of your arteries.

In fact, scientific tests have shown that EDTA can eliminate calcium from plaque, help clogs to soften, let go, and be flushed away!

Put simply, chelation therapy is widely known to be a viable remedy for heart, joint, kidney, and even hearing problems!

U.S. medical associations — including the American College for Advancement in Medicine (ACAM) are dedicated to training doctors in the use of chelation therapy to improve hardening of the arteries and other chronic degenerative issues.

As a result, 1,526 U.S. doctors enthusiastically recommend EDTA chelation therapy to their patients. And chelation therapy is given to more than 1 million Americans and 3 million patients in Canada, Europe, Australia, and South America every year.

**A healthier circulatory system**
**is the secret to a healthier body**

As millions of Americans and others around the world continue to use I.V. chelation therapy to remove toxic metals from their bodies and plaque from their circulatory systems, something else is happening — something truly miraculous:

As toxins are removed... as circulation is improved... and as life-giving blood begins surging throughout their bodies... both patients and doctors report that scores of chronic and painful health problems are helped:

****** Blockages in the arteries feeding the heart and brain are reduced...

****** Cholesterol, homocysteine, and blood pressure — key risk factors for heart and brain problems are normalized...

****** Irregular heart beats and palpitations are regulated...

****** Angina and general chest pains are eased...

****** Edema (swelling of the lower legs and ankles) is alleviated...

****** Chronic shortness of breath is eased...

****** Cold, numb, and painful extremities are warmed and soothed...

****** Infections due to poor immune health are less frequent...

****** Enlarged prostates reduced...

****** Varicose and spider veins fade...

****** Insomnia is replaced by deep, restful sleep...

****** Low energy is replaced by deep wells of new energy...

****** Vision problems and "floaters" melt away, eyesight is improved...

****** Male sexual problems improved...

****** Sciatica and back pain is relieved...

****** Sexual sensation intensifies in both men and women...

****** Hearing loss due to calcium deposits in the ear improved...

****** Age-related cognitive decline, memory loss, and fading mental powers are eased or improved...

****** Skin problems and ulcers are cleared...

****** And much, much more!

**_Remarkable scientific breakthrough_ :**
**The astonishing power of chelation therapy
is now in your hands!** Until recently, getting the full benefits of chelation therapy was uncomfortable, time consuming and expensive.

You had to take time out of your busy day... drive to the nearest chelation clinic... plop down into a chair... get poked with an I.V. needle... and sit there for up to three hours while the EDTA was pumped into you.

When it was over, the nurse would hand you a bill for up to $300 — and then tell you that you still had nine more treatments... 27 more hours in the chair... and another $2,700-worth of treatments to go.

And as if the $3,000 bill for your first set of treatments wasn't enough to break you, you discovered that you needed to come back in six months for another six treatments, another 18 hours in the chair and another $1,800 invoice!

The high price and inconvenience of chelation therapy put it out of reach for many Americans. But now, those days are gone for good — thanks to **Peak Chelation+ Resveratrol TM.**

Now, you can experience the life-changing benefit of chelation...

**•** With three small, easy-to-swallow capsules...

**•** Without needles...

**•** In the comfort and privacy of your own home...

**•** And for just pennies a day! **Can you name a single nutrient that can boast of successes like these? ... For pennies a day and ZERO negative side effects?**

**Peak Chelation+ Resveratrol TM** is that product. And although you can experience AMAZING benefits from just taking EDTA alone, that's just the tip of the iceberg...

...To help folks like you naturally support arteries and boost heart health...
