clean_body: | Dear Friend, Artery plaque could have been a death sentence for John — and a catastrophe for his grieving family. Cholesterol in his artery walls was clogging his circulatory system, restricting blood flow to vital organs, and setting the stage for a disaster. Left alone, it had the power to turn John — a living, breathing human being — into a fading memory — another heart statistic. Who knows? John might have been one of the fortunate ones. His plaque might just have triggered a mild heart or brain problem, leaving him diminished, but still alive. Or, if he was really lucky, he might have escaped with a lifetime sentence of doctor visits and drugs that may cause skin rashes, insomnia, depression, kidney damage, and even rob him of his sexuality. But now, this once-savage killer is as harmless as a teaspoon of sugar. Because a few hours ago, John swallowed three, tiny capsules containing an amino acid so safe that the United States Food and Drug Administration has approved it as an additive to baby food. It entered his bloodstream, seeking out the rogue calcium deposits that had glued plaque to his artery walls. Then, in an act of supreme irony, the very blood that this plaque had once blocked swept it to his kidneys where it was unceremoniously evicted from John's body as a component of urine. There will be side effects. Truly amazing ones! This remarkable amino acid did not just help remove plaque from John's cardiac arteries, it also helped scrub every one of the 75,000 miles of arteries, veins, capillaries, and microscopic arterioles in his body. Now, nutrient-rich, life-giving blood is coursing to places it hadn't reached in years. And suddenly, cells throughout his body are being nourished including... > The brain cells that control learning, reasoning, coordination, and memory > Nerve endings and painful joints > Entire organs — from his eyes and ears... to his heart, lungs and liver... to his stomach, pancreas and intestines — and even his sexual organs > Extremities — arms and hands, legs and feet are now being warmed by supplies of life-giving blood... > Skin that was thinning and weakening with each passing year is regaining the smoothness, elasticity, and youthful glow it had 10, 20, even 30 years ago... > As his body rallies, even the fatigue that began plaguing him after age 50 is giving way; replaced by vibrant new energy. Four little letters are changing John's life. They should be changing YOURS! So what is this miracle of nature? This 23-cent capsule that works such heart wonders? Scientists call it "ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid." But please don't be put off by the hard to pronounce name. The rest of us refer to it with four little letters: "E–D–T–A." EDTA, first synthesized in Germany in 1935, is a simple amino acid, very similar in composition to common household vinegar. In medical studies, EDTA has been shown to be extremely safe. In fact, EDTA is so safe for humans, the American Heart Association recommends large direct intravenous injections as treatment for people who have been exposed to toxic levels of lead, mercury, aluminum, and cadmium. More than 200,000 children in the U.S. have undergone chelation therapy as treatment for lead poisoning. Both the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) and U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) approve it for use in foods that are enjoyed by everyone from our youngest babies to our oldest seniors. EDTA is used every day to help stabilize fats, oils, and vitamins... to keep potato products from turning brown... to keep fish and shellfish looking fresh in the supermarket... to preserve the flavor and consistency of milk products... to preserve canned vegetables... to keep beer from exploding in your face when you open the can... to preserve the flavor of soft drinks... and much, much more. When a doctor administers intravenous EDTA, the procedure is called "chelation therapy." The word "chelation" is taken from the Greek word for "claw" — the EDTA grabs and dispatches toxins in your body like an eagle's claw grabs its prey. In 1955, research conducted at the Providence Hospital in Detroit, Michigan, found that EDTA can help claw away rogue calcium in your joints, kidneys, and the bones of your inner ear. And that which glues cholesterol deposits to the inner walls of your arteries. In fact, scientific tests have shown that EDTA can eliminate calcium from plaque, help clogs to soften, let go, and be flushed away! Put simply, chelation therapy is widely known to be a viable remedy for heart, joint, kidney, and even hearing problems! U.S. medical associations — including the American College for Advancement in Medicine (ACAM) are dedicated to training doctors in the use of chelation therapy to improve hardening of the arteries and other chronic degenerative issues. As a result, 1,526 U.S. doctors enthusiastically recommend EDTA chelation therapy to their patients. And chelation therapy is given to more than 1 million Americans and 3 million patients in Canada, Europe, Australia, and South America every year. A healthier circulatory system is the secret to a healthier body As millions of Americans and others around the world continue to use I.V. chelation therapy to remove toxic metals from their bodies and plaque from their circulatory systems, something else is happening — something truly miraculous: As toxins are removed... as circulation is improved... and as life-giving blood begins surging throughout their bodies... both patients and doctors report that scores of chronic and painful health problems are helped: **** Blockages in the arteries feeding the heart and brain are reduced... ** Cholesterol, homocysteine, and blood pressure — key risk factors for heart and brain problems are normalized... ** Irregular heart beats and palpitations are regulated... ** Angina and general chest pains are eased... ** Edema (swelling of the lower legs and ankles) is alleviated... ** Chronic shortness of breath is eased... ** Cold, numb, and painful extremities are warmed and soothed... ** Infections due to poor immune health are less frequent... ** Enlarged prostates reduced... ** Varicose and spider veins fade... ** Insomnia is replaced by deep, restful sleep... ** Low energy is replaced by deep wells of new energy... ** Vision problems and "floaters" melt away, eyesight is improved... ** Male sexual problems improved... ** Sciatica and back pain is relieved... ** Sexual sensation intensifies in both men and women... ** Hearing loss due to calcium deposits in the ear improved... ** Age-related cognitive decline, memory loss, and fading mental powers are eased or improved... ** Skin problems and ulcers are cleared... ** And much, much more! Remarkable scientific breakthrough : The astonishing power of chelation therapy is now in your hands! Until recently, getting the full benefits of chelation therapy was uncomfortable, time consuming and expensive. You had to take time out of your busy day... drive to the nearest chelation clinic... plop down into a chair... get poked with an I.V. needle... and sit there for up to three hours while the EDTA was pumped into you. When it was over, the nurse would hand you a bill for up to $300 — and then tell you that you still had nine more treatments... 27 more hours in the chair... and another $2,700-worth of treatments to go. And as if the $3,000 bill for your first set of treatments wasn't enough to break you, you discovered that you needed to come back in six months for another six treatments, another 18 hours in the chair and another $1,800 invoice! | | My Fellow American,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is **[**NumbersUSA.**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)** You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.**NumbersUSA** harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, **NumbersUSA** calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need **NumbersUSA** to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of **NumbersUSA**.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America!
---
**Senator Ted Cruz** for **NumbersUSA**
---
P.S. **Roy’s email to you is included below.** It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and [get back to him and the folks at **NumbersUSA** as soon as you can!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Begin Forwarded Message:**From** : Roy Beck, NumbersUSA
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_.** **[Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "https://numbersusa.revv.co/wmacb97563856f76?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active")** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship......and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." **So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues.** **[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "https://numbersusa.revv.co/wmacb97563856f76?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active")** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND _of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "https://numbersusa.revv.co/wmacb97563856f76?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active")** **If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "https://numbersusa.revv.co/wmacb97563856f76?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active")[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.** ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | **Roy Beck**
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Founder and President**NumbersUSA**
---
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | **P.S.** I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. **[So please, don’t delay — click here or the button below to complete your Birthright Citizenship Survey and stand with us today!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "https://numbersusa.revv.co/wmacb97563856f76?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active")**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBTp/?__vbtrk=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1NDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence.
---

The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.NumbersUSA harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, NumbersUSA calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need NumbersUSA to rally American patriots from across our great land. # TFVC Is Training the Next Wave of Freedom Fighters
---
| |
---
| **Team TFVC showed up strong** at last week’s Texas Homeschool Coalition Convention in The Woodlands! Our trained volunteers had **countless meaningful conversations** with families seeking answers to their vaccine questions and guidance on their legal exemption rights. The COVID response opened millions of Texans’ eyes to the outsized influence of Big Pharma—not just in healthcare, but across all areas of life, including education. As a result, many families have turned to homeschooling and are questioning long-standing vaccine policies once taken for granted. **That’s where TFVC comes in.** Our Outreach Coordinators (OCs) are trained and equipped to confidently and compassionately navigate this often polarized, politicized, and emotionally charged topic. But their impact doesn’t stop at conventions like this one. Under the leadership of TFVC Outreach Director Carrie Bigford, our OCs are **empowered to thrive in a wide variety of outreach scenarios** —from TFVC-hosted meetups and community events to government meetings, election season activities, and even internal organizational support. **We invest in YOU.** Through communications training, ready-made advocacy tools, leadership development opportunities, and a vibrant, mission-driven community, TFVC equips volunteers to **make a real and lasting difference**. If you’ve followed us for even a short time, you know we’re focused on **driving meaningful change**. When you’re ready to see how just 3–6 intentional hours a month can amplify your voice and impact, we’re ready to help you step into your role.

---
|
---
| | [ Learn More about the OC Program HERE ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU2ODIyNjIxMDc5NDcxNjgyLFwiclwiOjE1NjgyMjY3MzI3MDI0NDk3MH0iLCJzIjoiMmE5ZTQ1NDM5ODdlMTk4OCJ9)

If you missed it the first time, this is your second chance!**** This **MAHA Films production** breaks down how Big Food, Big Pharma, and government agencies have worked together (and profited massively) while chronic illness has exploded.

clean_body: | | Find Your Role Today | | | | | | TFVC Is Training the Next Wave of Freedom Fighters | | | Team TFVC showed up strong at last week’s Texas Homeschool Coalition Convention in The Woodlands! Our trained volunteers had countless meaningful conversations with families seeking answers to their vaccine questions and guidance on their legal exemption rights. The COVID response opened millions of Texans’ eyes to the outsized influence of Big Pharma—not just in healthcare, but across all areas of life, including education. As a result, many families have turned to homeschooling and are questioning long-standing vaccine policies once taken for granted. That’s where TFVC comes in. Our Outreach Coordinators (OCs) are trained and equipped to confidently and compassionately navigate this often polarized, politicized, and emotionally charged topic. But their impact doesn’t stop at conventions like this one. Under the leadership of TFVC Outreach Director Carrie Bigford, our OCs are empowered to thrive in a wide variety of outreach scenarios —from TFVC-hosted meetups and community events to government meetings, election season activities, and even internal organizational support. We invest in YOU. Through communications training, ready-made advocacy tools, leadership development opportunities, and a vibrant, mission-driven community, TFVC equips volunteers to make a real and lasting difference. If you’ve followed us for even a short time, you know we’re focused on driving meaningful change. When you’re ready to see how just 3–6 intentional hours a month can amplify your voice and impact, we’re ready to help you step into your role. | | | | | | News | | | | | | Honoring Rep. Tinderholt | Rep. Tinderholt has been a steadfast, yet quiet, warrior to whom TFVC owes a debt of gratitude. It is with great sadness but even greater pride that we share the announcement of his retirement from the Texas House. | | | | | | Learn More about the OC Program | Join TFVC Outreach Director Carrie Bigford on tomorrow's episode of Your Freedom Hub, a podcast brought to you by the National Health Federation, to hear more about TFVC's advocacy approach. | | | | | | ICYMI: Shot Callers | Cherie Beuse was enjoying life as a self-employed swim instructor when her second dose of the Moderna COVID-19 vaccine altered the trajectory of her life. Listen to her story in last week's episode. | | | | | | Volunteer Opportunity | Another summer. Another Great Homeschool Convention in Round Rock! We'd love to have you help man the TFVC booth at this engaging, friendly convention! | | | | | | MAHA Films: Toxic Nation | The viewing window to watch Toxic Nation has been extended for 10 more days! If you missed it the first time, this is your second chance!** This MAHA Films production** breaks down how Big Food, Big Pharma, and government agencies have worked together (and profited massively) while chronic illness has exploded. | | | Upcoming Events | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | You are receiving this email because you donated or signed up. |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh09dkokj21rekgev0srav6mc5gie5va5svkueeg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljm4p36cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3a185ohd4fvsj3275l559k30ie32ghmkm95cp8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljm4p36cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5gqee0hs759dst21kgut2ajto1hnc6g8n47fk7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljm4p36cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zekhkkfb1oq2fabig9rrcscn52gr2ltk9975n8k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljm4p36cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpiqktkqausvgrpggkn9eddq2skpfeb17fnlfq68_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljm4p36cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zav3jk4knro0o48sgo1e3j9ldd6bhrhqr7keiqr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljm4p36cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4d4j6c7ftma3o25e9ir5kq4udp4mgam2hfie07o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljm4p36cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z98rs5fiq5tf91517848icrkntu5u9t35hi155u0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljm4p36cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7o15j5subhnegou589fvpd2mn79ajd598l467d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljm4p36cph2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

## Sen John Fetterman Torches His Own Party Over Response to Anarchy in Los Angeles – RedState
Senator John Fetterman (D-PA) chastised his party for refusing to condemn anarchy in the streets of Los Angeles as rioters continue to terrorize the city in response to federal immigration enforcement. Fetterman posted an image of several Waymo vehicles on fire in the streets while a masked man stands [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/2xpzcV1VMvw1Mx7JbAI1D2hO5inioeShx6ZL21JkdtYx_ogqUfQrbqz01HM7xDACboVY9DY3uIzXlphp19W6PFbv2wIWLErSgS5rq9UPldBHFvTwnXgGD3j1uYZ9lVvlUMpNKurQhaEqw4p4-h00XwXJJVQ6YbLlzLqUnp9jkRaXWLuFgXu5P7iDRZFzx9E77OmkxeMV4nT66DswRrLy5SC1MPg56ghoYLko_NcWSx8nVw3-8ejQfWJM7MSLUaxEugZqBMfbIW9THsjxGYgXCzpcZBkPhGDXCKJFw8hE_8h7o-d-PcbbLT-CL1TbBcOBBDau6TPTnX1aIVwIMIQxubl5JlDVsO1kqUiTRHgNiAufwV3riT3lTb4-P3yYnoo3xIjjctvWe5L15Nc8TLHUR74IJaZcZkPzhoxHv2ImnimOfkUkiaQfBgP-70_bBe4tXGXVGfLRy31OPsTOtKSC_fctGjln5P89NB8k-wvnYBsS-SpBDQRQViB9t6VOh3Uu8X-CspwAttUmuoXcSxm0YOmO-pq5JJuN3J1CJwmtoApJ7LfB7WcfKCnPpstTzALfxpUGeNSp1BYL3GM4qYzcaWsvQWLS152wJxR6/KGPgvGGdrn7wDm6RSn8kiyjVHXnUfARg/9)

Unfortunately, it’s not very good at predicting things, and its bad calls can lead to bad policy results. The Congressional Budget Office and the Joint Committee on Taxation predict what will happen with spending, [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/U__3wTKN7REm-9gVWq_Cc3xn0bszulZUKtd24IoyD2X-HC9X4J3hXERLNY4wUTIURDS86VeRX-splPnpNFTTrpJeuMe8HVJ7rE3VeSafWxeNPHwphwGkjdERYoQvC7pOb8yaFvOiwBVmM6pbNlnJuoZxnUPw9OduiXkhV7WKyC6lvVCxf3X6pldZ4NbYXb0S5pPvg1zwI-dcYDOiWS_eIWNmVQS2vSmtocy88LaZe4iGmOkJsVrRz7Uc17vj_ycticqieDkS2-XrOCECii_NMLHATkPJgI1NsXlYkIBrCgkm1YWjkaGihK7GQdYTyTZbhN76tv1VKPJTmHFKPFfl_aZ2tttcjTjhxEBfdPlSUN_7ddjXVeIEwv6-rQkEp0mOSoe8GYbX8Yfn2xe3-lYEI6pBI95MJyQ351EA5SNV122268oq8fBntV1eGk-ELXJi2fDL0pmUVafjBp5vgmUXT3UMpu9y2XQ/CDvodU0jN-I3fR4tMpO8um2L4aEkqC8b/9)

Until now, he hadn't been identified, but according to Attorney General Pam Bondi, that just changed. One of the reasons that the LA anti-ICE riots got out of control was the feckless nature of the Democratic leadership, including California Gov. Gavin Newsom. Instead of supporting federal law enforcement, his response was to make it about fighting President Donald Trump. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They tried to own this generation. We are taking it back.
body:
If you’ve ever wondered whether we can actually win this fight for America’s soul...

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z044va1jmmiajknsal7rkendkiuk98homdcqaqeg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)

Friend, If you’ve ever wondered whether we can actually win this fight for America’s soul... Let me send you the proof. I want to ship you a FREE hardcover copy of my book, **_Right Wing Revolution._**

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zobdk5l3e0oh8ugqeg6i6d4ud00bsbv8f0ohs0fg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)
---
No strings attached, just make a donation of ANY amount to Turning Point USA today so that we can reach even more young people and fuel our unstoppable movement.

[ **Yes, Charlie! Send Me My FREE Book!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5lh2edf2tdbojvlrb26tbrgdf2pi13qhvqg9208_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)

This isn’t just a book. **It’s what the Left never wanted you to read.** Why? Because it lays out — in brutal detail — how they hijacked our culture... And how we can flip it BACK, one campus, one student, one bold conversation at a time. **There’s no better time than NOW for you to join us... Because we’re seeing it** **in “Red” states and “Blue” states:** 🔥 Students standing tall for this country
🔥 Overflowing crowds shouting that they’re “PROUD to be an American!”🔥 Hands in the air to get their own “47” and “MAGA” hats

We’ve sparked a wildfire. And it’s only growing..._Right Wing Revolution_ tells the story behind the movement. How we keep the momentum going. How we DEFEAT the Left once and for all. , this isn’t about merely watching history... It’s about making it._**[Make your gift of any amount today to join our movement, and I’ll send your free copy today!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztgn5bmo7vsqlmfrfvich719tcu3bgqfla6cnde8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)**_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zba3lg18edesb8j9jbecgube27983jcmj41fqsig_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfmek4ca4eg9bdp9v8vds6gpi80hast1n1mc9o7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1j2aekgq9atui5paqpam23diml7io3p1rkfgico_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zotj757hkahlajcleebcormvh1cjtc2evc7ncln0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhkct69f182n45467erdeuuibh85v495qfgtppi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlrju0kss0h3dss584rlcmi98trdiejs7e48bibo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5t3mlth2c4ajinsouo0iv0dnmeuta6dr7kgvt6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z61t6vff9l8ahhm6accnhts9c6cj5pa4f3ggl38g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

clean_body: Please – for the sake of all our families | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. name: Maud Maron
subject: New York has become a third-world hellscape!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.

| | |
---
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmc05psfjkhgepmloq766nfh05ep7bfcvetahs50_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)
---
| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpkcpv5f146tl5qjrb1uff12dfadtgh5bsbv6db0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zupijd9vrfvdo3qrvchrtresaobbn2gaa3t75ii8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfdmu17ul2uo4q6vccvp6ksgp36421mi1tu9jvrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z17tt9n5fkm2lvv79p9lirp47ot2nmhrfb2phba0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgau5v0a1gag9l4s3bgelfph6ra7upm81jur2c90_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sljmco34cth2bs)**
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
---
P.O. Box 274New York, NY 10013-0274
---

---

# [RFK Jr. fires entire CDC vaccine advisory committee. Demand he reverse this idiotic decision](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64749826-bf8b-4d4e-b730-b6af85727894/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T422f6103-4a49-42e8-a85a-474418d43f15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Health Secretary RFK Jr., a noted skeptic of vaccines, science, and reality, has ousted every single member of the CDC vaccine advisory committee. He is expected to replace them with people who share his beliefs, even if actual data says they're bonkers. [**It's hard to stress enough how idiotic and dangerous this decision is.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf687c892-e4f4-46a6-a595-55795d0b8209/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) At a time when we face Covid and other new threats, and when longtime ones like measles are exploding once again, we need real experts to help us fight these enemies -- not ones who get their medical advice from the "Journal of Crap I Found on the Web." RFK Jr needs to reverse this decision immediately. People across the political spectrum should be able to agree on this, since we alll have a vested interest in avoiding plagues. [**Sign the petition, and join us in demanding RFK Jr reverse this idiotic decision.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad59a592-dc3a-4af9-97be-a7823c464051/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Health Secretary RFK Jr., a noted skeptic of vaccines, science, and reality, has ousted every single member of the CDC vaccine advisory committee. He is expected to replace them with people who share his beliefs, even if actual data says they're bonkers. At a time when we face Covid and other new threats, and when longtime ones like measles are exploding once again, we need real experts to help us fight these enemies -- not ones who get their medical advice from the "Journal of Crap I Found on the Web." RFK Jr needs to reverse this decision immediately. clean_body: This book is how we win the culture war| | | Fellow Patriot, If you’ve ever wondered whether we can actually win this fight for America’s soul... Let me send you the proof. I want to ship you a FREE hardcover copy of my book, Right Wing Revolution. No strings attached, just make a donation of ANY amount to Turning Point USA today so that we can reach even more young people and fuel our unstoppable movement. This isn’t just a book. It’s what the Left never wanted you to read. Why? Because it lays out — in brutal detail — how they hijacked our culture... And how we can flip it BACK, one campus, one student, one bold conversation at a time. There’s no better time than NOW for you to join us... Because we’re seeing it in “Red” states and “Blue” states: 🔥 Students standing tall for this country 🔥 Overflowing crowds shouting that they’re “PROUD to be an American!”🔥 Hands in the air to get their own “47” and “MAGA” hats We’ve sparked a wildfire. And it’s only growing...Right Wing Revolution tells the story behind the movement. How we keep the momentum going. How we DEFEAT the Left once and for all. Fellow Patriot, this isn’t about merely watching history... It’s about making it. Let’s win this fight. Let’s make history. Let’s never let the Left have its grip on our nation’s youth again! The next generation is choosing America — and with your help, we will make sure they never look back. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 -

# [Tom Homan makes MSNBC reporter look like a FOOL when he refuses to take his bait](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=165621719&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjIxNzE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1NjM1MjIsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE1NTUyMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.UFUuiSvfhz03mB84bAcMMLUCM7paicpv8V8VSB3E69c)

| | [Politibrawl](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)

| Jun 10

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=165621719&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjIxNzE5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0OTU2MzUyMiwiZXhwIjoxNzUyMTU1NTIyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.PWcnH00znbG-ooJO_JraLw78FJhaGZI091DpH1DgT9A&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[put an MSNBC reporter in his place](https://substack.com/redirect/873fe5b5-9dee-4900-8f1e-2b9f480a0358?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for trying to stir up controversy between himself and California Governor Gavin Newsom amid the destructive Los Angeles riots.
Homan had no time for BS like this...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/873fe5b5-9dee-4900-8f1e-2b9f480a0358?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/873fe5b5-9dee-4900-8f1e-2b9f480a0358?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The reporter pressed Homan on the Trump administration's action in Los Angeles, deploying the National Guard to contain the situation, as many Democrats claim the move only escalates tensions.
"I was there when a thousand protesters surrounded the federal building, breached that federal building, putting our officers at risk, putting the illegal aliens being put into custody at risk. It was out of control, so I support President Trump's decision to deploy the National Guard," Homan explained. "I was on the ground, Governor Newsom wasn't!"
The reporter brought up **[Newsom's challenge to Homan to arrest him,](https://substack.com/redirect/873fe5b5-9dee-4900-8f1e-2b9f480a0358?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "'Come after me, arrest me. Let's just get it over with, tough guy,' that was the Governor of California talking to you," the reporter prompted Homan.
"I'm not biting on that!" Homan fired back. The reporter who interviewed me was very dishonest, we did a 20 minute interview and he cut out a little clip and takes my words out of context."
**["Here is what I said, they have a right to protest but](https://substack.com/redirect/2a5d98a7-c240-4d71-bee7-abf28c8b1489?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** they can't cross that line. They can't cross that line of putting their hands on officers, they can't cross that line of concealing an illegal alien,... When he asked a question including Mayor Bass and Gavin Newsom,... they're not above the law either! If they commit a crime they will certainly face prosecution!"
Watch the tense exchange here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/873fe5b5-9dee-4900-8f1e-2b9f480a0358?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/c65cec29-46fe-4729-9241-3e31ff6e964d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Sharing Homes Made Investors Rich. Sharing Data Could Be Bigger](https://substack.com/redirect/c65cec29-46fe-4729-9241-3e31ff6e964d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c65cec29-46fe-4729-9241-3e31ff6e964d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Remember when people said "nobody will rent their homes to strangers"? Early Airbnb investors who ignored the skeptics saw $1k grow to $5M at the company's IPO.
Airbnb grew to $100 billion by unlocking value in homes, and now Mode Mobile is doing the same with an asset owned by 7 billion people - smartphones.
Instead of renting spare rooms, Mode users monetize their screen time:
* 45M+ users earning from everyday activities (games, music, charging)
* Helped users save and earn over $325M+

And with their Nasdaq ticker ($MODE) secured, you now have a limited time to invest at just $0.30/share
**[Here's how to invest and even earn up to 100% bonus shares.](https://substack.com/redirect/c65cec29-46fe-4729-9241-3e31ff6e964d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/c65cec29-46fe-4729-9241-3e31ff6e964d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Rioter who allegedly attacked police identified, Trump draws a hard line
Attorney General Pam Bondi announced that **[the FBI has identified the suspect](https://substack.com/redirect/63e2905a-f391-4f58-92a2-d7fe7580daf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who allegedly assaulted federal officers during anti-ICE protests in Los Angeles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/63e2905a-f391-4f58-92a2-d7fe7580daf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Elpidio Reyna, (US Attorney Bill Essayli X)
* **Elpidio Reyna was captured on video** allegedly throwing rocks at federal law enforcement vehicles in Paramount, California, injuring a federal officer and damaging government property during Saturday's protests.
* **Federal authorities were conducting a search warrant on the suspect's home as Bondi spoke** \- The Attorney General told Sean Hannity on Monday night that the FBI had identified Reyna through "great police work" and that he would be placed on the Most Wanted list, warning "you can run, you can't hide."
* **The Justice Department is promising severe federal penalties for rioters** \- Bondi warned that looters could face up to 20 years in prison under the Hobbs Act, while those who spit on federal officers could get up to 5 years, citing Trump's motto "You spit, we hit" as the new enforcement policy.
* **FBI Director Kash Patel emphasized zero tolerance for attacks on law enforcement** \- Patel warned that anyone who assaults a law enforcement officer "is going to jail--period," regardless of their background or cause, and promised federal intervention when local jurisdictions won't protect officers who "wear the badge."

* * *
# Terrorist scumbag calls for jihad on America and the assassination of Trump and JD Vance
The leader of al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula called for the assassination of President Trump and his top advisors **[in a disturbing video](https://substack.com/redirect/17b7c74e-f81f-4efa-9712-b29a089e4cbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** addressing "every muslim" in the United States.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/19253ea8-22a9-4663-bbf4-dbb0aabfa71b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Sa'ad bin Atef al-Awlaki,** who has a $6 million U.S. bounty on his head, released a propaganda video Sunday specifically targeting Trump, VP JD Vance, and advisors including Marco Rubio, Pete Hegseth, and Elon Musk over their pro-Israel positions.
* **The terror leader encouraged Muslims in the U.S. to "take revenge" and attack officials' families** \- Al-Awlaki told followers not to consult anyone about "killing infidel Americans" and to go after Trump administration officials "and their families and all those who have any ties or are close to the politicians of the White House."
* **The 34-minute video also called for strikes against all Jews and praised recent terror attacks** \- In the video titled "Inciting the Believers," al-Awlaki praised suspects behind recent antisemitic terror attacks and previous Trump assassination attempts, while calling for attacks on Jews everywhere as revenge for the situation in Gaza.

* * *
| | POLL
---
If Gavin Newsom refuses to cooperate with the Trump administration to deal with the riots, should he be arrested?
| [Yes](https://substack..JmLSRR8-1T1Hj1DgacW1oYrk5qp_T6Pq_XtRCMrpw3Q?)
---
[No](https://substack..nYO4QoIlUadhlinohft34uvWX4ieuJ9GsOo-id_NEvs?)
[Not sure...](https://substack..rZIfsvjZW8xzl5vQFxMAc1kmptvYfdPW1PzCKlQonjo?)

If you dont want to read on Just do the following with this **CALL TO ACTION: TO STOP HB-5002**
**Tell Governor Lamont to VETO this harmful housing mandate that threatens local control and burdens towns already struggling with rising costs.**
**Call: (860) 566-4840 |**
**Toll-Free: 800-406-1527**
**Email: governor.lamont@ct.gov**
* If you want the easy way to email him with prepared materials click [here ](https://substack.com/redirect/4607b255-b152-43bc-ad5f-b240fd78ccc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)from our friends at [CT 169 Strong](https://substack.com/redirect/d3a5a981-1ff3-4cfe-82c7-16f7814ea020?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**NOW FOR THE REASONS WHY:**
More pressure is being put on the largest taking in Connecticut - HB 5002.
For many Nutmeggers, CT usually makes the NY Post for Nightmares or a Page Six spotting.
Well, CT is back on the the Post's radar - picking up an Op-Ed by _Betsy McCaughey, former lieutenant governor of New York and co-founder of the[Committee to Save Our City](https://substack.com/redirect/eaa2a76f-cfad-4902-8a9b-17fbe7188cd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e9d7028b-8769-4db9-81a0-5ffb120950ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Pledge your support](https://substack..1BeXjlmjyaU0emky74nlonBc2rPy9A0oUbWZ5rSyJiU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165622733)
HB5002 was passed at 2AM - talk about a Sleepless Night in the Senate - A "homlessness" housing bill that was a 160 page omnibus bill that is a taking of your property rights and impacts the biggest asset - YOUR HOME.
Instead of paving paradise and putting up a parking lot - your neighbor can turn your quaint neighborhood into a New Rochelle or White Plains with large developments (of 9 units in the place of a single residence with no need to provide parking) with no say by your planning and zoning (the last line of defense). Just imagine 9 more cars from one of your next-door neighbors.
_**It is an "as of right" piece of legislation and if you challenge the developers, taxpayers may get to pay their legal bills.**_
It is also logistically a nightmare and creates all sorts of unfunded mandates like how to deal with population challenges and limited resources - sewer, water, schooling, emergency response....
This does not solve for the "Needs of Homeless Persons."
While this is a Democrat Bill of your elected representatives in a democrat controlled House, Senate, and Hartford (Governor, Lt. Governor, AG, SOTS....), there are plenty of local Democrat Selectmen that think this is horrible for their community and want to look to common sense.
Fairfield has been decimated by 8-30g and we will talk more about that another day. They have had so many developments that they were just granted a 4-year moratorium - well HB 5002 stops that for more of Fairfield's "fair share". First Selectmen Gerber (D) is fed up as well watchng his town fall to 8-30g and HB 5002.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=165622733&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjIyNzMzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1NjI2NTIsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE1NDY1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.k90H4BnHwfw0firYZkip6fhMrLQiE9qdT3C1z-KYI4s)
It is in Ned's Hands and without more pressure he may just sign it rather than veto it.
**Connecticut has fallen where New York stood up to a similar taking by Governor Hochul.**
**Remember the driver of DeSegregate CT is funded out of NEW YORK CITY: it is part of** the Regional Plan Association ("RPA"), a NYC based non-profit (engaging in lobbying efforts) with most of their board members based in NYC, NJ and to a lesser extent CT. **So NYC is telling Hartford what to do** \- Here is a previous article on that.
## [DesegregateCT and its Transit Oriented Development Lobbying Needs Further Scrutiny ](https://substack.com/redirect/e1813a45-1273-4c5f-bb88-7230acf73785?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---|---|---
**WHAT CAN YOU DO?**
_**It is time to be that Cowboy or Cowgirl from Connecticut (as those commercials were the Texans) and turn up the heat by:**_
1. **Telling Governor Lamont to VETO this harmful housing mandate that threatens local control and burdens towns already struggling with rising costs.**
**Call: (860) 566-4840 |**
**Toll-Free: 800-406-1527**
**Email: governor.lamont@ct.gov**
* If you want the easy way to email him with prepared materials click [here ](https://substack.com/redirect/4607b255-b152-43bc-ad5f-b240fd78ccc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)from our friends at [CT 169 Strong](https://substack.com/redirect/d3a5a981-1ff3-4cfe-82c7-16f7814ea020?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
2. Sharing this as we need to grow this movement. It's in your back yards now and it will get worse if you are silent. This is well beyond the gas blower distraction.
3. Getting Active and reaching out - Its no longer an armchair event here in CT - and its not a partisan thing. Its a preservation of our neighborhood charm.
4. Remembering that outside lobbying of developers especially out of New York and New York City are behind this as well.

[Pledge your support](https://substack..1BeXjlmjyaU0emky74nlonBc2rPy9A0oUbWZ5rSyJiU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165622733)
We aren't backing down and neither should YOU.
Stand up to Lamont, Stand Up to Hartford and TAKE YOUR TOWNS BACK

name: Erica Henry
subject: Something is deeply wrong with this picture.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109311651/550694923/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250610wrong_N_EH_90DO_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyM2U1MTE4LTAxNDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bAL4fkXQwrzE8WrpJ6mSN6f6v0lF1GjbkIckf4WkP0Q=)
---
Did you see this message, Peter?

A woman in Georgia named Adriana Smith was eight weeks pregnant when she was diagnosed with blood clots in her brain and almost immediately declared brain-dead. Because Georgia’s abortion ban contains provisions about “fetal personhood” – which entitles embryos and fetuses to full legal rights and protections – Georgia law requires doctors to keep Adriana on life support to preserve the pregnancy.

She is still on life support right now and her baby, who will likely have serious medical challenges if he survives, is growing.

The decision to keep Smith on life support did not come from Smith’s family. Her family had no choice in the matter but are, however, expected to cover the medical costs of keeping her at the hospital. Instead, **Georgia’s government, which has a state legislature that is 65% male and an executive branch that consists almost entirely of men**, is making this decision for them.

There is something deeply wrong with this picture. We are sick and tired of dangerous laws that limit women’s rights to bodily autonomy being written by __male legislators.__

[**Every woman deserves bodily autonomy – and the history and data show that getting more women elected to government is our _best defense_ against any law that threatens that right. Help support this effort to elect pro-choice, pro-women women who will fight for our rights by pitching in $25 or more immediately →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109311652/550694924/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250610wrong_N_EH_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyM2U1MTE4LTAxNDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bAL4fkXQwrzE8WrpJ6mSN6f6v0lF1GjbkIckf4WkP0Q=)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor
Her Bold Move

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

Earlier this year, a Georgia woman named Adriana Smith checked into a hospital with what she thought was an intense headache. At the time, Smith was about eight weeks pregnant.

The next day, she was rushed back to the hospital after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with blood clots in her brain. Hours later, she was declared brain-dead.

Georgia’s abortion ban contains provisions about “fetal personhood”, a doctrine that entitles embryos and fetuses to full legal rights and protections. Since Smith was 8 weeks pregnant, the law has required doctors to keep her on life support to preserve the pregnancy, even though she no longer has brain function. Doctors will deliver the baby, who experts say will have medical challenges and may not survive, through a caesarean section...

**Smith’s family did not get a choice or say about the decision. The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government – which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch, and a state legislature that is more than 65% male.**

**_We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: men should not be making laws that infringe on women’s bodily autonomy._**

[**There are far too many new laws across the country that give embryos more rights than women. At Her Bold Move, we are working to elect pro-choice, pro-women women who will fight for our daughters, sisters, mothers, grandmothers, neighbors, and friends. Every woman deserves bodily autonomy – and we know that getting more women elected to government will be our best defense against any law that threatens that right. Monica Simpson, Executive Director of SisterSong, the lead plaintiff in a lawsuit challenging Georgia’s abortion law, said Smith’s family, "deserved the right to have decision-making power about her medical decisions. Instead, they have endured over 90 days of retraumatization, expensive medical costs, and the cruelty of being unable to resolve and move toward healing.”

**Georgia state Senator Ed Setzler,_who sponsored the state’s abortion ban_** , has taken the opposite view. He told the _Associated Press_ that “it is completely appropriate that the hospital do what they can to save the life of the child.”

_Why is a man sponsoring a state’s abortion ban???_ Something is deeply wrong with this picture and, at Her Bold Move, we’re on a mission to solve it.

[**We desperately need more women in office advocating for women constituents and their bodies. We cannot allow this to continue.
