clean_body: | | | | | = Did you see this message, Peter? A woman in Georgia named Adriana Smith was eight weeks pregnant when she was diagnosed with blood clots in her brain and almost immediately declared brain-dead. Because Georgia’s abortion ban contains provisions about “fetal personhood” – which entitles embryos and fetuses to full legal rights and protections – Georgia law requires doctors to keep Adriana on life support to preserve the pregnancy. She is still on life support right now and her baby, who will likely have serious medical challenges if he survives, is growing. The decision to keep Smith on life support did not come from Smith’s family. Her family had no choice in the matter but are, however, expected to cover the medical costs of keeping her at the hospital. Instead, Georgia’s government, which has a state legislature that is 65% male and an executive branch that consists almost entirely of men, is making this decision for them. There is something deeply wrong with this picture. We are sick and tired of dangerous laws that limit women’s rights to bodily autonomy being written by male legislators. = Together, Erica Henry Senior Political Advisor Her Bold Move \---------- Forwarded message --------- Hi Peter, Earlier this year, a Georgia woman named Adriana Smith checked into a hospital with what she thought was an intense headache. At the time, Smith was about eight weeks pregnant. The next day, she was rushed back to the hospital after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with blood clots in her brain. Hours later, she was declared brain-dead. Georgia’s abortion ban contains provisions about “fetal personhood”, a doctrine that entitles embryos and fetuses to full legal rights and protections. Since Smith was 8 weeks pregnant, the law has required doctors to keep her on life support to preserve the pregnancy, even though she no longer has brain function. Doctors will deliver the baby, who experts say will have medical challenges and may not survive, through a caesarean section... Smith’s family did not get a choice or say about the decision. The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government – which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch, and a state legislature that is more than 65% male. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: men should not be making laws that infringe on women’s bodily autonomy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Monica Simpson, Executive Director of SisterSong, the lead plaintiff in a lawsuit challenging Georgia’s abortion law, said Smith’s family, "deserved the right to have decision-making power about her medical decisions. Instead, they have endured over 90 days of retraumatization, expensive medical costs, and the cruelty of being unable to resolve and move toward healing.” Georgia state Senator Ed Setzler,who sponsored the state’s abortion ban , has taken the opposite view. He told the Associated Press that “it is completely appropriate that the hospital do what they can to save the life of the child.” Why is a man sponsoring a state’s abortion ban??? Something is deeply wrong with this picture and, at Her Bold Move, we’re on a mission to solve it. = Together, Erica Henry Senior Political Advisor Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. name: Niki Conforti
subject: You're Invited to Our Official Launch Event
body:
You're Invited to Our Official Launch Event | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/212dfeb46c85/conforti-for-congress-10609590?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Join us!!

The Conforti for Congress race to US House District IL-06 for the 2025-2026 election is launching at Parker's Restaurant in Downers Grove on Tuesday, June 24th.

As the top Republican vote-getter for all 14 Illinois challenger congressional races in the 2024 election, we are carrying our momentum to a win in 2026! Mark your calendar!

**Conforti for Congress Launch Event**
Tuesday, June 24th
Parker's Restaurant
1000 31st Street, Downers Grove
5:30 - 7:30pm

**I need your help to push back on the destructive left-wing agenda!**

Please consider a sponsorship at the $500 - $3,500 level for my inaugural event. Your contribution will help us with the seed money to launch the key components of my congressional race and get proper representation in Congress.

Visit our Website's Event Page by [Clicking Here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=3af095a979&e=25f4fa3311)

Thank you for your leadership and strong consideration to invest in my campaign.

If you are unable to attend, please consider a campaign contribution to help us bring common sense back to WDC by clicking the Donate button below.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=bb9b5310d7&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
Don't stop believing in what we can achieve when we work together!
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=d475940ec5&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=3e427e75e5&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=d93220ddb4&e=25f4fa3311)!

subject: How Tax Cuts Protect Small Businesses
body:

| | |

| **__Warren Hudak_ : Tax cuts must be a Republican priority, but reform requires common sense_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3819693813&e=b7b3eddce2)

* * *
---
| ''Last November, Pennsylvanians and all Americans affirmed their desire for another four years of President Trump’s policies and agenda. A cornerstone of the President’s first term was the Trump Tax Cuts, which helped small businesses flourish and strengthened the economy for working Americans.

With another Republican trifecta in Washington, there’s never been a better time to build on those successes. Making the 2017 tax cuts permanent has become a centerpiece of current budget discussions — and for good reason..."

Friend, I’m gay – and I need your help.
**My name is Daniel Hernandez, and I’m an openly gay Latino running for Congress in Arizona’s special election just WEEKS away.**
I’m in this fight to push back against MAGA Republicans who are desperate to strip us of our fundamental rights.
Republicans have bullied LGBTQ+ children, threatened long-standing same-sex marriage rights, threatened to ban trans people from traveling, and harassed the most vulnerable among us.
**Since launching my campaign, I’ve already become a target for Republican vitriol.** Extremists hate that I won’t back down from a fight, so they’re getting ready to pour millions into defeating me.
**[So Friend, will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and PARTNER so we can stand up to homophobic Republicans hellbent on turning back progress?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOxoQv6eRvqfAftMXwfs5emoszAlMap-OYeXjG-VR2ofYGgpl2n4r2w5ufN8zzJ9FWJumInfUUTNpU8dw2W_4fPSiIv8gA55JbeHCVLJ1jVXc9qlrIj6ey8Tcar4Gjvxf96wAuQz1Aq8wyGx2DsRci1YwSS_gqq4jE5TF6_DwXkrVk8nyNqezMqO1cVd3fhv57PUFLLO12vXI65FA-I9RWDW_hXpYOR6lhclVVA2wEUfTc_gFyCTNrv-hHWGnM-xop/4h8/NkzuMd8ITN6ZLBGsDigP4Q/h1/h001.F7LurdgkzyWz-HgfS61ajTiym_BULsHBJAtYT70RiEg)** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOxoQv6eRvqfAftMXwfs5emoszAlMap-OYeXjG-VR2ofYQla2q7cMujDj1JlP2uzamXSW1zOEiSAVOvybQa3ZzaoUT6SwcxC8QSSMdb3knCRrEwn9ZGO9h4PnNEJSkYLiUEVEuXZuVbVyJ8luV4xYfMC2VL_RNpulwjnWvHkQkTFfsfrvvPlnbggZp5N6D0ssU9E_UiNTQWQFM_VpoFbxyRqQa4IoANpdUE1F3rVTe4784wKtzshmNBjIrdWHvZYWh/4h8/NkzuMd8ITN6ZLBGsDigP4Q/h2/h001.kxifIf3PBfVqlr4e3fsi8l0WQOzcRds3ZXgwiyPSuPM)** | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOxoQv6eRvqfAftMXwfs5emoszAlMap-OYeXjG-VR2ofbOg2ZBRGMn1GUKU8kssGlKRBTRCUq5Qqsqntxq9Fyu-_EA5J8eKd0VhgktgidYiiCUz43tdIjQrQ0h1xHTqrT5rtJte0GGyTc7d1L2wmCzy7cUiAg440tY9k3o_Vl2NOhQrhcCK1fybTatUdGi3bC7l9ia1S2JkY6AbaYeTizNDgydMKJJP0c7AJyo75z833H7FMNhr7Zjh0ceOx7_eAsW/4h8/NkzuMd8ITN6ZLBGsDigP4Q/h3/h001.ULd2fi-Qpz0zPsxPovPufl7b_8EkCtebPphD8La9FGA)

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: What it takes to spot a travel scam
body:
Hi Peter,

How many times have you seen gimmicks like this?1
FREE vacations!
Premium vacation rentals for CHEAP!
LOWEST PRICES on charter flights, international travel documents, cruises & more! Act NOW -- offer only good for the next 24 hours!
Those probably look like travel scams, right?
Some scams are really obvious, but other scams aren't.
And any of us can fall prey to them, especially if we're out of our element and we're caught off guard.
The good news is that travel scams can be easier to identify if we know a thing or two about them.
And they're just one aspect of travel safety that the modern traveler should know about.
[](https://financeinsights.net/aQYgtna6lsWLmZ5T70AjeuXEdB5?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[**Click here to see it!**](https://financeinsights.net/aQYgtna6lsWLmZ5T70AjeuXEdB5?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Beyond scams, travel today can be boobytrapped with all sorts of risks.
Any of those can be manageable, however, if you practice some basic travel safety before you take off.
If you do, you could gain some priceless peace of mind. And you could end up having a better trip -- and wonderful lasting memories of it.
[**Want to read more about travel safety and what it takes to vacation safely these days? Click here to check out the rest.**](https://financeinsights.net/aQYgtna6lsWLmZ5T70AjeuXEdB5?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

Sincerely,
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IjB6d05UNDUzd0MyYThnYiIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)

* * *
P.S. What travel scams have you run into or heard about? How did you know it was a scam or how would you avoid getting conned by that scam in the future? Hit "reply" and share your story with me. I'd love to hear more about your experiences with travel scams and what you've learned from them.
Sources
1. [https://consumer.ftc.gov/articles/avoid-scams-when-you-travel](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC9jb25zdW1lci5mdGMuZ292XC9hcnRpY2xlc1wvYXZvaWQtc2NhbXMtd2hlbi15b3UtdHJhdmVsIiwiaGFzaCI6IjB6d05UNDUzd0MyYThnYiIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)

# [#] Team, it’s Election Day!

Polls are open today until 8 p.m.

If you’re in line to vote at 8 p.m., STAY IN LINE!!!

You can click here to find your polling location and any other voting information! [https://www.nj.gov/state/elections/vote-polling-location.shtml]

If you voted by mail but have not returned your ballot yet, you can return it to your county’s Board of Elections office or to a secure ballot drop box by 8 p.m. today! To find a drop box location near you, click here! [https://www.nj.gov/state/elections/vote-secure-drop-boxes.shtml]

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas bets big on nuclear: Lawmakers greenlight $350M in taxpayer funds for new projects,** " Houston Chronicle's**Claire Hao** - "Texas lawmakers have approved [the creation of a $350 million program](https://substack.com/redirect/77986a17-2aad-4df0-bc35-67404ad71847?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to attract the advanced nuclear industry to the state by giving companies taxpayer-funded grants to develop nuclear projects.

The amount falls short of the $2 billion initially sought by the industry. Still, the money set aside in Texas' budget this session for nuclear projects is the "largest national commitment" of its kind, Gov. **Greg Abbott** said [in a recent statement](https://substack.com/redirect/f0b70568-f91a-4a10-84ea-2948c84e6f5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) congratulating the state legislature on passing [House Bill 14](https://substack.com/redirect/50467aea-af5c-4f66-8274-f82996101658?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Abbott last year [declared his goal](https://substack.com/redirect/cc642989-9afb-471c-b8ac-bf02aaa7e1b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for Texas to be "the global leader in advanced nuclear power." HB14 implements several initiatives recommended by [the governor's advanced nuclear working group](https://substack.com/redirect/e9a4ab7e-1aec-4628-8ecd-fd9af0e2670a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The bill has been sent to Abbott, who said that he looks forward to signing it into law.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/69c12ed2-61dd-40c9-8096-f5b6c187173e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Texas is the energy capital of the world, and this legislation will position Texas at the forefront of America's nuclear renaissance," Abbott said in the statement.

Under HB14, a Texas nuclear energy office would be established within the governor's own office. This new office would oversee the nuclear funding program, as well as help companies interested in developing projects navigate the state's permitting and regulatory process.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/69c12ed2-61dd-40c9-8096-f5b6c187173e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Reed Clay** , president of the Texas Nuclear Alliance, a statewide trade group, said Friday there's "overwhelming excitement" within the industry about HB14's success. He expects to see "a continued stream" of companies announcing intentions to develop nuclear reactors in Texas.

"Texas has really cemented its position as the head of the class, in terms of the state that's best positioned to take advantage of the next Atomic Age," Clay said.

The American nuclear industry is awakening from a decades-long slump as it touts a technology known as [small modular reactors](https://substack.com/redirect/39c623f7-8a14-4644-af6d-a801d85c029c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which are supposed to be easier and cheaper to build than traditional reactors, though no commercial SMRs [have been deployed in the country](https://substack.com/redirect/867bb1cc-0456-47fb-9456-1f512c926abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Texas has already [attracted a growing number](https://substack.com/redirect/4e348787-5d70-4b57-a3f6-b0837835dfb1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [of advanced nuclear companies](https://substack.com/redirect/a1098d61-c4dc-4644-a1f8-e70a52cbbdeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to set up in the state or to announce plans to build here. [The nuclear industry has argued that Texas](https://substack.com/redirect/92f481a5-ee64-4593-b06a-5751943169c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) could reap tens of billions in investment and hundreds of thousands of high-paying jobs if the state put up its own funds to jumpstart the sector's expansion.

Plus, nuclear's proponents argue, incentivizing the construction of**** more advanced nuclear power plants would be beneficial for Texas' power grid. Demand for electricity could jump more than 70% by 2031, according to [the Texas power grid operator's estimates](https://substack.com/redirect/6043f9cb-48ab-4b6b-8ab7-e56acb3e1118?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as data centers and other large electricity users flock to the state.

Thus, more nuclear is needed to provide Texas residents and businesses a source of continuous electricity generated without climate-warming emissions, industry supporters say.

Yet, many of Texas' most prominent environmental groups are strongly opposed to giving what they called "handouts" to nuclear companies. The industry has [a history of overpromising and under-delivering](https://substack.com/redirect/3a2bd283-0565-40e8-aea9-f140fef85956?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), so taxpayer dollars shouldn't be spent on a risky technology that hasn't yet proven itself in the market, critics said repeatedly to Texas lawmakers in the last few months.

The nuclear industry started in January with an ambitious ask -- $2 billion -- from the Texas Legislature. That number was gradually whittled down in lawmaker negotiations to $750 million, and then finally to the $350 million that was approved." [Hou Chron](https://substack.com/redirect/84cf44fa-0574-4297-8f33-2f8770ab641b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "Texas bets big on nuclear: Lawmakers greenlight $350M in taxpayer funds for new projects, " Houston Chronicle'sClaire Hao - "Texas lawmakers have approved to attract the advanced nuclear industry to the state by giving companies taxpayer-funded grants to develop nuclear projects. The amount falls short of the $2 billion initially sought by the industry. Still, the money set aside in Texas' budget this session for nuclear projects is the "largest national commitment" of its kind, Gov. Greg Abbott said congratulating the state legislature on passing . Abbott last year for Texas to be "the global leader in advanced nuclear power." HB14 implements several initiatives recommended by . The bill has been sent to Abbott, who said that he looks forward to signing it into law. "Texas is the energy capital of the world, and this legislation will position Texas at the forefront of America's nuclear renaissance," Abbott said in the statement. Under HB14, a Texas nuclear energy office would be established within the governor's own office. This new office would oversee the nuclear funding program, as well as help companies interested in developing projects navigate the state's permitting and regulatory process. Reed Clay , president of the Texas Nuclear Alliance, a statewide trade group, said Friday there's "overwhelming excitement" within the industry about HB14's success. He expects to see "a continued stream" of companies announcing intentions to develop nuclear reactors in Texas. "Texas has really cemented its position as the head of the class, in terms of the state that's best positioned to take advantage of the next Atomic Age," Clay said. The American nuclear industry is awakening from a decades-long slump as it touts a technology known as , which are supposed to be easier and cheaper to build than traditional reactors, though no commercial SMRs . Texas has already to set up in the state or to announce plans to build here. could reap tens of billions in investment and hundreds of thousands of high-paying jobs if the state put up its own funds to jumpstart the sector's expansion. Plus, nuclear's proponents argue, incentivizing the construction of** more advanced nuclear power plants would be beneficial for Texas' power grid. Demand for electricity could jump more than 70% by 2031, according to , as data centers and other large electricity users flock to the state. Thus, more nuclear is needed to provide Texas residents and businesses a source of continuous electricity generated without climate-warming emissions, industry supporters say. Yet, many of Texas' most prominent environmental groups are strongly opposed to giving what they called "handouts" to nuclear companies. The industry has , so taxpayer dollars shouldn't be spent on a risky technology that hasn't yet proven itself in the market, critics said repeatedly to Texas lawmakers in the last few months. The nuclear industry started in January with an ambitious ask -- $2 billion -- from the Texas Legislature. That number was gradually whittled down in lawmaker negotiations to $750 million, and then finally to the $350 million that was approved." name: Jennifer Pepper
subject: We were the last clinic in TN providing abortions
body:
People will ALWAYS need access to care | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109317199/550707010/1126318745?sourceid=1150744&utm_campaign=25emige-0603aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZlYTg0NS0wNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyqERbDmxHWT8JII-3znprQkIeJjW1SKyPNzveTC5Os=&emci=11c8696d-f342-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=506ea845-0646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
---
Dear Peter,

CHOICES was founded in 1974 by Black and white feminists in Memphis who were done waiting for access to care. Even after _Roe v. Wade_ was decided, the medical system refused to provide abortion care—so we built our own clinic. Nearly 50 years later when the U.S. Supreme Court overturned _Roe_ , we stood as Tennessee's _last_ abortion clinic. That didn't happen by chance. [**It happened thanks to the support of the Center for Reproductive Rights... and people just like you who have stepped up to support abortion rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109317200/550707011/1126318745?sourceid=1150744&utm_campaign=25emige-0603aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZlYTg0NS0wNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyqERbDmxHWT8JII-3znprQkIeJjW1SKyPNzveTC5Os=&emci=11c8696d-f342-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=506ea845-0646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) | [**FUND THE FIGHT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109317201/550707012/1126318745?sourceid=1150744&utm_campaign=25emige-0603aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZlYTg0NS0wNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyqERbDmxHWT8JII-3znprQkIeJjW1SKyPNzveTC5Os=&emci=11c8696d-f342-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=506ea845-0646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "FUND THE FIGHT")
---
Since 2014, the Center for Reproductive Rights has been our legal backbone. They helped us challenge restrictive policies, like Amendment 1, which amended the state constitution to remove privacy rights and make abortion illegal or unavailable in Tennessee. [**They've also helped us navigate a minefield of anti-abortion laws and stay open when so many other clinics were forced to close, turning away patients who needed care.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109317202/550707013/1126318745?sourceid=1150744&utm_campaign=25emige-0603aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZlYTg0NS0wNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyqERbDmxHWT8JII-3znprQkIeJjW1SKyPNzveTC5Os=&emci=11c8696d-f342-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=506ea845-0646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) And when abortion was essentially banned in Tennessee, they helped us open a new clinic in Illinois so we could continue providing critical, comprehensive reproductive care.
[**2X YOUR IMPACT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109317203/550707014/1126318745?sourceid=1150744&utm_campaign=25emige-0603aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZlYTg0NS0wNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyqERbDmxHWT8JII-3znprQkIeJjW1SKyPNzveTC5Os=&emci=11c8696d-f342-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=506ea845-0646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "2X YOUR IMPACT")
---
Patients travel from 21 states to see us. And we're still here in Memphis, operating Tennessee's only birth center led by Black midwives, offering care with dignity and safety to communities often left behind. Because of the Center's support, we've been able to be bold, resilient, and courageous in the face of an ever-shifting abortion rights landscape. But this fight is far from over.

[**The Center's legal and compliance support continues to ensure we can show up for the 16-year-old seeking gender-affirming care, the patient navigating a long journey from a ban state, and the Black mother delivering her baby with dignity and safety.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109317205/550707015/1126318745?sourceid=1150744&utm_campaign=25emige-0603aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZlYTg0NS0wNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyqERbDmxHWT8JII-3znprQkIeJjW1SKyPNzveTC5Os=&emci=11c8696d-f342-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=506ea845-0646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) Together with the Center, we've helped shape state policy, protect our clinics from harmful laws, and stand boldly for reproductive freedom.

[**This fight isn't a sprint or a marathon, it's a relay. Because of the Center, we've made it this far. Now it’s your turn to lead the charge. Take the baton. Fund the fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109317207/550707016/1126318745?sourceid=1150744&utm_campaign=25emige-0603aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZlYTg0NS0wNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyqERbDmxHWT8JII-3znprQkIeJjW1SKyPNzveTC5Os=&emci=11c8696d-f342-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=506ea845-0646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Be courageous,

Jennifer Pepper
President and CEO of CHOICES, client of the Center for Reproductive Rights

P.S. [**Give by June 30 and your donation will be matched—doubling your impact for reproductive rights in the U.S. and around the world.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109317210/550707017/1126318745?sourceid=1150744&utm_campaign=25emige-0603aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZlYTg0NS0wNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyqERbDmxHWT8JII-3znprQkIeJjW1SKyPNzveTC5Os=&emci=11c8696d-f342-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=506ea845-0646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

clean_body: People will ALWAYS need access to care | Dear Peter, CHOICES was founded in 1974 by Black and white feminists in Memphis who were done waiting for access to care. Even after Roe v. Wade was decided, the medical system refused to provide abortion care—so we built our own clinic. Nearly 50 years later when the U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe , we stood as Tennessee's last abortion clinic. That didn't happen by chance. | "FUND THE FIGHT" Since 2014, the Center for Reproductive Rights has been our legal backbone. They helped us challenge restrictive policies, like Amendment 1, which amended the state constitution to remove privacy rights and make abortion illegal or unavailable in Tennessee. And when abortion was essentially banned in Tennessee, they helped us open a new clinic in Illinois so we could continue providing critical, comprehensive reproductive care. "2X YOUR IMPACT" Patients travel from 21 states to see us. And we're still here in Memphis, operating Tennessee's only birth center led by Black midwives, offering care with dignity and safety to communities often left behind. Because of the Center's support, we've been able to be bold, resilient, and courageous in the face of an ever-shifting abortion rights landscape. But this fight is far from over. Together with the Center, we've helped shape state policy, protect our clinics from harmful laws, and stand boldly for reproductive freedom. Be courageous, Jennifer Pepper President and CEO of CHOICES, client of the Center for Reproductive Rights P.S. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

| Good Morning,
Rob was in DC last week but was home for the weekend. He’s been working tirelessly, voting for what’s best for NEPA! His CEASE Act passed the House, which targets companies that give out predatory loans to small businesses. For too long, predatory banks have given out loans with astronomical interest rates to people already in dire straits. As a former small business owner, this was near and dear to his heart and will financially protect small businesses. Lastly, tonight Rob is doing another Tele-Town Hall at 6:30! Feel free to call in or follow live on Facebook. Rob is in Washington again this week but will be back this weekend.

name: Michael | Overhaul PAC
subject: Bloodbath: Should Tom Homan arrest Newsom?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Overhaul PAC
body:
Illegals torch cars. Assault police. Gavin Newsom lets it all happen. Should Tom Homan arrest him?

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9am8n2accdju7tb5f7ulnj1fekro5nidbgoc9a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4o30cth2bs)
---
Michael from Overhaul PAC here — and it’s time to say what nobody in D.C. has the guts to say: It’s time for Tom Homan to step in and ARREST Gavin Newsom. Because THIS is not a protest — 👉 It’s an invasion. 👉 It’s mob rule. 👉 It’s open warfare on American soil. And Newsom is letting it happen. In Los Angeles: 🔥 Illegals torched cars. 🔥 Mobs attacked ICE agents. 🔥 Police officers were assaulted. 🔥 National Guard troops were ambushed. All because ICE dared to enforce the law. Newsom isn’t just allowing it — he’s protecting it. This is DERELICTION OF DUTY. 👉 He’s spitting in the face of federal law. 👉 He’s shielding foreign criminals. 👉 And he’s actively obstructing ICE, law enforcement, and national security. If you or I did this, we’d be arrested immediately. Patriot — enough is enough. It’s time to demand federal action. It’s time for Tom Homan to step in and ARREST Gavin Newsom for aiding and abetting this invasion. ** ADD YOUR NAME: DEMAND TOM HOMAN STEP IN****👇**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME BEFORE MIDNIGHT** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z07qketq9olf6oli80jtd5ahu53ucfq50jaj2f88_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4o30cth2bs)
---
Let me be blunt: Burn police cars? Attack ICE? Torch U.S. cities? You’re not a protester — you’re an enemy of this country. And if Gavin Newsom wants to shield these violent mobs, then he can stand trial alongside them. **Overhaul PAC is rallying 100,000 America First patriots to demand Congress and federal authorities take emergency action BEFORE this spreads nationwide.** **SIGN NOW. STAND UP. AND MAKE IT CLEAR:** **NO ONE — INCLUDING GOVERNORS — IS ABOVE THE LAW.**

name: Jesse Binnall, The Kash Foundation
subject: Law enforcement officers are being handcuffed
body:
You, me, and every American should be terrified.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z05phhjma76shuslbq3qhpdrp00543v0uouqjl48_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)
Friend,

You, me, and every American should be terrified.

Here is what is happening right now in cities across our country:
* In _**Los Angeles**_ , radical activists are burning American flags and cop cars during violent riots.

* In _**Washington, D.C.**_ , homicides are hitting record highs, and the city council still wants to cut funding for law enforcement.

* In _**Chicago**_ , elected officials are setting illegal immigrants free, even those with prior weapons charges, all because it’s a so-called “sanctuary city.”

* In _**Texas**_ , ICE agents were publicly smeared by President Biden after being falsely accused of _“whipping”_ illegal immigrants. A claim that was completely debunked, but never retracted.

**You see, the very people who swore to protect us are under attack, all because they dared to wear the badge.**

But I have a plan to fight back.

My name is Jesse Binnall. You might have seen me before on Fox News or Newsmax fighting against election fraud and weaponized government prosecutions. Today, I’m humbled to serve as the President of The Kash Foundation.

[The Kash Foundation, founded by Kash Patel, supports law enforcement who are being politically targeted, wrongfully prosecuted, and silenced for doing their jobs.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3bd5mfs4g8vfiad09g86omilnmbdenp9h6715o0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)

_Although Kash has been called to a new mission,_ the Kash Foundation continues to embody the bold vision he set in motion, one rooted in truth, justice, and fearless accountability.

But we can’t do it alone.

[Please donate any amount you can afford to support the Kash Foundation’s mission today. We are looking to raise $56,000 this month to support our nation’s law enforcement. Click here to donate >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6fvupkm16261bc9l6elkhigbvvfsifkkovlood8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)
[DONATE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp6afefkgbffiaq8b884klr9a9lt9j02ntvud6ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)
Law enforcement is being set up to fail. And it’s patriots like you who pay the price.

This is what is at stake:
* **The radical Left is targeting law enforcement:** They're using politics and public pressure to punish those who protect us, and it's working. Now, many are scared to act, second-guessing every decision, and wondering if anyone still has their back.

* **Crime is spilling into every neighborhood:** Carjackings, home invasions, and violent assaults aren’t just big-city problems anymore. They’re happening in suburbs, small towns, and rural communities.

* **Emergency response is slowing down:** In some areas, it takes 15, 20, even 30 minutes for law enforcement to arrive...if they come at all. That delay can cost lives.

Good cops across the country desperately need backup, and right now, you are the backup they need to protect our country.

The Kash Foundation is assembling a team. A team that can’t be bought. Can’t be bullied. And won’t back down from defending the truth.

And we’re asking you to join the force.

Not with a badge, but with bold action to help defend truth, justice, and those who keep us safe.

[Please donate today because when law enforcement calls for backup, you answer!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh32tbrf3put86o8kin9dhhgadsfc2tirf6s6dho_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)
[DONATE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgfq38eu14me4nf37tuhg7ou1tn9a0q9d9iap9i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)
When others turned their backs, we stepped in.

The Kash Foundation hasn’t been around long, but in our short existence, we’ve distributed over $1,000,000 in grants to America First patriots in need.

The Kash Foundation is proud to share that it has been able to:

* Provide financial support and care for families of fallen officers. When a law enforcement officer doesn’t make it home, we can help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.

* Provide scholarships to children of those who gave everything. The loss of a parent in the line of duty is life-shattering. We provide scholarships that help those kids so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future.

* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, we help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

And with your help, we’ll do even more.

**You and I can’t sit this one out, not while those who protect us are being taken down by politics and fear.**

We need your help to step in where others won’t and provide legal aid, emergency grants, and support to law enforcement and their families when politics leaves them out in the cold.

[So with that in mind, if you can afford to send $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even more – I hope you do.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1tvbtj878d0v34f8t9966f7irr0bbcg802c7e28_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)
[DONATE $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z35hgt37vmln51036punkpp9tbs1pa9or6apa8oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)

[DONATE $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl2fb48rb2ntnbmei9fdvbvqq7ofot01io6b6vp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)

[DONATE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjlcaun2s63to674pb4ks27v25qrtvmc0eu45iho_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)

[DONATE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq8ar65d8jglsviijbvn7bkjqb1l9kti2brr1jqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)

[DONATE $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znaomibvop3no79ag43t060lu4mkkerks77s1i20_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)

[DONATE $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuh8shffn71pv2emkh74gitdj1dq1pkcagctiu88_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)

[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6i3rs4cb0kgf1ec5a829siegjuoekuekmdvqu1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge4p70c3h2bs)
Thank you for answering the call and fighting with The Kash Foundation for a better future, promoting public interest, civil liberty protections, and real justice.

For law, order, and liberty,

Jesse Binnall
President
The Kash Foundation

Alexandria, VA. 22314

body:
| | | Friend, it's Kirsten Gillibrand, your DSCC Chair. I just looked at the numbers ahead of tonight's midnight fundraising deadline, and I have to ask:

**[Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $5 to flip the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250610-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandAnythingICanSay-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250610-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandAnythingICanSay-ETG-sl1&akid=20458%2E9716520%2E8HvKmO)**
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250610-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandAnythingICanSay-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250610-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandAnythingICanSay-ETG-sl1&akid=20458%2E9716520%2E8HvKmO)
---

What if I told you that the GOP and its megadonors spent **over $500 million** to seize the Senate majority, and Trump is on track to raise a **BILLION more** to keep it?

What if I told you that election experts report **Democrats have a "difficult climb to regain a majority,"** and we have our work cut out for us if we're going to take back the Senate?

But what if I told you that top analysts _also_ say **a majority of the most competitive Senate seats are held by Republicans** , which shows we could have a path back to a Democratic Senate -- _IF_ we rise to the occasion?

We may be up against a far-right money machine and have some _tough_ races ahead of us, but **we have a real opportunity to beat the odds and take back the majority.** It's my job to make sure we do everything we can to win, and that starts with raising the $19,748 we still need to hit our next fundraising goal before tonight's deadline.

**[So please: Can I count on you to make a $5 donation to help us hit our fundraising goal and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250610-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandAnythingICanSay-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250610-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandAnythingICanSay-ETG-sl1&akid=20458%2E9716520%2E8HvKmO)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Americans for Responsible Innovation
subject: 10-Year AI Law Ban Faces Backlash
body:
If April was a breakthrough month for AI policy, May was a reminder that progress is a battle — and we're in it for the long haul.

| | | | | |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=1976a8f035&e=a07d75591f)
|
---
| | | | |
# **Preemption Battles, Petition Drives, and Export Controls Uncertainty **
---
| | | | | | | | | | | If April was a breakthrough month for AI policy, May was a reminder that **progress is a battle — and we're in it for the long haul.** From major export control news to pushing back on troubling new proposals, ARI has had a busy month on the frontlines of AI policymaking in Washington. The AI landscape changes every week, and we’re here to keep you in the loop.Here’s what we’ve been up to:
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
### **ARI vs a 10-Year Moratorium on State AI Laws**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Not all AI legislation is headed in the right direction. A provision in the budget reconciliation package under consideration in Congress would **preempt state laws regulating AI** , stripping power from states just as they begin responding to urgent AI-related issues.ARI has quickly launched a full-court press:
* We released a[ press statement](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=30dd256e30&e=a07d75591f) condemning the proposal.

---
| [Our Press Statement](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=5767ecae67&e=a07d75591f)
---
|
* We **organized a letter signed by 260 state lawmakers** from across the country, urging Congress to reject the measure. The Washington Post described our letter from state lawmakers as “the most broad-based opposition yet” to the AI moratorium proposal. [Read the WaPo exclusive](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=6299827a34&e=a07d75591f) on our state lawmaker coalition letter and [read the full letter here](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=32ad0d0432&e=a07d75591f).

[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=aec94eb4f3&e=a07d75591f)
* We launched a public [petition campaign](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=cca0b18212&e=a07d75591f), helping to gather 25,000 petition signatures against the AI moratorium proposal. [Axios reported](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=53596fd093&e=a07d75591f) on the grassroots petition drive that we worked on alongside Public Citizen and Accountable Tech.

---
| [ Our Petition Statement](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=68ccad1577&e=a07d75591f)
---
|
* We signed a[ coalition letter](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=a0ec1abc7c&e=a07d75591f) with allied advocacy organizations.

---
| [Our Coalition Letter](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=6be94c506c&e=a07d75591f)
---
| While we believe the reconciliation measure will ultimately be stripped due to the Byrd Rule, **we** **expect new standalone legislation on AI preemption to be introduced.**
---
|
---
|
### **AI Diffusion Framework Repeal—And What’s Next**
---
| In late May, the Trump Administration announced it would **repeal Biden’s AI diffusion export control framework** , a move that leaves U.S. AI policy uncertain at a critical moment.In response, ARI laid out a [new strategic framework](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=b7bda1515b&e=a07d75591f) for regulating the export of advanced AI chips. Our proposal focuses on prioritizing robust international cooperation, verifiable security requirements for chip buyers, 'know your customer' requirements for Licensing as a Service (LaaS) providers, and preventing the unauthorized proliferation of model weights.
---
| [Our Letter to the Dept. of Commerce](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=c1c385b7d8&e=a07d75591f)
---
|
---
|
### **The White House Goes Nuclear**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | From nuclear energy to OpenAI’s mysterious hardware plans, the newest edition of The Output covers the latest in AI policy news.Touching on policy, industry, and research news, The Output is your one-stop shop for the biggest movements in the AI policy space.
---
| [The Output](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=1001390313&e=a07d75591f)
---
|
---
|
### **ARI President Brad Carson Keynotes AI Conference**
---
| This past month, ARI President Brad Carson was the keynote speaker at FAR-AI’s Technical Innovations for AI Policy conference. FAR-AI is a frontier alignment research organization that seeks to ensure the secure development and deployment of advanced AI systems.During his keynote address, Brad highlighted 10 open questions about AI, including energy demands, military applications, overemphasis on generative AI, and more.
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=45b9585e43&e=a07d75591f)
| [Watch Brad’s Keynote Speech](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=3b976c51f9&e=a07d75591f)
---
|
---
| As we continue to advocate for responsible AI innovation in the public interest, thank you for working alongside us and staying current on the work we’re doing.
Onward,Americans for Responsible Innovation
---
|
---

---
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=bc0629fc32&e=a07d75591f)
---

The Washington Post described our letter from state lawmakers as “the most broad-based opposition yet” to the AI moratorium proposal. on our state lawmaker coalition letter and . We launched a public , helping to gather 25,000 petition signatures against the AI moratorium proposal. on the grassroots petition drive that we worked on alongside Public Citizen and Accountable Tech. | | We signed a with allied advocacy organizations. | | While we believe the reconciliation measure will ultimately be stripped due to the Byrd Rule, we expect new standalone legislation on AI preemption to be introduced. | | AI Diffusion Framework Repeal—And What’s Next | In late May, the Trump Administration announced it would repeal Biden’s AI diffusion export control framework , a move that leaves U.S. AI policy uncertain at a critical moment.In response, ARI laid out a for regulating the export of advanced AI chips. Our proposal focuses on prioritizing robust international cooperation, verifiable security requirements for chip buyers, 'know your customer' requirements for Licensing as a Service (LaaS) providers, and preventing the unauthorized proliferation of model weights. | | | The White House Goes Nuclear | | | | | | | | | | | From nuclear energy to OpenAI’s mysterious hardware plans, the newest edition of The Output covers the latest in AI policy news.Touching on policy, industry, and research news, The Output is your one-stop shop for the biggest movements in the AI policy space. | | | ARI President Brad Carson Keynotes AI Conference | This past month, ARI President Brad Carson was the keynote speaker at FAR-AI’s Technical Innovations for AI Policy conference. FAR-AI is a frontier alignment research organization that seeks to ensure the secure development and deployment of advanced AI systems.During his keynote address, Brad highlighted 10 open questions about AI, including energy demands, military applications, overemphasis on generative AI, and more. | | | As we continue to advocate for responsible AI innovation in the public interest, thank you for working alongside us and staying current on the work we’re doing. Onward,Americans for Responsible Innovation | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 American for Responsible Innovation. All rights reserved.You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. name: Jane Fonda
subject: Trump’s deployment of the National Guard to LA is a warning.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The right to protest is under attack, and we must defend it.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109324183/550725166/1328794144?refcode=ea.36531b69-0f46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.36531b69-0f46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2NTMxYjY5LTBmNDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BYz38F2lSaEY9c2vf1ryoJWG_ICJR3sQai2C59OEirE=&emci=85b10a47-0346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=36531b69-0f46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
Throughout my life, I’ve marched, I’ve protested, and I’ve been arrested. I have and will continue to put my body on the line because I believe the right to protest is one of the most powerful tools we have to speak out against the injustices of our world. That’s why what Donald Trump is doing in Los Angeles makes me furious. **For the first time in 60 years, a president has deployed the National Guard to a state without the governor’s consent, all because people dared to speak out.** The people of LA took to the streets to oppose cruel and targeted ICE raids. They demanded justice and dignity for their neighbors. And Trump responded by trying to strip that right away. Let’s be clear: This is nothing more than political theater, staged by a wannabe strongman who cares more about appearances than protecting our democratic freedoms. So just like every generation before us, we have a choice to make. **Will we stand idly by as the Trump Administration targets labor leaders, organizers, and protesters? Or, will we come together to stand with our community members in LA and speak out for the voiceless?** I know where I stand, and I think you do, too. The right to protest is essential to our democracy. It always has been. If we don’t sound the alarm now, this overreach won’t stop in LA. It will spread. **[That’s why I’m speaking out, and why I hope you will too. Can you commit to taking to the streets and attending the nationwide ‘No Kings’ protest on Saturday, June 14th? People like you are showing up _everywhere_ to say no thrones, no kings, no crowns.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109324184/550725167/602626186?org_ids=42198&refcode=ea.36531b69-0f46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.36531b69-0f46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2NTMxYjY5LTBmNDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BYz38F2lSaEY9c2vf1ryoJWG_ICJR3sQai2C59OEirE=&emci=85b10a47-0346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=36531b69-0f46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | [**FIND A PROTEST NEAR YOU**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109324185/550725168/602626186?org_ids=42198&refcode=ea.36531b69-0f46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.36531b69-0f46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2NTMxYjY5LTBmNDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BYz38F2lSaEY9c2vf1ryoJWG_ICJR3sQai2C59OEirE=&emci=85b10a47-0346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=36531b69-0f46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
Look, I know things feel hopeless. One step forward. Two steps backward. But across the country, people are pushing back and holding the line against the dismantling of democracy.
Hope is a muscle like the heart. It's when we take action that hope comes alive. Thank you for giving me hope.
In solidarity,
Jane

Let’s be clear: This is nothing more than political theater, staged by a wannabe strongman who cares more about appearances than protecting our democratic freedoms. So just like every generation before us, we have a choice to make. Will we stand idly by as the Trump Administration targets labor leaders, organizers, and protesters? Or, will we come together to stand with our community members in LA and speak out for the voiceless? I know where I stand, and I think you do, too. The right to protest is essential to our democracy. It always has been. If we don’t sound the alarm now, this overreach won’t stop in LA. It will spread. | Look, I know things feel hopeless. One step forward. Two steps backward. But across the country, people are pushing back and holding the line against the dismantling of democracy. Hope is a muscle like the heart. It's when we take action that hope comes alive. Thank you for giving me hope. In solidarity, Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Team Crow
subject: Jason Crow: Colorado’s Democrat of the Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hi team,

We’ve got some incredible news to share: Last weekend, the Colorado Democratic Party named Jason Crow Democrat of the Year!

This honor is more than just an award. It’s a recognition of what we’ve built together — a movement to fight for working families, stand up to MAGA extremism, and bring integrity back to Washington.

https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/202506-demoftheyear [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/202506-demoftheyear]

When Senator Michael Bennet introduced Jason, and presented his award, he emphasized Jason embodies the highest ideals and aspirations for what it means to be a servant leader. Calling him “one of the best elected leaders in the country”, Senator Bennet said Jason always takes on the tough fights, from serving as an impeachment manager, to gun safety, to veterans' rights, and he’s done it with grit, honesty, determination, and a deep belief in service.

We’re so proud of this recognition, and it’s inspired Jason to fight even harder for what he believes in. If you’ve got Jason’s back in the fights ahead, we’d love for you to add your name and stand with him: [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/202506-demoftheyear]

SIGN ON NOW [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/202506-demoftheyear]

Thanks for being part of this movement. We’re so glad to have you on our side.

— Team Crow

name: Jesse Binnall, The Kash Foundation
subject: Law enforcement officers are being handcuffed
body:
You, me, and every American should be terrified.

|
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z912d4ldsbkq2ocv574og8l7gravq9nkehreh81g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)
Friend,

You, me, and every American should be terrified.

Here is what is happening right now in cities across our country:
* In _**Los Angeles**_ , radical activists are burning American flags and cop cars during violent riots.

* In _**Washington, D.C.**_ , homicides are hitting record highs, and the city council still wants to cut funding for law enforcement.

* In _**Chicago**_ , elected officials are setting illegal immigrants free, even those with prior weapons charges, all because it’s a so-called “sanctuary city.”

* In _**Texas**_ , ICE agents were publicly smeared by President Biden after being falsely accused of _“whipping”_ illegal immigrants. A claim that was completely debunked, but never retracted.

**You see, the very people who swore to protect us are under attack, all because they dared to wear the badge.**

But I have a plan to fight back.

My name is Jesse Binnall. You might have seen me before on Fox News or Newsmax fighting against election fraud and weaponized government prosecutions. Today, I’m humbled to serve as the President of The Kash Foundation.

[The Kash Foundation, founded by Kash Patel, supports law enforcement who are being politically targeted, wrongfully prosecuted, and silenced for doing their jobs.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaojrfhrslvva3311u5vfilq0pi8oc6c41vug45g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)

_Although Kash has been called to a new mission,_ the Kash Foundation continues to embody the bold vision he set in motion, one rooted in truth, justice, and fearless accountability.

But we can’t do it alone.

[Please donate any amount you can afford to support the Kash Foundation’s mission today. We are looking to raise $56,000 this month to support our nation’s law enforcement. Click here to donate >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1pbir3hsnsp3blkt78uu8ij3k7tetaf8j87c16g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)
[DONATE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbqvdgeq4otkl1k3eci6ohhc07rbbsn9jmlhh82g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)
Law enforcement is being set up to fail. And it’s patriots like you who pay the price.

This is what is at stake:
* **The radical Left is targeting law enforcement:** They're using politics and public pressure to punish those who protect us, and it's working. Now, many are scared to act, second-guessing every decision, and wondering if anyone still has their back.

* **Crime is spilling into every neighborhood:** Carjackings, home invasions, and violent assaults aren’t just big-city problems anymore. They’re happening in suburbs, small towns, and rural communities.

* **Emergency response is slowing down:** In some areas, it takes 15, 20, even 30 minutes for law enforcement to arrive...if they come at all. That delay can cost lives.

Good cops across the country desperately need backup, and right now, you are the backup they need to protect our country.

The Kash Foundation is assembling a team. A team that can’t be bought. Can’t be bullied. And won’t back down from defending the truth.

And we’re asking you to join the force.

Not with a badge, but with bold action to help defend truth, justice, and those who keep us safe.

[Please donate today because when law enforcement calls for backup, you answer!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8e1m26ba2dcrj26lt73mlc2lsqfve897c4am18o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)
[DONATE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2cinv2pvur8r80k1nj7tbeqffpopfmbkbbs7neo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)
When others turned their backs, we stepped in.

The Kash Foundation hasn’t been around long, but in our short existence, we’ve distributed over $1,000,000 in grants to America First patriots in need.

The Kash Foundation is proud to share that it has been able to:

* Provide financial support and care for families of fallen officers. When a law enforcement officer doesn’t make it home, we can help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.

* Provide scholarships to children of those who gave everything. The loss of a parent in the line of duty is life-shattering. We provide scholarships that help those kids so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future.

* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, we help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

And with your help, we’ll do even more.

**You and I can’t sit this one out, not while those who protect us are being taken down by politics and fear.**

We need your help to step in where others won’t and provide legal aid, emergency grants, and support to law enforcement and their families when politics leaves them out in the cold.

[So with that in mind, if you can afford to send $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even more – I hope you do.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl5vq2r890mstml19aq29jogo7hjjo3v9v2h61m8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)
[DONATE $10](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2dr97njivqqjjrlmdm8oq0gucvr7b847fq808h0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)

[DONATE $35](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ufj5vs36a8nvj0tl4vqgmhr9mcovvncbojeui8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)

[DONATE $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo679cihngtctk0oihv0ilvs7v46r3lea7j1qs5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)

[DONATE $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmgick82udkcuokd9sjhqjaeq7bm5b26uib98eao_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)

[DONATE $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z89d66phsl8sp0kha5ed1r3ki1ag9glftlvper4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)

[DONATE $1,000](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zupq7o8q5qk369cmk5vjuhj9no5supjro5747hio_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)

[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za9m4tviigsodbpt65s6163cap5m9vegrjqhcln0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slgeco76c5h2bs)
Thank you for answering the call and fighting with The Kash Foundation for a better future, promoting public interest, civil liberty protections, and real justice.

For law, order, and liberty,

Jesse Binnall
President
The Kash Foundation

name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: This email is important to read from top to bottom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.

| | | **☀️ **To each of Abigail's dear supporters, **🇺🇲**

We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom.
---
| | We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. _Our average gift last month was a hair under $30._

It adds up fast, but unfortunately, not everyone is in a position to give. And we completely understand that.
---
| | The fact is that our opponent knows we have momentum on our side, and Democrats nationwide view our race as a bellwether for 2026 (and beyond!). Moreover, Virginia has the only election this year where Democrats can flip a Governor’s seat blue.

_That's why the same far-right billionaire donors who sent Trump to the White House are pouring money into Winsome Earle-Sears' campaign._
---
| | Now, with the general election just ONE WEEK away, we have to ramp up our outreach to folks across the Commonwealth.

Our opponent is already paying for digital ads distorting Abigail's record, but it’s only going to get more intense. Setting the record straight is going to be expensive -- which is why our team set an ambitious fundraising goal for June.
---
| | While it may not seem like much, if every person reading this email contributed even $5, we’d breeze past our goal and have enough resources to win.

[_**What do you say, Peter? If electing Abigail Spanberger is important to you, if flipping the Virginia Governor’s office seems worth $5 to you, make a contribution today to lay the groundwork for a big victory in November.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109325304/550727862/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-10_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWU3Y2FjNDktMTE0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i7X6oiGegnVOsTIP_5vrIaS40Pz1aFVTtj9P-rSrlr4=)

clean_body: We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. | | | ☀️ To each of Abigail's dear supporters, 🇺🇲 We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom. | | We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. Our average gift last month was a hair under $30. It adds up fast, but unfortunately, not everyone is in a position to give. And we completely understand that. | | The fact is that our opponent knows we have momentum on our side, and Democrats nationwide view our race as a bellwether for 2026 (and beyond!). Moreover, Virginia has the only election this year where Democrats can flip a Governor’s seat blue. That's why the same far-right billionaire donors who sent Trump to the White House are pouring money into Winsome Earle-Sears' campaign. | | Now, with the general election just ONE WEEK away, we have to ramp up our outreach to folks across the Commonwealth. Our opponent is already paying for digital ads distorting Abigail's record, but it’s only going to get more intense. Setting the record straight is going to be expensive -- which is why our team set an ambitious fundraising goal for June. | | While it may not seem like much, if every person reading this email contributed even $5, we’d breeze past our goal and have enough resources to win. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = | | 💪 Your support means so much at this critical moment of the race. ♥️ Together, Spanberger for Governor HQ * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: GIFFORDS Alert
subject: Trump is holding a military parade on his birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must speak out.
#

Team,
In case you haven’t heard, Donald Trump is preparing to hold a government-funded military parade on his 79th birthday this Saturday.
According to NBC News, the event will have more than 9,000 soldiers, 130 military vehicles, 50 helicopters, and eight Army bands in attendance. All of this to stroke the president’s ego.
The price tag? Up to $45 million in taxpayer dollars.
This comes at the same time the Trump administration stripped millions of dollars in school mental health resources and removed grants from community violence intervention programs -- things that we KNOW help prevent violence.
Donald Trump is sending a clear message: He would rather spend your money celebrating himself than solving issues that help our families. **This is wrong, and we have to speak out now.**
[**Add your name to tell Congress that you are AGAINST Donald Trump spending taxpayer money for a military parade for himself this weekend. We must raise our voices, loud and clear.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_military_parade_june2025//?source=em250610-1-b&refcode2=10566.3935704.QYdlel&akid=10566%2E3935704%2EQYdlel)
**[ADD MY NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_military_parade_june2025//?source=em250610-1-b&refcode2=10566.3935704.QYdlel&akid=10566%2E3935704%2EQYdlel)**
Thank you.
-- Team GIFFORDS
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/62200?t=1&akid=10566%2E3935704%2EQYdlel)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=10566%2E3935704%2EQYdlel) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| Hey Everyone! I am excited to announce that this month we will be joined at our monthly meeting by State Rep. Brandi Bradley, who is on the front lines at the state capitol and is deeply involved in the fight against HB 25-1312, the radical transgender law that Governor Polis signed last month.
We will also provide an update this month on the attempt to call a special meeting of the Colorado GOP to vote on the 2026 primary opt-out, as well as updates on the Unity Scorecard and a recap of the RNC Spring Training held in Miami last month.
Next month, we will hear from another Colorado GOP Gubernatorial Candidate, and I am hopeful that we can keep the momentum of our grassroots movement strong as we lead into the November 2025 School Board Elections.
As always, click the image or button below to RSVP for our meeting on Tuesday.

name: Steve Simon
subject: A legacy worth fighting for
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109326721/550732184/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQxNzQ3MjYtMTQ0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c0iH438onrpFeDNO-L_mft3Lf1JhFAv8UaegthYIem0=) | My grandfather was born in Eveleth, Minnesota, to Jewish immigrants who fled persecution in Lithuania, a place where they had no say in who governed them. They came to this country, and to this state,**in search of something simple but powerful: freedom.** They opened a dry goods store in Hill City, worked hard, raised their family, and knew what mattered most:**look out for others, speak the truth, and always be a part of something bigger than yourself.** **That legacy is why I do this work.** **I’ve spent my career defending democracy and the right to vote, first as a legislator and now as Secretary of State, because I know what’s at stake when people are denied their voice.** And right now, that freedom is under attack again, from efforts to block eligible voters, from disinformation, and from those who want to silence truth-tellers. **[That’s why I need your help. June 30th is our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we need to raise another $27,000 before then. People will be watching to see if we’re still willing to stand up for our democracy. As Secretary of State, I oversee Minnesota’s elections, and I take that responsibility personally.
I know that when a young person votes for the first time, when a senior is able to cast a ballot from home, when an election judge feels supported and safe doing their job, that’s democracy in action.
In Minnesota, we lead the nation in voter turnout year after year. And that’s not an accident. It’s because we’ve fought to expand access, strengthen election security, and protect every voter’s voice, no matter where they live or who they vote for.
**But those achievements didn’t happen on their own.**
They came from people like you showing up, staying engaged, and believing that our democracy is worth protecting.
**[So I’m asking again: if you believe in this work and if you believe in what we’re building together, will you chip in before the end of the quarter fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109326729/550732192/1241229473?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250610&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQxNzQ3MjYtMTQ0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c0iH438onrpFeDNO-L_mft3Lf1JhFAv8UaegthYIem0=) **
Thank you for being part of this. It means more than you know.
Gratefully,
Steve

His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. clean_body: = | My grandfather was born in Eveleth, Minnesota, to Jewish immigrants who fled persecution in Lithuania, a place where they had no say in who governed them. They came to this country, and to this state,in search of something simple but powerful: freedom. They opened a dry goods store in Hill City, worked hard, raised their family, and knew what mattered most:look out for others, speak the truth, and always be a part of something bigger than yourself. That legacy is why I do this work. I’ve spent my career defending democracy and the right to vote, first as a legislator and now as Secretary of State, because I know what’s at stake when people are denied their voice. Friends,
This Pride Month, we’re celebrating the courage, joy, and resilience of the LGBTQ+ community—and recommitting ourselves to protecting equality and justice for all Coloradans.
From banning conversion therapy to expanding nondiscrimination protections, Colorado has made progress, but extremists across the country are working to roll those rights back. From issuing a ban on Transgender individuals serving in the military, to cutting resources for LGBTQ Health Grants, the Trump Administration has taken discriminatory actions against the LGBTQ+ community.
We want to send a message this Pride Month: Colorado is a safe, welcoming, and inclusive state for everyone, regardless of who they love.
Can you sign our petition to show you stand for LGBTQ+ rights? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/raAabkx9s0q8KpXkTRCECw2]
Thanks for standing with us in the fight for equality. We’re proud to be in this movement with you.
—Team Griswold

subject: Tim Walz calls ICE agents the Gestapo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the U.S. Senate, and I believe in immigration enforcement and the deportation of criminal illegal aliens. That does not make me a Nazi. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e63f82a845cb4a599effc4e5cd9d4312&_e=TGmGHYuRQYjNU8sib-YLbZQmrcnc15Pwfo96CokzhSVhNij4q2S5Ut8foR-mDlJl92SKgjaZ-M3NmcmdYhURk2FJMwiO4rfrouSH__gWecPDgceSpNTK3hissFBQIOz3s1AatqjzRRY4F5Q7hGprHYbXyJHyAb2PuownlqXQeT72lHl3wH7D-wMOCMEikJHNAJFibWh4rOYicOOl64svSE5HGAxGao2I4SpCJ_VjAiDgYBGpZqJfekY6vGC2ANm0kNw_yU_xSrQg2CQi7E4v8fCFtUIDP0erfYhbeV9lW76VAr9BR6w_yIEPRU4r3PcK64VF5WFrpyyJVd87GCb79SuwlzBKCxFX_0KjvEf_LDs-my8ROErIRnYPaXfb3q1fXkRJKz8ixPDnO1q4gboVyA%3D%3D)

---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e63f82a845cb4a599effc4e5cd9d4312&_e=TGmGHYuRQYjNU8sib-YLbZQmrcnc15Pwfo96CokzhSVhNij4q2S5Ut8foR-mDlJl92SKgjaZ-M3NmcmdYhURk2FJMwiO4rfrouSH__gWecPDgceSpNTK3hissFBQIOz3s1AatqjzRRY4F5Q7hGprHYbXyJHyAb2PuownlqXQeT72lHl3wH7D-wMOCMEikJHNAJFibWh4rOYicOOl64svSE5HGAxGao2I4SpCJ_VjAiDgYBGpZqJfekY6vGC2ANm0A6OkOqtMNYN33DJepi1fzE9xBdp_dj_lHY8uBVXZ-EAx2sY-NtRSnTCQ1uG8jI_ai-axq1Dd7d1w57wWsGhhFAJ-zMjg2F-PPS3GD_y78vxr7yIWZejdtCuu_g-s5Pm14fMLIoyVpWA7_M3HjnzBvw%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself.

I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork.

After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. **On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards.**

In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a **Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command.** Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions.

Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate.

**The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous.**

I'm running against **Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor** , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit _**against**_ the Minneapolis Police Department.

Governor Walz wants America to believe **Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo.** His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.”

So ask yourself: _**If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda?**_

**Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis.**

Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots.

But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.**It's common sense**. It's about **protecting Americans**.

Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then **[I’m asking you to pitch in $1, $5, or even $15 today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e63f82a845cb4a599effc4e5cd9d4312&_e=TGmGHYuRQYjNU8sib-YLbZQmrcnc15Pwfo96CokzhSVhNij4q2S5Ut8foR-mDlJl92SKgjaZ-M3NmcmdYhURk2FJMwiO4rfrouSH__gWecPDgceSpNTK3hissFBQIOz3s1AatqjzRRY4F5Q7hGprHYbXyJHyAb2PuownlqXQeT72lHl3wH7D-wMOCMEikJHNAJFibWh4rOYicOOl64svSE5HGAxGao2I4SpCJ_VjAiDgYBGpZqJfekY6vGC2ANm0rkO7MKjM6V8l11MExIQNG1_IhC41QDXTGzxeawa0b7XrDPxyUJ2jxBpvIGImk7NvF-r3FHq496twkkdmb9oHi2vWrmfvDvq7peXWfh7ZOiT6GUIVLCrUy67qeptfEp0CS7O6k6zb5C7OWLObxWLp6w%3D%3D)**
