**Here's What I Believe:** I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens.

I believe in a **strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law** —no exceptions, no apologies.

I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities.

**I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point.**

Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it.

While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault.

Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either.

Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: **[Could you donate $10, $25, or even $50 to help me launch this campaign the right way?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e63f82a845cb4a599effc4e5cd9d4312&_e=TGmGHYuRQYjNU8sib-YLbZQmrcnc15Pwfo96CokzhSVhNij4q2S5Ut8foR-mDlJl92SKgjaZ-M3NmcmdYhURk2FJMwiO4rfrouSH__gWecPDgceSpNTK3hissFBQIOz3s1AatqjzRRY4F5Q7hGprHYbXyJHyAb2PuownlqXQeT72lHl3wH7D-wMOCMEikJHNAJFibWh4rOYicOOl64svSE5HGAxGao2I4SpCJ_VjAiDgYBGpZqJfekY6vGC2ANm0-RhxRjGODi-uv2wOvCANEA373ldcXn_AON286dt7aMKYgwx4V8qZtwTdpzAiw4snAfXbYcPNsH3uNBbeTj_HUCBI1oRWHrutMy-w-kfpuKV76HDmxhc22ftHC23917RTACI8g1c0EZuRXBGig_h9qg%3D%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e63f82a845cb4a599effc4e5cd9d4312&_e=TGmGHYuRQYjNU8sib-YLbZQmrcnc15Pwfo96CokzhSVhNij4q2S5Ut8foR-mDlJl92SKgjaZ-M3NmcmdYhURk2FJMwiO4rfrouSH__gWecPDgceSpNTK3hissFBQIOz3s1AatqjzRRY4F5Q7hGprHYbXyJHyAb2PuownlqXQeT72lHl3wH7D-wMOCMEikJHNAJFibWh4rOYicOOl64svSE5HGAxGao2I4SpCJ_VjAiDgYBGpZqJfekY6vGC2ANm0tBsvLfb9AvjLjPRqrVEeCWsvqSE5BkkJSHEKvdElh1odb3rA1rlbq1_Q1sjSt7ylU4vgFOjLDodg00rKjLjviGBEa-0rAaYQjIf9pfICXtr74Da4vqRvZxS7JDbVzzKpjrMZml4NIHXieOywTeJEGQ%3D%3D)
Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet.

With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative.

**I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp.**

What I have is grit, **a record of service** , and hopefully, the support of **patriots like you** who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on...

And if you believe we deserve **leaders who've fought for this country—** Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today.

clean_body: I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the U.S. Senate, and I believe in immigration enforcement and the deportation of criminal illegal aliens. That does not make me a Nazi. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself. I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork. After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards. In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command. Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions. Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate. The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous. I'm running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department. Governor Walz wants America to believe Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo. His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.” So ask yourself: If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda? Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis. Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots. But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.It's common sense. It's about protecting Americans. Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then Here's What I Believe: I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens. I believe in a strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law —no exceptions, no apologies. I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities. I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point. Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it. While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault. Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either. Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet. With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative. I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp. What I have is grit, a record of service , and hopefully, the support of patriots like you who still believe America is worth fighting for. name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: I’m taking action on extreme heat. Here’s how:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, Yesterday, Phoenix reached 108. For some lifelong Arizonans, that’s just the start of summer, but for vulnerable populations, it’s the start of the most dangerous time of year in our city. **That’s why I’m introducing three new bills to take on the rising crisis of extreme heat in our communities.** Together, this package of legislation would allocate funding for community-level heat mitigation projects, bring federal agencies together under the National Integrated Heat Health Information System (NIHHIS) to coordinate extreme heat preparedness and emergency response, and call for a comprehensive national study on the economic impacts of extreme heat. These policies are designed to save lives, especially in frontline communities hit hardest by climate change and extreme temperatures: seniors, low-income families, outdoor workers, and the unhoused. Extreme heat is one of the deadliest threats we face from climate change, yet it’s been ignored for too long in Washington. **I’m working to change that.** ****_**[To keep up the pressure and build support around these bills, I need your help, Peter. Will you donate $10 or whatever you can to power our fight for bold climate solutions in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109327763/550735205/-2009428703?amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250610_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTgzNGVhOS0xNDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_L4i1am1UoEYOuY5Icn716f0l3ReSRetr3loFfpkPbQ=)**_**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109327766/550735207/-2009428703?express=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250610_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTgzNGVhOS0xNDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_L4i1am1UoEYOuY5Icn716f0l3ReSRetr3loFfpkPbQ=)

clean_body: | Peter, Yesterday, Phoenix reached 108. For some lifelong Arizonans, that’s just the start of summer, but for vulnerable populations, it’s the start of the most dangerous time of year in our city. That’s why I’m introducing three new bills to take on the rising crisis of extreme heat in our communities. Together, this package of legislation would allocate funding for community-level heat mitigation projects, bring federal agencies together under the National Integrated Heat Health Information System (NIHHIS) to coordinate extreme heat preparedness and emergency response, and call for a comprehensive national study on the economic impacts of extreme heat. These policies are designed to save lives, especially in frontline communities hit hardest by climate change and extreme temperatures: seniors, low-income families, outdoor workers, and the unhoused. Extreme heat is one of the deadliest threats we face from climate change, yet it’s been ignored for too long in Washington. I’m working to change that. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This legislation is just the beginning. Together, we can build a safer, healthier, more resilient future for everyone. Grateful for your support, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States ** | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

* * *
# [Corporate Media Is Capitulating to Trump](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165634279&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjM0Mjc5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1NzIwODgsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE2NDA4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2Pv4BuXy6Yh8VXWkQQbgkrUd00On0scJ4nPwJWG03WU)
### As the fourth estate falls, here's what we must do to stay informed and empowered
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jun 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165634279&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjM0Mjc5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0OTU3MjA4OCwiZXhwIjoxNzUyMTY0MDg4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iiAKB9xVZ4XPNFDjE3Cu45DH9lMSUTX6pGZL2-OhOQI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165634279&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjM0Mjc5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1NzIwODgsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE2NDA4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2Pv4BuXy6Yh8VXWkQQbgkrUd00On0scJ4nPwJWG03WU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165634279&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjM0Mjc5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1NzIwODgsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE2NDA4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2Pv4BuXy6Yh8VXWkQQbgkrUd00On0scJ4nPwJWG03WU)
---
| | [](https://substack..zqTPWaXNxijJYf8gbDNYioAZdhxN_mpE_ZVWlGO9pUo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/corporate-media-is-capitulating-to?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

If you're still wondering why authoritarianism keeps advancing in America, look no further than the corporate media industrial complex, which remains more interested in appeasing power than holding it accountable. The press was supposed to be the Fourth Estate. Instead, too many of our legacy outlets have become little more than luxury PR firms for fascism, laundering propaganda through an illusion of objectivity.
Let me break it down with three deeply disturbing examples from just this week--each of which reveals just how far the so-called "free press" has fallen in its desperate bid to avoid Trump's wrath (or worse, curry his favor). **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gevavoZsLb35LocaZw_YfJG8_ZzZ1MDTalxqTziY6MM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165634279)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4cd21946-5649-4e00-8da3-fc5dd0635d46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Screen Grab: David Pakman Show
### **1\. The Hill 's Hit Job on Kamala Harris: A Preemptive Strike Against Truth**
Right before the 2024 election, _The Hill_ ran an article with the headline: "Kamala's newest lie: Trump will send the army after you." Written by a right-wing Heritage Foundation operative with zero disclosure of his political affiliations or dark money backers, the piece labeled then-Vice President Harris a liar for warning that Trump might use the military on American citizens.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b6575859-0c89-46ff-ac8f-0f974dc8b2e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And now? That "lie" is manifesting in real time. Trump is, quite literally, deploying the military to enforce illegal ICE raids and quash peaceful protests. Where is _The Hill 's_ correction? Where is the retraction? Where is the accountability?
Nowhere. Because the lie wasn't Harris'--it was theirs. And their silence now is complicity.
### **2\. Paramount Signals Capitulation in Court --While Trump Cries "Mental Anguish"**
In another grotesque display of spinelessness, Donald Trump has filed a $20 billion lawsuit against CBS and its parent company, Paramount Global, because he believes CBS edited a "60 Minutes" interview in a way that caused him "mental anguish" and hurt his reputation as a "content creator." Yes, really. The President of the United States is apparently hurt that his chances as TikTok stardom have diminished.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3a8a7f68-a81f-48d1-b6e8-881d1d28f853?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
CBS denies wrongdoing--and yet Paramount is reportedly negotiating a settlement with Trump anyway. Why? Because Trump's administration has regulatory authority over Paramount's proposed merger with Skydance Media. So now, one of the largest news organizations in the country is literally bending to a fascist's demands to get a merger approved.
CBS News President Wendy McMahon and "60 Minutes" EP Bill Owens--two of the few reportedly pushing back--have resigned. Corporate media is folding to autocracy not because they believe him, but because they're afraid of him. This is billionaires in media capitulating to a billionaire President so the billionaire media corporation can expand its monopoly. Utterly reckless.
### **3\. An Australian Journalist Shot While Reporting --And the AP Whitewashes It**
The Associated Press, that old bastion of journalistic neutrality, ran a story with the benign headline: "Australian reporter hit by nonlethal round during live report from LA immigration protests."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/726ab1bd-f941-496f-b94b-6beaea83beaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Notwithstanding that rubber bullets can, in fact, be fatal, take note of what they left out: That rubber bullet was fired by Trump-aligned paramilitary forces during peaceful protests against his anti-immigrant raids. You can literally see the police officer aim and fire at her--yet the headline attempts to whitewash it anyway. The reporter wasn't in a war zone--she was in downtown LA. And the people firing on her weren't rogue actors. They were part of Trump's own militarized crackdown.
But the AP's version might as well have come from a tourism board press release. Passive voice. No mention of perpetrators. No context. Just another day in the land of euphemisms and erasure. _Copaganda_ at its finest.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gevavoZsLb35LocaZw_YfJG8_ZzZ1MDTalxqTziY6MM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165634279)
### **Let 's Call This What It Is**
This isn't journalism. It's a soft coup--enabled by editors who prefer access over accountability, and by boards more interested in mergers than morals.
From _The Hill_ smearing truth-tellers, to Paramount entertaining the fantasies of a fascist plaintiff, to the AP sanitizing state violence--the pattern is unmistakable: corporate media keeps bending the knee to Trump, even as he grinds democracy underfoot.
Meanwhile, we're the ones paying the price, because truth-telling requires risk. Cowardice is not a neutral act--it is a betrayal. And we don't have the luxury of neutrality in the face of fascism. We must invest in independent media and fund local, people-powered journalism. We must hold media corporations accountable--not just for what they report, but for what they refuse to. So how do we fight back?
## **How Do We Address These Problems?**
### **1\. Support Independent Writing**
When I launched _Let 's Address This_, it wasn't just to report on injustice--it was to confront it and build a community to stand against it. Over 450 pieces later, we've reached more than 25 million readers and more than 100,000 podcast downloads. That reach exists _because of you._ Because you've chosen to invest in truth over profit.
If you're a subscriber--thank you. If you're not yet--[join us](https://substack.com/redirect/e04f2e22-92d8-4dac-a49c-58d72538178b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Because while we will _never_ enact a paywall, every share, every read, and every subscription is a blow against the systems that profit off our ignorance.
### **2\. Invest in Ground News --Right Now**
If you care about getting the critical context missing from your typical newsfeeds--and I know you do--you need [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/e4f3ab9a-dda1-4808-84f0-9e07d12fb938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I use it every day to write these articles. It's not just a news app and website--it's a weapon against propaganda.
Here's why [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/e4f3ab9a-dda1-4808-84f0-9e07d12fb938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) matters:
✅ **Bias Detection** - See immediately where every outlet leans: left, center, or right. No more hidden agendas. No more smoke and mirrors.
✅ **Funding Transparency** - Know who's pulling the strings. Whether it's a the Heritage Foundation, a defense contractor, or a billionaire mogul, Ground News exposes the money behind the media.
✅ **Global Comparison** - Get a 360° view. See how the same story is reported in the U.S., the Middle East, and Europe. Build factual conclusions. Don't let corporate America build them for you.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/e4872d91-644f-4a86-8544-c48a634f5cb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
So my ask of you is this: As you navigate media inaccuracies, funding secrecy, and national bias, do so with tools that stop letting other people's agendas control how you think: subscribe to Ground News for 40% off--just $5/month. The below link directly supports my work--and most importantly, it arms you with the ability to verify your sources in an era of relentless disinformation.
And unlike billionaire-run media, Ground News is reader-supported. It is built for people, not profits. It answers to you, not advertisers.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/e4872d91-644f-4a86-8544-c48a634f5cb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Conclusion
We are not helpless. We still have the power to decide what voices we amplify, what stories we believe, and what values we uphold. We can resist--with knowledge, with community, and with conviction. That's why I show up every day to write--because truth still matters. This is why I partner with [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/e4f3ab9a-dda1-4808-84f0-9e07d12fb938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Freedom doesn't just suddenly disappear--it's chipped away every time we stay silent in the face of injustice. Let's ensure we don't become the generation that looked away.
**I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.** **Subscribe and join the movement.**

clean_body: As the fourth estate falls, here's what we must do to stay informed and empowered | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! As the fourth estate falls, here's what we must do to stay informed and empowered | | | Jun 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | If you're still wondering why authoritarianism keeps advancing in America, look no further than the corporate media industrial complex, which remains more interested in appeasing power than holding it accountable. The press was supposed to be the Fourth Estate. Instead, too many of our legacy outlets have become little more than luxury PR firms for fascism, laundering propaganda through an illusion of objectivity. Let me break it down with three deeply disturbing examples from just this week--each of which reveals just how far the so-called "free press" has fallen in its desperate bid to avoid Trump's wrath (or worse, curry his favor). Let 's Address This. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Screen Grab: David Pakman Show 1\. The Hill 's Hit Job on Kamala Harris: A Preemptive Strike Against Truth Right before the 2024 election, The Hill ran an article with the headline: "Kamala's newest lie: Trump will send the army after you." Written by a right-wing Heritage Foundation operative with zero disclosure of his political affiliations or dark money backers, the piece labeled then-Vice President Harris a liar for warning that Trump might use the military on American citizens. | | ---|---|--- And now? That "lie" is manifesting in real time. Trump is, quite literally, deploying the military to enforce illegal ICE raids and quash peaceful protests. Where is The Hill 's correction? Where is the retraction? Where is the accountability? Nowhere. Because the lie wasn't Harris'--it was theirs. And their silence now is complicity. 2\. Paramount Signals Capitulation in Court --While Trump Cries "Mental Anguish" In another grotesque display of spinelessness, Donald Trump has filed a $20 billion lawsuit against CBS and its parent company, Paramount Global, because he believes CBS edited a "60 Minutes" interview in a way that caused him "mental anguish" and hurt his reputation as a "content creator." Yes, really. The President of the United States is apparently hurt that his chances as TikTok stardom have diminished. | | ---|---|--- CBS denies wrongdoing--and yet Paramount is reportedly negotiating a settlement with Trump anyway. Why? Because Trump's administration has regulatory authority over Paramount's proposed merger with Skydance Media. So now, one of the largest news organizations in the country is literally bending to a fascist's demands to get a merger approved. CBS News President Wendy McMahon and "60 Minutes" EP Bill Owens--two of the few reportedly pushing back--have resigned. Corporate media is folding to autocracy not because they believe him, but because they're afraid of him. This is billionaires in media capitulating to a billionaire President so the billionaire media corporation can expand its monopoly. Utterly reckless. 3\. An Australian Journalist Shot While Reporting --And the AP Whitewashes It The Associated Press, that old bastion of journalistic neutrality, ran a story with the benign headline: "Australian reporter hit by nonlethal round during live report from LA immigration protests." | | ---|---|--- Notwithstanding that rubber bullets can, in fact, be fatal, take note of what they left out: That rubber bullet was fired by Trump-aligned paramilitary forces during peaceful protests against his anti-immigrant raids. You can literally see the police officer aim and fire at her--yet the headline attempts to whitewash it anyway. The reporter wasn't in a war zone--she was in downtown LA. And the people firing on her weren't rogue actors. They were part of Trump's own militarized crackdown. But the AP's version might as well have come from a tourism board press release. Passive voice. No mention of perpetrators. No context. Just another day in the land of euphemisms and erasure. Copaganda at its finest. Let 's Call This What It Is This isn't journalism. It's a soft coup--enabled by editors who prefer access over accountability, and by boards more interested in mergers than morals. From The Hill smearing truth-tellers, to Paramount entertaining the fantasies of a fascist plaintiff, to the AP sanitizing state violence--the pattern is unmistakable: corporate media keeps bending the knee to Trump, even as he grinds democracy underfoot. Meanwhile, we're the ones paying the price, because truth-telling requires risk. Cowardice is not a neutral act--it is a betrayal. And we don't have the luxury of neutrality in the face of fascism. We must invest in independent media and fund local, people-powered journalism. We must hold media corporations accountable--not just for what they report, but for what they refuse to. So how do we fight back? How Do We Address These Problems? 1\. Support Independent Writing When I launched Let 's Address This, it wasn't just to report on injustice--it was to confront it and build a community to stand against it. Over 450 pieces later, we've reached more than 25 million readers and more than 100,000 podcast downloads. That reach exists because of you. Because you've chosen to invest in truth over profit. If you're a subscriber--thank you. If you're not yet--. Because while we will never enact a paywall, every share, every read, and every subscription is a blow against the systems that profit off our ignorance. 2\. Invest in Ground News --Right Now If you care about getting the critical context missing from your typical newsfeeds--and I know you do--you need . I use it every day to write these articles. It's not just a news app and website--it's a weapon against propaganda. Here's why matters: ✅ Bias Detection - See immediately where every outlet leans: left, center, or right. No more hidden agendas. No more smoke and mirrors. ✅ Funding Transparency - Know who's pulling the strings. Whether it's a the Heritage Foundation, a defense contractor, or a billionaire mogul, Ground News exposes the money behind the media. ✅ Global Comparison - Get a 360° view. See how the same story is reported in the U.S., the Middle East, and Europe. Build factual conclusions. Don't let corporate America build them for you. So my ask of you is this: As you navigate media inaccuracies, funding secrecy, and national bias, do so with tools that stop letting other people's agendas control how you think: subscribe to Ground News for 40% off--just $5/month. The below link directly supports my work--and most importantly, it arms you with the ability to verify your sources in an era of relentless disinformation. And unlike billionaire-run media, Ground News is reader-supported. It is built for people, not profits. It answers to you, not advertisers. Conclusion We are not helpless. We still have the power to decide what voices we amplify, what stories we believe, and what values we uphold. We can resist--with knowledge, with community, and with conviction. That's why I show up every day to write--because truth still matters. This is why I partner with . Freedom doesn't just suddenly disappear--it's chipped away every time we stay silent in the face of injustice. Let's ensure we don't become the generation that looked away. I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

body:

| | Hi Peter, Chesterfield is more than just a district to me—it’s my home. I lived here early in my career, and when my husband and I were deciding where to raise our family, Chesterfield was the clear answer. We have put down deep roots here, and as the proud parent of a Chesterfield County Public School student, this is personal for me. As a mother, I've experienced firsthand how essential quality public education is for our children's future. Fully funded schools, well-supported teachers, and modern classrooms shouldn't be determined by your zip code. Every child deserves the chance to learn and grow. In the House, I will advocate tirelessly to secure full funding for our public schools, competitive salaries for educators, and expanded opportunities for career and technical education. **[Can you please help me reach the House of Delegates so we can fight for every child’s future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109328850/550738388/-42534385?refcode2=txt1&refcode=20250610education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjQyMGVmYjQtMTU0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1Qs7zenCWC5crRVk2pRTakEcemgNRINJlXexPMuN7Lk=)**

| Peter,

Donald Trump’s war on public institutions just escalated. His latest target? **National Public Radio — a trusted, independent source of news for millions of Americans.**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109329033/550739091/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-06-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWNkYmYwNC0xNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR_SbuWFKA7Sf9wPiLWCpqIHgbyGUfj0bxtSkAf_M1U=)

# [Trump Is Literally Deporting Jesus](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=165637102&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjM3MTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1NzIyOTYsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE2NDI5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HWrPBefQigu_BRAk94376XljmP2WlTf7tn3gCcpIuMU)
### A man who portrayed Jesus Christ in his local church's play has been deported by ICE.
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| Jun 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=165637102&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjM3MTAyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0OTU3MjI5NiwiZXhwIjoxNzUyMTY0Mjk2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDM5OTEzMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.qp1zXSWD9hVtjDxDAQexOX7Ej9DvXEUPNNr3g9m306Y&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=165637102&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjM3MTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1NzIyOTYsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE2NDI5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HWrPBefQigu_BRAk94376XljmP2WlTf7tn3gCcpIuMU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=165637102&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjM3MTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1NzIyOTYsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE2NDI5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HWrPBefQigu_BRAk94376XljmP2WlTf7tn3gCcpIuMU)
---
| | [](https://substack..UKBrjNJqefYI-6MFGSoeSsxA80DcYcZPLUdjMjkdvAU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/trump-is-literally-deporting-jesus?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Lately, it feels like we're living through the parable of "The Boy Who Cried Wolf"--only this time, it's President Trump crying "emergency" and doing his best to divide us at home and from our friends abroad.
Sometimes the emergency involves tariffs slapped onto our closest allies--Canada, the UK, and Japan--costing American consumers dearly. Other times, it's watching [ICE agents in full military gear storm into upscale neighborhood restaurants in San Diego](https://substack.com/redirect/61bb288d-12dd-4abc-9946-4cfd3057728d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to arrest immigrant busboys mid-shift. I believe in strong borders as much as the next veteran, but it's hard to see how deporting a man who [portrayed Jesus Christ his local church's passion play days after Easter in Jupiter, Florida](https://substack.com/redirect/92483f10-fbea-4af9-a574-7121e7b5da10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or raiding restaurants to apprehend working people, does anything to make us safer. Yes, they were undocumented, most came here legally but overstayed their visas, but 70% of them committed no other crime except trying to work and stay in America. Actions like these confuse border security with cruelty, making hardworking neighbors look like dangerous targets.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f9ab183f-421e-449c-85de-63d37a54cb6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
via Palm Beach Post
Thanks for reading, this post is public so feel free to share it.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=165637102&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjM3MTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1NzIyOTYsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE2NDI5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HWrPBefQigu_BRAk94376XljmP2WlTf7tn3gCcpIuMU)
Which brings me to the case of **Kilmar Abrego Garc ia.**
Garcia is a Salvadoran immigrant who illegally entered the U.S. as a teenager. He later married, had children, and made a life here. But Garcia is far from sympathetic. He has multiple domestic abuse allegations against him--documented through Protection from Abuse orders filed by his own wife in 2020, 2021, & 2022--and he currently faces federal charges accusing him of running a human-smuggling ring that allegedly trafficked minors and suspected MS-13 gang members across state lines.
In short, Mr. Garcia is what I would call a "dirtball."
If the allegations are true, he deserves every ounce of expedited legal consequence. But that's exactly the point. He deserves a _legal_ consequence, not executive fiat, not backroom deportation, and certainly not a policy driven by fear and political expedience.
The Constitution wasn't created just to protect people we like. It exists precisely to ensure that even people we dislike--even people who might truly deserve punishment--still receive due process under the law.
In 2019, a U.S. immigration judge ruled that Garcia couldn't be deported because he faced credible threats of violence in El Salvador. That ruling is called "withholding of removal," and under our laws, it carries the full weight of federal protection.
In March 2025, ICE deported him anyway.
ICE sent him straight to a maximum-security prison in El Salvador, directly ignoring a federal judge's explicit order. They later called their actions an "administrative error."
A federal judge ordered Garcia's return, and the Supreme Court backed up that order. ICE finally complied--but they didn't send Garcia home to his family in Maryland. Instead, they rerouted him to Tennessee, where he now faces federal charges of human smuggling and conspiracy.
And while those charges may be legitimate, his removal was not.
Looks to me like Garcia deserves severe punishment. But that punishment must come from a court, not from an administration that bends laws to suit its political needs. Our Constitution promises "equal protection under the law"--without fine print saying "unless we really dislike you."
Garcia's original deportation directly defied judicial orders and undermined the rule of law itself. Our Constitution clearly separates judicial power from executive power precisely to prevent this kind of abuse.
Justice demands due process--even, and perhaps especially, for people we don't like.
Because if we can bend the law to punish someone we don't like, we can bend it to punish anyone.
This isn't just about one man. It's about whether the rule of law holds when it's most inconvenient. And right now, we're failing that test.
Our second U.S. President, John Adams, understood this in 1770 when he defended British soldiers accused of murder in the Boston Massacre. Adams hated their actions, but he stood for something deeper: constitutional protections must apply to everyone, especially those we despise.
If our government can ignore the law for someone we dislike today, it can do so for anyone tomorrow.
When we uphold rights for the most unpopular among us, we protect them for all of us. That's not soft-heartedness; that's patriotism.
## **The streets of Los Angeles are boiling over.**
In recent days, thousands have flooded the streets of Los Angeles, protesting precisely this kind of executive overreach. President Trump, overriding Governor Newsom, unilaterally deployed more than [2,000 National Guard troops](https://substack.com/redirect/4ec83455-6a2c-4154-83ae-e966c8bb379c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [700 U.S. Marines](https://substack.com/redirect/110a615c-e3eb-4fc2-a6ab-a5108d5f28fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to control protests over federal immigration raids.
Let me be clear: I served in the military. I don't use terms like "authoritarianism" lightly. But when a sitting president threatens to arrest a governor (as Trump did with Newsom), deploys federal troops without state consent (what happened to Republicans being for a limited government), and disregards judicial orders, we're no longer talking about maintaining "law and order." We're talking about erosion of democratic norms. As Nancy Pelosi put it: this is "a hallmark of authoritarianism."
Thanks for reading, subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXRyaWNrbXVycGh5cGEuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FjY291bnQiLCJwIjoxNjU2MzcxMDIsInMiOjQzOTkxMzMsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1NzIyOTYsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE2NDI5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.779CrI5OnkXrymCjmA8S2hFrNgL6he7zPsxAacOX8zk?)
California Attorney General Rob Bonta and Governor Gavin Newsom have already sued the federal government, calling the action an unlawful federalization of state forces. Newsom accused the president of creating a ["manufactured crisis"](https://substack.com/redirect/fed5e44c-bea7-4868-a34e-18ecaca112e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to justify violating the 10th Amendment--stoking fear to consolidate power, not to protect the public.
We are dangerously close to crossing a constitutional Rubicon: the selective suspension of rights under the guise of order.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/04ddedd6-74e7-4fdf-8141-ad46ac8d40f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Los Angeles Protests via CNN
## **History has something to teach us.**
In 2003, serving with the 82nd Airborne Division in Iraq, I met Sergeant Solomon Bangayan who grew up in the Philippines, came to Vermont with his parents, and volunteered three times to expedite his citizenship. He joined the Army, graduated from Airborne School, and became a paratrooper in the elite 82nd Airborne Division. Solomon fought alongside us, conducting nighttime raids against our targets, and during the day, we tried to expedite his American citizenship. We navigated the deadly "Ambush Alley" repeatedly just so Solomon could finalize his citizenship paperwork in the Green Zone. Tragically, Solomon was killed in action before achieving his goal, though he was posthumously granted U.S. citizenship. Today, Solomon remains a hero--a reminder that immigrants are integral to America's story, often sacrificing more than many of our fellow citizens who were lucky enough to be born here. In fact, 8% of American veterans are foreign-born (that's 1.5 million veterans).
## **BEHIND THE LINES**
So yes, democracy is messy--and frustrating at times-but embracing that messiness is precisely what makes us American. Let's not forget it.
Winston Churchill famously called democracy "the worst form of government, except for all the others." As someone who regularly steps into the lion's den--appearing on Fox News weekly--I believe in engaging across ideological divides. Iron sharpens iron, and despite friendly attempts from conservative hosts like Charlie Hurt to bait me into partisan traps, my message remains consistent: uphold the Constitution, even for people we don't like, even when it's not politically convenient.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a26b4c38-e072-4b85-b096-5520db245a40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This Saturday, June 14th, the U.S. Army will celebrate its 250th birthday. It also happens to be Flag Day. Let's remember: America's strength isn't measured by whom we exclude, but by how fiercely we uphold our constitutional ideals. We started and remain a nation of immigrants--originally establishing our nation in the name of religious liberty, freedom, and equality for all. And while we haven't always gotten it right, check yourself when you want to just throw the baby out with the bathwater. Our Constitution is the blueprint of our nation, the oath we take to support and defend, even when it gives due process for the "dirtballs" among us.
-Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: Los Angeles PLUNGED INTO CHAOS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Fanning the flames and making it harder for the brave officers on the ground.

This is beyond words, Patriot.
The footage coming out of Los Angeles looks like a war zone. Chaos is erupting in the streets, crime is surging, and what are the Democrats doing? Fanning the flames and making it harder for the brave officers on the ground.
Instead of restoring law and order, the Democrat leadership in California is too busy chasing headlines and pandering to radicals.
- Adam Schiff is more focused on attacking the Trump Administration than lowering the temperature- Alex Pedilla downplayed the violence on MSNBC- Kamala Harris took the side of illegal rioters- Gavin Newsom moved to SUE the Trump Administration for restoring law and order
This is a slap in the face to the law-abiding citizens.
As the daughter of *legal* Mexican immigrants who came to America the right way, I'm appalled.
Luckily, President Trump and Republican leaders are stepping into the void. We are the Party of defending police officers, standing with ICE, and restoring law and order. But the Democrats are putting the interests of criminal illegals above the safety of the American citizens.
That's why I'm asking you to take action today. [Will you join our efforts to defend law enforcement and defeat the radicals plunging our cities into chaos?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcmsh7ejkv8kvjg6g6krkrladngbhq5tbg1o4dk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4slge6pb2c5h2bs)[PLEASE CONTRIBUTE NOW

1. Suggested arresting California Governor, Gavin Newsom.

2. Threatened to annex Canada and make it the 51st state.

3. Slapped 25% tariffs on Canada and Mexico.

4. Worked to dismantle USAID's critical work across the world.

5. Attacked the State Department's work on human rights around the world.

6. Threatened to invade THREE different countries.

_Trump 's careless antics are absolutely destroying America's reputation, which could have material and economic impacts that would be devastating for everyday Americans!_

We think that Donald Trump is the **WORST** Commander-in-Chief we've seen in modern history.

But, we have no clue what Democrats in your area think?!

name: All On The Line
subject: Straight-up voter disenfranchisement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We must come together to protect our democracy from these attacks
|
---

Peter,
It’s not a matter of if — it’s when. Any day now, conservatives could bring one of the most anti-voter pieces of legislation in decades to the Senate floor for a vote.
They’ve already tried to pass it by unanimous consent, an attempt to ram it through without a recorded vote.
It’s no wonder they’d rather avoid putting their names on it. This is an extreme bill that would restrict access to the ballot box for millions of Americans by upending our voter registration process and requiring overly burdensome and costly forms of ID just to register to vote.
**This bill could come up again for a Senate vote any day now — and we absolutely must defeat it. All On The Line is mobilizing Americans to demand their senators reject this bill. But we need a surge of grassroots support to ramp up this critical work.**
[**Can you make a donation to power our movement that’s standing up for voters’ rights and fighting for a fairer, more representative democracy?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109329288/550740016/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVEStatus_email_20250610-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEStatus_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250610-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEStatus_&utm_campaign=SAVEStatus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhNzNkOTBhLTE2NDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rqKEKFSOVxKqgo7soJ0k1yWf5ks4b6xH6X6ohKSUkpU=)

We’re not overstating it when we say this bill would put up significant barriers to vote for someone you know, including:
• Married women who have changed their last names and don’t have a birth certificate with their current legal name.
• Military voters who will no longer be able to use their military ID to register.
• Americans who don’t have a passport, who are more likely to come from lower-income families.
• Transgender Americans who have changed their legal names.
• Rural voters who often rely on online and mail-in voter registration.
• People who have lost documents to natural disasters, and so many more.
**Anti-democracy forces argue that this bill was created to protect the voting process. But the truth is undeniable: The purpose of the SAVE Act is to make it more difficult for certain citizens to vote.**
To make things worse, legislators at the state level are quietly pushing copycat versions. And in Michigan, extreme groups are pushing a ballot initiative that requires proof of citizenship for voting. While the national legislation gets the most attention, All On The Line is also working around the country to stop any attempt to take power away from the people.
**We need all hands on deck to stop the SAVE Act and push back on voter suppression in all its forms.[Can we count on you to make a donation to help fund our campaign to protect our democracy and defend free and fair elections?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109329295/550740023/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVEStatus_email_20250610-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEStatus_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250610-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEStatus_&utm_campaign=SAVEStatus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhNzNkOTBhLTE2NDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rqKEKFSOVxKqgo7soJ0k1yWf5ks4b6xH6X6ohKSUkpU=)**
Thank you,
The All On The Line Team

clean_body: We must come together to protect our democracy from these attacks | Peter, It’s not a matter of if — it’s when. Any day now, conservatives could bring one of the most anti-voter pieces of legislation in decades to the Senate floor for a vote. They’ve already tried to pass it by unanimous consent, an attempt to ram it through without a recorded vote. It’s no wonder they’d rather avoid putting their names on it. This is an extreme bill that would restrict access to the ballot box for millions of Americans by upending our voter registration process and requiring overly burdensome and costly forms of ID just to register to vote. This bill could come up again for a Senate vote any day now — and we absolutely must defeat it. All On The Line is mobilizing Americans to demand their senators reject this bill. But we need a surge of grassroots support to ramp up this critical work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We’re not overstating it when we say this bill would put up significant barriers to vote for someone you know, including: • Married women who have changed their last names and don’t have a birth certificate with their current legal name. • Military voters who will no longer be able to use their military ID to register. • Americans who don’t have a passport, who are more likely to come from lower-income families. • Transgender Americans who have changed their legal names. • Rural voters who often rely on online and mail-in voter registration. • People who have lost documents to natural disasters, and so many more. Anti-democracy forces argue that this bill was created to protect the voting process. But the truth is undeniable: The purpose of the SAVE Act is to make it more difficult for certain citizens to vote. To make things worse, legislators at the state level are quietly pushing copycat versions. And in Michigan, extreme groups are pushing a ballot initiative that requires proof of citizenship for voting. While the national legislation gets the most attention, All On The Line is also working around the country to stop any attempt to take power away from the people. We need all hands on deck to stop the SAVE Act and push back on voter suppression in all its forms.= Thank you, The All On The Line Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. subject: They’re trying to silence the truth – and I need your help to stop them
body:
I’ve taken on corporations, politicians, even federal agents—anyone who thinks they can hide their lies from you. But right now, I’m the one under attack, and I need your help to keep fighting.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1u6yAQhZ8GdrFgAEMWLOyb60qt1HaRSk13BHBDZGIH_8lvXyVNvZ35Zs6nY2LXhHrRSJYI4BRcjwAQKxDA9TDHNJ7jy9NmPhRvm2v-GsVtC_8e6AQrfLHGFeXI_fue9fKTfXTH-f9EV3xYOr_Cj9DMRxOa21TusNOsdoRjr6nkWyFBKIJPelt746Xk1hinqCWSO2u5MJwcJVdC4aCBgCA5JTQHECqrFfUcBBcWOGwVQ5zcczITfQrW0H6YTUptGzPbRtzo0zB0_V2sQlDNqc0uo2382P-e2TYiqB7KCKoJQaWeF1OKpZwWxKp7aWyn0rnYE_OlcNKum0PThD6XiJPvvzd40vATAAD__ytMblw)

[****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj0-PmzAQxT_NcAPZYxvIgUO2ND1Uantope5pZbBJXDGB-E9Qvn1lFEXa47z3m3nzNK2zmx4dNG-AeHEmACKIIyDe3jfy6R99_1Zu78ef5a3-QSq7-OWJ3vEFX0dtjm9J2l-_RWj-ij_rsH298xceH6t9wc_QypJ2c1abvjCdmAyThe14Iw-qQdWy4tK1ig0CsVVSHlp-YI3EqVYW2Ti10yBZ4TpkqFjNGa8RVVtNLbcSlVQjSjy0AiTbcypN1rtR8xA37f2yUDUuVMzdJcY17I-dAE_BjsnbSl-tWWImAE-zG6yPj_KctDd5PpeTNWVILpYrL2koFwJxSpE-wpL8aEH0nxnAOrtkjUsEos9nd2XUtGp3voLoaQCsNS3pGkH0qJ5EtD5vIKsb-bF5XvjOrJubZxfqBiQ77-VylXuH_wMAAP__LmiNfQ) Patriot,

I’m James O’Keefe. Maybe you’ve heard of me, maybe you haven’t—but if you care about the truth, stick with me for a minute.

I’m an investigative reporter who’s spent over a decade going undercover, exposing corruption that the powerful want buried.

I’ve taken on corporations, politicians, even federal agents—anyone who thinks they can hide their lies from you. But right now, **I’m the one under attack** , [**and I need your help to keep fighting.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj0-PmzAQxT_NcAPZYxvIgUO2ND1Uantope5pZbBJXDGB-E9Qvn1lFEXa47z3m3nzNK2zmx4dNG-AeHEmACKIIyDe3jfy6R99_1Zu78ef5a3-QSq7-OWJ3vEFX0dtjm9J2l-_RWj-ij_rsH298xceH6t9wc_QypJ2c1abvjCdmAyThe14Iw-qQdWy4tK1ig0CsVVSHlp-YI3EqVYW2Ti10yBZ4TpkqFjNGa8RVVtNLbcSlVQjSjy0AiTbcypN1rtR8xA37f2yUDUuVMzdJcY17I-dAE_BjsnbSl-tWWImAE-zG6yPj_KctDd5PpeTNWVILpYrL2koFwJxSpE-wpL8aEH0nxnAOrtkjUsEos9nd2XUtGp3voLoaQCsNS3pGkH0qJ5EtD5vIKsb-bF5XvjOrJubZxfqBiQ77-VylXuH_wMAAP__LmiNfQ)

**Picture this:** I’m standing on a city street, camera in hand, confronting a former FBI agent named Jamie Mannina. I’d caught him in a web of deception, and I had the proof—his own words, recorded for the world to hear.

When I asked him to explain, he didn’t even try. He just lost it, yelling, “You’re a fraudster! You’re hiding behind the First Amendment!” I didn’t flinch. I kept the camera rolling, because that’s what I do—I show you what they don’t want you to see. But now, **Mannina’s suing me for “assault” and “slander,” trying to punish me for doing my job.**

Then there’s Project Veritas, the group I founded. They’re suing me too, hitting me with a legal battle that’s bleeding me dry.

Each deposition costs **over $12,000** , and I’ve got four more to go. Between that, the **$29,000** I already owe in legal fees, and the **$17,000** I need for a new attorney to fight Mannina, I’m staring down a total of **$46,000** I don’t have. These lawsuits aren’t about justice—**they’re about shutting me up.**

Why does this matter to you? Because **I’m the only one left doing this**.

The mainstream media? They’ve abandoned undercover journalism. They’d rather schmooze with the elite than expose them. But me and OMG? We’re out there every day, risking it all to uncover the truth. If I go down, who’s going to keep digging? **Who’s going to protect your right to know what’s really happening?**

Here’s the deal: **every day counts** , and [**I need to raise that $46,000 now, or these lawsuits could end me**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj0-PmzAQxT_NcAPZYxvIgUO2ND1Uantope5pZbBJXDGB-E9Qvn1lFEXa47z3m3nzNK2zmx4dNG-AeHEmACKIIyDe3jfy6R99_1Zu78ef5a3-QSq7-OWJ3vEFX0dtjm9J2l-_RWj-ij_rsH298xceH6t9wc_QypJ2c1abvjCdmAyThe14Iw-qQdWy4tK1ig0CsVVSHlp-YI3EqVYW2Ti10yBZ4TpkqFjNGa8RVVtNLbcSlVQjSjy0AiTbcypN1rtR8xA37f2yUDUuVMzdJcY17I-dAE_BjsnbSl-tWWImAE-zG6yPj_KctDd5PpeTNWVILpYrL2koFwJxSpE-wpL8aEH0nxnAOrtkjUsEos9nd2XUtGp3voLoaQCsNS3pGkH0qJ5EtD5vIKsb-bF5XvjOrJubZxfqBiQ77-VylXuH_wMAAP__LmiNfQ).

But if you [**donate today**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj0-PmzAQxT_NcAPZYxvIgUO2ND1Uantope5pZbBJXDGB-E9Qvn1lFEXa47z3m3nzNK2zmx4dNG-AeHEmACKIIyDe3jfy6R99_1Zu78ef5a3-QSq7-OWJ3vEFX0dtjm9J2l-_RWj-ij_rsH298xceH6t9wc_QypJ2c1abvjCdmAyThe14Iw-qQdWy4tK1ig0CsVVSHlp-YI3EqVYW2Ti10yBZ4TpkqFjNGa8RVVtNLbcSlVQjSjy0AiTbcypN1rtR8xA37f2yUDUuVMzdJcY17I-dAE_BjsnbSl-tWWImAE-zG6yPj_KctDd5PpeTNWVILpYrL2koFwJxSpE-wpL8aEH0nxnAOrtkjUsEos9nd2XUtGp3voLoaQCsNS3pGkH0qJ5EtD5vIKsb-bF5XvjOrJubZxfqBiQ77-VylXuH_wMAAP__LmiNfQ), you’re not just helping me—you’re joining the fight. You’ll feel that rush of knowing you’re standing up to the corrupt, that patriotic pride of defending the truth in America.

**You’ll be the reason I can keep going** , making sure the powerful answer for their actions. Your life gets better because you’ll know you’re part of a mission that’s bigger than us both.

**Will you help me right now?**

[**Click to donate—it’s quick, it’s secure**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj0-PmzAQxT_NcAPZYxvIgUO2ND1Uantope5pZbBJXDGB-E9Qvn1lFEXa47z3m3nzNK2zmx4dNG-AeHEmACKIIyDe3jfy6R99_1Zu78ef5a3-QSq7-OWJ3vEFX0dtjm9J2l-_RWj-ij_rsH298xceH6t9wc_QypJ2c1abvjCdmAyThe14Iw-qQdWy4tK1ig0CsVVSHlp-YI3EqVYW2Ti10yBZ4TpkqFjNGa8RVVtNLbcSlVQjSjy0AiTbcypN1rtR8xA37f2yUDUuVMzdJcY17I-dAE_BjsnbSl-tWWImAE-zG6yPj_KctDd5PpeTNWVILpYrL2koFwJxSpE-wpL8aEH0nxnAOrtkjUsEos9nd2XUtGp3voLoaQCsNS3pGkH0qJ5EtD5vIKsb-bF5XvjOrJubZxfqBiQ77-VylXuH_wMAAP__LmiNfQ), and it’ll keep me in the game. I need **$46,000** urgently, and every bit you give gets me closer.

[**Donate Now to My Legal Defense Fund.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj0-PmzAQxT_NcAPZYxvIgUO2ND1Uantope5pZbBJXDGB-E9Qvn1lFEXa47z3m3nzNK2zmx4dNG-AeHEmACKIIyDe3jfy6R99_1Zu78ef5a3-QSq7-OWJ3vEFX0dtjm9J2l-_RWj-ij_rsH298xceH6t9wc_QypJ2c1abvjCdmAyThe14Iw-qQdWy4tK1ig0CsVVSHlp-YI3EqVYW2Ti10yBZ4TpkqFjNGa8RVVtNLbcSlVQjSjy0AiTbcypN1rtR8xA37f2yUDUuVMzdJcY17I-dAE_BjsnbSl-tWWImAE-zG6yPj_KctDd5PpeTNWVILpYrL2koFwJxSpE-wpL8aEH0nxnAOrtkjUsEos9nd2XUtGp3voLoaQCsNS3pGkH0qJ5EtD5vIKsb-bF5XvjOrJubZxfqBiQ77-VylXuH_wMAAP__LmiNfQ)

Thanks for hearing me out. Let’s keep the truth alive together.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
**The Latino Vote by the Numbers:
Unpacking the Catalist Report
With Maria Cardona & Catalist CEO Michael Frias**
The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 15
| In this episode of **The Latino Vote Podcast** , Mike Madrid is back and is here to tackle the hard truth:****
**The Latino voter shift isn’t about turnout—it’s about policy.**
While Democrats scramble to reconnect with a base that’s drifting right, Chuck and Mike break down the real reasons why working-class Latino voters are leaving the party.**Spoiler: it’s not because Democrats didn’t show up to enough quinceañeras.**
---
|
---

**Today's Headlines:**

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Beto came to Houston to attack me
body:
This is just the beginning, Peter
| | | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXDA9K5FHWJWDRRSEBJGCP33_0)
---
| | | | Peter, Beto O’Rourke just held a rally right here in the Houston area. And he used his platform to launch a personal attack against me. After years of humiliating losses, you’d think he’d step aside. But instead, Beto is back and he’s dragging the full weight of the radical Left with him. The DCCC and their far-left Super PAC allies are already positioning themselves to flip traditionally Republican districts across Texas – _districts just like this one_. **Make no mistake: this is how it starts. A rally. A headline. A smear campaign. Then come the attack ads, dark money, and outside operatives flooding into our state. ** I’m not going to sit back and wait for it to happen. That’s why I need your help to fight back right now. [**Please make a contribution of $25, $50, $100, or even $250 to help me stand up to Beto and the radical Left and defend this district, defend Texas, and defend our House Majority from their assault.**](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXDA9K5FHWJWDRRSEBJGCP33_1)
---
| | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXDA9K5FHWJWDRRSEBJGCP33_2)
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE $25 >> ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXDA9K5FHWJWDRRSEBJGCP33_3)
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE $50 >> ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXDA9K5FHWJWDRRSEBJGCP33_4)
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE $75 >> ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXDA9K5FHWJWDRRSEBJGCP33_5)
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXDA9K5FHWJWDRRSEBJGCP33_6)
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE $250 >> ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXDA9K5FHWJWDRRSEBJGCP33_7)
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE OTHER >> ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXDA9K5FHWJWDRRSEBJGCP33_8)
---
| The truth is, if we let our guard down in even one district, we risk losing everything – the House majority, our ability to advance President Trump’s America First agenda, and the conservative firewall protecting America. That’s why I’m asking you to take this seriously. As a Navy SEAL, I know that the best way to win a fight is to meet the threat before it’s at your door. That is why I’m fighting back now. I’m counting on you to join me Peter. [**So please rush a contribution today to help me push back against the Left’s attacks, defend Texas, and keep Congress in conservative hands.**](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXDA9K5FHWJWDRRSEBJGCP33_9)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I’m sick and tired of this
body:
| | | | |
---
Peter,
If you’re sick and tired of** _do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of **_RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help **_politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC_** ...
**Then you feel exactly the way I do.**
[STAND WITH MTG](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/tgJWCdxodTgGHl0kRsqefQiZpdr8foC9TxE-bX4LWKSQLT3WTscM_s7zoSJAFlUiE82xZtDhT1AerXfkJRYPHl_lRZ7J9vG5OJrP9lHhGNYQXLzu45Q6n3KTr3GMVA-ccd7-HXj6Uqsd-3MpkPmRo9Yu8k-M6foWo0ZbaEIFpANAWKMHd2gLTayuH3yGeY7QCnX9Hme8IyxaWyFjGn7mfJU8TTt-DfpLv0i_sK5RRUk3TbTuP4lCmCl_qDa4ZIeKYKmFgKxs006haIJD99RdbujXywCdR5NJoYvSruorgAt2Fg79-UzuiRoGeL7OfXYqsgQpf5wyFhA4BxndJ8ETdx8RQ4NuBRWRQFNtJD_WT0eqgdGK7TPwGG9KHMU239HB4npE-DoEXeZ4ys8XlYkXUs6WpWujyiSgaz5evddjG9mLsPinqktc96mHnDAm0o1XJ61IXGbi3y72dGOmGzQN62SsTGpVgSgQBLmbMtxE4Ch0d4PPfeSffkhq84IbUSKERzvNbjThWtJHZDfh2eJLny24ATXkAVyqBEp3AKpkMuT6J9GNEJDDeSOx8WMz1NJESjLjeDQdi0XJY6hKr3HG3SRVbF5qN6sPXSmKbkICmE-o78cVYF8Jf2hjLRhyIZul9GfvVYkmi6WCkLsaFzHzMpTbPAe-QE-f4Df_hwldGDbUJ6nuzUZWyclkfkiHB4BKmyy4IjD8tnlqK1It_hDLm9lIAb4q_9_PpB_GURV2UJEBW5kvu9ZGevIGtAcWJkfcv1nFsnU/iKXyg6yLUTalhGMStrBi0whbcpa1GlTG/9)
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action.
**Republicans need to get serious about:**
* Making the DOGE cuts permanent.
* Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children.
* Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies.
* Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine.
* Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable.
* Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security.
* Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary.

If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections.
**I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: **
**When MTG is upset, the base is upset.**
We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election.
That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda.
The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. **I work for YOU.**
**_[That’s why I’m so proud to fund my political operation $10, $25, and $50 at a time from patriots across this country like you who are sick and tired of the status quo](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/2OUZtK_nI3bYTMkPHsJ_ebvHZNuPdQCzZuA93VZJopH8ZVpd8K6fcNlPbJ-Rw46058ltihPhMiQcRxkJS92BorQavyIcACsz_KGey9YEqFT-_Iwofo27d9_bB0-B6HtP_qgUHEc1PnpmiDZUxhrR1V4HAw1Th_rMoDgGdU9e4z23NrSGU0OfW7kHvpeq9lWU1_xNEss8lCqc5EOLKrxkM1n_bk_RZuy4TgvjNHEJTHf6eCwjzxEqn5AcoMkdVsTDeGvnOg4BETWhZK2LB8VYGkbRNGV_PDncPBxkqlHZlItwjzETBWem9an3-N8YfeV8XfcwKzBrygKJYB1nF0BSCfYwZKE_6OX5VGK_SHhSSvuBG7GPtYlJdasD8FVIopCWn6dqGYyTyy81S3OM9mOBZKeeeU0QhZGIT_wIwXzkgAVXiDbFVLHK0fDPNOxxe5gcA0UDQsJiPkVeAWKz32F1AxyCaYnGWjY3c4sooL37gRFTdQ3e1J4_MNnk0s_z8RsLFBC9vfBNccR1xpZv27eGdfj3UKr5VJPcnremTohl9mems-Rt8OdGG7ZS6Rci2mybiBsgG_9iM1shGljMN77TczIwUzjDtSXryqQfru8Rp3XD173dLFulR_fJnVjXNOsLTBL2Uu9-00vl_bRPpwlAWfirelqD1edg3qE8YzVwNcLe-S_H3TLthG9NCSgGEDSBGun_Z4298RpAd9Hlq4lUqVW-xzpSi2FqDlZ1qSamyAUi9MnseHlRtkpmHJJBb4W9XtJV9QE/oxn9Sn5Z3R4Ofy91KRxENoC7C0DzNfZk/9)_.**
I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here.
I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of **_We The People_**.
**_[And that’s exactly what I’m doing](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/5AEurouj1ygmBJtFUKj0CzvtUlXaHy2elIlECzu5qVgErVt1D5cz6azQmVWjmAJHdVsF4O8mbGylpTZsPQGwGX2A5L20XIUqfgwOlf0_yXt0yU5AUbX4BKu6xlA180hYA2VsO4RLJ5bvHO5wUo-cs9dJJs8MMa2lyDB1Zrl5okt8IQgHBf-pZZeyLH9csAfoiL9ZQVYAp5KI_OPbqmqT0UlW8chcnKgGwec1aoKFwa-SFoc0uWp2rRTv6G1d-JAuTGDZNFOSfNe60Vt_9oew0E1f07boTagquLtRAakBrsvyYD1iiKSZEklhYRfrpzovNaNgNgFMfQ_WUrT-1TZdyr8zEv9TpQ-kMTHOhRMKBixCJIc-PSJ-I1NufV1LgFLY-CTAN6A5ZusF_cZGIVjsH9U3xIhNyFgBkodHORrVXOvYEHS8lADZi5dm9KTYyrqm9o2_cSXDcihviTGAznOUGdkBIe7SAz89EcWb8fp2htdgoLDeybeC2i4BJgvCP4IJ-0CiBHfLk56s2CrVpRW0nx3vB8h_2m-amAznx9ZJanLO1ldhzkrUfpwip5G89rFZ4FOW9QuqVLcoIhawF8vo0Lq1rNsvQoXDv1fJcR3ENtxlzaS-EJDTVA4dcw0jl-_lUP3uQrEaBD49o2W1mcFcXAMxMBy9bKz7IVIxYP8FEVSM8yRRCihB3a6VS-8SLqy35q7DfwbvWZLBl-iz1huF4UkxxPMtOqlJrlwx4bpSKxdmGFl1LwMzZVEGwx9sj5JXdP6CyBw/KdMo1BtVUm78T6NTIRccZorH7iQfKC_7/9)_.**
With urgency,

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, If you’re sick and tired of do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws ... If you’re sick and tired of RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins ... If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC ... Then you feel exactly the way I do. It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action. Republicans need to get serious about: Making the DOGE cuts permanent. Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children. Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies. Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine. Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable. Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security. Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary. If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections. I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: When MTG is upset, the base is upset. We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election. That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda. The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. I work for YOU. . I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here. I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of We The People. . With urgency, Marjorie Taylor Greene ** |

Some elected officials can't take a joke.

And unfortunately, they think they have the power to do something about it.

After the governor of California saw a video parody of a politician, he responded by saying the video should be "illegal." Then the California legislature fast-tracked and passed two bills, banning certain political speech.

_The Babylon Bee_ and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against California officials because the bills censor free speech and punish people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians.

Where do you stand on the issue of free speech and humor?

clean_body: Everything we’ve worked for is on the line this year. | Hi Derek, We’re just one week away from Virginia’s Primary Election — and everything we’ve worked for is on the line. This election isn’t just about one race — it’s about building a strong Democratic foundation that can win in November and beyond. From protecting reproductive rights to ensuring quality education and fair wages, every vote matters. = Here’s what’s at stake: Expanding Democratic control of the House of Delegates Winning the Governor’s office Electing a Democratic Lieutenant Governor and Attorney General Protecting the rights and values we all believe in Your support now will help us connect with every Virginia voter — through phone calls, digital ads, and on-the-ground organizing — to ensure no Democrat sits this election out. = | ************=************ Thank you for being part of this fight. Let’s make history — together. —Team DPVA [content goes here] Forwarded this email? name: Jessica Hamilton, Evergreen
subject: Join us + Sen. Schumer for a townhall with climate leaders on what's next for the GOP budget bill
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
This Thursday, June 12, hear about our plans to fight back
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3671788/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| The fight against the disastrous Republican budget bill is still far from over, and we still need your help! Join a call with the climate movement and Senator Schumer this week to help us leave it all on the field. [JOIN US ON JUNE 12](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3671789/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Friend—

Right now, Senate Republicans are trying to fasttrack a bill that would gut clean energy investments, severely increase energy costs for consumers, and create pay-to-play schemes for polluters to ignore environmental safeguards and drill on public lands, along with other threats to people’s health and safety.

If passed, it would be one of the most harmful, costly, and sweeping pieces of legislation in recent history—which is why we, as a movement, must do everything in our power to stop it.

If you want to learn more about our plans to fight back, **join us on Thursday, June 12 at 6 p.m. ET for an exclusive briefing** with environmental organizations and activists from across the country to discuss the plan of action and how you can get involved. |
---
[RSVP TODAY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3671790/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We’ll also be joined by **Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer** , who will give us the latest intel from the Senate on how they're fighting dangerous budget cuts that threaten lifesaving federal programs, affordable clean energy prices, and climate action.

Don’t miss this opportunity to learn more during this critical juncture of our fight against the Republican budget bill. [**Sign up NOW to get the direct number to call in and join.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3671791/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| Thanks for all you do for our movement, friend. |
---
| | |
---
### Jessica Hamilton
Senior Director - Digital Advocacy
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

name: Breaking News via RTP
subject: URGENT UPDATE: Marines on the ground in Los Angeles
body:
URGENT UPDATE:
Under Trump's orders, Marines have arrived in Los Angeles to assist in suppressing protests
If you've been waiting for a moment to get off the sidelines, Peter, the moment has come. Help us support Democrats fighting back against authoritarianism by making a donation of any amount you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061025_rr_mrn]

In yet another shocking escalation, Donald Trump has ordered 700 Marines into Los Angeles.
They’re joining the National Guard — already on the ground — to silence protests against his brutal ICE operations.
This is a chilling turning point.
Military force.
Against civilians.
On U.S. streets.
We cannot look away. We cannot stay quiet. And we absolutely cannot let this moment go unanswered.
We're raising funds to help support Democrats STANDING UP to this fascist regime, and we need everyone who cares about the future of our Democracy to join us in this fight. subject: Join us to fight for public media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
We know that Trump’s attacks on funding are more than just that - they’re attacks on information and education for all of us.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=1nBwxvRR9k1sjT7WhpZwPCavB1UqQWYg%2FXFbAG5ep9imz%2FpM1Eht5Pks1heucv1V5I0lFII5FMoex8p092p5LJ8pMjYQtIIAjR72U9vXnnaYtFvtL9gpK0J12Nu5EDcdWHTIeeIYQ%2B1OqVNQnjaAZFoEWKek07Y3OGh7GEuPCs1JqNG82y6GLtHVKevwxrxBYKu8DgTaIcPmLi8HqPg%2BH3FcN7eUTUfNaHE%2BRoQmW%2BDNo2iJ9qOLMKLYBVgxyZdhR6F2fEY97CpzgWRqJeCMztStYM6rKYhqrK%2BOHIRgq%2Fh%2Bk%2Fporuzj9KY9it4Tc9ySuOpQtgt5gElnM9dXnLQnmgjFCXSzEynCPKZPkN5fqaKkRgMcBNg5fPPldW%2FuFDF5rQwLjFf8XkVN%2BnH9zhK1xSVmrAaxilnt%2BEMNhJo9Q0A%3D)

---
Peter,

_**FIRST:**_ Trump signed an executive order to cut all federal funding for public media services including _PBS_ and _NPR_ , which millions of Americans depend on for local and national news programming and information, education, and entertainment.

_**THEN:**_ _NPR_ , _PBS_ , and several other local stations sued the Trump Administration, making it clear that _**they will not stop fighting**_ to continue delivering these vital public services to you and your communities. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109331133/550747230/-19675062?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_061025_PublicMedia_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2EwNDVhMS0xYjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2QE6r1Nn4_-h6C-RNKAYpcIffio-3T5bj7hg5MTCSg=&emci=a9a045a1-1b46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=aca045a1-1b46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895) _**NOW:**_ Congresswoman Foushee has made her stance on Trump’s illegal executive order very clear: _**she will not stand for these services being stripped from the American people.**_

Valerie has spent her career fighting for every child, _no matter their background_ , to have access to a high quality education and the resources they need — including public broadcasting services like _NPR_ and _PBS_ that provide education, entertainment, and fact-based information for our children.

[She’s not backing down - will you join her? If you’re with us, please add your name to our petition to demand Congress protect funding for _PBS_ and _NPR_.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109331134/550747231/-19675062?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_061025_PublicMedia_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2EwNDVhMS0xYjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2QE6r1Nn4_-h6C-RNKAYpcIffio-3T5bj7hg5MTCSg=&emci=a9a045a1-1b46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=aca045a1-1b46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109331135/550747232/-19675062?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_061025_PublicMedia_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2EwNDVhMS0xYjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2QE6r1Nn4_-h6C-RNKAYpcIffio-3T5bj7hg5MTCSg=&emci=a9a045a1-1b46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=aca045a1-1b46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895)
---
We know that Trump’s attacks on funding are more than just that - _they’re attacks on information and education for all of us._ **But there is strength in numbers.**

[By adding your name to Congresswoman Foushee’s petition, you’re joining folks all across the country who stand with _PBS_ and _NPR_ and want to protect funding for the critical services they provide.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109331136/550747233/-19675062?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_061025_PublicMedia_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2EwNDVhMS0xYjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2QE6r1Nn4_-h6C-RNKAYpcIffio-3T5bj7hg5MTCSg=&emci=a9a045a1-1b46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=aca045a1-1b46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895)
