clean_body: We know that Trump’s attacks on funding are more than just that - they’re attacks on information and education for all of us. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, FIRST: Trump signed an executive order to cut all federal funding for public media services including PBS and NPR , which millions of Americans depend on for local and national news programming and information, education, and entertainment. THEN: NPR , PBS , and several other local stations sued the Trump Administration, making it clear that they will not stop fighting to continue delivering these vital public services to you and your communities. NOW: Congresswoman Foushee has made her stance on Trump’s illegal executive order very clear: she will not stand for these services being stripped from the American people. Valerie has spent her career fighting for every child, no matter their background , to have access to a high quality education and the resources they need — including public broadcasting services like NPR and PBS that provide education, entertainment, and fact-based information for our children. | We know that Trump’s attacks on funding are more than just that - they’re attacks on information and education for all of us. But there is strength in numbers. Thanks for standing with us, Team Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Why I’m fighting for our future.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=95a23a6a82bc491688e0cfa162823f71&_e=n84JjNIITFSbcQ7RHGDI-2q0oSmuGBDMYyYNthBFSYZt8SUKF1olrCQjyODv1K1T8WgIke1wHypYECnMUwMkcD9H4FhyNHfEkRgxhOdJsaEUFsiGUWUcmhlM09xoN9zV_qwVOMGatihESo_LBU5JjTA-iLt5bzvF_MmEjZoTlSd-1Pxs2mE6YnSsZh61H637pXPkRLdIUzLF-Tgk6QRqjimMyNkRUzNWmTojE_0IitaDcmjefIHe5DbqSvypypMN34FksRsrUYB7MrrqKbzMwEVZnaP1JztxNJZdhNiI2Ws8LO6AzmCGvV2Uc4lt9H_IqNc3WJssFk_k0NXj1uxt6nCbpjawI5uJUo1JsQ8jR2wilJOJnzQ-zO24VgMAr3PS)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=95a23a6a82bc491688e0cfa162823f71&_e=n84JjNIITFSbcQ7RHGDI-2q0oSmuGBDMYyYNthBFSYZt8SUKF1olrCQjyODv1K1T8WgIke1wHypYECnMUwMkcD9H4FhyNHfEkRgxhOdJsaEUFsiGUWUcmhlM09xoN9zV_qwVOMGatihESo_LBU5JjTA-iLt5bzvF_MmEjZoTlSd-1Pxs2mE6YnSsZh61H637pXPkRLdIUzLF-Tgk6QRqjimMyNkRUzNWmTojE_0Iitb8J4nM6HTrbtqwHC0YmMb3JZvCMxq2zf8SR8wyClBy5lj1dYlicYd2IsE_xbgHIBxhYFGTIomvi1eQ-9NLw_RrXZZZc7yeamuIAVNepmDqJEPOOfFYDcpA103ra2TimEg7bi4HEGGtEguYVVuMTxLi)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=95a23a6a82bc491688e0cfa162823f71&_e=n84JjNIITFSbcQ7RHGDI-2q0oSmuGBDMYyYNthBFSYZt8SUKF1olrCQjyODv1K1T8WgIke1wHypYECnMUwMkcD9H4FhyNHfEkRgxhOdJsaEUFsiGUWUcmhlM09xoN9zV_qwVOMGatihESo_LBU5JjTA-iLt5bzvF_MmEjZoTlSd-1Pxs2mE6YnSsZh61H637pXPkRLdIUzLF-Tgk6QRqjimMyNkRUzNWmTojE_0IitZDMmwQJ03Ugkt1J9K0NFbDXTE_6vkMtPnUg1qbl7TNPcFOxi7Cl5WIWRSSh0mW5Z3t21Td1kNHsVoHg_JcHkZr44duZiZKi7KlWqpv-O9MOS5fnkdUmtkXOuQ6S6-hywY1vHHWadMDldyf5KNF-c5V)**

| [** CONTRIBUTE HERE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=95a23a6a82bc491688e0cfa162823f71&_e=n84JjNIITFSbcQ7RHGDI-2q0oSmuGBDMYyYNthBFSYZt8SUKF1olrCQjyODv1K1T8WgIke1wHypYECnMUwMkcD9H4FhyNHfEkRgxhOdJsaEUFsiGUWUcmhlM09xoN9zV_qwVOMGatihESo_LBU5JjTA-iLt5bzvF_MmEjZoTlSd-1Pxs2mE6YnSsZh61H637pXPkRLdIUzLF-Tgk6QRqjimMyNkRUzNWmTojE_0IitYKBIs5vHMsatRW8Qlr7kzlAsBqiXf0xVfycvZkUVzj4U8yeqe9BKZQZrzNiJmaEYorKTBE12mkg56H8xwR4jAaC_NCnz4T4ItdJgV0fmLi5JDFMi8Syr4_Z62gnq--SVN1FYXaijo7BbegBULjIPhT)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=95a23a6a82bc491688e0cfa162823f71&_e=n84JjNIITFSbcQ7RHGDI-9ibiUN3oazkXOxQebsRn9tY-JIOCfxCkGG5pTd_KK9LzYUGwbBIh9PpKEYh3VP45E-qP5XwiuMfDXuOGdkWG4fdkiWreLCSeAoCelnV1eLO_xLXw00_KQVzK43aCLEZ0T_8JR7KCMGb8S4KFgyQ7kM7A-ajY5gGrKyb4yvaTedagd353z8ShOzfq5AkC4KUjAYC2oy4D9-khKWJ3lf1j1E%3D)

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=95a23a6a82bc491688e0cfa162823f71&_e=n84JjNIITFSbcQ7RHGDI-2q0oSmuGBDMYyYNthBFSYZt8SUKF1olrCQjyODv1K1T8WgIke1wHypYECnMUwMkcD9H4FhyNHfEkRgxhOdJsaEUFsiGUWUcmhlM09xoN9zV_qwVOMGatihESo_LBU5JjTA-iLt5bzvF_MmEjZoTlSd-1Pxs2mE6YnSsZh61H637pXPkRLdIUzLF-Tgk6QRqjimMyNkRUzNWmTojE_0IitYhGbBO-3tia_NjmgnBwfIymTWnoyZNC8F-J9oWLIX9RcU4OQrrW8LbCZYlFO5LZ5J0u4mYjZnf0jLa_4ugZzxA12fHqnLeE9q76bVoYpEbff4C-YpwrWfrYiRB3yjTy59uGbbGhbtGthwhDBDXqAM4)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** SUPPORT SENATOR GRAHAM **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=95a23a6a82bc491688e0cfa162823f71&_e=n84JjNIITFSbcQ7RHGDI-2q0oSmuGBDMYyYNthBFSYZt8SUKF1olrCQjyODv1K1T8WgIke1wHypYECnMUwMkcD9H4FhyNHfEkRgxhOdJsaEUFsiGUWUcmhlM09xoN9zV_qwVOMGatihESo_LBU5JjTA-iLt5bzvF_MmEjZoTlSd-1Pxs2mE6YnSsZh61H637pXPkRLdIUzLF-Tgk6QRqjimMyNkRUzNWmTojE_0IitY35mk8_MhQCT50ShtSD1-Q-t4FqfCo8BaOit4NR_8thTerW8Tm_5jxW4mHL-czphAb7bCJGZH4s8Oa9Hsj_KM_qbk-Z720z-sFuqEO7pMLgNTqZI5o52hmlJtUFYOjkWxqX2R9x_VFHdrj2SrKPBFI)

subject: What Do You Tell Your Kids?
body:

discuss them with your kids.

Pride Month's Dark Agenda: It's Not About Love - Tell Your Kids the Truth

It's Pride Month again, and families face challenges to their values and the safety of their kids on all sides. This year, the
fervor is tamped down in some ways. Still, this celebration of LGBTQ lifestyles is not going away anytime soon, so take time to
arm your kids with all they need to stand firm in their beliefs and family standards this month – and in the future.

Pride Month is meant to draw culture into the deviance, deception, and danger of the LGBTQ movement, so we're sharing ideas to
safeguard young hearts and minds in your family.

Since the year 2000, Covenant Eyes has been helping men and women overcome addiction to explicit internet content. So many people
trapped in addiction feel like there is no way out. Tools like Covenant Eyes filter media content and connect people to a
community of healing and restoration.

Karen Potter, Marketing Director for Covenant Eyes and host of the Covenant Eyes podcast, joins us to share more about the company
and how parents can protect their children. Like, subscribe and share.

clean_body: Tell your kids the truth. It's that simple. In this week's newsletter, we're covering difficult topics and showing you how to discuss them with your kids. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] June 10, 2025 • Newsletter Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Pride Month's Dark Agenda: It's Not About Love - Tell Your Kids the Truth It's Pride Month again, and families face challenges to their values and the safety of their kids on all sides. This year, the fervor is tamped down in some ways. Still, this celebration of LGBTQ lifestyles is not going away anytime soon, so take time to arm your kids with all they need to stand firm in their beliefs and family standards this month – and in the future. Pride Month is meant to draw culture into the deviance, deception, and danger of the LGBTQ movement, so we're sharing ideas to safeguard young hearts and minds in your family. Read the Blog [] Overcoming P*rn Addiction Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Since the year 2000, Covenant Eyes has been helping men and women overcome addiction to explicit internet content. So many people trapped in addiction feel like there is no way out. Tools like Covenant Eyes filter media content and connect people to a community of healing and restoration. Karen Potter, Marketing Director for Covenant Eyes and host of the Covenant Eyes podcast, joins us to share more about the company and how parents can protect their children. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. subject: They’re coming after us
body:

The attacks keep coming, friend. Last year, Derek made history by flipping a longtime red seat by just 653 votes. That narrow victory shook the GOP, and now they’re doing whatever it takes to claw it back. **Their latest move? The American Action Network – a powerful Republican group – is pouring over $4 million into attack ads against vulnerable Democrats, including Derek, in hopes of drowning out his voice and flipping CA-45 red.** The GOP knows this seat could decide the House majority – and they’re starting their attacks early to bury us under a wave of lies. But we’ve got news for them: we’re not backing down. We can’t let their lies go unanswered. Our end-of-quarter deadline is coming fast, and what we raise will determine how strong we are heading into the summer – we can’t afford to fall behind now. **[Your $3 donation today will help Derek stand strong against GOP attacks and protect this seat. clean_body: | = The attacks keep coming, friend. Last year, Derek made history by flipping a longtime red seat by just 653 votes. That narrow victory shook the GOP, and now they’re doing whatever it takes to claw it back. Their latest move? The American Action Network – a powerful Republican group – is pouring over $4 million into attack ads against vulnerable Democrats, including Derek, in hopes of drowning out his voice and flipping CA-45 red. The GOP knows this seat could decide the House majority – and they’re starting their attacks early to bury us under a wave of lies. But we’ve got news for them: we’re not backing down. We can’t let their lies go unanswered. Our end-of-quarter deadline is coming fast, and what we raise will determine how strong we are heading into the summer – we can’t afford to fall behind now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, -Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. To support Derek's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Derek Tran for Congress 10441 Stanford Avenue #395 Garden Grove, CA 92842 United States

name: Mass Mobilization Alert via Care in Action
subject: Join us Saturday. 1,600 events. 250,000 people.
body:
We are sick and tired of the people abusing their power!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109333963/550757948/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-no-kings-day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQ4MTA3Yy0yMTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XeBXRnENhDDAC0NdeV3eTlXE_-VEdLjAfsGF7c0Mid0=&emci=833609ec-1646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5948107c-2146-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
This weekend, Americans were courageously exercising their rights to protect their neighbors from cruel immigration enforcement — and were met with militarized force.
These were working people, parents, union leaders like David Huerta — community members standing up for hard working families being torn apart by raids, for communities being destabilized, for coworkers disappearing from job sites.
This is not just happening on our streets — it’s unfolding behind closed doors in Congress, where lawmakers are plotting to pour billions into detention and deportation programs by stripping Medicaid from millions, in the cruel reconciliation bill.
**Peter, we are sick and tired of the people abusing their power! And we refuse to stay silent.**
This Saturday, a quarter of a million people are participating in the No Kings mobilization — to say no to cruelty in our communities, raids on our families, and attacks on our healthcare.
[**There are over 1,600 No Kings events in every corner of the country. Find an event near you and join hundreds of thousands this Saturday, June 14.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109333964/550757949/-1463457584?SQF_SOURCE=careinaction&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-no-kings-day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQ4MTA3Yy0yMTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XeBXRnENhDDAC0NdeV3eTlXE_-VEdLjAfsGF7c0Mid0=&emci=833609ec-1646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5948107c-2146-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)

[FIND A NO KINGS EVENT NEAR YOU](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109333967/550757952/-1463457584?SQF_SOURCE=careinaction&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-no-kings-day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQ4MTA3Yy0yMTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XeBXRnENhDDAC0NdeV3eTlXE_-VEdLjAfsGF7c0Mid0=&emci=833609ec-1646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5948107c-2146-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
**We know how important it is to show up when our neighbors are hurting — and right now, the pain is spreading rapidly across our communities.**
Standing shoulder to shoulder, we can galvanize public opinion to disrupt the frightening potential use of the military against peaceful protestors, the attempts to strip Medicaid from millions, and the increased immigration enforcement creating fear and instability in our communities.
We must show decision-makers loud and clear that care workers, domestic workers, and working families refuse to be targets—that we demand respect, dignity, healthcare access, and genuine safety.
**That's why we're joining almost a quarter of a million people nationwide this Saturday for the No Kings mass mobilization.** [**Will you pledge to attend and speak up — for our rights, our safety, and the dignity of every domestic worker and immigrant family?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109333968/550757953/-1463457584?SQF_SOURCE=careinaction&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-no-kings-day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQ4MTA3Yy0yMTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XeBXRnENhDDAC0NdeV3eTlXE_-VEdLjAfsGF7c0Mid0=&emci=833609ec-1646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5948107c-2146-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: just a few hours left to vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Team,

Happy Election Day! I wanted to remind you that polls in Jersey close at 8 p.m.! If you’re in line to vote at 8 p.m., STAY IN LINE!!!

If you voted by mail but have not returned your ballot yet, you can return it to your county’s Board of Elections office or to a secure ballot drop box by 8 p.m.! To find a drop box location near you, click here! [https://www.nj.gov/state/elections/vote-secure-drop-boxes.shtml]

If you have voted, please, donate here to help keep our momentum going. Every dollar we raise will help us start tomorrow off on strong ground. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=]

Thank you for making your voice heard! Yours,

Josh
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. Winning in August would diminish the GOP’s power in Georgia – and it’d be a disastrous upset for Trump and his authoritarian buddies.
Anything is possible when we come together and support candidates fighting for the causes that voters care about most. It’ll be tough, but **this seat is critical to building Democratic power in the legislature, so we can’t give up.**
**Letting far-right power go unchecked fuels hate and rolls back our rights. But together we can help support state Dems who are committed to building a better, safer, and more inclusive future.**
[Here’s the bottom line: Winning elections like this requires grassroots support. Will you chip in $7 to help give our state Dems the necessary resources and tools to secure a victory in states like Georgia nationwide? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDqV2bKIMRGsvIJOaErTgze3BIoVeHTq_qTEJxBJ3K9IKLkAd7tNKQ2tqgpccnLYB4-Ny-u7e6joXZ5femTXdKOKYBxC28R9iHOYil1gLURwoQXaQtJ9UvHtxT1pT4XC8QRmaS6sNB3leW6TV1KFNMNaSNcjmRdiKIE-qqUPW3pTrxDbiN4oAx2gfJAdmFIBmAHUVjVGKnlUiCAevQDrMnjh8wXPJEwoPq4-7JKYa5AzcVS4u0-ql2Itp52TONiL_KQYlnry4MevBdM4IcppnMS4HQ_sAqJc3ZTGfTJ8XbcNwVryLXwIAEih2snhs06dyMnOVySK4-VjMKq4IHLgr1KkzBUm2awsMt5lCoFHH_zWuoAht04oioDkNIJ2B7BqENJT2FKJLQFbyiaRBWk1mxTg/4h8/bbKLPgAiQzq94bYLYT48vg/h8/h001.BvoTm61Nifbeg42fePkq8n2sWhMJBbitkvVKYSLWqqM)

clean_body: Georgia Democrats are facing a key special election for a seat in the state Senate, and the stakes are sky high. We’re fighting to flip as many seats as possible in this ultra-competitive chamber. | | | | | ---|--- On August 26th, Georgia Democrats are facing a key special election for a seat in the state Senate, and the stakes are sky high. Debra Shigley is the lone Democrat in a race against Republicans in a GOP-held district. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Winning in August would diminish the GOP’s power in Georgia – and it’d be a disastrous upset for Trump and his authoritarian buddies. Anything is possible when we come together and support candidates fighting for the causes that voters care about most. It’ll be tough, but this seat is critical to building Democratic power in the legislature, so we can’t give up. Letting far-right power go unchecked fuels hate and rolls back our rights. But together we can help support state Dems who are committed to building a better, safer, and more inclusive future. Are you ready to fight back? Thanks, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Not authorized by any candidate. Contributions or gifts to DLCC Victory Fund are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . name: Tyranny Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Troop Deployments Nationwide?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, we have
crossed into uncharted authoritarian territory.

Deploying 700 Marines and 4,000 National Guard troops against protesters
in Los Angeles is an intentional attempt to shred the constitutional
safeguards meant to prevent tyranny from ever taking root.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31338?source=email20240610&t=1011&akid=8735%2E5885482%2EOqUaOQ ]Bernie Tweet about authoritarianism in real time

This goes far beyond Los Angeles. Experts are already sounding the alarm
that Trump has authorized preemptive deployments nationwide regardless of
whether protests involve violence *or are even happening yet.*

The line between military and civilian government is one of the most
critical protections for democracy. We must immediately [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31338?source=email20240610&t=1012&akid=8735%2E5885482%2EOqUaOQ ]urge our
members of Congress to use every power at their disposal to stop Trump
from deploying troops against our communities!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31338?source=email20240610&t=1013&akid=8735%2E5885482%2EOqUaOQ ]ADD YOUR NAME

This is not law and order—it's tyranny. Right now it's Los
Angeles—tomorrow it could be Chicago, Miami, or Minneapolis.

When power is concentrated in the hands of a corrupt few, and dissent is
met with armed repression, democracy itself is under siege. We must call
this what it is: a threat to the republic.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31338?source=email20240610&t=1014&akid=8735%2E5885482%2EOqUaOQ ]Our Revolution Tweet on Trump using the military as a political weapon

Active duty soldiers are trained to fight and destroy an enemy, not to
de-escalate civil unrest, and that's precisely the point. Trump is
intentionally trying to inflame the situation to create a politically
winning "law and order" media cycle, and he doesn't care how many people
are hurt or how much damage he does to the Constitution in the process.

Congress must fulfill its constitutional responsibility to block this
authoritarian escalation. Our elected representatives have the authority,
obligation, and moral imperative to act immediately, using every lever
available—from asserting congressional authority over troop deployments to
refusing funding—to prevent President Trump from using soldiers as his own
personal police force.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31338?source=email20240610&t=1015&akid=8735%2E5885482%2EOqUaOQ ]Add your name to call on Congress NOW to stand up for democracy and
stop Trump's military crackdown. No Troops in Our Streets!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31338?source=email20240610&t=1016&akid=8735%2E5885482%2EOqUaOQ ]ADD YOUR NAME

History will remember moments like these. It will record who stood firmly
against military threats intended to silence dissent, and who stayed
silent as authoritarianism attempted to rise in America.

Our Revolution members have always been on the right side of history,
organizing protests, taking to the streets, mobilizing calls, and standing
up courageously to say enough is enough. We won't back down now, or ever.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email20240610.PuOlmt&t=1008&akid=8735%2E5885482%2EOqUaOQ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email20240610.7nxJMQ&t=1009&akid=8735%2E5885482%2EOqUaOQ ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ ]Add your name to call on Congress NOW to stand up for democracy and stop Trump's military crackdown. No Troops in Our Streets! [ ]ADD YOUR NAME History will remember moments like these. It will record who stood firmly against military threats intended to silence dissent, and who stayed silent as authoritarianism attempted to rise in America. Our Revolution members have always been on the right side of history, organizing protests, taking to the streets, mobilizing calls, and standing up courageously to say enough is enough. We won't back down now, or ever. When we organize, we win. name: Katie Porter
subject: California is the tip of the spear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39796%2E3422442%2EWXqlVz)
Dear Derek,
In the past week, Donald Trump has escalated his targeting of California:
* Illegally withholding federal funding
* Unlawfully detaining Californians without due process
* Seizing our National Guard
* Threatening to arrest our sitting governor

**Every American should be worried about this, whether you and your loved ones live in California or not—because if the president can overstep in California without repercussions, he can do it anywhere in the country.**
These are the actions of a wannabe dictator, and Trump is clearly looking to see how far he can go.
As Donald Trump tries to expand his own power, we need to remind him that in our democracy, power belongs to the people.
Speak up. Volunteer. Donate. Peacefully protest.
If you’ve been concerned about what’s happening in our country but unsure about using your voice, now is the time.
—Katie
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250610_1_ak?refcode=em20250610-39796&refcode2=39796_3422442_WXqlVz&akid=39796%2E3422442%2EWXqlVz)

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250610-39796&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39796_3422442_WXqlVz&akid=39796%2E3422442%2EWXqlVz)**

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Use the 25th Amendment to Remove Trump NOW
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Use the 25th Amendment to Remove Trump NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5cb3f94-a03a-4b07-a137-090b37bf4cbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c83a206-43d5-4291-aee4-b5228aa13ad6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | It's hard to believe it, but Trump has gotten even worse. His asinine trade wars have wrought economic havoc and turned the world against us. He is no longer even pretending to follow the Constitution. He is sending combat troops to be used against our own citizens. And his cognitive decline has been rapid, obvious, and incredibly frightening. **Trump needs to go NOW. We can't endure 3 1/2 more years of this.[It's time to use the 25th Amendment to remove Trump.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b4954e6-2903-4426-a06f-9aed878c9a50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The 25th Amendment allows the Vice President and a majority of cabinet members to remove the president, if they believe he is unable to perform his duties. We've reached that point. And we need put pressure on them to move NOW. Yes, the cabinet is full of Trump supporters, and is unlikely to move immediately. But as time goes on, and Trump worsens, there's a chance they will start turning against him, the way cabinet members from his first term did. The more pressure we put on them, the quicker we can make this happen. **They are opportunists, and if it looks like the ship is sinking, they will throw the captain overboard before they go down with the ship.** (And yes, that would make Vance president, but as horrible as Vance is, Trump represents a unique and existential threat to America) [**Add your name, and demand the 25th amendment be used to remove Trump NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcec9a840-3f5c-4cd0-b2fa-a55ad0e10d40/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc78ac6d4-0b71-4135-8b0c-3ba6933a675f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6306586-1673-4805-a106-29172eacf778/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f935a04-5354-426f-9f4a-0d7bf8245c5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1794ac31-8ae3-4005-ad42-82baa29cfbd7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Peter,

We're sounding the alarm after Joni Ernst's brazen remarks last week; it's clear voters are fed up with the cruel nonchalance coming from the Republican Party.

**That's why we're taking a closer look at reach states like Iowa and races like Ernst's.**

Because if Republicans are willing to be this thoughtless and dismissive, it won't be long until they feel the ripple effect at the ballot box.**And we want to be in the best position possible to take advantage of their self-inflicted political vulnerability.**

So, Peter, as we finalize our strategy for the cycle ahead, we need your input:
[**What red states and races should we invest in this cycle?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109335849/550764724/-475766367?refcode=WUENE619_20250610_ErnstKicker_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1056367&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjQ4MjM2OS0yNTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ih2JWsE06_ouas0XTHoAY6xm9S2vw6bYRxolfIHrnLg=&emci=a9482369-2546-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b2482369-2546-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5177934)

Last week, GOP Sen. Joni Ernst said the quiet part out loud at a town hall.

When a concerned constituent pointed out that people would die as a result of Republicans' devastating proposed cuts to Medicaid, Ernst's response wasn't concern. It wasn't urgency. It wasn't compassion. It was a shrug, a smirk — and six chilling words:

**"We all are going to die."**

This is the Republican agenda in action: Prioritize billionaire tax breaks above all. Cut off lifesaving medical care from the people who need it most. Slash services families rely on — and then brush off the human cost.

At EMILYs List, we're sounding the alarm. It's still early in the cycle, but comments like this are a clear signal to us: It's time to take a closer look at states like Iowa and races like Joni Ernst's (who happens to be up for election in 2026!). We've seen this kind of cruel nonchalance from Republicans since the day Trump arrived at the White House. Comments like Ernst's don't just expose how dangerous the Republican agenda is — they also create real political vulnerability. The public outrage in response to Ernst's remarks has proven one thing: Voters across the political spectrum are paying attention, and they're furious.

If Republicans are willing to be this brazenly dismissive and careless to their own voters just to stay in Donald Trump's good graces, it won't be long until the ripple effect reaches the ballot box. **In fact, they may be more beatable than anyone thought.**

Joni Ernst said the quiet part out loud at a town hall. Cut off lifesaving medical care from the people who need it most. Slash services families rely on — and then brush off the human cost. At EMILYs List, we're sounding the alarm. Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=Yh7BFfroSBoPVmWBntP7WdYPONcDMHQMFnIIF3Iw7LzJpVBHe7l9/PjhR2NJcJH3VHNcz4YnzPphPxX0yl0R+VKirDldoFc6aJApvX5aSAU=]
CNN: DOGE seeks access to highly sensitive taxpayer data at IRS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/CNN_DOGE_IRS.png]
Elon Musk and his DOGE team have taken a wrecking ball to the federal government -- with President Trump's approval.
Funding has been frozen, key agencies are being shuttered, and multiple outlets have reported that Musk and his team have unfettered access to critical personal taxpayer data like Social Security numbers and IRS returns, despite lacking the security clearances needed to access sensitive government information.
We want to hear from our supporters in your area about DOGE's efforts. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you approve of Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency?

It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

Peter, remember when Kim warned us that our democracy was on the line? **This is exactly why she sounded the alarm:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109336783/550768479/-1557424714?ms=em25_250610_demope_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_250610_demope_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_250610_demope_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250610_demope_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=QLxL0DeeqcJYJGBcghBVZmE1pxRyH49ATefkNHhaf7nH6Up63ELR1rPKFE8N6TbNWw0BlytCUM4jVqg4tFINel/J74/PuGufyabLDgGmopDdlZKxJQEG5fGiDpm9Yu9a9VpowlqlkyNp+wzqWySNV2DeloAT5vWo1NY3hcVQDhI=&refcode2=1f9d1dcd-2746-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjlkMWRjZC0yNzQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fbAmLXONz-FvMmrDEhAbEILARFHoeukRNcLpPTvuMcw=&emci=550aeb74-4a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1f9d1dcd-2746-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338) Republicans in Congress aren’t working to lower costs, protect healthcare, or defend our communities. **Instead, they’re floating a constitutional amendment to let Donald Trump run for a third term as president.**

_Let that sink in..._

GOP members are actively working to dismantle the very guardrails our Constitution put in place to protect democracy from turning into a monarchy. The 22nd Amendment exists for a reason. It stops any one person—no matter how powerful or popular—from consolidating power indefinitely.

It's a check on authoritarianism, and it's one of the foundations of our democratic system. But clearly, that’s not stopping the far-right from trying to rewrite the rules to serve Trump. This isn’t just wrong—it’s BEYOND dangerous. And we have to say so.

These riots are a national disgrace.

Every week, we hear new stories about innocent Americans being targeted by violent illegals, Liberals interfering with Law Enforcement, ICE raids getting leaked, and Democrats siding with law-breaking protesters.

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: I grew up next to a Donald Trump golf course
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
But not in the way you think...

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109337176/550769974/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBkZTVlYS0yODQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3tJzGEsAZnKy0Y5rLzXQLCdU8WDm5jLRoUyXdvw3fyw=)
---
Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109337177/550769975/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250610_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBkZTVlYS0yODQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3tJzGEsAZnKy0Y5rLzXQLCdU8WDm5jLRoUyXdvw3fyw=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109337178/550769976/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250610_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBkZTVlYS0yODQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3tJzGEsAZnKy0Y5rLzXQLCdU8WDm5jLRoUyXdvw3fyw=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

Right now, the threat of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families _– and they’re raising millions to pull it off._

But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. [**Can I count on you to join our coalition today by chipping in $3 toward our $25,000 Mid-Year goal? If thousands of people like you each chip in what they can afford, I know we can take on their dark money and handle whatever the GOP trifecta throws our way. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109337179/550769977/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250610_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBkZTVlYS0yODQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3tJzGEsAZnKy0Y5rLzXQLCdU8WDm5jLRoUyXdvw3fyw=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109337186/550769984/-935925420?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250610_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBkZTVlYS0yODQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3tJzGEsAZnKy0Y5rLzXQLCdU8WDm5jLRoUyXdvw3fyw=)

_Ritchie_

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

body:
Click here to unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4xBla9HqS06_watf7h3QaQ2?source=header_rfe]
You’ll want to see this:

Donald Trump just deployed military troops in LA.

Gavin Newsom just took a bold stand – and called on Americans everywhere to act:

Gavin Newsom: "This is a red line - and they're crossing it. WAKE UP!" [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91305/images/20250610_em_fr_rr1_hmp_main.png]

We need to wake up and answer the call to action with an unprecedented response. The stakes TRULY couldn’t be higher. name: Hassan Martini
subject: Democrat defects to GOP amidst Trump Crackdown in LA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
He is backing Trump’s crackdown in LA and he just got dinner with Bannon last night. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DCEnmSrLPZ6VVg5XtcYp6m3R4tvCX2qYgfbOiscdOdJ9x12CNNnVzwDzT54epMFhj09YZnregJ2YXKHnfQLSEgC4OjA3RQtcV_BTn3SJEO2lMjg2lGXLI7kKgIgrk7Z-YpJQXl0Tx-BlCVze3ufwFi2Buv0KS5iUzto7sTZ_99BhBnJAZ1e1OvsAfW0VhoZna6R3_LfbWRicSh7_vrZiNh1GzVH94Pc7GKrD1SLqwBWtrq42TDliJ-nffPIITWby5LT7dsKDPJEOBl1LFwaD8pzTI7b7FdlRTD6BVeUYTyUTqfxl-xBzgfFTzDBXqJV26RbERph-9dzgHTKHTn3hytw/4h8/TdMEUvTpScSLZDNkMI2ubg/h0/h001.eaxRqgOKV2hzb75XIOmEbDmnB5g0JvJcDFQ8R63i0Hw)
---
Friend, _Our nation is on fire._ In response to anti ICE protests in LA, the administration has **deployed US Marines to quash the protests** , the first time in American history that active duty soldiers have been deployed against citizens.

Trump has also illegally seized control of the CA National Guard and has called for the Director of ICE to arrest California Governor Gavin Newsom.

Rather than standing in solidarity with Governor Newsom and Californians facing the brunt of the US military, _some Democrats have joined up with the Republicans and are supporting Trump 's crackdown_.

I am, of course, referring to "Democrats" like Sen. Fetterman (D-PA), who have not issued a single statement condemning the administration's illegal orders to turn our own military against our citizens. No--instead, Fetterman spreads Trump's talking points attacking peaceful protestors:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DCEnmSrLPZ6VVg5XtcYp6m3R4tvCX2qYgfbOiscdOdJ9XgYQhA-FoPkrZQNQeeTgH4a3StQ4RH5VfUqxFEHcktJb7w4LGY3LTQpAaoB4Be9C5lSJc5BxAlDC3q-Fg7yKDhQGYLmw8rEAvKDEDaKh0HoOVgZD11cO6Pia51z9_dZrKkq4fzJNGD54riy3I2pe3No1a1KFGDLyEIyVklm05WwXVAJkw_3D4Pz9UmPRS09WQGNY2WWyiqpYbr4OUGLrRzxvvZYELa3O0UIR0pDzcGn_dgs9YV0TeDO-4jGgV_PeoNeiS4Sa9egs4Hl8XBzasB0dGvqWbsSJ7tg6cGinlDw/4h8/TdMEUvTpScSLZDNkMI2ubg/h1/h001.xeH7tle2DSKaSKYdaDVqaAFFmHbu6LW3Yc5b6tSTX0U)
---
Yes, of course, there are a few people causing harm to our cause, but that is the minority--one that Republicans, the media, and the Fettermans of the world amplify.

And if you needed anymore convincing on where his allegiance's lay, Fetterman was caught getting dinner with Steve Bannon and the editor of Breitbart at MAGA's favorite DC hangout last night:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DCEnmSrLPZ6VVg5XtcYp6m3R4tvCX2qYgfbOiscdOdJ8ONaDZLpKXBiZ-AdUJ3w3LmFfdbnIdlqL8goJXP-VaBRLFkzNOsdGQ3shXssY4N73grdPQ_MKGBXZKX4wMCb67NQaKBUHYPEDrkpdszRyX8GisfdB18wWOS2i5Jrut7-iFhC8gGz4va8C9NZy9lRf31wUPUG7CIB9pK1nPeDsK0TJoilXZUkqWlBM1j0-boBmsmaAdv5njsZBoMZBQZ-TVhLP_dqW_5BKNPSehOdv9QLnfxalssf4VwIlVG3T_5VtsITVMndPuLxUDQxscX7Xc6hKigWtosuov0FPDBWliyA/4h8/TdMEUvTpScSLZDNkMI2ubg/h2/h001.-gBGD6CbNH2GzSbUx_HySvOpke1a0wWxZ1Ps7D7skF4)
---
I am mortified by what is happening in America. I should note that I am traveling abroad this month, and everywhere I go, I get asked the same question: "What has happened to America?" I truly don't know how to answer that, other than to say we as Democrats didn't stay true to our values. As a result, a ruthless white supremacist dictator partnered with a ruthless white supremacist billionaire with endless resources--and they brainwashed the country into voting for them.

In the coming days, more protests are scheduled across the country. Our military will likely be given more illegal orders to attack our own people. This is the constitutional crisis we've been bracing for. As Democrats, we cannot give in--not today, not ever. Our country is not a military state. It never has been, and it never will be. We will always denounce violence--whether in Israel or in America. Evil will not triumph, and we will not back down.

**I know this email may cause me some headaches when I try to re-enter the country. I do not care. If they silence us, they win. I beg of you: do not remain silent, especially if you are in a position of privilege where you can use your voice.****
**
We must stay vigilant. We must stay unified._We must root out the bad apples in our party --like the Fettermans of this country._ We don't want them. We don't need them. The days of remaining silent because the D.C. consultant class threatens us are over. We are more powerful than they are. We have the people on our side. We are not going to betray the Democratic Party--we are going to win it back and kick them out once and for all.

We are the party of the working class. We will defend all people, regardless of race, gender, or socioeconomic background. We will fight to restore our credibility with the American people. And just as we are witnessing in real time with the incredible mayoral race and our very own endorsed candidate, Zohran Mamdani, we are going to win the minds and hearts of the American people.

This is our moment. What we do next will determine what kind of country our children inherit. We must fight. Our country deserves it.

In solidarity now and forever,

Hassan Martini
Executive Director

clean_body: He is backing Trump’s crackdown in LA and he just got dinner with Bannon last night. | | Friend, Our nation is on fire. In response to anti ICE protests in LA, the administration has deployed US Marines to quash the protests , the first time in American history that active duty soldiers have been deployed against citizens. Trump has also illegally seized control of the CA National Guard and has called for the Director of ICE to arrest California Governor Gavin Newsom. Rather than standing in solidarity with Governor Newsom and Californians facing the brunt of the US military, some Democrats have joined up with the Republicans and are supporting Trump 's crackdown. I am, of course, referring to "Democrats" like Sen. Fetterman (D-PA), who have not issued a single statement condemning the administration's illegal orders to turn our own military against our citizens. No--instead, Fetterman spreads Trump's talking points attacking peaceful protestors: | Yes, of course, there are a few people causing harm to our cause, but that is the minority--one that Republicans, the media, and the Fettermans of the world amplify. And if you needed anymore convincing on where his allegiance's lay, Fetterman was caught getting dinner with Steve Bannon and the editor of Breitbart at MAGA's favorite DC hangout last night: | I am mortified by what is happening in America. I should note that I am traveling abroad this month, and everywhere I go, I get asked the same question: "What has happened to America?" I truly don't know how to answer that, other than to say we as Democrats didn't stay true to our values. As a result, a ruthless white supremacist dictator partnered with a ruthless white supremacist billionaire with endless resources--and they brainwashed the country into voting for them. In the coming days, more protests are scheduled across the country. Our military will likely be given more illegal orders to attack our own people. This is the constitutional crisis we've been bracing for. As Democrats, we cannot give in--not today, not ever. Our country is not a military state. It never has been, and it never will be. We will always denounce violence--whether in Israel or in America. Evil will not triumph, and we will not back down. I know this email may cause me some headaches when I try to re-enter the country. I do not care. If they silence us, they win. I beg of you: do not remain silent, especially if you are in a position of privilege where you can use your voice. We must stay vigilant. We must stay unified.We must root out the bad apples in our party --like the Fettermans of this country. We don't want them. We don't need them. The days of remaining silent because the D.C. consultant class threatens us are over. We are more powerful than they are. We have the people on our side. We are not going to betray the Democratic Party--we are going to win it back and kick them out once and for all. We are the party of the working class. We will defend all people, regardless of race, gender, or socioeconomic background. We will fight to restore our credibility with the American people. And just as we are witnessing in real time with the incredible mayoral race and our very own endorsed candidate, Zohran Mamdani, we are going to win the minds and hearts of the American people. This is our moment. What we do next will determine what kind of country our children inherit. We must fight. Our country deserves it. In solidarity now and forever, Hassan Martini Executive Director No Dem Left Behind | | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. ## ICYMI: **Los Angeles ERUPTS into CHAOS ...**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2a4a86ba-a19a-40ea-be17-56e32e32eafd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Stories I'm reading...
[EXCLUSIVE: Rep. Ronny Jackson Accuses Biden Doctor Kevin O'Connor Of Sexual Misconduct](https://substack.com/redirect/4d27bb3c-db3d-41ce-9938-25088c3ae501?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Daily Caller
[What really happened outside the Paramount Home Depot? The reality on the ground vs. the rhetoric](https://substack.com/redirect/9f4efa7c-1221-44a7-948f-c66eee7a7d45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via L.A. Times
[The Cancer World is Waking Up to the Need to Protect the Immune System and the Cancer Bioshield](https://substack.com/redirect/44e95ca4-d6af-438d-8dce-e4971391615d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Dr. Pat Soon-Shiong
[Michael Cohen, former ally who turned on Trump in hush money case, calls on president for pardon](https://substack.com/redirect/4cc7ead2-58e9-4e20-ba04-fb8647c16076?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Washington Times
[In Challenge to Trump, Smithsonian Says It Controls Personnel Decisions](https://substack.com/redirect/46e63e28-72cd-4b0f-85b9-85e1fb90be2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via New York Times
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Coming up today, we've got BOTH Deputy White House Press Secretary Harrison Fields AND Secretary of Education, Linda McMahon. Please join us on [YouTube](https://substack.com/redirect/2ed581d8-bb53-4b67-9517-04aa0d7725c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at 6pm for the Premiere. Then, join me Wednesday for a conversation with former Speaker of the House, Newt Gingrich. Thursday we've got a great panel with Batyar Ungar-Sargon, Caroline Downey, and Tony Katz, and then author and Emmy award winning investigative journalist Sharyl Attkisson will join me Friday to close out the week. Don't miss it!
## Los Angeles ERUPTS, but it's all in fun?
If you thought Abrego Garcia was misplayed politically, you ain't seen nothing yet.
Over the weekend, anti-ICE violence broke up in Los Angeles... and was promptly downplayed by all major media.
It's worth noting that the whole situation was caused by a Democrat member of the California assembly, but we'll get to that later.
I've always said every issue has two sides: the policy and the politics.
Sometimes the policy is solid, but the political optics are a mess--or vice versa.
Right now, with the Trump administration tackling illegal immigration head-on, they're nailing both.
But the media's coverage of the resistance? Let's just say it's a masterclass in shooting themselves in the foot.
Let me break it down...

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: It’s time to put parents back in the driver’s seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Elementary school children should not be introduced to gender-affirming ideologies in the public school system. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bdc0bdef152645a1906326e2f3ee14c6&_e=KtdTrcw1N5y5N_MQAdLt7FdydV5Yp67FUJcDkWaTY2lg-2JQPcx2jY4z1kz3tj2yi3HU79ov3jZ4Ybi1HxiqHRTDnqKnyEb7JMQdcOYyenufR4IALDCszwmRQRGBECnUpoe67QyNotkoql_jTNx9XXQkGELn4BQDABMZ0ZgDcI-C5s-kYHGhbKM1EupN6GeMjR-C7OFqJfJ90S_0WcFqxQ5YND_mvyTWOmlaj_u71G8lWaGJrQUbjAXEKmBF1HDLhVbDUZkS14Yz73CnvKUhvBa9y8_Skak3JvV2-QQ72dyXETTolhUEhr2Gzep3CltWqxJzrkNturswNgBC8bht_VyJtyPEyJqVCb3hBTe0sLi6BAKgrSUXufMa75k9oZkL2RE4bAlnvA3NDS2vyfR3eqCajFrg3AkHZruK8ZRbLss%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time right now.

I’m well aware that if you’re reading this right now, you’re likely receiving many emails from countless would-be politicians introducing themselves and asking for your money.

I’m not one of them.

_**I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **_who has put his body through the ringer serving this great nation of ours, but has so much left to give for a country that has given me so much.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

A few months ago, I decided that the best way to do that would be by running for U.S. Senate against **Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** After living through this man’s governorship, his failed vice presidential campaign last fall, and having seen firsthand what his **looneytoon policies** have done to the state of Minnesota, I decided I couldn’t sit back and let another Democrat waltz into the Senate.

**Navy SEALs fight to win** , and that’s what I will do - for Minnesota and for you. I was recently asked why I would open my life up to the scrutiny of a federal campaign. While there are numerous reasons, **I want to tell you about one of the most important today: childhood education.**

Here in Minnesota and around the nation, our children are being indoctrinated. They’re being forced to learn topics beyond their years that are not in the ordinary curriculum.

Our kids deserve an education, not an agenda. Here in Minnesota, boards of education and radical left politicians, like my opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, regularly override the will of parents.

**Did you know that elementary schools around America are beginning to institute gender studies in K-5 classes? This type of curriculum should be reserved for college campuses, and only on an elective basis. Kids in first through 5th grade have no concept of this adult material and shouldn’t.
**
_**When did the government stop listening to parents and putting the will of crazed left-wing activists ahead of the concerns and beliefs of parents?**_

It’s time to put parents back in the driver's seat.

**[If you agree, please contribute a few dollars to my campaign today. clean_body: Elementary school children should not be introduced to gender-affirming ideologies in the public school system. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time right now. I’m well aware that if you’re reading this right now, you’re likely receiving many emails from countless would-be politicians introducing themselves and asking for your money. I’m not one of them. I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan who has put his body through the ringer serving this great nation of ours, but has so much left to give for a country that has given me so much. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. A few months ago, I decided that the best way to do that would be by running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. After living through this man’s governorship, his failed vice presidential campaign last fall, and having seen firsthand what his looneytoon policies have done to the state of Minnesota, I decided I couldn’t sit back and let another Democrat waltz into the Senate. Navy SEALs fight to win , and that’s what I will do - for Minnesota and for you. I was recently asked why I would open my life up to the scrutiny of a federal campaign. While there are numerous reasons, I want to tell you about one of the most important today: childhood education. Here in Minnesota and around the nation, our children are being indoctrinated. They’re being forced to learn topics beyond their years that are not in the ordinary curriculum. Our kids deserve an education, not an agenda. Here in Minnesota, boards of education and radical left politicians, like my opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, regularly override the will of parents. Did you know that elementary schools around America are beginning to institute gender studies in K-5 classes? This type of curriculum should be reserved for college campuses, and only on an elective basis. Kids in first through 5th grade have no concept of this adult material and shouldn’t. When did the government stop listening to parents and putting the will of crazed left-wing activists ahead of the concerns and beliefs of parents? It’s time to put parents back in the driver's seat. I’m running for the United States Senate because, as a retired Navy SEAL, I’ve seen the dangers of the world, and In liberty, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Update re: our latest lawsuit against Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
President Trump has doubled down on his unlawful and unprecedented military escalation in California.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250610&t=1&akid=1822%2E1088799%2Eet38YU)
I have an urgent update for you on the situation in Los Angeles.
Yesterday, Governor Newsom and I announced a lawsuit against President Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth for unlawfully deploying 2,000 California National Guard Troops without the Governor’s consent or authorization.
After our announcement, the President doubled down, deploying 2,000 more troops and deploying an additional 700 U.S. Marines — _an extremely rare move by a U.S. president._
**I just filed a temporary restraining order in court to stop Trump and Hegseth from using military and federalized National Guard to patrol our communities.**
**[We need to remain steadfast in our fight for state sovereignty and against this administration’s unlawful actions. If I have your support, can you rush a contribution of $5 or more to power our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250610?refcode=em20250610-1822&amount=5&refcode2=1822_1088799_et38YU&akid=1822%2E1088799%2Eet38YU)**
More updates soon when I have them. Thanks for standing with me.
— Rob
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rob Bonta [info@e.robbonta.com]
Date: Mon, Jun 9, 2025 at 7:37 PM
Subject: An abuse of authority
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
Last weekend, President Trump and Department of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth federalized 2,000 California National Guard troops without authorization from Governor Newsom and against the wishes of local law enforcement.
**This move was unnecessary, unprecedented, and unlawful — so the Governor and I are suing to stop it.[If you have our back, chip in now →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250610?refcode=em20250610-1822&amount=5&refcode2=1822_1088799_et38YU&akid=1822%2E1088799%2Eet38YU)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250610?refcode=em20250610-1822&amount=5&refcode2=1822_1088799_et38YU&akid=1822%2E1088799%2Eet38YU)
Let me be clear: _There is no invasion or rebellion in Los Angeles or the state of California._ The President is trying to manufacture chaos and crisis on the ground for his own political ends.
Calling in these troops to respond to protests is not only **counterproductive** but also deeply unfair to the members of the National Guard who are hard at work every day protecting our state, preparing for and responding to natural disasters, and training so that, if called, they can fight our nation’s wars.
**We don’t take the President’s abuse of power and violation of California’s sovereignty lightly.** We’re asking a court to put a stop to this unlawful, unprecedented order.
**[If you’re with us in this fight, please consider chipping in $5 or more to support our people-powered campaign as I focus on holding the President accountable to the law.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250610?refcode=em20250610-1822&amount=5&refcode2=1822_1088799_et38YU&akid=1822%2E1088799%2Eet38YU)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250610?refcode=em20250610-1822&amount=5&refcode2=1822_1088799_et38YU&akid=1822%2E1088799%2Eet38YU)**
To anyone outraged with this administration who feels moved to stand up and speak out, I urge you to do so peacefully, safely, and lawfully. We will get through this together.
Thank you,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250610&t=2&refcode2=1822_1088799_et38YU&akid=1822%2E1088799%2Eet38YU)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1822%2E1088799%2Eet38YU)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1822%2E1088799%2Eet38YU)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642

name: Tiernan Sittenfeld, LCV
subject: RSVP: Join us for an exclusive briefing with climate leaders
body:
This Thursday, June 12 — learn more about our plans

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI1OTE2ODIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI0MDgzNTk0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |

|
* * *
---
| | | | [ ](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | Right now, Senate Republicans are rushing to try to pass a bill that would gut clean energy investments, severely increase energy costs for consumers, and create pay-to-play schemes for polluters to ignore environmental safeguards and drill on public lands, along with other threats to people’s health and safety. **It’s on track to be one of the most harmful, costly, and sweeping pieces of legislation ever.**
---
| | If you want to learn more about our plans to fight back, join us on **Thursday, June 12th, at 6pm ET / 3pm PT** for an exclusive briefing with environmental organizations and activists from across the country to discuss the plan of action, and how you can get involved. We will be joined by special guest **Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer** to give us the latest from the Senate on how we’re fighting dangerous budget cuts that threaten clean air, safe drinking water, public lands, affordable clean energy choices, and good-paying jobs.
---
| | | [ RSVP TODAY ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~Ada9J_)
---
| | Thanks for all you do, Peter, and we’ll see you on June 12th.
---
| | Tiernan Sittenfeld
Senior Vice President, Government AffairsLeague of Conservation Voters
---
| | |

---

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: A Michigan where anyone and everyone can thrive.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I’m committed to the fight 24/7/365.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=401%2E181023%2EAXgdmG)
Hey team, happy Pride Month!
I had a blast marching in the Motor City Pride Parade over the weekend. It was such a beautiful celebration of the power of love, community, and inclusion.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250610_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=401%2E181023%2EAXgdmG)
The energy, the people, the joy — it was everything that makes me proud of our state!
I’m running for governor to make sure Michigan is a welcoming place for anyone and everyone to call home, no matter who you love or your gender identity.
As LGBTQ+ rights are under attack across the country, I promise that as the next governor of Michigan, I will fight for our friends and loved ones in the LGBTQ+ community. It’s not just a promise during Pride Month — **I’m committed to the fight 24/7/365.**
[**If you support a Michigan where everyone can have confidence in their voice and their vote, and that we are safe and protected, please pitch in a few dollars to my campaign for governor.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250610_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=401%2E181023%2EAXgdmG)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q22025.lB2dD6&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250610_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=401%2E181023%2EAXgdmG)

Thank you, and happy Pride!
— Jocelyn ❤️🧡💛💚💙💜

body:
The radical Left staged a mass protest at the Tampa City Hall to stop deportations of illegal immigrants. Peter, help us fight back and show the radical Left we will NOT let them California our Florida. |
---
Peter,

For days, we have watched violent protests erupt in California while the state's Democrat leaders sat back and did nothing. Protestors have looted stores, assaulted ICE agents, burned cars, and blocked major highways, all because President Trump is finally enforcing the law...

[
](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb5dc199ca0144d48eacd056a5dfbe79&_e=Z_F5eVG8cfXWok29HhQ61T2GdCW_oh7Iw6RZ-ALaVpxQHsfsHzef5Pe83WrPVv1E4YiYoBFeXt5tK8TNtoLIQTIXYK38puc3VW8Y6nuv-vCy3U7p8dOpXwTNaioLnHGQQss7baUAkl2YaHVTpWZ9txoVZYqtS2XibytEasu4cJ4UyoZ9-LT5ubc-IMrf_7HB4XTp3PxYbC9uY-Ydd8dRe0cP50V1qftfG3DOsU8zrJs8SqFc6NHYOM9W86P-Ohp_PQD62F19CKbp9O3VxRPFKYOOO16g9pwOJFkr7zNsiRiuzAWsIs0UdTeXE9pg0pXM-mliL8gT7KpoDS40T5aqWi-z-oVuzpkX2ufGzBe0DbGa03bRH4cfeosVymxt75TFIMHt6citZV7V3qcj-DYl0g%3D%3D) _Source: ABC News_
**Then, the radical Left staged a protest outside the Tampa City Hall in Florida to stop deportations of illegal immigrants.**

[**STOP THE LEFT!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb5dc199ca0144d48eacd056a5dfbe79&_e=Z_F5eVG8cfXWok29HhQ61T2GdCW_oh7Iw6RZ-ALaVpxQHsfsHzef5Pe83WrPVv1E4YiYoBFeXt5tK8TNtoLIQTIXYK38puc3VW8Y6nuv-vCy3U7p8dOpXwTNaioLnHGQQss7baUAkl2YaHVTpWZ9txoVZYqtS2XibytEasu4cJ4UyoZ9-LT5ubc-IMrf_7HB4XTp3PxYbC9uY-Ydd8dRe0cP50V1qftfG3DOsU8zrJsRzwdEEhYNzlhpd2-O3DxwlKgjkqWC6w_IaUMNK6JmbkV4pHR1GY47e16e2S8Tf2mZZCr19wP42ei8KGyOupV0e_VUIz83XSxzjnbmuupZFdP1LWujZZ5hqBd8iHKUuPad7V6dz5s-eyIzR6Fab8Ht8uGK7YH6KHk0bMwKqZ15GA%3D%3D)
**Let me be clear: Florida is a law-and-order state.** Under Florida's Republican leadership, inciting chaos and violent protests will not be tolerated and will be met with the _**FULL**_ force of the law.

[**Peter, please help us fight back and show the radical Left we will NOT let them California our Florida by making a donation today to help keep Florida Free.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb5dc199ca0144d48eacd056a5dfbe79&_e=Z_F5eVG8cfXWok29HhQ61T2GdCW_oh7Iw6RZ-ALaVpxQHsfsHzef5Pe83WrPVv1E4YiYoBFeXt5tK8TNtoLIQTIXYK38puc3VW8Y6nuv-vCy3U7p8dOpXwTNaioLnHGQQss7baUAkl2YaHVTpWZ9txoVZYqtS2XibytEasu4cJ4UyoZ9-LT5ubc-IMrf_7HB4XTp3PxYbC9uY-Ydd8dRe0cP50V1qftfG3DOsU8zrJt2ymRoGFvlChHvvLm5-ZqvdcGMJ2qTqmR1nPWwXIFDlEnRnn2qRCBlItlXoTbX8ilzL95mBoXYxKR21YOw8GvRzydYRF2rh-vadISgjcOcr41I92dwG26awDhN35eFbR6sSQwuXUXrSSJMAxAa2kT7r3GOqUJXL8Qrdq61YNBheg%3D%3D)

[**HELP US FIGHT BACK**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb5dc199ca0144d48eacd056a5dfbe79&_e=Z_F5eVG8cfXWok29HhQ61T2GdCW_oh7Iw6RZ-ALaVpxQHsfsHzef5Pe83WrPVv1E4YiYoBFeXt5tK8TNtoLIQTIXYK38puc3VW8Y6nuv-vCy3U7p8dOpXwTNaioLnHGQQss7baUAkl2YaHVTpWZ9txoVZYqtS2XibytEasu4cJ4UyoZ9-LT5ubc-IMrf_7HB4XTp3PxYbC9uY-Ydd8dRe0cP50V1qftfG3DOsU8zrJvM1v-tTnGw-KU2-dfcAmYp6YyapfeW5Gc6d5OLsjji3PNFWDcCsMA57EHjHXSSNZ3AVq-OXrJeaqtQrpwoaNAxdpMjGWpA-33j88IZ0GzszQJ86_2n1kPg_DgECeN5OgD1BTZImjUPfyI3AzzwM_qGn9ushPY9Qtw6229WMkIA8g%3D%3D)

Evan Power
_Chairman of the Republican Party of Florida_

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

name: Team ITT PAC
subject: Let’s build a better future for every Kentucky kid and their parents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Andy has never wavered in his commitment to Kentucky’s families.
Peter,

Andy has never wavered in his commitment to Kentucky’s families.

He's always believed that every child deserves a strong start — **that's why he’s fighting to make universal pre-K for all four-year-olds a reality in the Commonwealth.**

Here’s why this matters:

➡️ **53.8% of Kentucky children aren’t ready when they start kindergarten.** That gap makes it harder for them to succeed.

➡️ **79 of Kentucky’s 120 counties — nearly two-thirds — don’t have enough child care options to meet the needs of working families.** That means parents are having to choose between providing for their family or staying home.

➡️ **Pre-K strengthens our economy.** According to the U.S. Census Bureau, Pre-K for All could add up to 70,000 workers to Kentucky’s labor force.

➡️ **It puts money back in parents’ pockets.** A long-term Yale study shows KY families with kids in pre-K earn nearly $9,000 more per year, totaling over $50,000 by the time their kids reach elementary school.

➡️ **Every $1 we invest in pre-K returns $10 in economic activity** that cycles through our communities.

Andy’s work has always been about more than politics — it’s about people. He’s raised teacher pay, expanded healthcare, created more than 60,000 good jobs, and delivered record-breaking economic growth.

Now, he’s fighting to ensure that where a child is born doesn’t determine how far they can go. Pre-K for All is about giving every Kentucky child the tools to thrive — and giving every Kentucky parent a fair shot at success. Let’s keep Kentucky moving forward.

[**When leaders step up for us, we need to step up for them. Will you chip in today to stand with Andy and his work toward growth for our Commonwealth? name: Josh Hawley
subject: Deport Illegal Immigrants and Raise the Minimum Wage!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=8177e787dbb14aceb72dd1b0c039da5f&_e=HDaVdtBV7fWN3vmRc13I4x4gGG1bM5zCx4ZgnGVitslXNVF0uiAdszyKblVAkhw4-enfY-TZWqspvrOxNnlzjQ4KkTJd8yULj9npHwRPhbcYwkPRSvVOPaywg2EnStpOv8c4Q6pSQQbVFSsGoNLzOXbqKgqx9pDs63_x5c7gSof-NnaSWx_AQv7Knaj21oxOn1HDtvMk_YaRk_lBfR1QRuvffP0tUJcSgbM8S-slWdF3RhFEEuK6XFgxzmAMEWuNb2OCdZiBdQKGak_StDGtrt6Ug2LeT63JpbQrvwxUy7pP_sj7shjZ3iPWv2PMAaWiet4wH2WeGYVRBLA1f11nGFnnKIeBUu3TyzgfHHC7p1eihstLwp8Z2bj-08AQTzgM_K8G7ZkUg3xVYSuQzPXKSg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
For the last four years, the media and the democrats pushed the lie that the economy was booming. _It's not. _ Earnings reports for massive, global corporations may be great, but the life of the American working class is in shambles. Just buying gas and groceries is a struggle for _far too many _hardworking American families. I've got some good news and some bad news. Here's the good news— we can fix it. _**First**_ , we deport the illegals taking our jobs and burdening our systems. **_Second_** , we raise the minimum wage to $15 per hour. We can retake our workforce and increase wages for _American _workers in one fell swoop. Now for the bad news— the political establishment is married to big business and a globalist agenda. They _want_ cheap illegal labor. They _want_ foreign manufacturing. They _want_ a low minimum wage. Because they prioritize profits over people, and will stop at nothing to keep the money flowing.
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=8177e787dbb14aceb72dd1b0c039da5f&_e=HDaVdtBV7fWN3vmRc13I4x4gGG1bM5zCx4ZgnGVitslXNVF0uiAdszyKblVAkhw4-enfY-TZWqspvrOxNnlzjQ4KkTJd8yULj9npHwRPhbcYwkPRSvVOPaywg2EnStpOv8c4Q6pSQQbVFSsGoNLzOXbqKgqx9pDs63_x5c7gSof-NnaSWx_AQv7Knaj21oxOn1HDtvMk_YaRk_lBfR1QRuvffP0tUJcSgbM8S-slWdEjUZLYnAAsVd2QbiIvlza5l_Xdu0se0anHPfMOzFnq83ljzfUjvkGh4T6e5yNvBWSPdgyBHHY1CYyj7K3hO4AaIfAnowK50fNeWXUAEs4vwEp5Z8h4kLbzoOnxwFOtrvomQeFKY7N3JyqYFKBW7SIPaEAkrHnvNvMcEj01-v0BFw%3D%3D)
---
For decades, massive global corporations have pushed the narrative that raising the minimum wage would have a detrimental effect on the economy. All the while, they ship jobs overseas, hire the flood of immigrants, and reconfigure the American economy to extract more work for lower wages. The days of the Republican Party prioritizing profit for big business at the expense of hardworking Americans needs to end. I can't win this fight alone. I need grassroots patriots like you to _REJECT _the big business talking points the establishment has pushed for decades and _EMBRACE_ an America First movement that does just that - puts America workers FIRST.
---
[ **JOIN MY FIGHT TO RECLAIM THE AMERICAN DREAM** ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=8177e787dbb14aceb72dd1b0c039da5f&_e=HDaVdtBV7fWN3vmRc13I4x4gGG1bM5zCx4ZgnGVitslXNVF0uiAdszyKblVAkhw4-enfY-TZWqspvrOxNnlzjQ4KkTJd8yULj9npHwRPhbcYwkPRSvVOPaywg2EnStpOv8c4Q6pSQQbVFSsGoNLzOXbqKgqx9pDs63_x5c7gSof-NnaSWx_AQv7Knaj21oxOn1HDtvMk_YaRk_lBfR1QRuvffP0tUJcSgbM8S-slWdGUVwZXW9ExVSdATdQhJqCK0-DsYG4fznjUlQVx4Hb2sQt7jwENm2E0uFUpMz5dbPUHHC0FlHrBm17CAuCk_DPikEy_4HECb5MdHS3tsrnP0UBKlkWkGn-v8LHJIPJdLAwwNSNlXYfxwtXtUH7wPDyUU8s0_Z-UkawjKD0MjEQqfg%3D%3D)
---
In Liberty,
---
---
Josh Hawley
