clean_body: | | | | | Peter, For the last four years, the media and the democrats pushed the lie that the economy was booming. It's not. Earnings reports for massive, global corporations may be great, but the life of the American working class is in shambles. Just buying gas and groceries is a struggle for far too many hardworking American families. I've got some good news and some bad news. Here's the good news— we can fix it. First , we deport the illegals taking our jobs and burdening our systems. Second , we raise the minimum wage to $15 per hour. We can retake our workforce and increase wages for American workers in one fell swoop. Now for the bad news— the political establishment is married to big business and a globalist agenda. They want cheap illegal labor. They want foreign manufacturing. They want a low minimum wage. Because they prioritize profits over people, and will stop at nothing to keep the money flowing. For decades, massive global corporations have pushed the narrative that raising the minimum wage would have a detrimental effect on the economy. All the while, they ship jobs overseas, hire the flood of immigrants, and reconfigure the American economy to extract more work for lower wages. The days of the Republican Party prioritizing profit for big business at the expense of hardworking Americans needs to end. I can't win this fight alone. I need grassroots patriots like you to REJECT the big business talking points the establishment has pushed for decades and EMBRACE an America First movement that does just that - puts America workers FIRST. In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | | |

After decades of fighting by trailblazing activists, federal law explicitly prohibited gender-based wage discrimination. While it was a momentous step forward, pay inequity persists today. By and large, women still take home less than their male peers for the same work – and the disparity is even greater for women of color, and LGBTQ+ folks. _[In honor of this anniversary, it’s time to demand action. Add your name to join me in calling on Congress to pass legislation to finally close the gender pay gap once and for all:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109340178/550780252/-1308987774?refcode=RS_EM_PT_2025.06.10_EqualPay_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTY3NzBkYi0zMTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iZt8UHWsOlotQrWbuBeeE34gGUg__eAC-lHs1GhZO-U=&emci=b773c079-1846-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d56770db-3146-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442)_ [DEMAND EQUAL PAY FOR EQUAL WORK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109340179/550780253/-1308987774?refcode=RS_EM_PT_2025.06.10_EqualPay_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTY3NzBkYi0zMTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iZt8UHWsOlotQrWbuBeeE34gGUg__eAC-lHs1GhZO-U=&emci=b773c079-1846-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d56770db-3146-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) Pay equity isn’t just about fairness – it’s about building an economy that works for everyone, from the middle class out, putting working families at the center of economic policy. name: Adam Schiff
subject: An update on Los Angeles right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8671%2E5257348%2EqrNt7S)
Derek — I wanted to send you a quick update.
By now, you’ve seen the images coming out of Los Angeles.
The Trump administration’s continued targeting of our immigrant communities, its illegal renderings, and separation of families is absolutely unconscionable.
And so is the violence they have provoked. The vandalism and assaults on law enforcement. None of that is acceptable either.
You’ve seen the videos of ICE agents going into businesses and read the reports of them showing up at schools. You’ve seen communities coming together to support one another. You’ve heard the messages of the importance of family, community, and those who came here in search of a better life. You’ve seen the peaceful protests — the vast majorities of those who have gathered to express themselves. And yes, you’ve probably seen the unacceptable violence by those who don’t care about the plight of immigrant communities and simply wish to cause mayhem.
I want to start by saying that violence is never the answer, and assaulting law enforcement is never ok. Indeed, doing so plays directly into the hands of Donald Trump and those who seek to antagonize and weaponize the situation for their own gain. Do not let them succeed.
Our power as a community is in our voices, not our fists.
But I also want to take a moment to talk about Trump’s actions this weekend.
_**Trump’s actions are designed to inflame tensions and escalate the situation. Not de-escalate or make the situation better for anyone.**_
Calling in the California National Guard without the request or approval of the Governor — indeed over his opposition — is practically unprecedented. You would have to go back to the 1960s South and the effort to integrate schools over the objection of a segregationist governor to find another example, and that is hardly on point. Trump’s tactic here was meant to create more chaos, not stop it.
If the Guard is needed to restore peace, I’m confident Governor Newsom will ask for it. But continuing down this path will just erode trust in the Guard – the people we rely on in our worst moments, like when there’s an earthquake or major fire. Not to mention the even more unjustified move to bring in Marines.
But here’s why it’s such an issue — I see this as Trump using California as a test case for the unilateral misuse of the Guard across the country. And there is nothing he would like more than a violent confrontation with protestors to justify the unjustifiable — invocation of the _Insurrection Act_ or some form of martial law.
**So why does this matter, and what can you do about it?**
First, it’s important to keep using your voice in peaceful protest of these actions. To do so safely and legally.
Second, keep standing up for our community and for immigrants. To tell their stories and make sure people know that they are not just part of our communities, but integral to who we are as a nation. There is no objection to deporting violent criminals, but there is strong objection to breaking up peaceful families.
And finally, use the tools you have at your disposal to push back against the Trump Administration’s messaging, dehumanizing language, and blatant lies.
In Congress, I’ve taken a number of steps:
First, yesterday I attended the bail hearing for David Huerta — a California labor leader who was arrested on Friday after observing an ICE raid.
I was present to support David, along with members of his family and others in the labor movement who know and respect David. I have also pushed the Department of Justice to answer questions about his arrest and the personnel involved. I was glad to see him released on bond at the conclusion of the hearing.
I’m also working on legislation to strengthen civilian protections and prevent the mobilization of federal troops without the explicit authorization of Congress in situations like this. It is a basic American principle that our military does not conduct or enforce civil law enforcement.
Trump has repeatedly exploited his authority and grossly abused the power of the Presidency far beyond its bounds. He has shown a willingness to do so across the board. Not just with the military, National Guard, or law enforcement agencies, but with law firms, universities, and more – and the American people are hurting because of it.
**Trump wants chaos. And he wants to exploit it. He doesn’t want to make your lives better. And he can’t point to a single thing he’s done in 141 days to make them better.**
I’m going to keep doing everything I can to push back against this administration. I hope you do, too.
— Adam
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=8671%2E5257348%2EqrNt7S) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=8671%2E5257348%2EqrNt7S)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---

Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8671%2E5257348%2EqrNt7S)

name: Survey Dept. [Heritage Action]

body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2052e8w13x1v3ap0zopfvkb40jlcyeqq5xnhh70k6r0t09f4tbgex2mh4csljz2scdfs4gsavpsk2apkqxs&__stmp=sxno7f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxno7f&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf3gq9llrbev8c5c2zv0me0cg9xzr2lz4gwemmx5t284gglwe39gw9gne4p7dg8f00x93xzumiyjnukphtsoy7484r9vohqdonhnk9601i21tt913o9q7k6yiv6k8a11w501s2nh6rdf7ilyf0fc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxno7f&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxno7f&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxno7f&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxno7f&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf3gq9llrbev8c5c2zv0me1385tlqc8ru9pbpcy6pdn0m4f5bqevsdeaa5haoofl98g6ewe6t1nlymj7fmacrn4dywtq6k1q5g0syisbvtlf19hon46897vx6m773yqjnxfc0rhrfq1f7qtrwapx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxno7f&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxno7f&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Keisha Lance Bottoms
subject: Big news that I wanted you to hear from me first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Hi team, this is Keisha Lance Bottoms. I wanted you to hear it from me first: **I’m running for governor of Georgia.** As at least a fifth generation Georgian, I have dedicated over twenty years of my career to public service — and I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work to deliver for our state. [**I want to know that you’re with me — will you split a contribution between me and Ohio House Dems today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109340574/550781463/-220692591?refcode=250610_Bottoms_BigNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk2YjZjZi0zMzQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kdm-vx6T-s6LYazRcDOkSomHxWV1lt0-QIERtQYnzkc=) | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109340575/550781464/1548146612?refcode=250610_Bottoms_BigNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk2YjZjZi0zMzQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kdm-vx6T-s6LYazRcDOkSomHxWV1lt0-QIERtQYnzkc= "https://secure.actblue.com/")**
---
Team, as mayor of Atlanta, I steered the city through some very difficult times, including the pandemic.
Under my leadership, we increased access to affordable housing, gave our first responders a _historic_ pay increase, took steps to put more money back into the hands of the hardworking people of Atlanta, and more.
But our fight is far from over. And these days, most Georgians are right to wonder: _Who is looking out for us?_
Donald Trump is a disaster for our economy and our country. From his failure to address rising prices to his giving an unelected billionaire the power to cut Medicare and Social Security, **it’s one terrible thing after another.**
**It’s time for a leader who has your back and who will fight back — that’s why I’m running.**
[**I’m running for governor because Georgia families deserve far more than what Donald Trump and Republicans are giving us. If you’re with me, become a founding donor of my campaign by splitting a contribution between me and Ohio House Dems today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109340576/550781471/-220692591?refcode=250610_Bottoms_BigNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk2YjZjZi0zMzQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kdm-vx6T-s6LYazRcDOkSomHxWV1lt0-QIERtQYnzkc=)
| [**$15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109340577/550781479/1548146612?amount=15&refcode=250610_Bottoms_BigNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk2YjZjZi0zMzQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kdm-vx6T-s6LYazRcDOkSomHxWV1lt0-QIERtQYnzkc= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

As governor, I will make expanding Medicaid my top priority.
I’ll do more to protect those who protect us, just like I did as mayor when I gave first responders a historic raise.
I’ll work to eliminate state income taxes for teachers, focus on supporting small businesses, crack down on corporate landlords who are raising rent and housing costs, and invest in our children’s future.
**We need to look out for each other — and that’s the kind of governor I will be for Georgia.** [**Join me in the fights ahead by splitting a donation between me and Ohio House Dems.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109340581/550781497/-220692591?refcode=250610_Bottoms_BigNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk2YjZjZi0zMzQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kdm-vx6T-s6LYazRcDOkSomHxWV1lt0-QIERtQYnzkc=)
Thank you, and let’s get to work!
— Keisha

name: Ami Bera
subject: This is a dangerous abuse of power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

What we’ve seen over the past few days in Los Angeles is deeply alarming.

**President Trump’s decision to deploy Marines is a dangerous misuse of our military and a blatant abuse of presidential power.**

Let me be clear: this isn’t about protecting public safety. The president is escalating tensions to justify further crackdowns and undermine civil liberties.

**This cannot stand.**

The right to peacefully protest is fundamental to our democracy — and it must be protected.

Be well,

Ami Bera
---

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My phone has been ringing off the hook
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4749%2E35263%2EOCl3HG)
Peter — This administration has put profits over people at every turn. Trump let unelected billionaire, Elon Musk, and DOGE lay off thousands of federal workers in the name of “efficiency.” Trump ripped away funds for lifesaving Alzheimer’s and cancer research, putting a deadly hold on potential cures for millions of patients and their loved ones. And Trump’s budget bill slashes funding for SNAP and Medicaid — which could shutter rural hospitals, rip food assistance away from 3 million hungry families, and kick 258,396 Wisconsinites off their insurance. Why? So he can give billionaires and big corporations over $3 trillion (yes, with a “T”) in tax breaks. _This is literally the definition of putting profits over people._ My phone has been ringing off the hook about this budget bill, Peter. But folks aren’t just scared, they’re fed up. It’s time our government got back to working for everyday people, and I’m doing everything in my power to make Republicans listen. I’ll continue to fight back, because what their billionaire-first agenda will do to working families is cruel and just plain wrong. **[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll chip in to support my work and help us take back the Senate from Republicans in 2026.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-jun25.1mF5PM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250610_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4749%2E35263%2EOCl3HG)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-jun25.x5VxaC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250610_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4749%2E35263%2EOCl3HG)

clean_body: | Peter — This administration has put profits over people at every turn. Trump let unelected billionaire, Elon Musk, and DOGE lay off thousands of federal workers in the name of “efficiency.” Trump ripped away funds for lifesaving Alzheimer’s and cancer research, putting a deadly hold on potential cures for millions of patients and their loved ones. And Trump’s budget bill slashes funding for SNAP and Medicaid — which could shutter rural hospitals, rip food assistance away from 3 million hungry families, and kick 258,396 Wisconsinites off their insurance. Why? So he can give billionaires and big corporations over $3 trillion (yes, with a “T”) in tax breaks. This is literally the definition of putting profits over people. My phone has been ringing off the hook about this budget bill, Peter. But folks aren’t just scared, they’re fed up. It’s time our government got back to working for everyday people, and I’m doing everything in my power to make Republicans listen. I’ll continue to fight back, because what their billionaire-first agenda will do to working families is cruel and just plain wrong. name: Sean Feucht
subject: Urgent Gathering to Pray for Los Angeles!!
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=77a5bc8ae7464a1a947c55d4322bda4a&_e=mw6EWcIQ4BDF1RxCo_qrGwvdtItB3sfVXe39qN4ARq4gX34zLHJ69AG4xslx6Om0lA9NZ4sXlIODN6V_5307XNalTfP8KqZwQa4R6Oy4FzV9uI2tCEkMUnXEk1hLy7Io1MUti6NQeg8N-yeaLnbz_YCNMB4y8q9In7c20ZwY6reymz6ogdky-gGjTePWobz1aUaHBUuQXYgYplMsFEDQWtjW7CdgAOaA_B1PWk-jBrwST3ByDzp0z92DCe0jyDpGomD9RVuJPTBrF2nYgjaR3N6NvyTEw6iEnLpxWjAzY7eAybHEVvSdR7g51IZGTOVEzeGkazUARYUJR2dtWTmTtQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
God put the darkest, most broken cities in America on our hearts. From Isaiah 61, we launched the Revive in ‘25 Tour. Los Angeles is descending into a level of lawlessness and chaos we haven’t seen in a generation. It is certainly a perfect picture of a broken city. We’re launching an URGENT GATHERING to pray for Los Angeles THIS THURSDAY!! God continues to place us in the heart of brokenness and disaster because that’s where the Gospel is needed most. This revival wasn’t pre-planned and wasn’t budgeted for, so we’re putting out the call. **[If you can and feel led to help contribute to this last-minute revival in response to the Los Angeles riots, please donate HERE or at the button below.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=77a5bc8ae7464a1a947c55d4322bda4a&_e=mw6EWcIQ4BDF1RxCo_qrGwvdtItB3sfVXe39qN4ARq4gX34zLHJ69AG4xslx6Om0lA9NZ4sXlIODN6V_5307XNalTfP8KqZwQa4R6Oy4FzV9uI2tCEkMUnXEk1hLy7Io1MUti6NQeg8N-yeaLnbz_YCNMB4y8q9In7c20ZwY6rfDBodRDE4I-mjHTBd2dv_qVl5wS9x_EwO3Yqqbz5QY1cCQWSBdBLaZ02LvRmfrkktU544UK04J_tDhfbMjQ2fzhIvarcIn_xCs8_LlUDixjVfe2T8oouQIdrVcalgP1YlhOi7Zeqbc_4-VSWAU4rYum7qRaOeUKW0InoDi9duIBA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: We will stop the riots in LA if others won’t! | | | | Friend, We made a great decision in sending the National Guard to deal with the violent, instigated riots in California. If we had not done so, Los Angeles would have been completely obliterated. The very incompetent “Governor,” Gavin Newscum, and “Mayor,” Karen Bass, should be saying,“THANK YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP, YOU ARE SO WONDERFUL. WE WOULD BE NOTHING WITHOUT YOU, SIR.” Instead, they choose to lie to the People of California and America by saying that we weren’t needed, and that these are “peaceful protests.” Just one look at the pictures and videos of the Violence and Destruction tells you all you have to know. NOW, GAVIN NEWSCUM IS SUING MY ADMINISTRATION! Let me say this loud and clear: we will always do what is needed to keep our Citizens SAFE, so we can, together, MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! America needs LAW AND ORDER. You want it. You voted for it. I will deliver! We can’t let the Radical Lunatics win. They want nothing more than OPEN BORDERS for everyone. Criminal after criminal will be unleashed on American soil if Democrats get their way. First, this lawsuit. Next, they could IMPEACH TRUMP. Well, I’ve got news for them: WE WILL NEVER SURRENDER! Peter — It’s only been a few months since Trump returned to the White House, but he’s already _obsessed_ with 2026, according to _POLITICO_. Why? And guess where he’s starting: _right here in New York._ Trump knows the House majority will come down to a few battleground seats, and New York is at the center of it all. That’s why he’s working behind the scenes to lock down support and silence anyone who won’t fall in line. **He’s not waiting for 2026 — and we can’t afford to wait either. name: Team WFP
subject: AOC’s first appearance after endorsing Zohran Mamdani in the NYC Mayoral Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, The New York City Mayoral primary is just 14 days away, and it’s one of the most important elections of the year. On one side of this ranked-choice race, we have an incredible slate of candidates, **led by Assemblymember Zohran Mamdani, who we’ve endorsed as our #1 choice** 1 **— and who was also just endorsed by AOC.** 2 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9k9vVRweAZjr953k2EiI41SwNyhUR3cwGmKIctIyiRbyFePZzJ5Q1lRfGC-np4XGFgoFa1-Nd3rpd1zEq0wBB199E47yKu_1HGuMTBllS-_5j33do8OxRXE_fV9dnOgbAlucqVB3Duu9sykDEwQdwkfhoOYEHp14_vIF5qt4sH_a9_AhiJVhmVlt2Yi7w2MStG7CVWM0M8lHeuL9ORP49Gq6_vrKY0kLsaR83JZ77fz2zbACkg5ITftUqW8v38jDEOy6dbD7wn_MKVpLPfjdxV_D24HNPBWuTCu4XlR52pBACnfPAI_CstNoSmMEnOoYvut9EGCk6qR3pzSpPL8gCHNPFmkzrKX2W2pJ7SylUghFe4au91e4ZsEBCI8EH2HhkYDiVsb4ygbdxuCsXATf12eaAehuqrhcaqOLkEKiVyzf9JfOz_PCfoho6r6IzbjGaQH7gA_-e39v5ZXrSlTJSlg/4h8/_YMGpFpITvesoOiShMXkpA/h0/h001.dqoNqPlhuqsaRQt70DPbsX8yiktHAMYSQF18svESpKk) On the other side, we have disgraced ex-Governor Andrew Cuomo — a man with at least 13 sexual harassment allegations against him;3 who was caught under-reporting the number of nursing home deaths during the COVID pandemic;4 _and who has been accepting campaign contributions from the very same billionaires that elected Donald Trump._ 5 Putting Andrew Cuomo back into office would be an unmitigated disaster for New Yorkers. And since this is a ranked-choice election, the best way to BLOCK his attempted return is encouraging voters to rank the New York Working Families Party’s ENTIRE slate of candidates — and to leave Cuomo off their ballots. [We’re beyond proud to endorse Zohran and our entire slate of candidates. Zohran — like the others on our slate — is committed to putting working families first. His platform includes pillars like:
* A city-wide rent freeze that would prevent landlords and investment firms from jacking up rent prices, year after year.
* Fast and free bus services.
* Universal childcare.
* And tripling the city’s supply of permanently affordable, union-built, rent-stabilized housing.

Electing Zohran and blocking Cuomo is our top priority in this race. clean_body: | | | Peter, The New York City Mayoral primary is just 14 days away, and it’s one of the most important elections of the year. On one side of this ranked-choice race, we have an incredible slate of candidates, led by Assemblymember Zohran Mamdani, who we’ve endorsed as our #1 choice 1 — and who was also just endorsed by AOC. 2 On the other side, we have disgraced ex-Governor Andrew Cuomo — a man with at least 13 sexual harassment allegations against him;3 who was caught under-reporting the number of nursing home deaths during the COVID pandemic;4 and who has been accepting campaign contributions from the very same billionaires that elected Donald Trump. 5 Putting Andrew Cuomo back into office would be an unmitigated disaster for New Yorkers. And since this is a ranked-choice election, the best way to BLOCK his attempted return is encouraging voters to rank the New York Working Families Party’s ENTIRE slate of candidates — and to leave Cuomo off their ballots. This is our opportunity to score a massive win and send a message NATIONALLY that voters are sick and tired of ‘Democrats’ who fund their campaigns from big corporations and Trump donors. Zohran — like the others on our slate — is committed to putting working families first. His platform includes pillars like: A city-wide rent freeze that would prevent landlords and investment firms from jacking up rent prices, year after year. Fast and free bus services. Universal childcare. And tripling the city’s supply of permanently affordable, union-built, rent-stabilized housing. Electing Zohran and blocking Cuomo is our top priority in this race. And it’s how we’ll build a government that truly works for the many, not just a small handful of corporations, Trump donors, and real estate developers. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , Working Families Party, May 30th, 2025 2\. , The New York Times, June 5th, 2025 3\. , Politico, January 26th, 2024 4\. , The New York Times, January 28th, 2021 5\. , Politico, April 14th, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . [1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Donald Trump and his authoritarian administration are dangerously
escalating conflict with protesters standing up to their aggressive ICE
raids in Los Angeles.

Now is a critical moment where our leaders must choose which side they’re
on. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140786?t=1002&akid=36749%2E1203867%2E-_bUnC ]Write a letter to your senators demanding an end to workplace ICE
raids and the use of the military in our communities!

First, Trump sent ICE agents into Los Angeles County neighborhoods over
the weekend to conduct mass deportations, targeting immigrants at their
workplaces, schools, graduations, courthouses, and more. Since Trump
returned to office, his ICE gestapo have violated countless individuals’
constitutional right to due process, and have even violently detained and
deported documented immigrants and American citizens.

Then, communities stood up to protect themselves through peaceful
protests. ICE cracked down and even arrested SEIU California president
David Huerta.

Now, Trump is escalating tensions further by calling in the National Guard
– something he refused to do during the January 6th insurrection – without
the governor's consent. It’s the first time in 60 years a president has
done this, not since Selma in 1965.

He’s even threatening to arrest California’s governor and mobilizing the
Marines on American soil against people exercising their 1st Amendment
right to protest his disgusting anti-immigrant agenda — fanning the flames
and making things worse.

We need ALL of our elected officials, especially routinely feckless
Democrats, to stand up to this abuse of federal authority. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140786?t=1003&akid=36749%2E1203867%2E-_bUnC ]That’s why
we’re asking you to call on your Senators to end workplace ICE raids and
the violent escalation of these conflicts in our communities: send a
letter now!

Send a Letter

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Yes, I built the U.S. Capitol out of Legos 😅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I geek out about government.
#
Let’s just get this out of the way: I’m a nerd.
I’ve been called it enough in my life that I’ve just got to embrace it — I’m the _built-the-Capitol-out-of-Legos, can’t-resist-a-random-history-fact_ kind of nerd.
(I’ve also built the White House out of Legos. It’s a whole thing.)
Did you know that the ballroom at the Hotel du Pont in Wilmington is where Joe Biden celebrated his first Senate win in 1972? Because I did. And I will absolutely tell you about it at length if you let me.
But here’s the thing: I’ve always been this way. I’ve always been fascinated by how our democracy works — how ordinary people, through public service, can actually make lives better.
And now, I get to take that lifelong love of history and turn it into action in Congress — fighting for unions and teachers, fighting for paid leave and an economy that works for working families.
The nerd is in the building, and I’m rolling up my sleeves and working hard every day, but I’m counting on your support to stay focused on advocating and legislating.
[**Will you pitch in $5 now to fuel my work in Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250610-1?refcode=em20250610-2090&amount=5&refcode2=2090_21716_Mk_Pya&akid=2090%2E21716%2EMk_Pya)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250610-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250610-2090&refcode2=2090_21716_Mk_Pya&akid=2090%2E21716%2EMk_Pya)**
We’re facing real challenges. You know it and I know it.
Donald Trump and Republicans are pushing extreme policies that hurt the very people they’re supposed to represent. They’re trying to distract, divide, and derail progress, but I’m pushing back and I’m working on delivering results.
So yes, I geek out about government. And yes, I still have Lego sets at home. But what fuels me is our shared belief that public service can be a force for good — and that we can build something better, together.
[**If you believe in the work I’m doing, I could use your help. Please chip in $5 or whatever you can now.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250610-1?refcode=em20250610-2090&amount=5&refcode2=2090_21716_Mk_Pya&akid=2090%2E21716%2EMk_Pya)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250610-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250610-2090&refcode2=2090_21716_Mk_Pya&akid=2090%2E21716%2EMk_Pya)**
Thank you!
— Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250610-1&t=1&refcode2=2090_21716_Mk_Pya&akid=2090%2E21716%2EMk_Pya)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2090%2E21716%2EMk_Pya)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2090%2E21716%2EMk_Pya)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2090%2E21716%2EMk_Pya)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

Peter, We’re now just one week away from Georgia’s upcoming Special Primary Election for Public Service Commission — and while it might not be dominating the news cycle, the results will have a major impact on families across the state. Georgia’s Public Service Commission determines how much we all pay for electricity and other essential utilities. And with the cost of living continuing to rise, this election couldn’t be more important. That’s why we need to reach every voter we can — **_this week._** We have just days left to make sure people know what’s at stake, how to vote, and why this race matters. subject: Trump Deploys Marines to LA
body:
We got an even more chilling update: the Trump administration has deployed active-duty U.S. Marines on American soil. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-wwdR9raS9cYqQz6SeLrm7u96P8iLehZrI5tJhSI2tnbete1gwzaQhOibkLE9vrMXIpkwy-tvSBJHUYmOgzBNVIFrb5_zPB-bLWs6us5zh9K1fRUgjmrbWZ8Io5PXONFAev7FyZ5P8BSkaMkBw9Qrp8IeCnHqPsOmtzM3YGipR2X3ADzBh_0iWn9jbSluCQP9EjpyHBi7uaC3a3S__r-vlolULS-VWdAxXJSHPpkAfW5SlMqsmI4aQ3NhGeCyn0HcKcHFYIzrTdBUOtvguNJd-Tl0aL3RAVIhbmsdTPZokzMEKTO4Xh9_kFvyskn96PtOZ6p0aNwfPvFYb_KwkiHFko/4h8/R-ah1hgiT3qcJzgPXPqmqg/h0/h001.0vCCYVQA3y1b91iRjYjNYcZOtj0QnVgTyJ0nud7LCfo)
---
Peter, Yesterday, we sounded the alarm about Trump's call to have ICE arrest CA Governor Gavin Newsom.
But just hours after we sent that message, we got an even more chilling update: **the Trump administration has deployed active-duty U.S. Marines on American soil** to quash protests in LA.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-wwdR9raS9cYqQz6SeLrm7v-XKXRa-TMVGfKV9caKwLAOs-VkLZWEbZ_2kE8hnAOapr40PKM-_CnhnnrqjkgvZfL9dqmjKdE9pD_OFLjp3xHhpwCZ04cZaxNJQLfwmLpeNYbapLbG9ZVBgRKam3SLE9IiNru2IGIysYDzOAGnY0jd4Cg2oo-lzDQvdoYIyty3o63wFWCjMCX5NXsZ73jtt1UYccOYBCNQNbkYur8Sjy1pZb18tYWwJnAIoJItrguaImxdlIjn-7uWUFKIOsmntZQEKezb58zt0BPa3xsLAl5ngsyN8J8NDPhERWACK9Eu4TdRWoJWi8MyqjT_jnJwPI/4h8/R-ah1hgiT3qcJzgPXPqmqg/h1/h001.kk83FEaLMAxuGpxCtB2l3K5OWyXIFQ-KHploLDEL5CM)
---
**This is brazenly illegal.** Passed in 1878, the Posse Comitatus Act prohibits the President from using the military for civilian law enforcement purposes or to implement domestic policy. _Trump is illegally using the brave men and women who serve our nation to foment terror and chaos in American streets with their presence_ \- **an attempt to provoke his opponents and manufacture an emergency that he can use as pretext to expand his power and crush opposition.** With Republicans in total control of Congress, **our courts are the only thing that can prevent Trump from pulling America into a full blown constitutional crisis.** _We need our courts now more than ever._ **Defend Our Courts is fighting Trump 's fascism** by supporting state supreme court judges in races across the country - starting with PA later this year. Trump wants to replace Democratic judges with loyalists who will rubber stamp his fascist agenda and help tilt elections in MAGA's favor. **[Can you chip in whatever you can spare to help Defend Our Courts at this pivotal moment in American history?](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-wwdR9raS9cYqQz6SeLrm7squTKsiADJ3xA34M28x91Y4tZdZbe3W9Qmv96qlG8IG35A1y8wHB_ExQEbGzuG4FitzBrLRrCndL1j6p964rlKxC_JcOjypqYQnbKwTPrOgkiQ5sBxJAqf42X2yJuSFb6TPKxS-7ZZVaKJKkgA6l85-bVxH1WCSPYRN8f_O8VZ2mRjlavWExE90GBDe9Cajoj60J3hmgw-LsP7E3xwUEDqYAlY7iTxpjLhuTV1FZLedKvpIPIBe8lYBN-gBc9NdnA6QI9_1mFVKauICn3h0Ad-KbkopRJkJkjn5-ayeJVVWptYbldlmye-p2AUy9M38PI/4h8/R-ah1hgiT3qcJzgPXPqmqg/h2/h001.WRsrbSsyw4WbzhKsMPD_jhuHSWkGBgJrb42Pp_kQqMI)**

clean_body: We got an even more chilling update: the Trump administration has deployed active-duty U.S. Marines on American soil. | | Peter, Yesterday, we sounded the alarm about Trump's call to have ICE arrest CA Governor Gavin Newsom. But just hours after we sent that message, we got an even more chilling update: the Trump administration has deployed active-duty U.S. Marines on American soil to quash protests in LA. | This is brazenly illegal. Passed in 1878, the Posse Comitatus Act prohibits the President from using the military for civilian law enforcement purposes or to implement domestic policy. Trump is illegally using the brave men and women who serve our nation to foment terror and chaos in American streets with their presence \- an attempt to provoke his opponents and manufacture an emergency that he can use as pretext to expand his power and crush opposition. With Republicans in total control of Congress, our courts are the only thing that can prevent Trump from pulling America into a full blown constitutional crisis. We need our courts now more than ever. Defend Our Courts is fighting Trump 's fascism by supporting state supreme court judges in races across the country - starting with PA later this year. Trump wants to replace Democratic judges with loyalists who will rubber stamp his fascist agenda and help tilt elections in MAGA's favor. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Team Defend our Courts | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/CaN-FwTlSpqeBhKi3LWHiGfQHfFDMsdZ6SuxZHNOj31FqoAQ43rGC7AVxwmO37ReBVb-8MhEBoKW01vVH2qoyZDEOQjqBOISb2PoVdh4sFBGNv2nZWFe-6zhU1WxjBax39DbjxpS1mWTdWWHjivwOD-NKMolgWrPI6VVDDxwcasjpwz2h-icGa4cSRR8KIJxqKrkwCWcdgpchpJb3Oqx48_RTkrYeJM-9R5YkYxeLwcxMHldKBXTxhgwL93VGI4blXLDV-8OW-ycfudvtkmYEysdaNyPLdgA0fk6FJUUohildbtnpd93ptFNkz7A9Dyv4kXnwITTeUTEYcHePq3DcS4QampwN-_gxH4WVZfla6NYEcWA3jekzvqmmxEJoPco06LF0cbZf5s-EKzo2oHcbQ-FXrvwL_6xyaNuobzDcAGz7YdnWtDj5JYevK3KMNHOl10Mm-5tVHXAaGAAF2Rb10Fr-98Gn0nImIM_4nEjm977EXg0AbCCKlm9fHQkz-hCiEXUw099yLb5Z27uyGQdXXXEcLuNby1no-NnADMWiGaYM6AZ_eVmjFreb6JMmlUCagS1Ma-RJ-u0Xhmbz-4t7epL7lqm_XUmCScSUdFj8E8CTqXeo0R8BqhVC-F3FOPAhoUKb_NdcsTd6lXXaDv9QUSxANpxCTUGBKeRxnU8AEx22KpZTNORcRAf6ISoxyOs_V8xRkN5v0oPdzzQ9PoHKSPcradW_VZGXw/EDrGEOdZUF2JM-Lln8WWi6NtSC1DC6tN/9) [NO](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/E0x6nXLGHFhXdWNR3YWlvewwBJpbijLwO2HzxuqzJNnvVh1fWo_bWVr6p4Psqn1ld6mxS_vwWXmn21ViJAGufkM0x6GIpIPqwSmeYKWVcgmbf0MhFoFbqH2m_Mb5sHDLgqDsvyLWh23mY4Tpm2y6OrWtoVoXkc_9vo-8j3GHT28wdGYoplLn9oxLgKjALKOkjteb0vM646hUsSJUAfImeLXd41X8isEK9AofNxZK0WQ35XiQC38PY7l65-W8hhhYoTu2SHrYxh5USzyYGfFrN5U70l5P92U-WBN1kKpgH_kD03A_RwqHCYqq4nyWT0vhAdWzB7wVy2Ryh4Jvlh861P5-BpkskWDLyhmZx3WaxNQX0WLQx-yHxWOvYsHveAud9O_JChqrlCwNNJYsyJ5Ca25yH9mt1IhQeZK_-SH6McMlfAuhtJ-wC3kNdtU5kmU6c8bCZpl5_BrhfbBx6z4HtezB5wSj3V0NPFdbFV-8SciQDU4xR6qeqCb5B9kuvdpKkhX3K40x2alzscFpzxN9PQAEmqnonuvj9rhePyo73U-qEPVtHpXwZ88OQus3j1QhPybOMTy0CUw2gwrt_GQghcj9ryx4QlejWb7kDr_1WQMEZZ_Zlip0lFQ_Hctioy7b61egEQhw0uA6eTkUhKNnVo7_CIIWN7VdLpuna2rmXRNALXK4NkQbToF7yhncXQBJsgzJk6T30qDTTdphV1Rv0KXhJQR5sUW07w/35rqC77ugQ2k7xKVm6fwGLawlyeLLMvT/9) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/IvMyVVIdPx1sVrC5rAbB38SjfaZp09h8qvybJWyNPD9HZgiYBH_BVYpMiKGNaNFgklYUOBk9vQ7xna2j8u2Tfd3lNPZeV3njB_JOfHDFqNQylf5u8zlVPYFEknF2vZVy9coGc_MY_Y0LULpVPchRrQ9r4sCcPDOwTV0nETOzYa8O7VRhJnCk946zWCbA39eQe-XY-g8qP2xybKp3DRQEo2-wz_1ChjxtjZ80Fus1iUN5JfezQ_uZ10-T8dXOqUkxHSD70WJ1KFGcY1z1smBUamxn6ZoaAtw3WEuU3X15BPBY3nz2RSrHUFfpU8XbcoagwLVU0DmSI_GYThYlOtVFlv15pua4gs9tZh9K04f0IiPhLjzutmSvEvG8R6UapDAAdQV4cc7-_m1tIQFu19HGaVDQbCXUoULnvjdyFFspI3uELMrHtqExClzQgkSm9egiy-K6Gjmau2kxbZFqGjSw3fFiFAW--Y2rG_OHjma8hrDnf5eYpwp_Dz34F6Qmy-jOKfVogzhDFvtzZ8C0aOsO_T2C8NRCI1MLcIpARUWAWpBCYSRZ0v-1pdOfCx7EZjfn8jjizfxGoqI_gS5ifwrS8H_VgaHufJ37u7BJ5C2BHFmJmEo01JJVr0cevNkHv4SlVd_pPhWlS4xE80FyFj7UFz5OPDTM0ZbdDDVzzojSuV8e7dPxWn9RVfFUkH2VPMrP_iesLHM3Rf-YLDWjsE1gI-liHSJQuSHzNw/y8gZvANMHMwpi_OR6ctF5SS1jOoSZrEA/9)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Team Frost
subject: Team Frost Updates, Events, and a Note from Maxwell 💬
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL ALEJANDRO FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter,
I stood with over 900 UAW workers right here in Orlando who were on strike fighting for fair wages, a livable pay scale, and the dignity every worker deserves. Too many are being forced into decades-long pay progressions and denied even basic respect, like time off to honor Veterans Day. That’s unacceptable. I’ll always show up to stand with workers demanding their fair share.

I also had the honor of endorsing Rep. LaVon Bracy Davis for Florida Senate District 15. She’s a bold and fearless leader who has fought for working families in Tallahassee — and I know she’ll carry forward the legacy of Senator Geraldine Thompson with integrity and heart. I’m proud to have her back. The final stretch is here. Please commit to a canvass shift over the next three weeks and help Rep. Bracy Davis win this critical race!

Last week, we held a town hall with Orange County Democrats, joined by Rep. Anna Eskamani and Senator Carlos Guillermo Smith. We broke down the budget proposals moving through Tallahassee and Washington — including what Trump calls the “One Big Beautiful Bill.” Let’s be clear: this bill is the largest wealth transfer from the working poor to billionaires in our nation’s history. It cuts healthcare, food assistance, and basic services so billionaires can have more yachts. My generation already expects we’ll never afford a home, retire, or escape debt and this bill makes that even worse.

And let me say this clearly: the people stealing from us aren’t folks in hoodies hiding in the shadows. They’re wearing suits, ties, and congressional pins. They’re doing it in the halls of Congress, wrapped in the flag, and calling it patriotism. It’s disgusting and we won’t forget.

Finally, I want to take a moment to uplift two local heroes: Maxine and Kirt Earhart, the heart and soul behind Maxine’s on Shine. They’ve spent decades giving back to our community and now it’s our turn to show up for them after a devastating house fire. While the event has passed, you can still donate, buy a gift card, or just send love their way here [https://app.betterunite.com/rapcf-anightformaxinekirtcommunitybenefitatbitesbubbles] .

This work is about people. The ones who fight for fairness on the picket lines, who show up at town halls hungry for truth, and who care deeply about their neighbors. That’s what we’re building together.

With love & gratitude,
Maxwell Frost

💬 Stay Connected: New Volunteer Signal Channel
We’ve launched a Signal Channel just for Team Frost volunteers! It’s a great space to connect, share updates, and stay in the loop.
Click here to join! [https://signal.group/#CjQKIEKC2HbKQsSPgo18peZHt_kugDkUtReM_pgADZ3bbxWLEhAQdtps8g5fXdp4pZWvU_eJ]

🚨NEW ENDORSEMENT!
Congressman Frost endorsed Rep. LaVon Bracy Davis for Florida Senate District 15!
Rep. Bracy Davis has been a fearless advocate in Tallahassee—taking on special interests, building strong coalitions, and fighting to expand opportunity for families across Central Florida. Now, she’s ready to continue the powerful legacy of Senator Geraldine Thompson and bring bold, people-first leadership to the Florida Senate. Congressman Frost is proud to stand with her in this next chapter.
Learn more about Lavon online here [https://www.lavonbracydavis.com/] .

📢 Special Election Alert
A special election is coming up in Florida Senate District 15 and House District 40 . Here’s what you need to know:

Special Primary Election Day: Tuesday, June 24, 2025 | 7 AM – 7 PM

Early Voting: Saturday, June 14 – Sunday, June 22 | 10 AM – 6 PM

You can Early Vote at the following locations:
Supervisor of Elections Office (Orlando)
West Oaks Library (Ocoee)
Apopka Community Center (Apopka)
Eatonville Town Hall (Eatonville)

Vote-by-Mail:
All previous vote-by-mail requests expired on December 31, 2024 . If you want to vote by mail in this election or any election through 2026, you must submit a new request. You can request a ballot here: https://orange.electionsfl.org/vrservices/mbrs# [https://orange.electionsfl.org/vrservices/mbrs#]
The last day to request a ballot for the primary election is June 12th at 5 PM .
Find polling places, maps, and more at https://ocfelections.com/SD15Election [https://ocfelections.com/SD15Election] .

🛑 KNOW YOUR RIGHTS!
Everyone—regardless of immigration status—has rights under the U.S. Constitution. If ICE comes to your door, here’s what you need to know:

Do Not Open the Door

You are not required to open the door unless ICE shows a warrant signed by a judge with your correct name and address. Ask them to slide it under the door or show it through a window.

You Have the Right to Remain Silent

Do not answer any questions. Anything you say can be used against you. Calmly say:
“I choose to remain silent and want to speak with an attorney.”

Do Not Sign Anything

Don’t sign any documents ICE gives you without reviewing them with an immigration attorney. You have the right to ask for a translation if you don’t understand something.
Need Help? Call the Free Hotline:
1-888-600-5762 (Available 24/7)

Learn more and prepare at: floridaimmigrant.org/know-your-rights [https://floridaimmigrant.org/know-your-rights]

Whether you’ve knocked doors with us, joined us at town halls, or simply believed in our movement, this conversation is for you.

clean_body: Hey Peter, I stood with over 900 UAW workers right here in Orlando who were on strike fighting for fair wages, a livable pay scale, and the dignity every worker deserves. Too many are being forced into decades-long pay progressions and denied even basic respect, like time off to honor Veterans Day. That’s unacceptable. I’ll always show up to stand with workers demanding their fair share. I also had the honor of endorsing Rep. LaVon Bracy Davis for Florida Senate District 15. She’s a bold and fearless leader who has fought for working families in Tallahassee — and I know she’ll carry forward the legacy of Senator Geraldine Thompson with integrity and heart. I’m proud to have her back. The final stretch is here. Please commit to a canvass shift over the next three weeks and help Rep. Bracy Davis win this critical race! Last week, we held a town hall with Orange County Democrats, joined by Rep. Anna Eskamani and Senator Carlos Guillermo Smith. We broke down the budget proposals moving through Tallahassee and Washington — including what Trump calls the “One Big Beautiful Bill.” Let’s be clear: this bill is the largest wealth transfer from the working poor to billionaires in our nation’s history. It cuts healthcare, food assistance, and basic services so billionaires can have more yachts. My generation already expects we’ll never afford a home, retire, or escape debt and this bill makes that even worse. And let me say this clearly: the people stealing from us aren’t folks in hoodies hiding in the shadows. They’re wearing suits, ties, and congressional pins. They’re doing it in the halls of Congress, wrapped in the flag, and calling it patriotism. It’s disgusting and we won’t forget. Finally, I want to take a moment to uplift two local heroes: Maxine and Kirt Earhart, the heart and soul behind Maxine’s on Shine. They’ve spent decades giving back to our community and now it’s our turn to show up for them after a devastating house fire. While the event has passed, you can still donate, buy a gift card, or just send love their way here [] . This work is about people. The ones who fight for fairness on the picket lines, who show up at town halls hungry for truth, and who care deeply about their neighbors. That’s what we’re building together. With love & gratitude, Maxwell Frost 💬 Stay Connected: New Volunteer Signal Channel We’ve launched a Signal Channel just for Team Frost volunteers! It’s a great space to connect, share updates, and stay in the loop. Click here to join! [] 🚨NEW ENDORSEMENT! Congressman Frost endorsed Rep. LaVon Bracy Davis for Florida Senate District 15! Rep. Bracy Davis has been a fearless advocate in Tallahassee—taking on special interests, building strong coalitions, and fighting to expand opportunity for families across Central Florida. Now, she’s ready to continue the powerful legacy of Senator Geraldine Thompson and bring bold, people-first leadership to the Florida Senate. Congressman Frost is proud to stand with her in this next chapter. Learn more about Lavon online here [] . 📢 Special Election Alert A special election is coming up in Florida Senate District 15 and House District 40 . Here’s what you need to know: Special Primary Election Day: Tuesday, June 24, 2025 | 7 AM – 7 PM Early Voting: Saturday, June 14 – Sunday, June 22 | 10 AM – 6 PM You can Early Vote at the following locations: Supervisor of Elections Office (Orlando) West Oaks Library (Ocoee) Apopka Community Center (Apopka) Eatonville Town Hall (Eatonville) Vote-by-Mail: All previous vote-by-mail requests expired on December 31, 2024 . If you want to vote by mail in this election or any election through 2026, you must submit a new request. You can request a ballot here: # [#] The last day to request a ballot for the primary election is June 12th at 5 PM . Find polling places, maps, and more at [] . 🛑 KNOW YOUR RIGHTS! Everyone—regardless of immigration status—has rights under the U.S. Constitution. If ICE comes to your door, here’s what you need to know: Do Not Open the Door You are not required to open the door unless ICE shows a warrant signed by a judge with your correct name and address. Ask them to slide it under the door or show it through a window. You Have the Right to Remain Silent Do not answer any questions. Anything you say can be used against you. Calmly say: “I choose to remain silent and want to speak with an attorney.” Do Not Sign Anything Don’t sign any documents ICE gives you without reviewing them with an immigration attorney. You have the right to ask for a translation if you don’t understand something. Need Help? Call the Free Hotline: 1-888-600-5762 (Available 24/7) Learn more and prepare at: floridaimmigrant.org/know-your-rights [] You're Invited: State of the District Join Congressman Frost for a special event focused on the state of Florida’s 10th Congressional District — a moment to reflect on the progress we’ve made, celebrate the people-powered victories we’ve achieved together, and chart a bold path forward for Central Florida. Whether you’ve knocked doors with us, joined us at town halls, or simply believed in our movement, this conversation is for you. Date: Saturday, June 21 Time: 10 AM - 12 PM Location: Upon RSVP RSVP HERE [repfrost.us/SOD] Canvass with Team Frost Date: Every Saturday Time: 10 AM Location: Provided upon RSVP SIGN UP HERE [] Phone Bank with Team Frost Date: Every Sunday Time: 10 AM - 3 PM Location: Virtual SIGN UP HERE [] Apopka Juneteenth Parade with Orange County Dems! Date: Saturday, June 14th Time: 2:00 PM - 7:00 PM Location: Alonzo Williams Park SIGN UP HERE [] NO KINGS Orlando Protest Date: Saturday, June 14th Time: 5:00 PM - 7:30 PM Location: 400 S Orange Ave Orlando, FL 32801 SIGN UP HERE [] Maxwell Frost backs LaVon Bracy Davis in the race to succeed Geraldine Thompson [] 'She’s ready to carry forward the torch.' U.S. Rep. Maxwell Frost has made clear who he wants to succeed the late state Sen. Geraldine Thompson . The Orlando Democrat is endorsing state Rep. LaVon Bracy Davis in the Special Election in Senate District 15. Rep. Max Frost talks Musk, public media, more—and thanks for supporting WMNF [] “The legacy will be a dark legacy,” Orlando-based Rep. Maxwell Frost told WMNF about the effect the world’s richest man had on regular Americans. “They did what they said they would do. They would run the government like a company.” Maxwell Frost says Elon Musk leaves a ‘dark legacy’ as his time in the WH ends Elon Musk’s tenure as a special government employee in the White House came to an end Friday, prompting Florida Democratic U.S. Rep. Maxwell Frost to say that his efforts reveal that a “corporate slash and burn mentality is not how you run a country.” Read More [] Why Maxwell Frost Wants Democrats to “Get Caught Fighting” [] The youngest member of Congress is showing his older colleagues how to punch back in the age of Trump. Read More [] 'Why did the president lie to me?': Rep. Frost says Trump's voters are getting angry [] Democratic Rep. Maxwell Frost joins The Weeknight to break down Trump’s inconsistent trade policies – and how they’re hurting everyday Americans. subject: Missouri voted for abortion rights. Republicans just overturned it.
body:
This is the new GOP strategy: If voters pass a ballot measure they don’t like, they'll just find a way to undo it. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109343609/550791981/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE618_20250610_Missouri_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056365&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQ5YmQ5MS0zZDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynffUgpW80YM4iMwePjNr4b7wtK6ZmvvcAM_cYlMM_g=) Peter — Just days ago, six months after Missouri voters approved an abortion rights amendment, the state Supreme Court sided with anti-abortion Republicans and put a near-total abortion ban _back into effect_ — overriding a lower court decision and, more importantly, **ignoring the will of the people**.

This is not just a fight over one state's laws. It's about whether voters, even after amending their constitution at the ballot box, actually have the power to protect their rights when extremist lawmakers are in control.

And it's proof that EMILYs List's growing effort to elect state Supreme Court justices who uphold the will of voters has never been more urgent.

****[**We know the vast majority of Americans are pro-choice, but we need EMILYs List women running and winning at every level of government to ensure that choice is protected and voters are heard. Donate today to help recruit, train, and support more pro-choice champions, all across the country:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109343610/550791982/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE618_20250610_Missouri_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056365&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQ5YmQ5MS0zZDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynffUgpW80YM4iMwePjNr4b7wtK6ZmvvcAM_cYlMM_g=)**** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109343611/550791983/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE618_20250610_Missouri_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056365&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQ5YmQ5MS0zZDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynffUgpW80YM4iMwePjNr4b7wtK6ZmvvcAM_cYlMM_g=)
---
Here's how we got to this point:

In 2022, Missouri Republicans enacted one of the most extreme abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions for rape or incest, and no meaningful options for people facing dangerous or traumatic pregnancies. Two years later, during the 2024 elections, Missourians voted to add _a fundamental right to reproductive freedom_ , defined to include abortion and "all matters relating to reproductive health care," to the Missouri constitution. And earlier this year, a state judge temporarily blocked the state's restrictive ban, citing constitutional concerns.

But just last week, Missouri's Supreme Court sided with the state's Republican attorney general and reinstated the ban. That means the people of Missouri are living under a ban that a lower court already said violates their constitutional rights — rights Missourians _just_ voted to secure.

So what's next? The amendment campaign to explicitly enshrine abortion rights in Missouri's constitution is still moving forward. But Republican leaders are already trying to stop it through lawsuits, legal delays, and legislative manipulation.

**This is the new GOP strategy: If voters pass a ballot measure they don't like, they'll just find a way to undo it.**

We've seen this in Ohio. In Florida. Now in Missouri. And we will see it again, unless we fight back with everything we've got.

That means electing Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot: not just to Congress and governors' mansions, but to state legislatures, attorney general seats, and _to state supreme courts._ These roles all matter in the fight to protect fundamental freedom and the rule of law.

****[**The best way to fight anti-democratic, anti-choice extremism is by electing EMILYs List-endorsed women to every level of elected office. clean_body: This is the new GOP strategy: If voters pass a ballot measure they don’t like, they'll just find a way to undo it. | = Peter — Just days ago, six months after Missouri voters approved an abortion rights amendment, the state Supreme Court sided with anti-abortion Republicans and put a near-total abortion ban back into effect — overriding a lower court decision and, more importantly, ignoring the will of the people. This is not just a fight over one state's laws. It's about whether voters, even after amending their constitution at the ballot box, actually have the power to protect their rights when extremist lawmakers are in control. And it's proof that EMILYs List's growing effort to elect state Supreme Court justices who uphold the will of voters has never been more urgent. **= | = Here's how we got to this point: In 2022, Missouri Republicans enacted one of the most extreme abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions for rape or incest, and no meaningful options for people facing dangerous or traumatic pregnancies. Two years later, during the 2024 elections, Missourians voted to add a fundamental right to reproductive freedom , defined to include abortion and "all matters relating to reproductive health care," to the Missouri constitution. And earlier this year, a state judge temporarily blocked the state's restrictive ban, citing constitutional concerns. But just last week, Missouri's Supreme Court sided with the state's Republican attorney general and reinstated the ban. That means the people of Missouri are living under a ban that a lower court already said violates their constitutional rights — rights Missourians just voted to secure. So what's next? The amendment campaign to explicitly enshrine abortion rights in Missouri's constitution is still moving forward. But Republican leaders are already trying to stop it through lawsuits, legal delays, and legislative manipulation. This is the new GOP strategy: If voters pass a ballot measure they don't like, they'll just find a way to undo it. We've seen this in Ohio. In Florida. Now in Missouri. And we will see it again, unless we fight back with everything we've got. That means electing Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot: not just to Congress and governors' mansions, but to state legislatures, attorney general seats, and to state supreme courts. These roles all matter in the fight to protect fundamental freedom and the rule of law. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Interim Vice President of State and Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Michael Bennet
subject: Shiver me timbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Ahoy mateys,
Last week, I invoked a rare procedural move in the Senate to attach my amendment to rein in President Trump's rampant corruption to the GOP cryptocurrency bill.
Punchbowl News called me a "stablecoin pirate " for hijacking the Senate floor.
Now, a storms brewin'. Yesterday, Majority Leader John Thune stripped my amendment from his bill. It's clear Senate Republicans are too scared to hold President Trump and his family accountable for their crypto corruption. They're shaking in their boots!
Republicans need votes from Democrats to pass this bill. I firmly believe that Senate Democrats should not support a bill that allows the President to continue his crypto corruption.
Matey, if you are with me on this fight and want to hold this administration's corruption accountable, join me today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act]
Thank you,
Michael
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Michael Bennet <info@michaelbennet.com>
Date: Thu, Jun 5, 2025 at 5:21 PM
Subject: They called me a pirate...
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act]
Ahoy mateys,
Friend, these aren’t normal times, and we can’t go about business as usual.
This week, I invoked a rarely used procedural move in the Senate to add the only Democratic amendment to the Republican crypto bill and rein in President Trump’s rampant corruption.
My amendment would ban the President and the Vice President from issuing or endorsing stablecoins, a type of cryptocurrency—and now, because of my legislative "piracy," I became the first Democrat to force my colleagues to take on Trump’s crypto corruption in the Senate.
We all know this administration reeks of corruption. President Trump and his family have repeatedly used their positions to issue and promote shady cryptocurrencies for their financial gain. Just a few weeks ago, he hosted a private dinner at one of his properties for the top holders of his meme coin.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act]
I know Coloradans aren’t just deeply worried about this corruption, they’re mad about it too. I’m not going to sit quietly and follow protocol while the President takes advantage of the American people.
That’s why I hijacked the Senate floor and placed my amendment directly onto the GENIUS Act. Republicans need Democratic votes to pass this legislation—and the Democrats should seriously rethink their support for this bill that, if unchanged, will only enable Trump's corruption (shiver me timbers!).
I won’t let anyone—Republicans or Democrats—grease the wheels of crypto corruption. If that means acting like a pirate and taking over normal Senate proceedings, then that is what I’ll do.
Folks, I could use your support in this fight. Can you join me in fighting Trump by sending us some gold coins now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act]
MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250610_bennethijackreup_act]
Fair winds,
Michael & Capt. Flint the Cat

## House Dems Brand Trump’s Troop Deployment to LA as ‘Reckless‘
Three high-ranking House Democrats from New York on Tuesday condemned President Donald Trump for his deployment of the military to restore law and order in riot-torn Los Angeles. At a House press conference, Congressional Black Caucus Chairwoman Yvette Clarke, D-N.Y.; Congressional Hispanic Caucus Chairman Adriano Espaillat, D-N.Y., and Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus Chairwoman Grace [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/nO553zKUvaTAMilJhIM1P-OQ7dlxwDR4Xq-re4OJdznlD12MXeUtaEVbK9_AZqcTUaOM0XBJJh0aVWz9fLwiSYOW4ojDEyI7k07k5njwchTyqS3-ePtksi3kxCpwAAwAk_sxOmhsTg202M27Hhr0TvrA6N1CtvIo2uQAzP1AsXJukjYIRM37CoNBY4dxMjtXciVdi5SwQfrOsKb6x0pWyMxcSNcxx9vfZIelWU6KRMnavmiu79mySbust2FXqcAE5xAfvnZyKKvibyuLI1-TesLzVbJbr6J-X9Atl14hmwbm7MrQf_vVjEo5fuS9f3KtCxKpn7iSFuqhT5XOXP_vdpLz-HK-vlpto1xkFzufs1LMK_u3_Lb0Fg9qImtwidS-Quzl0_K6JNHImgwT-_RXlSnwT17k6DMvMeSFV5xVuaTZAg4aJKqPGahTQ5D3Xu8EMDMwrlBqTIb5IRc2Sx1xiYsgqqHIgYM4k1cifpZgwnizGDRJSq8wy0tfIa5wod7e67wfJI_nfhST6owgEA/yNCOABNi9DEp4yjnRKCk3YVYp8rpZTfu/9)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: "Is AIPAC coming after Ilhan Omar?"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Last week we learned that AIPAC was running a poll in my district to test the waters of supporting a primary challenger against me.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1664%2E791427%2EG9uCnV)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250610-1-nor&t=2&akid=1664%2E791427%2EG9uCnV)
Friend — Last week we learned that AIPAC was reportedly running a poll in my district to test the waters of supporting a primary challenger against me.
**This is a serious warning shot.**
After this news broke, I met with my team to discuss our strategy to counter AIPAC and win this campaign.
I know that the best way to fight back is to start investing in our outreach **right now** — not waiting until it’s too late. That means paying for online ads, hiring canvassers and organizers, sending out mailers, growing our contact lists, and more.
But the problem is that the money for additional investments just isn’t our budget right now. So I made a difficult decision, **and approved some new investments anyway,** because I made a bet that this team would step up and help us afford the campaign we need to run.
Now I need your help to back that up.
If you’re ready to take on AIPAC, chip in $5.
If you’re ready to fight for democracy, healthcare for all, climate action, and the safety and dignity of Palestinians, chip in $5.
_**If you’re ready to win, chip in $5._**
**[Please, use this link or the buttons below to chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today. We have to start laying the groundwork for victory today, before it’s too late to stop AIPAC and their billionaire allies.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250610-1-nor&t=3&akid=1664%2E791427%2EG9uCnV)

name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: NEVER AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAND PAUL FOR U
body:
Fellow Patriot,

I seethed with rage as I watched Dr. Anthony Fauci lie to the American people and the US Senate about the lockdowns, taxpayer-funded research in Wuhan, China, and almost everything related to COVID treatment.

I swore I would use my power as a US Senator to make sure unelected bureaucrats hiding behind white lab coats at the National Institutes of Health (NIH) never again take your freedom.

Well, now, with Republicans back in the majority of the US Senate, I am the new Chairman of the powerful Homeland Security Committee.

**So NOW is the time to take action to protect America, no matter who the President is.**

But the elitists buried inside the NIH have deep connections with liberal media and academia who will scream and howl at even the most modest reform.

**That's why I need your voice... and your help.**

It is urgent that patriotic Americans like you and me act now to make sure that the suffering that we went through during COVID never happens again.

Help me use my power as a U.S. Senator to reform the National Institutes of Health (NIH) – to permanently stop the government from imposing this kind of suffering on Americans.

**[PLEASE SIGN MY PETITION NOW TO REFORM THE NIH... AND STOP COVID-STYLE LOCKDOWNS FOREVER.](http://track.randforkentucky.com/?xtl=4pnzqhe7ie5quamef2twfq7t0ys7njalhi0yn62c4r1uj1dvu4478h50vkuut72mci43d1wsl8845scax88q7fmi0mrdmk9g2eja4x3oqkodk2dd8lbd2qzahkuwikgggt9my6mdvcl0umiuycbrgbsfz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxnrxt&__onlt=h)**

Surely you remember Anthony Fauci in the summer of 2020 arguing against reopening schools. You might remember that I was the one who grilled him on it at a Senate hearing. I was attacked viciously by liberals in the media for taking this stand.

How did those school closures work out? According to the _New York Times_ , students in third through eighth grade who were forced into mostly remote learning fell more than half a year behind in math. Among poor students, that number is even higher.

**It may take these children years to recover from the harm that Fauci’s lockdowns caused them... and yet there have been virtually no repercussions!**

Fellow Patriot, I am worried that if I don’t take action on this now, the history books will be rewritten by the Left to erase all of the ugly facts about the COVID lockdowns.

If that happens, the next generation will never learn the hard truth about what the government did to its own people from 2020-2022.

And if there is ever another pandemic, America could once again suffer the same torment at the hands of government bureaucrats, or perhaps even worse!

This would be catastrophic for our beloved nation, and I cannot allow it to happen again. That’s why I am taking action to reform the NIH, and I am asking you to help.

**[PLEASE SIGN MY PETITION NOW TO REFORM THE NIH... AND STOP COVID-STYLE LOCKDOWNS FOREVER.](http://track.randforkentucky.com/?xtl=4pnzqhe7ie5quamef2twfq7t0ys7njalhi9n0hprqtuv1rgynxdsfj7h3idjze0cyv8dz3i6dvzes4qtmxa3a58f5lws5950a6m9rvjmfeyma13vxvn40qbiszlnl2cyyrslpu5ltrdzynynvvlkjm3j8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxnrxt&__onlt=h)**

My reforms would add checks and balances to the bureaucracy at the NIH by holding the leadership of this powerful agency accountable.

Under these reforms, the leader of the NIH would have to be appointed by the President, confirmed by the Senate, and serve no more than two 5-year terms.

It would also abolish the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases – the very agency that Anthony Fauci led for years – and divide up its responsibilities.

**To Fauci's ears, this might sound like a nightmare, but for Americans who saw the damage caused by the lockdowns and the persecution of the doctors and citizens who voiced dissent, it will be a sigh of relief.**

These reforms could save America from a repeat of the COVID lockdowns and speech control, but there will be heavy pressure on Congress by the liberal media to oppose my plan.

That's why I need you to make your voice heard.

**Click below to join me in urging Congress to support my crucial reforms to the National Institutes of Health to prevent COVID-style lockdowns in the future.**

**[PLEASE SIGN MY PETITION NOW TO REFORM THE NIH... AND STOP COVID-STYLE LOCKDOWNS FOREVER.](http://track.randforkentucky.com/?xtl=4pnzqhe7ie5quamef2twfq7t0ys7njalhitlcwa4avlv5fjb53qcqlmbzh1ogol6u6prv67ivh3sce29ll3f4t6cnab4lw079vygcud98yhfplrnk2iskqe41ps316yqqpaa4g17r4wmcoo4spmtlgd16&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxnrxt&__onlt=h)**

In Liberty,

U.S. Senator Rand Paul (R-KY)

P.S. I am attempting to stop COVID-style lockdowns forever by reforming the National Institutes of Health... but there is going to be massive pressure on Congress by the media to oppose my plan.

That's why I must rely on my secret weapon: patriotic Americans like you who were outraged by the disastrous lockdowns that were imposed on our country.

**By making your voice heard, you can help me prevent history from repeating itself.**

I need you to add your name to my petition so that I can present it to Congress and urge their support for my plan.

**[PLEASE SIGN MY PETITION NOW TO REFORM THE NIH... AND STOP COVID-STYLE LOCKDOWNS FOREVER.](http://track.randforkentucky.com/?xtl=4pnzqhe7ie5quamef2twfq7t0ys7njalhicas9kfkysvm80dkx2001pw7fme0jjypfu3r8vyo6v51rc2bovuwf4ztpfffghpgils1tx7zt5o3jd4mytfiqgny2ig3mu66nioi5irofojgp1jp6x12rq59&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxnrxt&__onlt=h)**

[And will you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away so that I can defend myself against attacks from the liberal media and also mobilize tens of thousands more Americans in this crusade?](http://track.randforkentucky.com/?xtl=2q4yoftdj6j1t600e6op22swg2dhyu79wusukqy6xya3h1vuwu6c1fib7pzeugkgnd8a8m7dl4fp68drh2xexlpbu8ziw53jepfi9dgbq62yzh8vh6zdsvp9x6z9cdbai03dx8owjykb2dxkx08awkmzx3g18w3zgk5e&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxnrxt&__onlt=h)

_****_ _**_**PAID FOR BY RAND PAUL FOR U.S. SENATE**_**_ _****_ _****_
* * *
_****_ _****_
---

In order to unsubscribe from this mailing list, please click [here](http://track.randforkentucky.com/?xul=3pofh2he53nmb4uzgg26z7wy3u60k0zkosw3m4y0q7fdtz6mcyrc7ems0oj6yvaqqabh49lg1rhb43ly38qk68taix8n4ia8fgun8ghqbsfy&__stmp=sxnrxt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Aloha Peter — I’m reaching out today to ask you to take my team’s **[official June Priorities Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109344509/550794998/735671445?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250610_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2Y3ZjhiNS0zZTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJTGYIW-r4m8F6CukU38nSfrnCnxbV1QcsRXRaP6h7c=&emci=7c48f7fc-3546-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=73f7f8b5-3e46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23190490)**.
