Sec. of Defense Pete Hegseth **[clashed with Democrat Rep. Betty McCollum](https://substack.com/redirect/8c82f0ab-cc9f-4080-a456-3008a0e07a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during an intense House Committee hearing today over the Trump administration's deployment of military troops to defend immigration enforcement officers from violent rioters in Los Angeles.
He puts her in her place!
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8c82f0ab-cc9f-4080-a456-3008a0e07a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8c82f0ab-cc9f-4080-a456-3008a0e07a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/79285451-5526-4867-b96e-972755ec83e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Trump deployed 2,000 National Guard and 700 US Marines this week to help manage the destructive anti-ICE riots taking place.
McCollum, echoing sentiment from many other Democrats, called the move "premature" and "escalatory" before grilling Hegseth on the costs associated with sending troops to the riot zone.
She likened the situation in LA to the 2020 George Floyd riots, which tore through her home state of Minnesota, "At no point did the citizens of Minnesota request that the marines be deployed!"
**["How much are these deployments going to cost](https://substack.com/redirect/8c82f0ab-cc9f-4080-a456-3008a0e07a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for both the Marines and the National Guard?" she asked. "Where in your limited budget, sir, are you going to find, in the remainder of this fiscal year, are you going to pull money to cover these deployments?"
Hegseth wasted no time in responding, "I recall 2020 quite well... The police precinct, ma'am, was abandoned and burned to the ground, and because of that, the National Guard was eventually, far too late, mobilized. And President Trump recognizes a situation like that, improperly handled by a governor, like governor Walz, when it gets out of control, is a bad situation for the citizens of any location."
McCollum attempted push back, dragging Hegseth back to the topic of budget, "I asked about the budget sir!!"
But Hegseth **[focused on a matter at hand,](https://substack.com/redirect/8c82f0ab-cc9f-4080-a456-3008a0e07a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "Thankfully, unlike the last administration we've got a 13% in our defense budget and we will have the capabilities to cover down on contingencies, which is something the National Guard and the Marines plan for."
Watch Hesgeth calmly defend law and order against the Democrat's criticism:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8c82f0ab-cc9f-4080-a456-3008a0e07a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# _Happening Now:_ Trump delivers speech to the troops in honor of the Army's 250th birthday
President Donald Trump **[speaks to the Army at Fort Bragg](https://substack.com/redirect/7eba996f-9d5a-40e2-83f6-38c0a12c4047?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** today ahead of his June 14th military parade in Washington D.C.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7eba996f-9d5a-40e2-83f6-38c0a12c4047?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Anticipating protests at the military parade this weekend, Trump warned, "For those people that want to protest, they're going to be met with very big force,..." during an Oval Office meeting.
Listen to Trump's remarks here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7eba996f-9d5a-40e2-83f6-38c0a12c4047?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Video shows rioters distributing tactical gear from back of truck**
**[A masked protester was caught on camera](https://substack.com/redirect/05278321-5419-4d03-8700-ac89ee3fe70c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** handing out tactical gear to demonstrators during the violent anti-ICE protests in Los Angeles.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ee42d01f-eabf-47a7-9a39-dc67ce9f01fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Footage released Monday shows an anti-ICE protester in Los Angeles handing out tactical gear** -- The gear, including vests and helmets, were given to a group of masked individuals, raising concerns over the escalation of recent demonstrations.
* **Authorities have yet to identify the individual seen distributing the gear** -- Federal agencies are reviewing the footage as part of broader riot-related inquiries.
* **The video has sparked debate** -- Some lawmakers and law enforcement called for investigations into potential premeditated violence at anti-ICE protests. However, Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass and Governor Gavin Newsom still insist the protests were majorly peaceful.

# Hillary Clinton brutally mocked for calling LA riots "peaceful demonstrations"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a0d7cc5c-d357-4dbb-a52b-ae53e942eed0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hillary Clinton **[drew heavy ridicule](https://substack.com/redirect/70bcb11e-f91b-436b-8482-d8779637eaba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after calling the violent Los Angeles riots "peaceful demonstrations" in an X post that blamed President Trump for causing "chaos" by deploying the National Guard.
* **What did she say?:** "California Governor Newsom didn't request the National Guard be deployed to his state following peaceful demonstrations. Trump sent them anyway," Clinton posted on X. "It's the first time in 60 years a president has made that choice. Trump's goal isn't to keep Californians safe. His goal is to cause chaos, because chaos is good for Trump."

* **Critics brutally mocked Clinton** as "delusional" and accused her of restricting comments on her post to avoid backlash, with popular accounts like Libs of TikTok sharing footage of the destruction while noting "She can't handle the ratio." Users were only able to respond through quote tweets rather than direct replies, prompting **[calls for Elon Musk to prevent government officials from disabling comments.](https://substack.com/redirect/7726c70a-27ef-4b71-8ab3-254e2577bb26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

subject: Urgent Poll: Should we send more troops to Los Angeles
body:
Foreign nationals and communist anarchists have declared war on our government and are violently attacking, burning, and rioting in one of the largest cities in America.

| | | | |
---
Fellow patriot, foreign nationals and communist anarchists have declared war on our government and are violently attacking, burning, and rioting in one of the largest cities in America.
The pictures and videos from the illegal immigrant invasion riots in Los Angeles are shocking. Just look at what is happening in what used to be one of the most beautiful cities in the world.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCJP/?__vbtrk=Mjk1OTAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1OTAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
To put it clearly, military age men from foreign countries are unleashing chaos on an American city and committing violence against federal agents who are carrying out lawful orders.
**_[Friend, I need to know right now if you think we need to send in more troops to stop these insurrectionists and detain and deport every illegal alien invader in the city](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCJP/?__vbtrk=Mjk1OTAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1OTAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

The Democrats brought in over 30,000 National guard troops after a 3 hour mostly peaceful protest at the Capitol on Jan 6, 2021. Now, their illegal alien invaders are taking over a major American city while Democrat leaders are condemning President Trump’s decision to send in the National Guard.

name: Team Lizzie
subject: BREAKING: TX Republicans looking at unprecedented power grab
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Every day this June, it feels like something unprecedented is happening. From the Trump/Musk breakup to today, the news is full of stories of attacks on our values and our democracy.
But there’s one alarming story we want to make sure you don’t miss. Last night, the New York Times reported that President Trump’s political team is urging Texas Republicans to take “ruthless” action to stay in power. They’ve discussed the possibility of redrawing Congressional district maps, which could help Republicans gain up to five seats .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250610 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250610]
We know a thing about these Democratic gains. This campaign is one of them . In 2018, Lizzie and several candidates in Texas fought hard to win Republican-held seats in Congress. They turned out Democrats all across the state, helping candidates state-wide. And, as you know, Lizzie and Colin Allred won those seats—helping win the House majority and meet the moment.
We know what it took to win this seat, and we know why winning it and giving Texans the representation they deserve was and is so important. We are not giving it back. Certainly, not without a fight.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250610]
We don’t usually say this, but we need your help right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250610] Here is why: We know what it takes to fight and to win. Right now, it takes resources to respond to this threat and to demonstrate to the people pushing this terrible idea that overwhelming support for Lizzie and candidates like her will shrink their majority in Congress, not grow it.
One way we show that is on our campaign finance report we will file this month. Will you make a contribution today to help us fight back? Every dollar you contribute helps to stop this dangerous power grab. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250610]
Together, we can make this plan backfire. We can remind the Republicans not to mess with Texas again. We can show why Lizzie and other Texas Democrats are representing our communities and our values in Congress today. But we can only do that if we have the resources to talk to people, to fight back in all the ways we need to, and to win what could be very tough elections next year.
We know we can—because of you. Thank you for standing with us in this critical moment.
—Team Lizzie

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: [Petition] Sign on to demand an immediate end to the violent ICE raids and National Guard deployment in Los Angeles.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We must stop Trump’s militarized attacks on our communities.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250610-5129-footer&t=1&akid=5129%2E420207%2E60X75R)
Peter,
Over the weekend, the Trump administration crossed yet another dangerous line.
ICE agents raided immigrant communities in Los Angeles, tearing families apart and arresting innocent bystanders. And in a chilling escalation, Donald Trump deployed the National Guard in response to peaceful protests.
**That’s not law enforcement. That’s repression.**
This is what authoritarianism looks like: weaponizing state power to sow fear, silence dissent, and punish immigrants, workers, and protestors alike.
[**We must act, and we must act now. Sign on to demand an immediate end to these violent raids and to the National Guard deployment.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250610-nationalguard?source=em20250610-5129&akid=5129%2E420207%2E60X75R)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250610-nationalguard?source=em20250610-5129&akid=5129%2E420207%2E60X75R)**
Trump wants us to cower in fear. He wants us to stop organizing, stop marching, stop demanding justice.
**Hell no. We are not afraid, and we will not be intimidated.** Together, we will fight back against every effort to divide and terrorize our communities.
But we need your voice in this fight. If enough of us speak out now, we can build the public pressure necessary to stop this abuse of power in its tracks.
[**Please, Peter, add your name to the petition now. Let’s show the Trump administration that we are watching, we are organizing, and we will not be silent.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250610-nationalguard?source=em20250610-5129&akid=5129%2E420207%2E60X75R)
**[Sign The Petition](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250610-nationalguard?source=em20250610-5129&akid=5129%2E420207%2E60X75R)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250610-5129-footer&t=2&refcode2=5129_420207_60X75R&akid=5129%2E420207%2E60X75R)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: Open to find out 👀 | | | | | | | | It’s almost that time, Friend! Tomorrow is the big Congressional Baseball Game—and practice has been going swimmingly. As a matter of fact, I’m pretty sure Democrats don’t stand a chance. ⬇️ DADGUMMIT, LOOK AT THAT FORM ⬇️ But before we break out the peanuts and Cracker Jack, I want to make sure you have a chance to get this year’s Team Burchett gear. I asked my folks to slash the price as low as possible. Honestly, I don’t even think we’ll turn a profit, but that’s okay—because I want you on my team. Burchett, Bigfoot, and Baseball. Does it really get any better than that? Well, we’re not woke Democrats, so maybe it does. Wish me luck! Sincerely, Tim Burchett P.S. You can still get tickets to tomorrow’s big game or watch it live on at 7 eastern. | | Join the conservative movement! Chip in to help us pave the way for a solid Republican agenda. | | | Stay in Touch 👇 Paid for by Burchett for Congress | | | ---|---|---

name: NEED your attention on this....FFR
subject: Trump threatens to arrest a Governor??!!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23131%2E4449941%2EnVukCR) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23131%2E4449941%2EnVukCR) It is with a heavy heart that we share this HORRIBLE news.

Donald Trump just suggested ARRESTING Gavin Newsom, the Democratic Governor of California.... **_We can’t believe this!!_** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62015?t=3&akid=23131%2E4449941%2EnVukCR) **Gavin Newsom has EVERY right to make decisions for HIS state without fear of retaliation. THIS IS ANTI-DEMOCRATIC!! We can’t let Donald Trump get away with this!!**

[**_Democracy is on the line. We NEED to stand with Governor Gavin Newsom against Trump’s VICIOUS, UNDEMOCRATIC attacks >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62015?t=4&akid=23131%2E4449941%2EnVukCR) | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62015?t=5&akid=23131%2E4449941%2EnVukCR)
---
**We need everyone on board. We are launching a goal to collect [10,000] Good Democrats’ signatures before MIDNIGHT. **
First Donald Trump launched an attack on the immigration process, sending ICE after Legal Immigrants.

Then he sent the NATIONAL GUARD and the US MARINES against UNITED STATES CITIZENS...just for exercising their Constitutional right to PROTEST.
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62015?t=6&akid=23131%2E4449941%2EnVukCR)
Now he is EVEN suggesting the arrest of Gavin Newsom for standing up to his GROSS misconduct of power.

This sets a dangerous precedent...Donald Trump isn’t a President, he’s a DICTATOR.
[**_Join other Good Democrats and sign our petition to stand with Gavin Newsom >> _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62015?t=7&akid=23131%2E4449941%2EnVukCR)
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62015?t=8&akid=23131%2E4449941%2EnVukCR)
---
Thanks,

_Fight For Reform_

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Republicans don’t care if Americans live or die
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
They're mocking and belittling people fearful about Medicaid being slashed.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109345788/550799139/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWMwMmIyNC00NDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcHCEay9GeUcbg-RR4A-QtUEyY98wqs-H1retKik2_c=&emci=a4f988a0-3846-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0ac02b24-4446-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

| | How are Senate Republicans approaching the task of taking up the House GOP's budget bill – which would represent the biggest cut to healthcare in American history? **By mocking and belittling people fearful about their livelihoods if Medicaid is slashed.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109345789/550799140/-2044921950?refcode=2025-06-10-je&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0ac02b24-4446-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWMwMmIyNC00NDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcHCEay9GeUcbg-RR4A-QtUEyY98wqs-H1retKik2_c=)** You might have seen the recent news about Iowa Senator Joni Ernst's remarks. **When pressed at a town hall about people dying if Medicaid is cut, she said, "Well, we all are going to die."** Since then, she has doubled down. In what I can only describe as a mock apology – _filmed at a cemetery_ – she bizarrely brought up the tooth fairy and concluded by telling viewers: **"****For those that would like to see eternal and everlasting life, I encourage you to embrace my Lord and savior Jesus Christ.****"** This isn't some isolated gaffe. This is a major Senate Republican defending horrible policies by essentially saying: _if you can't afford health care, we don't care whether you live or die._ Ultimately, **Republicans can't come up with a better defense of their Medicaid cuts.** They realize people are catching on to what they're trying to pull – and they're cracking when confronted by voters. _We need to keep the pressure on and continue turning the tide of public opinion against the GOP budget bill._ It's going to take all of us standing together, and any bit of grassroots support goes a long way. [**So will you please chip in $19 (or more) to help my ongoing efforts to expose the truth about the Republicans' plans to gut health care? clean_body: They're mocking and belittling people fearful about Medicaid being slashed. | | | | How are Senate Republicans approaching the task of taking up the House GOP's budget bill – which would represent the biggest cut to healthcare in American history? By mocking and belittling people fearful about their livelihoods if Medicaid is slashed. = You might have seen the recent news about Iowa Senator Joni Ernst's remarks. When pressed at a town hall about people dying if Medicaid is cut, she said, "Well, we all are going to die." Since then, she has doubled down. In what I can only describe as a mock apology – filmed at a cemetery – she bizarrely brought up the tooth fairy and concluded by telling viewers: "For those that would like to see eternal and everlasting life, I encourage you to embrace my Lord and savior Jesus Christ." This isn't some isolated gaffe. This is a major Senate Republican defending horrible policies by essentially saying: if you can't afford health care, we don't care whether you live or die. Ultimately, Republicans can't come up with a better defense of their Medicaid cuts. They realize people are catching on to what they're trying to pull – and they're cracking when confronted by voters. We need to keep the pressure on and continue turning the tide of public opinion against the GOP budget bill. It's going to take all of us standing together, and any bit of grassroots support goes a long way. = = More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. “White House Pushes Texas to Redistrict, Hoping to Blunt Democratic Gains”
— June 9, 2025
**Peter, the New York Times just reported that Donald Trump is actively pressuring Texas lawmakers to redraw its congressional map mid-decade in order to get an upper hand in the midterm elections. They want a “ruthless” gerrymander that they hope might pick up four or five more seats for Republicans in the House.**
Trump and his allies clearly don’t think they can win fairly, so they’re breaking out every tool in the autocracy playbook to try to cheat instead.
[**This is exactly the kind of abuse of power the NDRC is built to fight — we’re leading the fight against gerrymandering in Texas and beyond. Texas’s congressional map is already being sued for violating the Voting Rights Act — and **now Trump wants Republicans to try to gerrymander it even more.**
It doesn’t stop in Texas, either: Just a few states away in Ohio, Republicans there are gearing up to redraw their map. They have a history of trying to pack the state’s Democratic voters into a small number of districts, and some in their party see this as an opportunity to gain up to three additional congressional seats.
Now, Trump himself is wading in to put pressure on Texas. The Republican strategy for the midterms is built on **undermining fair representation. **
**Republicans’ attempts to gerrymander maps show anything but strength — they show weakness, and a blatant disregard for American democracy and fair and free elections as we know it.**
[**These attacks represent real, acute threats to our democracy, but we’ve beaten them back before, and we can do it again. Donate today and let’s defeat extreme, partisan gerrymandering wherever it raises its ugly head.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109345850/550799236/-1156862612?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXRR_email_20250610-NDRC-Tier1-TXRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250610-NDRC-Tier1-TXRR_&utm_campaign=TXRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzNGI5YTJiLTQ0NDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2pruocvCdkagKQuGJSS1rNX5U-ujjRjfWIx0ErG-yMc=)

subject: The Hardest Thing I’ve Ever Done (And Why You Should Do It Too)
body:
From ski mountaineer to U.S. Senate candidate: how risking everything helped me find purpose--and why we need more outsiders to run for office.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..o5yyEjgssrfeJqWDMZpSDFHVOrNv2JyetxUb2j1M7yo?) for more
---
# [The Hardest Thing I've Ever Done (And Why You Should Do It Too)](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=165663506&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjYzNTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1OTI2NDEsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE4NDY0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4ODM5MzkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5breWDieJGBdTopP_KRsdfU0vf_PCF2CSJyDPZ4eIrY)
### From ski mountaineer to U.S. Senate candidate: how risking everything helped me find purpose--and why we need more outsiders to run for office.
| | [Caroline Gleich](https://substack.com/@carolinegleich)
---
| Jun 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@carolinegleich)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=165663506&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjYzNTA2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0OTU5MjY0MSwiZXhwIjoxNzUyMTg0NjQxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg4MzkzOSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.knFFTSlgfY5Y_cenmpGGxNTxUZu_Hc3rVoH3D1_UzQ8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=165663506&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjYzNTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1OTI2NDEsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE4NDY0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4ODM5MzkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5breWDieJGBdTopP_KRsdfU0vf_PCF2CSJyDPZ4eIrY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=165663506&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NjYzNTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk1OTI2NDEsImV4cCI6MTc1MjE4NDY0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4ODM5MzkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5breWDieJGBdTopP_KRsdfU0vf_PCF2CSJyDPZ4eIrY)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/carolinegleich/p/the-hardest-thing-ive-ever-done-and?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

My hands were clammy. My armpits sticky. My mouth dry.
My stomach wasn't fluttering with butterflies--it was hawk wings pounding against my ribs.
I was about to walk onstage at the University of Utah's Huntsman Center to introduce Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders at their _Fighting Oligarchy_ tour. Fifteen thousand Utahns packed the stadium. Tens of thousands more watched the livestream.
Caroline Gleich ⛰️ is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..dP6D-jtbB5Y-n_AVPuWsOI9DQHCjCic3flesFONtLdU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165663506)
The energy was electric--more rock concert than political rally. A roar of defiant, rebellious rage at a broken status quo.
Not too long ago, I was like many of those participants, full of anger, rage, and disgust. I was tired of seeing mediocre men hold enormous power and make poor choices with our hard-earned taxpayer money. I looked at our politicians and thought, _I can do better._ Most of us can.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/77c3d57a-8d66-41f0-b903-e50dcbcd12a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
### Why I Ran
In 2024, I ran for U.S. Senate in Utah. I had an inkling of how unpleasant it would be, but I couldn't sit on the sidelines while people and places I loved were under threat.
In Utah, our Republican party leaders were pushing policies to the extremes--banning books and targeting our LGBTQ+ community by enacting bathroom bans. Our federal leaders celebrated the Supreme Court's decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , removing access to critical life-saving reproductive healthcare.
And despite the Biden administration's national progress on protecting our air and water, politicians were using taxpayer subsidies to keep polluting coal power plants running while eroding protections for our treasured public lands. Our state legislature's Republican supermajority had illegally gerrymandered districts to silence progressive voices.
As I told the crowd at the Huntsman Center:
> "I ran because I saw our state and country going backwards."
And I wanted my voice to be heard.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6de5e592-90ad-4b01-b6d2-08caabe21c93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
### Harder Than Any Mountain
Let me be clear: running for Senate was the hardest thing I've ever done.
As a ski mountaineer and environmental advocate, I've been in tough situations before. I grew up struggling with depression and anxiety. At thirteen, I ended up in rehab after turning to drugs and alcohol. Skiing and climbing gave me purpose, meaning, and a way to ease the pain.
Adrenaline. Exposure. Risk. Pain. Repeat.
I've been in tough situations on high peaks--when the pitch steepens, the rock crumbles, and the ground disappears beneath your feet. You're alone, without a rope. Frozen with fear. But your only choice is to keep moving and search for something solid to hold onto.
That's what running for office felt like. Only scarier.
The moment you file, you become a target. It's like walking through your community with a bullseye on your back--open to harassment, political violence, online mobs, and relentless public judgment. You lose your privacy. You risk your safety.
As a candidate--especially for a seat like the U.S. Senate--you're expected to raise millions of dollars. Suddenly, consultants and vendors circle like vultures, seeing you as a dollar sign. You're sleep-deprived, under relentless pressure, and it's easy to make costly mistakes.
You walk into room after room to speak to groups, either to win their vote or their money. As a 5'2" woman, I heard over and over, "I was skeptical about you until I heard you speak."
Skepticism and doubt are the default, and constantly proving your intelligence, your worth, your value to voters adds more exhaustion. You feel like you're for sale--maybe if you can charm enough donors, you'll be able to reach your next fundraising goal.
But I'm used to being underestimated and proving people wrong. When you grow up in a body like mine, you understand power because you've rarely had it.
Yet the emotional toll is staggering. Every moment of weakness is weaponized. Strangers question your worth. Allies sometimes vanish. And if your campaign goes into debt? You're personally responsible for paying it back.
Running for office isn't just hard. It can be brutal. Traumatizing.
And we need to stop pretending otherwise--because if we want more women, more young people, more working-class Americans to step up and lead, we must change the system that punishes them for trying.
But for me, running for office was in service of something bigger than myself.
If you, too, have ever used intensity or endurance to outrun your inner demons, it's the perfect job--a way to turn your darkness into purpose.
* * *
### We Need You
Women, moms, teachers, nurses, cashiers, scientists, artists--your experience is needed in politics. We desperately need people who understand what it's like to struggle, to serve, to be part of a community.
Utah has never elected a woman to the U.S. Senate. I was only the third woman ever nominated for this seat. Currently, there are three times more men named _John_ serving in the Senate than women who are mothers of minor children.
It's not because mothers of minor children are not qualified. It's because the system is rigged against outsiders.
But the right message and candidate can break the spell. And recent rules from the Federal Election Commission now allow candidates to take a salary and use campaign funds to pay for childcare--making it easier for working-class people and non-wealthy individuals to run.
The Senate shouldn't be limited to multi-millionaires, retirees (the average age is 65), political nepo-babies, or people named John.
We need more citizen candidates--people like you.
There are now countless organizations to help get you started: [Run for Something](https://substack.com/redirect/acd87d77-807d-4428-9b43-ecdd3c6f4b05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Emerge America](https://substack.com/redirect/fc2aded3-3599-40d1-9aad-9563ba217e23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [Arena](https://substack.com/redirect/a18a968e-5c88-4bab-8168-e5db2b1ca280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
You don't have to wait your turn. You don't need a political last name.
**You are readier than you think.**
* * *
### Why It Was Worth It
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8b0886c6-07dc-4e2e-a396-5b43fffc0e1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Running for office was the hardest thing I've ever done.
Early mornings. Late nights. Constant calls and texts.
Bullies. Trolls. Public scrutiny. Private doubts.
But then--
A little girl looks at you like you're her hero.
A grandparent tells you about their transgender granddaughter who died by suicide--and asks you to be a voice for her.
You stand on public land, remembering how the mountains helped you heal and how much you want to protect them.
You share a stage with AOC in front of thousands of Utahns, full of joy and defiance. And suddenly, it all matters.
After the rally, still riding the enormous high of adrenaline, I had the opportunity to spend a few moments with AOC and Bernie.
I told Bernie how badly I wished I was serving in the U.S. Senate.
When he asked how my race went, I said that while I lost, I still received more total votes than any non-Republican U.S. Senate candidate in Utah history.
He smiled and said:
> "Keep going. It took me four runs before I got elected."
> | [](https://substack.com/redirect/8eeea013-43b9-4698-8309-7e91fe16e82b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
> ---|---|---
* * *
### Final Words
You are the leader you've been waiting for.
And even if you don't win this time, you're preparing the soil for someone else to grow.
That is public service. That is legacy.
**Now go run.**

clean_body: From ski mountaineer to U.S. Senate candidate: how risking everything helped me find purpose--and why we need more outsiders to run for office. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more From ski mountaineer to U.S. Senate candidate: how risking everything helped me find purpose--and why we need more outsiders to run for office. | | | Jun 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | My hands were clammy. My armpits sticky. My mouth dry. My stomach wasn't fluttering with butterflies--it was hawk wings pounding against my ribs. I was about to walk onstage at the University of Utah's Huntsman Center to introduce Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders at their Fighting Oligarchy tour. Fifteen thousand Utahns packed the stadium. Tens of thousands more watched the livestream. Caroline Gleich ⛰️ is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. The energy was electric--more rock concert than political rally. A roar of defiant, rebellious rage at a broken status quo. Not too long ago, I was like many of those participants, full of anger, rage, and disgust. I was tired of seeing mediocre men hold enormous power and make poor choices with our hard-earned taxpayer money. I looked at our politicians and thought, I can do better. Most of us can. | | ---|---|--- Why I Ran In 2024, I ran for U.S. Senate in Utah. I had an inkling of how unpleasant it would be, but I couldn't sit on the sidelines while people and places I loved were under threat. In Utah, our Republican party leaders were pushing policies to the extremes--banning books and targeting our LGBTQ+ community by enacting bathroom bans. Our federal leaders celebrated the Supreme Court's decision overturning Roe v. Wade , removing access to critical life-saving reproductive healthcare. And despite the Biden administration's national progress on protecting our air and water, politicians were using taxpayer subsidies to keep polluting coal power plants running while eroding protections for our treasured public lands. Our state legislature's Republican supermajority had illegally gerrymandered districts to silence progressive voices. As I told the crowd at the Huntsman Center: "I ran because I saw our state and country going backwards." And I wanted my voice to be heard. | | ---|---|--- Harder Than Any Mountain Let me be clear: running for Senate was the hardest thing I've ever done. As a ski mountaineer and environmental advocate, I've been in tough situations before. I grew up struggling with depression and anxiety. At thirteen, I ended up in rehab after turning to drugs and alcohol. Skiing and climbing gave me purpose, meaning, and a way to ease the pain. Adrenaline. Exposure. Risk. Pain. Repeat. I've been in tough situations on high peaks--when the pitch steepens, the rock crumbles, and the ground disappears beneath your feet. You're alone, without a rope. Frozen with fear. But your only choice is to keep moving and search for something solid to hold onto. That's what running for office felt like. Only scarier. The moment you file, you become a target. It's like walking through your community with a bullseye on your back--open to harassment, political violence, online mobs, and relentless public judgment. You lose your privacy. You risk your safety. As a candidate--especially for a seat like the U.S. Senate--you're expected to raise millions of dollars. Suddenly, consultants and vendors circle like vultures, seeing you as a dollar sign. You're sleep-deprived, under relentless pressure, and it's easy to make costly mistakes. You walk into room after room to speak to groups, either to win their vote or their money. As a 5'2" woman, I heard over and over, "I was skeptical about you until I heard you speak." Skepticism and doubt are the default, and constantly proving your intelligence, your worth, your value to voters adds more exhaustion. You feel like you're for sale--maybe if you can charm enough donors, you'll be able to reach your next fundraising goal. But I'm used to being underestimated and proving people wrong. When you grow up in a body like mine, you understand power because you've rarely had it. Yet the emotional toll is staggering. Every moment of weakness is weaponized. Strangers question your worth. Allies sometimes vanish. And if your campaign goes into debt? You're personally responsible for paying it back. Running for office isn't just hard. It can be brutal. Traumatizing. And we need to stop pretending otherwise--because if we want more women, more young people, more working-class Americans to step up and lead, we must change the system that punishes them for trying. But for me, running for office was in service of something bigger than myself. If you, too, have ever used intensity or endurance to outrun your inner demons, it's the perfect job--a way to turn your darkness into purpose. We Need You Women, moms, teachers, nurses, cashiers, scientists, artists--your experience is needed in politics. We desperately need people who understand what it's like to struggle, to serve, to be part of a community. Utah has never elected a woman to the U.S. Senate. I was only the third woman ever nominated for this seat. Currently, there are three times more men named John serving in the Senate than women who are mothers of minor children. It's not because mothers of minor children are not qualified. It's because the system is rigged against outsiders. But the right message and candidate can break the spell. And recent rules from the Federal Election Commission now allow candidates to take a salary and use campaign funds to pay for childcare--making it easier for working-class people and non-wealthy individuals to run. The Senate shouldn't be limited to multi-millionaires, retirees (the average age is 65), political nepo-babies, or people named John. We need more citizen candidates--people like you. There are now countless organizations to help get you started: , , and . You don't have to wait your turn. You don't need a political last name. You are readier than you think. Why It Was Worth It | | ---|---|--- Running for office was the hardest thing I've ever done. Early mornings. Late nights. Constant calls and texts. Bullies. Trolls. Public scrutiny. Private doubts. But then-- A little girl looks at you like you're her hero. A grandparent tells you about their transgender granddaughter who died by suicide--and asks you to be a voice for her. You stand on public land, remembering how the mountains helped you heal and how much you want to protect them. You share a stage with AOC in front of thousands of Utahns, full of joy and defiance. And suddenly, it all matters. After the rally, still riding the enormous high of adrenaline, I had the opportunity to spend a few moments with AOC and Bernie. I told Bernie how badly I wished I was serving in the U.S. Senate. When he asked how my race went, I said that while I lost, I still received more total votes than any non-Republican U.S. Senate candidate in Utah history. He smiled and said: "Keep going. It took me four runs before I got elected." | | ---|---|--- Final Words You are the leader you've been waiting for. And even if you don't win this time, you're preparing the soil for someone else to grow. That is public service. That is legacy. Now go run.** Caroline Gleich ⛰️ is a reader-supported publication. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Announcing our latest endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Peter, we’ve got a major announcement.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250610-1&t=1&akid=2243%2E587540%2EwrK6b9)
Peter, we’ve got a major announcement.
**We’re proud to endorse Irene Shin for Congress in Virginia’s 11th District.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250610_1_ireneshin?refcode=em20250610-2243&amount=5&refcode2=2243_587540_wrK6b9&akid=2243%2E587540%2EwrK6b9)
The daughter of Korean immigrants, her family instilled in her the values of service, hard work, and integrity. She learned early on that the promise of America, which families like hers sacrificed so much to pursue, wasn’t always a promise as much as it was a possibility — one you had to fight for.
She decided to challenge the system and run for House of Delegates in 2021, defeating an ineffective incumbent. During the past four years in Richmond, Irene has taken on the establishment and won, delivering real results for Virginian families.
**And now, she’s taking on a broken political system that helped a 34-time felon win the presidency again. That’s why we’re thrilled to support her campaign for Congress.**
**[Will you make a $5 donation now to help Irene Shin and Leaders We Deserve buck the status quo and deliver the kind of leadership we need?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250610_1_ireneshin?refcode=em20250610-2243&amount=5&refcode2=2243_587540_wrK6b9&akid=2243%2E587540%2EwrK6b9)**
Irene knows that business as usual isn’t just failing — it’s dangerous. While Trump dismantles our government agency by agency, too many Democrats are running the same tired plays. But Irene is stepping up — and she’s doing things differently.
Irene’s progressive record speaks for itself. In the Virginia legislature, she has:
* Fought the hospital lobby, insurance industry, and utility giants — and won.
* Passed Malcolm’s Law to save lives from fentanyl overdoses.
* Expanded health coverage for pregnant Virginians.
* Stopped utility shutoffs during deadly heat waves.

**That’s what real representation looks like, Peter.**
But to win this high-stakes special election, she’s going to need serious grassroots power behind her. As a congressional candidate, Irene isn’t taking corporate PAC money. She doesn’t have right-wing billionaires funding her campaign. She is relying on people like us.
**[Please – contribute $5 now to help Irene and Leaders We Deserve win this critical race. We can’t afford the status quo – we need Irene in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250610_1_ireneshin?refcode=em20250610-2243&amount=5&refcode2=2243_587540_wrK6b9&akid=2243%2E587540%2EwrK6b9)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250610_1_ireneshin?amount=5&refcode=em20250610-2243&refcode2=2243_587540_wrK6b9&akid=2243%2E587540%2EwrK6b9)**
This is a moment of crisis — and of opportunity. The old way of doing things is failing us. But we have a chance to elect leaders who get it, who’ve lived it, and who are ready to fight like our democracy depends on it — _because it really does._
Thank you for your support,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250610-1&t=2&refcode2=2243_587540_wrK6b9&akid=2243%2E587540%2EwrK6b9)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2243%2E587540%2EwrK6b9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2243%2E587540%2EwrK6b9)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

L.A. is still descending into chaos as the protests against ICE agents has now devolved into riots and looting. From local jewelry stores, to Apple stores to CVS; looters were smashing through windows throughout downtown Los Angeles overnight. The LA Police Chief admitted they were overwhelmed in a press conference as they are now facing deadly threats from commercial grade fireworks, rocks and bricks. President Trump doubled the National Guard presence and deployed 700 Marines to protect federal assets and employees. Governor Gavin Newsom's response is to sue President Trump. Harrison Fields, the White House Deputy Press Secretary is with me today to give us the White House's perspective as to the chaos in L.A. and Newsom's decision to sue the president. Newsom is desperately trying to "save face" as another epic failure under his leadership plagues the state of California. Secretary of the Department of Education, Linda McMahon, is hard at work dismantling the Department of Education. The department's over bloated funding has not led to better test scores and improved our children's education and Linda is leading the charge on getting our children properly educated. As higher education institutes like Columbia and Harvard have allowed radical woke and anti semitic ideas to fester on their campuses, the DOE has used anti-discrimination laws to threaten Columbia's accreditation.

**Harrison Fields**

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: I haven’t forgotten...
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/dae1a20bcdbe4255b81e08aa4ec372e1-6baf89c999974cc08d5a7bda171f7647/63)
---
Friend, Doesn’t it feel good?

That we’re taking America back? That we’re... _finally WINNING?!_

You can just feel it in the air.

No matter where you look, the evidence is there... the Left is on the run. Routed and broken. In full retreat.

America is healing... _and becoming GREAT once again._
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/dae1a20bcdbe4255b81e08aa4ec372e1-6baf89c999974cc08d5a7bda171f7647/63)
---
But Friend, even with all the victories our movement is racking up every day, I need to take a step back for a moment...

Because this moment we’re in right now?_It’s fragile._

I haven’t forgotten where we were just a few short months ago. None of us should.

**Our country was on the brink, and you and I were in an ALL-OUT fight for**** _national SURVIVAL..._**

The regime left our borders wide open. Persecuted their political opponents. Corrupted justice.

The Left labeled you and me as “domestic terrorists.” Called faithful Christians “bigots.”

They said boys could become girls. Put them in girls’ locker rooms. Let them take over girls' sports.

They told our kids the color of their skin mattered more than character, merit, or intelligence.

They masked up our kids and kicked good people out of their jobs for refusing to take a shot.

_They even played drag shows for elementary school children._

The system the regime built wasn’t just broken... It was RIGGED — against people like you and me.

**The Left declared war on everything that makes America great. And they didn’t hide it.**

They had every cultural stronghold... Hollywood. Academia. Public schools. Big Tech. Corporate America. Media. The White House.

And they used them to indoctrinate, intimidate, and isolate.

**I remember Ben Franklin’s words:****_“A Republic... if you can keep it.”_** That line hit me harder than ever in the last few years.

Because for a while? _It felt like we couldn’t._

But then something happened...

And let’s be honest, Friend — This moment is not just the result of one election, one tour, or one person...

It was something higher...

** _God Almighty stepped in._**

It was His grace. He gave us a reprieve.

One more chance to turn things around... _If we were willing to take it._

And patriots like YOU answered that call, Friend.

You didn’t retreat. You didn’t whine. You didn’t sit back and say, _“I hope it gets better.”_

You stood up. You prayed. You gave. You fought.

**And patriots like you made it possible for Turning Point USA to be on the front lines when it mattered MOST.**

And now?

What we’ve witnessed this Spring on the American Comeback Tour?

It’s more than encouraging... ** _It’s miraculous._**
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/dae1a20bcdbe4255b81e08aa4ec372e1-6baf89c999974cc08d5a7bda171f7647/63)
---
Thousands of students are showing up. Crowds packed around the “Prove Me Wrong” table. BEGGING for one of those red hats.

Not because it’s trendy... Not because they were told to... But because they’re hungry.

Hungry for truth. Hungry for meaning. Hungry for something they’ve never been given — permission to love their country.

These young people?

They’ve seen what the Left is selling... and they want NONE of it.

They’ve seen their schools rot with propaganda.

They’ve watched their communities and states run by the Left collapse.

They’ve seen lives and families destroyed by a deranged ideology.

They’ve been lied to about basic science and biology... about freedom... about what it means to be American.

And, because patriots like YOU put us on their campuses?

They’re becoming the most conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in HALF A CENTURY!
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/dae1a20bcdbe4255b81e08aa4ec372e1-6baf89c999974cc08d5a7bda171f7647/63)
---
**Above Left:** The Left’s so-called “UnF**k America” Tour (So classy of them, I know) event at Texas A&M had NO ONE show up. **Above Right:** Meanwhile, that same day, we packed Texas A&M not once, but TWICE, with thousands of students. A decade ago, who would’ve thought we’d be beating the Left on their turf, at their own game?
---
But here’s the deal, Friend...

**Just because we’re winning...**_**_doesn’t mean we’ve won_**_**.**

This is a spiritual battle. A cultural battle. A battle for the hearts of a generation.

And just because they’re walking away from the Left... _Doesn’t mean they’ve_ __fully__ _bought into what you and I both know is right._

We can’t just hope they stay on the path. We can’t leave it to chance.

We have to reach the kids we haven’t yet...

We have to show them WHY our values matter, why they’re better — and how to defend them.

We have to make sure they don’t just leave the Left... but that they RUN to our movement, our ideas, and our love for this country.

That they NEVER look back.

**And, Friend?** **_You and I have to show them what comes NEXT._** That’s how we make this cultural shift PERMANENT. That’s how we make sure the American Comeback ushers in the next era of American Greatness.

The Left hasn’t given up. In fact, they’re just getting more desperate. Which means we can’t rest. We can' t give them one inch of ground back. Not after everything you’ve done. Not after everything we’ve built. _Not with everything on the line._

We have to press in. Harder than ever.

**This is our shot to lock in a generational shift... a true REALIGNMENT... And it all starts with you.**

Thank you for standing with us.

You believed before anyone else did, Friend.

You didn’t give up when the country was on the ropes.

You stayed in the fight when it was unpopular — when it was dangerous — _when it felt hopeless._

The victories we’re winning now? You earned them.

And now, I’m asking you to help us finish the job. To play for all the marbles.

**To win what we’ve always wanted:****_To pass down the America we’re proud of — and leave her better than we found her._**

I’m telling you... these young people?

It’s what I see in their eyes... **Relief. Hope. Conviction.**

_They’re ready._

Let’s reach even more young hearts and minds — with the same grit, grace, and gratitude that got us to this moment.

**Let’s make this the turning point our kids — and our country —**** _deserve._**

From one patriot to another... thank you. The best is still yet to come.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/dae1a20bcdbe4255b81e08aa4ec372e1-6baf89c999974cc08d5a7bda171f7647/63)
---
P.S. Ben Franklin didn’t say those words lightly...

_**“A Republic... if you can keep it.”**_

He said them at the dawn of a miracle — when this country was still fragile, still a new experiment, still surrounded by enemies.

And yet, even back then... he knew.

**Freedom is not guaranteed.**

It never has been.

It has to be fought for. Protected. Passed down.

_And right now, Friend, that responsibility doesn’t belong to some distant generation in the past..._

**It belongs to you and me.**

To all American patriots who still believe this country is worth saving.

To the young people who are finally waking up — _and need us to meet them with the truth._

So Friend, if you’d be proud to be a part of the movement that’s going to save our GREAT nation...

If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America...

**Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.**

When you join our movement today, every dollar you give will help flood campuses and schools with the truth... send us deeper into the Left’s territory... change even more hearts and minds...

And above all, ensure we make the most of this moment that God has so mercifully given us...

To keep the Republic. To secure America’s future. To restore her greatness.

**[Join our fight and make your generous gift to Turning Point USA today – thank you for standing with us.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/dae1a20bcdbe4255b81e08aa4ec372e1-6baf89c999974cc08d5a7bda171f7647/63)**
---
[ **Join Turning Point USA**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/dae1a20bcdbe4255b81e08aa4ec372e1-6baf89c999974cc08d5a7bda171f7647/63)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

DCDailyJournal.com

[Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam](https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/dae1a20bcdbe4255b81e08aa4ec372e1?op-notrack)

This email was directed to dpwillis67@gmail.com only | Our Privacy Policy can be found by [clicking here](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/dae1a20bcdbe4255b81e08aa4ec372e1-6a83397428c1466eb9b81a0babda49bf/63).

State: Virginia

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Newsom is BURNING LA to the ground to protect Illegals
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
I'd say stick to Governing, but you clearly aren't doing a very good job of that.
|
---
Peter,

**If there 's one thing I've learned from my years of experience DOMINATING the SEC in College Football, it's that a team could have all the potential in the world, but a bad coach will lead them to a WINLESS season.**

That's precisely what we're seeing in California right now. Gavin Newsom is BURNING Los Angeles to the ground to protect illegal aliens...

Gavin Newsom has failed to do his job. LA looks like a third-world country -- anarchists are in charge, law enforcement is being attacked, and the rule of law is nonexistent.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=e2073572b3a14123ad113d27f1be2b41&_e=x2xM22UcDJ8E3graNESM4z10NRMciN6NBIqDsDG2s4RGgbKsqurKtVGHFByXHu1p--7OY1mbIklON81eZ_11NLXllw6pGuU2UOeWFFPFAMq3AfPZL50emTeorzX8Icvp5X0T_IZiun0QN9Pue7yAU0iwT8szVHY0E6FCxIln-voQlcdqORwkwHbjAv48A3bQz_NoYQSe6HlAEFFGpmbIZpnW6iw38riPz9yp3_YtbZw-G8S3zGc1YaFxy2qd99_qD7V1AMfET0SONdn0Wq7gX9pnz7B_M8alB3DvnlmrXKCUsPliXcgswFfJISVPlTipAiKxkA-rGBwhLe4-sIakTNG-VkWpBHSiBgA78I4AAhOFAWlZu7cEcOhxWN8csTZM3RsT3Ml0f4nLezXGNQ8Ipj-n9eth10uBhRbsi-66WX5y8GYjE2_0se1WKj0EKCwEXqqNwF-3TncMDHraGrVlCIkp1niczyaUVG4iRpZRIYJVVzPprjcjn4t94daR0_14biA52QBHdE4EN6y4IRXcUpqEZ-WeNtrnKyu1YsqCAts4bYdDEcejQVNS5DjlL04L)
I'd tell him to stick to governing rather than coming at me on X, but clearly he's not doing a very good job at that.

If he wants to keep on whining like a child rather than stepping up to the plate to END the chaos that's unfolded in California, then I think it's time for President Trump to lock him up.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

Republicans have lined up behind a budget bill that would gut _essential government programs_ , leaving **millions** of families in limbo, and would throw communities across the country into uncertainty — all while delivering massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans. Here is the truth about Donald Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” and what is at stake:
* It **slashes Medicaid** , threatening health coverage for millions of Americans — including children, people with disabilities and rural hospital patients who rely on this essential program.
* It **guts SNAP** benefits, leaving families across the country uncertain about how they’ll afford their next meal.
* All while **billionaires and big corporations walk away with yet another tax break** — paid for by the very people this bill puts at risk.

Trump and his Republican allies are pushing a vision that forces working families to carry the burden of their political agenda — **and the uncertainty they’re creating is real**. Folks don’t know if they’ll be able to afford their medicine. Parents don’t know if school lunch benefits will still be available to their children. And rural hospitals, food banks and community clinics are left wondering how long they will be able to hold on. We cannot let this bill pass. clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Republicans have lined up behind a budget bill that would gut essential government programs , leaving millions of families in limbo, and would throw communities across the country into uncertainty — all while delivering massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans. Here is the truth about Donald Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” and what is at stake: It slashes Medicaid , threatening health coverage for millions of Americans — including children, people with disabilities and rural hospital patients who rely on this essential program. It guts SNAP benefits, leaving families across the country uncertain about how they’ll afford their next meal. All while billionaires and big corporations walk away with yet another tax break — paid for by the very people this bill puts at risk. Trump and his Republican allies are pushing a vision that forces working families to carry the burden of their political agenda — and the uncertainty they’re creating is real. Folks don’t know if they’ll be able to afford their medicine. Parents don’t know if school lunch benefits will still be available to their children. And rural hospitals, food banks and community clinics are left wondering how long they will be able to hold on. We cannot let this bill pass. We have to speak out — NOW. Add your name to tell Trump and his allies in Congress : | | — Team Vasquez | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Amber Padora
subject: For Our Kids. For Our Future. For the Soul of This Country.

body:
I’m Amber — John’s wife, a mother, and a fighter for what’s right. | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/Gn2vns7C--8O2_SrURz0COAE6gcqLqCvv1tUCBh_aigrwbG1PYNe1vlFSOA1e_NTuC1kNMH-SZVnnW197D34pDyfLhqhD0z6R49E49IiTag74c9VUPS4fz-5qTPyEi1yWkkllqEHzDRk6fk8ZqwJJ5A_IBHfgZRM6ifpkB2m435Cm7iXr4HaYS99yWL5FRu6vCNaNLOVTqOn2WuLD_ivFrgFw7QusehqJ5a9Ugm8JaGXUmHDKynLTVm5jLWQoDpkhUc0-L7-X6NSjzsZIjDDp1MprC4xVVbipu3riZFm4MOI4RTH0los-n4WJVKNo9XVrZzIdiyyGdkadIpjIsXj20VmIPt351A-VNqPEZwPrqXGOWDaLj0UuMGAxwrBF528InPWQ4Vmn3fWs9zlWYvrJxQREBH4_8eZeukBbtLzYUzswFTV8MGis7LlyS81ddYYw48UkOPqdlWWurb3pJ8/uS9Feey6dOep0GHUGvpZAbZCTVrXVWpH/9) Friend, I’m writing to you not just as the proud wife of a man running for Congress, but as a mother. As a woman who sees what’s happening in our country and refuses to stay silent. Because what we are living through right now — this rising tide of cruelty and corruption — **demands every ounce of courage we have.** Mothers and working families are carrying more than we ever have. We are working two jobs, chasing affordable healthcare, worrying about the price of groceries, and trying to hold our families together while the world feels like it's falling apart. Meanwhile, those in power like Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert strut around waving flags and quoting Scripture, pretending they speak for the heart of this nation. But let's be honest: their politics have nothing to do with Christ. Jesus fed the hungry. He healed the sick. He uplifted the poor. **He did not turn his back on immigrants. He did not cage children. He did not cheer on violence or greed or cruelty.** And yet, we are watching ICE agents march through immigrant communities in military slacks and face coverings with live ammunition. We are watching families torn apart. Our friends, neighbors, and colleagues are being treated like enemies. Our government is behaving more like the Gestapo than a republic rooted in liberty and justice. And the most horrifying part? Our children are watching. They are watching as we deport American-born children — born under the protections of our Constitution — simply because of who their parents are. That is not just wrong. That is immoral. It is the opposite of everything we claim to be as Americans. **[So today, I’m asking you — from one parent, one neighbor, one human being to another: Stand with us. Speak up, fight back, and join our campaign to end this nightmare.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/PshhZI6VrbD42IWluJSaLdWOG618L_V35kLSKf8fn97Y51t7g81vbyRlZbZQvTNvyixWMYIZJzl7XatzDqi2FVPHd5WURhLBKScGDxMt3ezFJHV6_Tai0-4Z8tLyWkZDiP7XkFEwPt7w_PPmSIxw6XI2tZEGlxt2y2F01zkZDIgl8fPsjzdoNB6LRD01ppqZyErk6V6pBFQGSn7O-ZUEnX22WdrO5YYf5jHjZRj8rLfBWtPFDgzm9WlzLq8VdIBhLsnfPdfft5q2xfsHYez5sYFBHAwcYsc4WfKS9FVShh1HI03csI8tNDupBdjHvG0xyjDUxf5cOVNemDxOvVGsdnS3SXYy_fC6hTEjErCwInILZTf1ds1hK7_ZYrbXjX5-6nFoOI-SiNjP9b6JG-21x9DVlFSsP5JObi9tTk0mL4OMazpqrdlVriHsImspnRFpUPMhHaJkpOfZAwyAr6o/cK3bD1EZyr8S73F1s1cmaWwVCmHYhSRM/9)** I could not be more proud to stand hand in hand with my husband John, as he runs for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. Because John is the kind of man who lives what he preaches. Every morning, he’s up at 4:30 AM — working multiple jobs to support our family. He’s building a people-powered campaign from the ground up, listening to families across Eastern Colorado, showing up for our community when times get tough, and giving his time, energy, and heart to make things better. He still finds time to be an incredible father, a present husband, and a neighbor who always offers help before he’s asked. **That’s the kind of leadership we need — not another self-serving politician, but a servant-leader willing to give the shirt off his back.** We are teaching our children what it means to love people — all people — and to fight for justice even when it’s hard. That’s what this campaign is about. And that’s why I’m asking you: **[Will you make a donation today to help John fight for families like ours — and yours?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/Jpn3nxaxrYmeszOCs9nQ1G41gjPXqhsrSIxtr7Yrn7dGBoMF2UCFBShb5lIm5uftyZewiOo1sXEEAOvYTIa2g66EHhXx_BbpCHssPYV-MYNV4eaeoElvRAjQyYSa8NhZhFMD1zKRYILJzbxF6TFOrahfJW9UvU3SIvYfNwnKNaVfGggWnhHoqFUG8t4ry8T-I-To7FIi5p58f1NdBI1iSdV_ozrE-9xf_AKmN6PEPRkGa9S5r7PSpRrH-1WHb5W8H-chwRmYtm-4upWQLc9cjP9SYw-I-IqKompc3UkIXTjfQVkpB7wn8rZssZo779KnLSUl34noy6SxGgiab2Pt_q0hmMdFlUyPqQmAbjJ3dpB-fgVKam10loRojpt-SQVaakWgPv53esYRdS2YNqT8WWKuQN_0BYHZyumMuGVSz2If0TePAhUD9kJWrxYFXvhOM12uUA0tu9VOKwFTfu0/1ceOryjzbXEp6hmP1vmy8ITBdZCWj8l8/9)** clean_body: I’m Amber — John’s wife, a mother, and a fighter for what’s right. | | | Friend, I’m writing to you not just as the proud wife of a man running for Congress, but as a mother. As a woman who sees what’s happening in our country and refuses to stay silent. Because what we are living through right now — this rising tide of cruelty and corruption — demands every ounce of courage we have. Mothers and working families are carrying more than we ever have. We are working two jobs, chasing affordable healthcare, worrying about the price of groceries, and trying to hold our families together while the world feels like it's falling apart. Meanwhile, those in power like Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert strut around waving flags and quoting Scripture, pretending they speak for the heart of this nation. But let's be honest: their politics have nothing to do with Christ. Jesus fed the hungry. He healed the sick. He uplifted the poor. He did not turn his back on immigrants. He did not cage children. He did not cheer on violence or greed or cruelty. And yet, we are watching ICE agents march through immigrant communities in military slacks and face coverings with live ammunition. We are watching families torn apart. Our friends, neighbors, and colleagues are being treated like enemies. Our government is behaving more like the Gestapo than a republic rooted in liberty and justice. And the most horrifying part? Our children are watching. They are watching as we deport American-born children — born under the protections of our Constitution — simply because of who their parents are. That is not just wrong. That is immoral. It is the opposite of everything we claim to be as Americans. I could not be more proud to stand hand in hand with my husband John, as he runs for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. Because John is the kind of man who lives what he preaches. Every morning, he’s up at 4:30 AM — working multiple jobs to support our family. He’s building a people-powered campaign from the ground up, listening to families across Eastern Colorado, showing up for our community when times get tough, and giving his time, energy, and heart to make things better. He still finds time to be an incredible father, a present husband, and a neighbor who always offers help before he’s asked. That’s the kind of leadership we need — not another self-serving politician, but a servant-leader willing to give the shirt off his back. We are teaching our children what it means to love people — all people — and to fight for justice even when it’s hard. That’s what this campaign is about. And that’s why I’m asking you: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We’re not just fighting for the folks in Eastern Colorado. We’re fighting for every family in every town, city, and suburb across this country. Let’s do this — for our children, for our future, and for the soul of America. With love and fierce hope, Amber Padora Wife, Mother, Believer in People Proud to Stand With John for Congress John Padora is a manufacturing engineer and candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. He’s running to bring commonsense leadership to Eastern Colorado—fighting for farmers, working families, and real solutions, not political theater. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

subject: It’s not glamorous, but it gets the job done.

body:

#
---
Let’s be honest: Political work isn’t always glamorous. It’s not red carpets, viral soundbites, or flashy stunts. _**It’s fixing the damn roads.**_ It’s passing laws that _actually_ help people — to lower costs, protect freedoms, fund public education, ensure our climate is livable for our grandchildren, and yes, fill potholes. **Governor Whitmer says it best: this work isn’t about headlines. It’s about results. ** She created Fight Like Hell PAC to support candidates who aren’t afraid to roll up their sleeves — the organizers, the problem-solvers, the coalition-builders _who actually get things done._ But that kind of leadership takes resources. clean_body: | Let’s be honest: Political work isn’t always glamorous. It’s not red carpets, viral soundbites, or flashy stunts. It’s fixing the damn roads. It’s passing laws that actually help people — to lower costs, protect freedoms, fund public education, ensure our climate is livable for our grandchildren, and yes, fill potholes. Governor Whitmer says it best: this work isn’t about headlines. It’s about results. She created Fight Like Hell PAC to support candidates who aren’t afraid to roll up their sleeves — the organizers, the problem-solvers, the coalition-builders who actually get things done. But that kind of leadership takes resources. The good guys don’t have billionaires bankrolling their campaigns. To win, they need people like you behind them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Progress doesn’t happen by accident. name: =?iso-8859-13?q?Ken=FFTravius?= Coleman, United for Democracy
subject: Which side is the Senate on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Trump wants to use the chaos ICE is creating as an excuse to take away our rights. | |
---
Peter, Over the weekend, ICE arrested dozens of protesters, including SEIU California president David Huerta, for exercising their First Amendment rights to oppose the mobilization of ICE in Los Angeles. **Now, the Trump administration has escalated its attacks on the community by mobilizing the National Guard to put down the Los Angeles protests. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has even threatened to deploy active-duty Marines against the protesters.** Local officials in Los Angeles have made it clear that the protests have been mostly peaceful. The mayor of Los Angeles and governor of California reiterated that they had the resources necessary to address the protests, and that federal involvement was unnecessary. **Trump sent in the National Guard anyway, escalating the situation while White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller branded the protests an “insurrection.”** Let’s be very clear: Trump is attempting to brand thousands of Americans using their voice to oppose ICE’s illegal terror campaign as a threat to the United States. His goal is to use the unrest as an excuse to demonstrate force against his opposition and rip away even more of our rights. [**Trump’s mobilization of the military against protesters on American soil is emblematic of his attacks on our very democracy. Add your name now and demand the Senate put an end to the ICE raids and military escalation.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_aIiWeFKH7rgL9EHbPrcmSZejoajZ4yOhNZ4eBlWQ8dEif2FFR2YHX_RuBV6iEHAAf_rcdNO-Y9kEUL2AiQMNzVU4V2D51rR40vx-MF4pxKSG47nqIZjjpQEzcrO7RzsevuOc8EPJNGz5ioltMYc6wOXLKkDUNdyPZL986VZX92iX_Zg6_3ZaQD8Y0sx7sIkkroVxREFlPqkvP7SVq91K31YmyS1jFhny_AYCQX1Gp3BUiMnJnTDCJ5jQ1Dq955dv16w7HBv-0T1rj-98UqN53jX4X5GbkTnbvfngxd2kwmS8ZiMkFzBnpfR-EYFofwnECfVUOt8vGJuqYUDPWEn-oKwGalgI0ZYsKIDjWF_2PM1AworkJbD-NAHLs4cQG8YHRXumLAm0EgthGAcC1aWXtuvfz3bl5iyR0na4eu2qlQBsK_iW5RBbsm7iRUEkTMMKhmHYGYGQkQt2DjMr_upukhqpF0u0e6Pw6GLBh-HJEXw/4h8/fJyr3_aSRtSJlBCMx-1Upw/h0/h001.pwoI71Wz4TpmDgxJ0MMSiugZR2Zv-xxo1yUvxOzpu20) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_aIiWeFKH7rgL9EHbPrcmSZejoajZ4yOhNZ4eBlWQ8dEif2FFR2YHX_RuBV6iEHAAf_rcdNO-Y9kEUL2AiQMNzVU4V2D51rR40vx-MF4pxKSG47nqIZjjpQEzcrO7RzsevuOc8EPJNGz5ioltMYc6wOXLKkDUNdyPZL986VZX92iX_Zg6_3ZaQD8Y0sx7sIkkroVxREFlPqkvP7SVq91K31YmyS1jFhny_AYCQX1Gp3BUiMnJnTDCJ5jQ1Dq955dv16w7HBv-0T1rj-98UqN53tZA2Sayiu4cBruOBwk5lFGyQJJYAIE7TFD-w7AnnYmQ6fSlawHyQMIXu1P4qYBFZ_wPhhFTguL_Y8vNFLVHqI_XOx1ANYi3Jp276p1hzbtuz0W9jgC7WSaV5FZ3bCPdr22O-1Vot920Misnr4l8s2QMp_ViW4iR4b7SXsAfzM0ITFivMIBexAGDfcDZIk87sUhbVj4Aq5rETl8XsOabbvw/4h8/fJyr3_aSRtSJlBCMx-1Upw/h1/h001.dfoFG4kQ9t4f2QYrbDt6XuXufwV5mfSMMqZJNQBk1gE) Trump has repeatedly mobilized ICE to illegally attack our rights. ICE has assaulted, arrested, and even deported American citizens without due process. **The immigrant community in particular have been victim to his scapegoating and crusade to intimidate, harass, and prosecute those he deems his “enemies.”** Now, Trump wants to use his ICE terror campaign to declare an emergency that would allow him to strip our rights and consolidate his dictatorial power over everyday Americans. **It’s time for the Senate to decide whose side it's on.** They must stand up for the rights of all Americans—even those who disagree with the wannabe dictator in the Oval Office. [**Tell your Senator: End ICE’s raids and Trump’s violent escalations in our communities!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_aIiWeFKH7rgL9EHbPrcmSZejoajZ4yOhNZ4eBlWQ8dEif2FFR2YHX_RuBV6iEHAAf_rcdNO-Y9kEUL2AiQMNzVU4V2D51rR40vx-MF4pxKSG47nqIZjjpQEzcrO7RzsevuOc8EPJNGz5ioltMYc6wOXLKkDUNdyPZL986VZX92iX_Zg6_3ZaQD8Y0sx7sIkkroVxREFlPqkvP7SVq91K31YmyS1jFhny_AYCQX1Gp3BUiMnJnTDCJ5jQ1Dq955dv16w7HBv-0T1rj-98UqN53rT33Ero0wjtKz-MS_jhuf9rLQTVQFzcfACIyf7HvW2UmBx4JMEz8B4wpenIEnRZdRYlVabipIJ7MIcBX3Y83X-Qsk-8tqUEadamV9tsnnY6_LjYly9nOM3vTAd4jYUu4t6k7RfQqf7oCdHrp6JK4xeVwhfSX9D0OSfluv9YvhH_dd0EbcqljH5qQdIo0DAdPotFMlJZR5OGFJ0Ypxym1Hg/4h8/fJyr3_aSRtSJlBCMx-1Upw/h2/h001.-tv6V7He22UPFYHN4Eo7BdXkD7ETv61L2MsfL3w2oS0) Thank you for fighting for our rights, Ken’Travius Coleman

Peter, The Climate Cult is pushing their BIGGEST lie yet: that the very air you exhale – carbon dioxide – is a "dangerous pollutant" that must be regulated and controlled. **_Their real agenda?_**__**_To control every aspect of your life_** _,_**_from the car or truck you drive to the stove you cook on._** The CO2 Coalition is fighting back with an arsenal of truth that the Green Lobby fears most: real science. With over 180 renowned scientists, including 2022 Nobel Laureate in Physics Dr. John Clauser, we're exposing the Climate Fiction that's being used to steal your freedoms. _**[_**Your immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 will help us flood the public sector, schools, and halls of Congress with scientific truth that dismantles their fear-mongering propaganda.**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/s7QTGte8DdH_i2jlHWosD1emIi_UsvPdV6dleVAICTzS-yrjDidemYXc97oWv3PHhzG-MBaVUUj-RgrtmaB3O6xgIeUjuKVooMy5ctIeu-LIu2Hh7cSM25j4u0RdMHUjcGFKNOVdXVoyJiuCvt-P6Ou8WrubHycesk5kRzZMS2IvybiugnYwBrvXTu6Z-Docl7GrUzhrlAILFxA9N23ODSldkp_-9CmbK5wEKL57lM7WrR5p8t04XRw3kLPs5rMMHBNGvwXmhrXEG0fFnwuKWw0XBcEjFoV0K-hnN25uvG5JgNusiJFWRLNThZ6ZAT4we2UB9FHYbFCGlbGCXx74emYRWfvKoTBltf9qJVEUTx5gzGlnG5s6_yHRY-ILsQI_KdwGnsp2o0IijzEbmUhWfXlqvMEovj-RU658nD9dVCQJiQbte2sUNwgdY1NoeFdh7IVmKppK6RTx1F8qZjb9VmhPZEnGvQpCHIIOJ6B0q2ke6WvhKBQxWxwzktnTiPdn88Jo26WsbcAjDrDQ4HWwUQPLqaSbPCLdgH9b9vDgkvZ6q7-6BwuchyrJ7HwR37SVkk1CQvRg6WdaqJ3eREsuYvtG_zUue14swVo1-rE/GOfTJXKR47eI0-aFcgznJWCz_xaJisk8/9)**_
