name: Deb Haaland
subject: Happy Pride 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
This campaign is about lifting up every New Mexican, no matter how you identify or who you love.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2518%2E400544%2EzpnqEN)
Last weekend I marched with our LGBTQ+ family in the Albuquerque Pride Parade.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250610_1_pride?amount=5&refcode=em20250610-2518&refcode2=2518_400544_zpnqEN&akid=2518%2E400544%2EzpnqEN)
**We marched and celebrated love and our LGBTQ+ community.**
This weekend we were surrounded by rainbow flags, love, and pride. Our LGBTQ+ community is vibrant and beautiful.
But right now, that community is under attack. Across the country, far-right extremists are pushing hateful policies to erase LGBTQ+ people from schools and public spaces.
And here in New Mexico, those same forces would love nothing more than to drag our state — and its vibrant people — backward.
**We can’t let that happen.**
As your next governor, I will fight fiercely to defend the dignity, rights, and safety of every LGBTQ+ person in New Mexico — in every classroom, courtroom, and public space.
Because love is not up for debate. Because safety should not depend on your gender or who you love. Because our state is stronger when every person can live fully and authentically.
This campaign is about lifting up every New Mexican, no matter how you identify or who you love. It’s about standing together when it matters most.
[**If you're with me, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to fuel our movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250610_1_pride?amount=5&refcode=em20250610-2518&refcode2=2518_400544_zpnqEN&akid=2518%2E400544%2EzpnqEN)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250610_1_pride?amount=5&refcode=em20250610-2518&refcode2=2518_400544_zpnqEN&akid=2518%2E400544%2EzpnqEN)**
We will not back down. We will not let hatred win. And together, we will change the game for New Mexico.
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250610-1&t=2&refcode2=2518_400544_zpnqEN&akid=2518%2E400544%2EzpnqEN)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2518%2E400544%2EzpnqEN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2518%2E400544%2EzpnqEN)

clean_body: This campaign is about lifting up every New Mexican, no matter how you identify or who you love. Last weekend I marched with our LGBTQ+ family in the Albuquerque Pride Parade. We marched and celebrated love and our LGBTQ+ community. This weekend we were surrounded by rainbow flags, love, and pride. Our LGBTQ+ community is vibrant and beautiful. But right now, that community is under attack. Across the country, far-right extremists are pushing hateful policies to erase LGBTQ+ people from schools and public spaces. And here in New Mexico, those same forces would love nothing more than to drag our state — and its vibrant people — backward. We can’t let that happen. As your next governor, I will fight fiercely to defend the dignity, rights, and safety of every LGBTQ+ person in New Mexico — in every classroom, courtroom, and public space. Because love is not up for debate. Because safety should not depend on your gender or who you love. Because our state is stronger when every person can live fully and authentically. This campaign is about lifting up every New Mexican, no matter how you identify or who you love. It’s about standing together when it matters most. We will not back down. We will not let hatred win. And together, we will change the game for New Mexico. Be fierce, Deb

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: This Saturday: No Kings protests nationwide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Join me and people across the country this Saturday. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWbyb5YFBiph8NikPHSqNMcp3igbu3zaMPpuPRZXggsyNDNP-8nIYnghhVFFr81SdWGANndKcCdLduFMF_qv5JtuULOjH7WLtLOpFPnC0dJSXDMGQJXKeBp5QK1Rwnf6ahmHPbSh2Giy5npzKUB-h9Kp4beXxbPE3K5XwUE7DQIIPQpk_nt8xxnAja0o_3xwRe/4h8/FjeCXb4IQr2kVFObOMw6IQ/h0/h001.9mUT_-KUdA7DMPKASRErzGh72mXG01V_M7dLiq-Q5no)

Friend, The Authoritarian in Chief is attacking our communities, including terrorizing families with mass deportations and sending the National Guard and U.S. Marines to assault protesters. But people are rising up to protect our rights and our neighbors—and to resist fascism. **This Saturday, there will be more than 2,000 “No Kings” rallies in every single state across the country to protest Trump’s billionaire government and reject authoritarianism.** [**Click here to find a rally near you and make your voice heard this Saturday!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRk69K3J2CF3YV_JCDdJw3jbgJtZe1KN5vU2IH_3N3en/4h8/FjeCXb4IQr2kVFObOMw6IQ/h1/h001.sf3QETLGYkXByYN8tTviddlAEPYE_T4BEYVaksZGp_U) And if you’re interested, the ACLU is [hosting a virtual Know Your Rights training tonight](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoU1wXkexa3tCwa87JchHBgEypyYgvM-b1o3b4BCWqH66YGnAof9mbyfV4rYVXIsJxow3ieSuG_OoybhRTSoIy7f5p0Jl2xExnVwkrtBq85EgwYgC9BeYYt1OWXrp_etsI1Mz5gcnaVM8FvD6kYy_FTLOzn94AX_AyMicHtuwHsHkmlf7GErnK1_RsCRzBLhTfglZt5g42IXapOyaJTNGZyl7rm20_tr8PIeVWPw0B1-QrKiDhJ-DrKDhZPTK3Sk_GCymGetS-MSd7UBVCPsiLm-3og9leDyvfYtaQQZ6XdqxG3Vh88qekT51L751QJej2g/4h8/FjeCXb4IQr2kVFObOMw6IQ/h2/h001.4gR_6NuJdLBIwQx4dyzeaEA7lNfP90rI7Hu-AApdjXI) at 7 pm ET to prepare for Saturday’s protests. **Right now, Trump is using the National Guard to silence peaceful protesters** ―unleashing attacks and dangerously escalating the situation in Los Angeles. He has done this without the consent of Governor Newsom or Mayor Bass. Sending in the military to brutalize U.S. protesters is an abuse of power and evidence of our country’s descent into fascism. Legal experts are sounding the alarm that Trump’s latest actions (using Title 10 to override state authority) violate the Constitution as well as the Posse Comitatus Act, which blocks the military from acting as a police force against civilians. **He’s acting like a king, but we’re not staying silent.** As Anabel Mendoza of United We Dream Action said:
> _“_** _What we witnessed in LA over the weekend is proof that Americans of all backgrounds are coming together to boldly and courageously reject ICE’s cruelty._**_We, the people, will not stay silent nor retreat into fear as thousands of armed agents and National Guard soldiers descend onto our cities to terrorize our neighbors and loved ones. Our cities, workplaces and neighborhoods are all made stronger because of immigrants._**_Our nation depends on the power of everyday people, and we will all come together to defend one another._**_”_
[**Click here to join me and everyday people across the country this Saturday to defend our communities and our rights, saying: no kings, no dictators or tyrants, and no fascism!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRk69K3J2CF3YV_JCDdJw3jbgJtZe1KN5vU2IH_3N3en/4h8/FjeCXb4IQr2kVFObOMw6IQ/h3/h001.WLTT9dKAGCxwKFjjnU5Mcv4OmbSWfah8H2JBb-sda7A) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRk69K3J2CF3YV_JCDdJw3jbgJtZe1KN5vU2IH_3N3en/4h8/FjeCXb4IQr2kVFObOMw6IQ/h4/h001.Zt9MfhOS5N7XJLsrYlFj4hron_xCzTOYXLR6LUAWdTw) Together, we’re demanding a multiracial democracy where all of us can thrive, with equity and safety for all. In solidarity, Rashida [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtjzbjFBpR7JpBHI31l9kbTssL2iCd_LDl88OA1cO_uPZTh_4qb-dDV4KslVIGGFBujVjmJoDIdQpVfEI7JYwmuOaqYwQWwH4NioLV_HdaMiCb-EB_FojNWjEuXF6EHFx1ErXScoK66X_NJTUPIaxAyEBWGiA51KUxOWSlgidT013g4lDmvf2XqsTd8RiiGBSV_-RMcoeXc1IAbA9TBnTMv-PWabKDHT8gW7Lbu-Xv_hjfGPEstJyle4NUPZsEbTWr85In8HSxcrZpy2znQVVXXGtCE4hSQlLCJNvBA5pRf5K5GGv1QZQAA3SGFRR4JKj3mi-HG0LyuKmgfSrmaSQ0U61qBiRwyU0FvslE8AOm0uiZhyB8bZTWZgpQU4ul2gKw/4h8/FjeCXb4IQr2kVFObOMw6IQ/h5/h001.HiENBfUpQidSQKapO2g1iFI-nprAvdUi7Zbt6UqbYm8)

name: Brad Finstad
subject: I’m Working to End Federal Perks for Sanctuary Cities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, I have great news to share: the U.S. House recently passed my Save SBA from Sanctuary Cities Act—a major win for taxpayers and small business owners across the country. I introduced this bill because I believe your tax dollars should support communities that respect the rule of law—not sanctuary cities that actively defy federal immigration enforcement. Here’s what the bill does: ✅ It requires the Small Business Administration to relocate its offices out of sanctuary jurisdictions, ensuring federal resources are placed in communities that uphold federal law. ✅ It sends a clear message that cities can’t expect federal perks while ignoring our nation's laws. ✅ And most importantly—it puts hardworking small business owners and law-abiding citizens first. This is about fairness, safety, and standing up for what’s right. I’m not afraid to take the heat on this issue because I know where Minnesotans stand. Now the fight moves to the Senate and I’m not backing down! If you believe in upholding the rule of law, protecting our communities, and standing up to the radical sanctuary city agenda, I need your help to keep the momentum going. 👉[Chip in today to help us win this fight.](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?) And if you haven’t already, follow me for updates as we take this fight all the way:
👉[ Facebook](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?)
👉[X/Twitter](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?) Thanks for standing with me, Brad Finstad

name: Mark Warner
subject: a quick note one week out from the primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109347715/550805911/906044162?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_OneWeek_250610_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2JjYzkyNC00YjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JBnfKGRIxlTr7uvLrONXzN6yfCQxhGbE7b3eKaKXSP4=) Virginia’s primary election is just one week away, Derek.

Then this fall, voters will decide whether to expand our razor-thin Democratic majority in the legislature and flip the Governorship from Republican to Democratic.

I could give you a list of Democratic candidates I believe deserve your support – frankly, there’s a lot of them, Derek.

Instead, I simply want to say that **these results will have far reaching consequences for the Commonwealth.**

Think about it: Trump is actively trying to hand over Virginia’s economy to his billionaire allies. He’s driven up unemployment, fired thousands of federal workers, and he continues to put Virginians' livelihoods at risk, all while cutting taxes for the wealthiest Americans.

While I lead the fight in Washington to hold him accountable for his chaos and corruption, I know I can count on my fellow Democrats in Virginia to do the same. But that fight would change dramatically if Republicans gain more control of the Commonwealth and defeat me next year.

**The very last thing we need is for Trump to buy his allies even more power in Virginia and Washington.**

[_**So I’m asking: will you pitch in to my reelection campaign today to keep Virginia blue and protect my Senate seat so we can keep up the fight to hold the Trump administration accountable?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109347716/550805912/906044162?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_OneWeek_250610_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2JjYzkyNC00YjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JBnfKGRIxlTr7uvLrONXzN6yfCQxhGbE7b3eKaKXSP4=) He’s driven up unemployment, fired thousands of federal workers, and he continues to put Virginians' livelihoods at risk, all while cutting taxes for the wealthiest Americans. While I lead the fight in Washington to hold him accountable for his chaos and corruption, I know I can count on my fellow Democrats in Virginia to do the same. But that fight would change dramatically if Republicans gain more control of the Commonwealth and defeat me next year. The very last thing we need is for Trump to buy his allies even more power in Virginia and Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The fight continues, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

| The math is simple: we need three more seats to take back the House, and **we have three competitive seats we can flip in 2026 right here in Michigan.**

That’s why this weekend, I launched my _**Majorities are Made in Michigan**_ fundraising tour. I’m going all over to help fundraise for a Democratic majority in 2026.
---
| [SUPPORT HILLARY ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109348047/550807055/-15287749?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-06-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzczODk1Yy00ZDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpoqfegRonXr1xMW9KirtamigP2FB6RUnBtoxJBohYU=)

When I took a stand and left Trump’s DOJ in 2017, I really thought that we would quickly right our ship and get back on a pro-democracy course with the next election. It turns out, the moment we find ourselves in has a deeper hold on this country than many of us thought. Each of us must ask ourselves, what will we do in this moment? How will we respond, and what will we do to help not only chart a new course but also ensure that we arrive safely at the destination?

I know what I’m doing. Not only did I leave a successful career that I loved to serve my country and my community in Congress, but now that I’ve won and helped secure my first re-election, I’m helping others do the same.

[_**But I can’t do it alone. If you’re tired of the do-nothing doom scrolling and you’re ready to take action, please join me in helping build a majority that can do what I did. Each of you has the power to change this election, $5, $10, $25 at a time. * * *
**by Brett Di Resta**
After five long months of navel-gazing, Democrats are finally looking up and realizing that they need to expand the playing field in order to retake the U.S. Senate. Believe it or not, some guy named John Thune is currently the Majority Leader (He's the South Dakota Republican who hasn't murdered a dog).
Democrats need to win 4 seats, while holding all of their own, to return Thune to the back benches. Or before Republicans in the chamber decide to give Moscow Mitch McConnell one last chance by hooking him up Evil-Emperor-style to a machine that gives him a transfusion. Not of blood, but additional Exxon donations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17ddfa1b-b6b4-4b81-96df-0f92ef9f34ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
To rid themselves of McConnell (retiring) and Thune, there are a few obvious places to start for Democrats. First and foremost, they need to finally send Susan "I'm sure Trump learned his lesson this time" Collins packing.
Democrats will also be targeting the North Carolina seat that Senator Thom Tillis holds. For both races, the hope is that former popular Democratic Governors in each state will challenge the two (That's Janet Mills in Maine and Roy Cooper in North Carolina).
Beyond those two races, the general consensus is that the pickings are slim for Democrats in upcoming Senate races. Not that the general consensus isn't sometimes worth what you can find in barns across Iowa farms, but it's a good barometer.
And, recent events, combined with the electoral history of Iowa Senator Joni Ernst, should be enough to change that conventional wisdom. And see Democrats make winning this seat as a priority.
Ernst rocketed into the public consciousness with an ad in which she bragged about her ability to castrate hogs. Yes, I'm not kidding. While I didn't see the appeal, many Iowans did, and she defeated Democratic Congressman Bruce Braley in 2014.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b93f9e2c-0034-46d5-9327-4fb569175990?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
That year was catastrophic for Democrats, as Republicans won 9 Senate seats to retake the Senate, and a lot more than that in various races across the country. In this big Republican year, Ernst defeated Braley 52-43, a comfortable win but not an overwhelming defeat considering the tidal wave Republicans rode.
You could call her win a bit truncated. Compared to the victories of other Republicans.
Flash forward 6 years, and Ernst was up for re-election against a relatively unknown opponent, Theresa Greenfield. Ernst won the seat 51.8% to 45.2%. At the same time, [Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/897d3e26-ea10-42ed-83fb-33401631a0a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) carried Iowa by a wider margin during his unsuccessful reelection campaign, 53-45.
`Independent Media For $1.32/Week!`

Again, Ernst won by a decent margin, but some of her margin was lopped off, and she wont by less than she had in 2014--and with a relatively low percentage. Despite running in a red wave in 2014 and with Trump on the ticket in 2020, Ernst could never top 52% of the vote. The sign of a strong candidate this is not.
While it is too early to predict the make-up of the electorate in 26, it will almost certainly be bluer than in 2014, and better with Trump not on the ballot. That should have already put the seat on the radar of Democrats trying to win back the Senate by carving out new territory.
But what should really motivate Democrats is [the absolute slicing of Ernt's image the last year has been](https://substack.com/redirect/bb1ba6be-1d7a-4517-86ed-ed072e943d9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In December, Ernst took considerable flak from the Right for her initial reluctance to support Secretary of Defense nominee Pete Hegseth.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/91baaece-e045-4881-94f5-2bd771f1a0bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yet, Ernst quickly folded, neutered by talk of a GOP primary. Just as undoubtedly, some MAGA mouth-breathers won't forgive her initial reluctance to support the keg-stand in human form who wanted to run the Pentagon, while her eventual capitulation angered women and veterans, among many others.
Then, in March, Ernst faced scrutiny for an alleged romance with a General who lobbied her office. The General saw his ranking diced, as he was ended up being demoted for his actions.
Despite the reports, Ernst denied the affair, and the issue faded quickly (and, surely, the General must have been demoted because there was nothing there, right?).
If those incidents created the snippet of a challenge, Ernst's recent statement caused a full shearing. During a town hall with constituents, a member of the audience shouted [that GOP Medicaid cuts would cause people to die](https://substack.com/redirect/bb1ba6be-1d7a-4517-86ed-ed072e943d9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Ernst callously responded, "We all are going to die."
In true MAGA fashion, Ernst sought to double down on Her Stupid rather than apologize. She released a bizarre, sarcastic video defending the morbid comments she'd made. Some might call it a bit freaky (can someone ask Madison Cawthorn if there was blotter acid those parties he talked about?).
She even filmed it in a graveyard! (All testes of the buried remained intact, as far as we know). Her handling of the issue, which shouldn't be surprising, has been widely criticized, and it has only emboldened a challenger.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/61f1b52d-846d-42ab-90fc-bfab84dabd33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Make no mistake, any Democrat taking on this challenge will be a underdog to win this seat. Ernst is an incumbent, and the GOP will put up a massive fight with a whole lotta spending to hold onto it.
**But any dream of Democrats retaking the Senate requires Ernst to take an electoral whacking, if you will**. And a well-funded Democrat running an aggressive, smart campaign with, um...balls, will have a solid chance.
If all goes right, ole Joni may just end up on the chopping block and Democrats may have the majority we need to enable another key institution to defend democracy.
* * *
_Brett Di Resta is President of The Maccabee Group, a political research and communications firm, and an adjunct professor at George Washington University School of Political Management, as well as the University of San Francisco._

Peter,
Donald Trump is once again using chaos as cover.
While all eyes are on the escalating, unconstitutional military deployment in Los Angeles, Trump's team is using the distraction as cover to quietly pressure Texas to redraw its congressional maps ahead of the 2026 election to create 2-3 more Republican pick-up opportunities.
This is how democracies fall, Peter, with a manufactured crisis and a quiet power grab.
But Peter, while Trump and his team test the waters with this scheme, there's a real possibility it could backfire. It's a desperate gamble — and if Democrats rally like we did in 2018, we could flip the script and win even more seats .
Either way, GOTV PAC is already mobilizing: we're working to expose Trump's redistricting plot, getting out the vote (AND WINNING) in the most competitive races of 2025, and building the game plan needed to overcome their gerrymandering.
But we need your help to do it.
Will you chip in $25 right now to help us gear up against Trump's dirty tricks? A Democratic blue wave has begun and is gaining momentum in 2025. It is within reach — but the work has to start now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06102025&amount=25]

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109348622/550809440/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzM3Y2U5ZS00ZTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=imCCZrDnZbNWhZwN41ieN8WzLEmMXGxfr3sqTpqjnkc=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s border czar threatens legal action against California leaders** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109348623/550809441/1641447874?refcode=em-6.10.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzM3Y2U5ZS00ZTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=imCCZrDnZbNWhZwN41ieN8WzLEmMXGxfr3sqTpqjnkc=)
* * *
Things are escalating fast, friend. Trump’s border czar Tom Homan just threatened to arrest **California Governor Gavin Newsom and LA Mayor Karen Bass** for opposing Trump’s immigration crackdown. His words: **“I’d like to see them prosecuted.”** Here’s why: Newsom and Bass had the audacity to stand up for their constituents and question the deployment of 2,000 National Guard troops to target immigrant communities in LA. **Trump’s allies are talking about arresting elected officials for resisting his orders.** So much for being “the party of small government”. We know what this kind of federal overreach looks like. We’ve seen how Trump and his allies abuse authority to punish dissent and silence resistance. That’s why we work every day to elect Democratic Secretaries of State who will stand strong when democracy is under attack. [**If we’re going to hold the line, we need you with us. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: They’re airing an ad about a vote I didn’t take.
body:
|
#
Folks, I want to make sure you saw this latest headline from The Detroit News: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109348953/550810641/846650059?refcode=em-6.10.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTU4ZDYwNC01MDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yHUcAuKwEqQaypgM6URRPVIveiM9SftlQcnRXcpXKSs=)
**Conservative group spends big early against Democratic congresswoman**
_The conservative American Action Network has spent nearly half a million dollars running attack ads against Michigan's most vulnerable congresswoman, freshman U.S. Rep. Kristen McDonald Rivet, and is preparing to spend more on another ad campaign this month._
---
Republicans are spending over**half a million dollars** on ads flat-out lying about my record on Medicare, Social Security, and prescription drug prices. These are the very programs I’ve fought to protect for working families and seniors. As _The Detroit News_ writes, it’s “a remarkable amount to spend” at this point of the cycle.
**One ad even criticizes me for a bill that passed in 2022... _before I was elected to Congress._**
They’re doing this because I represent one of the most competitive seats in the country – a Trump-won district that we carried by 6 points.
And as _The Detroit News_ article said, right now is when this ad _“will have its strongest impact because it is not buried in a blizzard of campaign-year advertising.”_
**In other words: they’re spending now because they think they can define me before you hear the truth.**
These ads insult the intelligence of our constituents, and we simply aren’t buying it. They can spend all the money they want, but I will never vote to take money away from hard-working, mid-Michigan families and give it to the ultra wealthy.
[**I’m not going to back down, folks. But with this flood of dark money inundating our district, I need your support more than ever. Will you chip in $3 to help me fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109348954/550810642/846650059?refcode=em-6.10.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTU4ZDYwNC01MDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yHUcAuKwEqQaypgM6URRPVIveiM9SftlQcnRXcpXKSs=)

name: Tobias Read
subject: The values that guide me:
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250610em-values [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250610em-values]
Hi, folks. It’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
People often ask me why I still send out fundraising emails even though I was just elected. Trust me – asking for money is not my favorite part of being a candidate.
Here’s the bottom line: I love my job and I’m proud of the work we have done in the Secretary of State’s office. But even though the election is behind us, the work of building a strong, effective campaign never really stops. Maintaining a campaign apparatus is crucial in modern politics. Without it, I’d be vulnerable to a challenger. Raising money also allows me to build stronger alliances across Oregon and to support organizations and candidates who will fight to protect our democracy.
Most importantly, it allows me to maintain a consistent and aggressive communication structure with Oregon residents about what I’m doing to uplift our democracy and help make Oregon's government more accountable to voters.
To support my campaign, please consider pitching in $25 or more. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250610em-values]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250610em-values]
The principles that guide my time in office are the same ones that guided me during the campaign.
Democracy. The rule of law. Public service. Fairness and equality.
So when it comes to standing up to MAGA extremism and President Donald Trump’s illegal actions, it’s never a question of whether I’ll bow to political pressure.
I’ll choose my values and the bedrock principles of American democracy every time.
But as our country faces unprecedented challenges, I need your help to continue defending Oregon’s elections. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250610em-values]
I also wanted to share a quick update. I recently had the honor of sitting down with Southern Oregon’s Jefferson Public Radio to discuss the work that my office has been doing over the past few months.
You can listen to what I had to say by clicking on this link. [https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read]
And then, if you’re able, chip in $10 (or whatever you can spare) to help my campaign stay strong in the face of these unprecedented attacks on our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250610em-values]
https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read [https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250610em-values [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250610em-values]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250610em-values]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

subject: Trump turned Fort Bragg into a campaign stop — and Tillis stood by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**

|

Peter, Donald Trump came to North Carolina under the guise of celebrating the U.S. Army’s 250th birthday. But instead of just honoring our troops, he turned the celebration into a political spectacle — attacking Democrats and pushing a hyper-partisan agenda. **And as usual, Senator Thom Tillis stood by and said nothing. ** This is exactly the kind of performative partisanship that North Carolinians are sick and tired of. It’s divisive. It’s disrespectful. And it does nothing to solve real problems. Wiley Nickel is running for Senate to change that — to rise above the toxic partisanship and deliver results for the people of North Carolina. But let’s be honest: defeating an entrenched Republican like Thom Tillis won’t be easy. The GOP is already pouring money into North Carolina to protect him. That’s why we’re building a grassroots movement — and why we need your support now. **[Will you chip in today to help Wiley Nickel defeat Thom Tillis and bring real leadership to the U.S. Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109349183/550811480/-648237359?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250610_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzQ1MzUwOC01MjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=07RHuYUHFeKkqkz_DCMbuoKmwXfYzyBLIO1x7wSCOls=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately:_ **** | | **[DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109349186/550811481/474294398?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250610_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzQ1MzUwOC01MjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=07RHuYUHFeKkqkz_DCMbuoKmwXfYzyBLIO1x7wSCOls=)**

name: OH, THE LIES!
subject: Trump’s Big Rip-Off Bill is a heist. Here’s what they don’t want you to know.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it's Isaiah Martin .
Donald Trump’s new “Big Beautiful Bill” is a flat-out scam. I call it what it really is: the Big Rip-Off Bill — and it’s the biggest heist in American history.
Here’s what’s really in it:
$4 trillion in tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy🛑
$900 billion in cuts to Medicaid and the ACA🛑
$230 billion slash from SNAP, the food assistance program that helps 1 in 8 Americans put food on the table—including 150,000 in TX-18 alone 🛑
11 million Americans projected to lose health insurance🛑
DACA recipients and legal immigrants locked out of care🛑
And yes — it adds $2.4 trillion to the national deficit🛑
All so Trump and his billionaire backers can line their pockets while everyday people in Houston and across the country lose coverage , pay more , and get nothing in return .
Republicans knew what they were voting for. They’re just scared that you’re finally finding out.
I’m running for Congress to stop this kind of cruelty at the source. But I can’t do it without you.
We need to raise $10,000 before midnight this week to keep up the fight.
Can you chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can to help us fight back?

body:

| Peter, we’re taking our youth organizing program to the next level!

This summer, we’re hiring our largest class of paid youth organizers EVER. This is truly a testament to the undeniable STRENGTH of our youth-powered grassroots movement.

**The math is simple: If we hire MORE student fellows, we can knock MORE doors, reach MORE young voters, and secure MORE progressive wins against fascism in Florida and beyond.**

So if you’re as fired up as I am, I have to ask: [**_Peter, will you donate $27 to support our largest class of summer organizing fellows yet? Every dollar goes directly towards growing our field program and developing the next generation of organizers!_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/90gViyyWrLvbs-Srna12Fw~~/AAPPABA~/DJc81NNGYgoOHvCbfcDDxvQM_VX26WBYmCmlmdAsRouNWaXKBEtRYei_KjpXxQN59fyZXACDj_i2m-A0gehMCUVkqVvretpoR91Ev4k-KpVPXnB7C0CvVNv3MAncmzGzdttwRNWEDQOpgB6NF_YhbqYk1ZObxqoGerP5MiSkzolrrgoSw_sj5fiKTgRPIecfyWPOHhYZ1C7TFUt3_AcXQUxCL4VMeKDfOVhQ9WUg_LMC5z-t6J5kah1wp_FjUezdRDRPUiKS5tfLNzutQDCK8EK3IOT-KUNKRqDSN7i0epkCSaPOE_SFf6eJGscZsm2AG2rI_DvbNh3vQuqJUsUE0LsQM5oQBPdUf7ao6F3MD0E~) Peter, for young people in Florida and across the country, the stakes are higher than ever.

Our youth are constantly being attacked by fascist policies. They’re seeing budget cuts for healthcare, education and other essential services. **And at the same time, they’re witnessing the largest transfer of wealth from young to old people in American history.**

It’s crucial that we bring as many of them as possible into our youth-powered movement. We need to connect with them, and show them a way _forward_ – before the far right indoctrinates them with lies.

Peter, that’s why our team of paid student fellows are organizing in the district, engaging with community members and fighting so that no young person is left behind.

**Our youth-powered organizing program is the best chance we have at defeating fascism, but we need your grassroots support to level up our program as the summer starts.** [**_We have a goal to raise $12,693 to boost our summer organizing program. If just 471 people stepped up and donated $27, we’d hit our goal by midnight. name: Team Gottheimer
subject: have you voted yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Team, the polls are closing!

Have you voted yet?

Remember, if you’re in line to vote at 8 p.m., STAY IN LINE!!!If you voted, make sure to remind your friends, family, neighbors, and peers to vote! This election will set the tone for November’s election, and it’s critical that we nominate a Democrat who is ready to lower taxes and costs from Day 1.

Thank you for all of your support. We couldn’t do this without you.

Team Gottheimer
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. I’m James O’Keefe, and at OMG, we’ve gone where others won’t—deep into the shadows. We caught CIA operatives on hidden cameras, bragging about sabotaging President Trump, spilling secrets from DHS and DoD too. _The Federalist_ called it “**a bombshell that rocks the deep state** ,” and X users said “OMG’s doing God’s work.” It’s dangerous, it’s real, and it’s why I’ve got no life outside this mission.

The left’s tried to break me from the start. Jailed on trumped-up charges, my home raided by the FBI over Biden’s diary, lawsuits raining down—**they want me gone**.

But I’m still here, fighting for the truth, because you deserve to know what’s happening in those locked rooms.

[**OMG needs**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkzz-PnDAQBfBPYzqQPfhPKCiSoE1xUZQoRZQ0p1l72PWFwZyBXV0-fQRC21z7_LOfH_I0xP6tFe6TALjGMAsAUX8UAK-_75zXF376UoJkU77ab2y2U_h80Bs88OjxR_r689e_cf4zUzdepf3-dFMPvrxN9MBHaUWMcdhS1xWhrfsgdUGtcroxTaNdU1zbYJz0vqFzgDM59I1C22OvnLZSe_WhiC1IMNIqCbVRSlc9BeM9asSa0JMXWu49FTLl6FHNyx1zTokrn7gY2uuyTPP-sZOA00x-zVThSCEtmxBwSn-JemIKES85rdMW8aV8WUcqQ443Kico-VzuWNSndeHnOa3Zk6i7d1KA3cD23Mo7OBKPPGG8jKLu-CzAIqd1XETdgTnEQnm7AdI683zPqshtmO5xGOJsndDysg_dZt1a-B8AAP__BsyVeA)**[**$64,600 by July**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkzz-PnDAQBfBPYzqQPfhPKCiSoE1xUZQoRZQ0p1l72PWFwZyBXV0-fQRC21z7_LOfH_I0xP6tFe6TALjGMAsAUX8UAK-_75zXF376UoJkU77ab2y2U_h80Bs88OjxR_r689e_cf4zUzdepf3-dFMPvrxN9MBHaUWMcdhS1xWhrfsgdUGtcroxTaNdU1zbYJz0vqFzgDM59I1C22OvnLZSe_WhiC1IMNIqCbVRSlc9BeM9asSa0JMXWu49FTLl6FHNyx1zTokrn7gY2uuyTPP-sZOA00x-zVThSCEtmxBwSn-JemIKES85rdMW8aV8WUcqQ443Kico-VzuWNSndeHnOa3Zk6i7d1KA3cD23Mo7OBKPPGG8jKLu-CzAIqd1XETdgTnEQnm7AdI683zPqshtmO5xGOJsndDysg_dZt1a-B8AAP__BsyVeA)**[**to keep going, and I’m asking you to step up. People call OMG “relentless.” When we dropped the CIA tapes, it wasn’t just news—it was a reckoning. Supporters say we’re “the only ones with the guts to take on the spies.” Critics? They squawk about “ethics” while ignoring the rot we uncover. I don’t care about their noise. I care about the operatives I’ve heard, their casual treason on tape, and the fire it lights in me. But this fight’s expensive—legal battles, gear, risks—and we’re on the edge.

[**Your support keeps us digging.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkzz-PnDAQBfBPYzqQPfhPKCiSoE1xUZQoRZQ0p1l72PWFwZyBXV0-fQRC21z7_LOfH_I0xP6tFe6TALjGMAsAUX8UAK-_75zXF376UoJkU77ab2y2U_h80Bs88OjxR_r689e_cf4zUzdepf3-dFMPvrxN9MBHaUWMcdhS1xWhrfsgdUGtcroxTaNdU1zbYJz0vqFzgDM59I1C22OvnLZSe_WhiC1IMNIqCbVRSlc9BeM9asSa0JMXWu49FTLl6FHNyx1zTokrn7gY2uuyTPP-sZOA00x-zVThSCEtmxBwSn-JemIKES85rdMW8aV8WUcqQ443Kico-VzuWNSndeHnOa3Zk6i7d1KA3cD23Mo7OBKPPGG8jKLu-CzAIqd1XETdgTnEQnm7AdI683zPqshtmO5xGOJsndDysg_dZt1a-B8AAP__BsyVeA)

**[I’M BEING SUED BY GAVIN NEWSCUM!](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)**
Friend,
We made a great decision in sending the National Guard to deal with the violent, instigated riots in California. If we had not done so, Los Angeles would have been completely obliterated.
The very incompetent “Governor,” Gavin Newscum, and “Mayor,” Karen Bass, should be saying,_**“THANK YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP, YOU ARE SO WONDERFUL. WE WOULD BE NOTHING WITHOUT YOU, SIR.”**_
Instead, they choose to lie to the People of California and America by saying that we weren’t needed, and that these are “peaceful protests.” Just one look at the pictures and videos of the Violence and Destruction tells you all you have to know.
**NOW, GAVIN NEWSCUM IS SUING MY ADMINISTRATION!**
**Let me say this loud and clear: we will always do what is needed to keep our Citizens SAFE, so we can, together, MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
America needs LAW AND ORDER. You want it. You voted for it. I will deliver!
**_[If you support me on this mission to KEEP AMERICA SAFE, please chip in what you can and tell me right here right now that you STAND WITH DONALD TRUMP!>](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
We can’t let the Radical Lunatics win.
They want nothing more than OPEN BORDERS for everyone. Criminal after criminal will be unleashed on American soil if Democrats get their way.
First, this lawsuit. Next, they could **IMPEACH TRUMP.**
Well, I’ve got news for them: WE WILL NEVER SURRENDER!
**_[You’ve always stood by me. Please, at this very moment, I really do need you right now. Declare that you STAND WITH DONALD TRUMP to PROTECT AMERICA!>](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
May God Bless you,

Donald J. Trump
